E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 击败强敌，获取战利品
E: Defeat the formidable foe to obtain treasure

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。

C: 克劳克影业设计的沉浸式梦境游戏。\n玩家将会通过变身装置化身「哈努兄弟」，与邪恶的「石头老板」抗争，体验《钟表小子》动画中的卡通冒险。
E: An immersive dream game developed by Clock Studios.\nIn this game, players assume the role of the hero Hanu via a transformation device and engage in the animated world of Clockie, ultimately defeating the arch-villain named Boss Stone.

C: 出现在藏宝地的神秘人。为了确保寻宝的游客拥有良好体验，他们已经停留在这里太久太久，久到忘记了自己只是个演员。
E: The mysterious figures appearing in the treasure trove. To ensure that treasure-hunting visitors have a good experience, they have been staying here for far too long, so long that they have forgotten they are just actors.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 奥赫玛的信仰中心和政治枢纽，祭司们凝望着负世泰坦，元老们在圆形会场中辩论不休。
E: The spiritual and political center of Okhema, where priests gaze upon the Worldbearing Titan, and Elders debate endlessly in the circular assembly hall.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 最强悍的野兽吞噬众生，最高明的猎手猎杀自我。
E: The mightiest beast devours all living things, while the most skillful hunter hunts oneself.

C: 来自「仲裁官」的试炼…为了「均衡」！
E: A trial from the Arbitrator... for Equilibrium!

C: 裂界将数百年前的时光一隅定格。不知道这座贴着封条的古宅在当时有着怎样的故事。
E: The Fragmentum copies a moment of time from hundreds of years ago. It is unknown what stories this ancient residence with seals had at that time.

C: 数千年前，某位龙尊在此导引古海之水掩覆玄根。自此罗浮持明族便身负守望建木之责。
E: A Vidyadhara High Elder from millennia ago commanded the waters of the ancient sea to engulf the Arbor's roots. The Luofu's Vidyadhara had been shouldering the duty of keeping watch over the Ambrosial Arbor ever since.

C: 鲜有人经历过被卷入他人记忆的奇异事件；更鲜有人找到了离开的路。
E: Very few people would have experienced the fantastical event of becoming entangled in another's memory. Even fewer are those who have found a way out of it.

C: 雅努斯火种的保藏地，世间所有门径的终点，命运的起始与归处。
E: The repository of Janus' Coreflame, the endpoint of all worldly paths, where destiny begins and ultimately returns.

C: 曾是通往王宫宝库的甬道，宝库中剩余的珍品已被逐火军全数取出，慷慨地分享给梦中的宾客。
E: Once a passage to the palace treasury, all remaining treasures within have been retrieved by the Flame-Chase Army and generously shared with guests in the dream.

C: 权杖的内核层，因不知名的能量污染，早已破败不堪。在这里，「智识」已然沉寂，「记忆」也黯淡无光，周遭唯有被「毁灭」浸染的数据废墟。
E: The kernel of the Scepter, contaminated by an unknown energy, has long fallen into decay. Here, Erudition lies dormant, Remembrance has dimmed, and only data ruins steeped in Destruction remain in the surroundings.

C: 解开特殊谜题后可发现隐藏的战利品。
E: Hidden treasures can be found after solving the special puzzle.

C: 地底的流浪者在炉心竖井周围自发形成了聚落。在这里，人机关系尚且还能称为和睦。
E: Vagrants from the underground have formed settlements around the Furnace Core of their own accord. This is the only place in the underground where a rapport between humans and robots can be seen.

C: 全宇宙最（不）神秘的办公室。
E: The most (un)mysterious office in the universe.

C: 罗浮仙舟上为数众多的聚居洞天之一，名唤「长乐」，人们百年一日安居于此。可世上真有长乐无忧之地？
E: One of the many residential delves on the Xianzhou Luofu. People live here peacefully for centuries at a time. Does it really provide personal exaltation as its name suggests?

C: 根据客户的需求特别定制的运单。完成指定客制运单，赢得合作商铺信任。
E: Customized delivery orders tailored according to the needs of customers. Complete the specified custom orders to win the trust of partner stores.

C: 能瞭望府邸全景的大树，折纸小鸟的聚集地之一。
E: A great tree capable of overlooking the entire residence. A place where Origami Birds gather.

E: Treasure

C:
我是「枘凿六合」秘密结社，通称魔方秘社，的社长。

您知道「枘凿六合」吗？

我曾经向无数的人提出这样的问题。被问到的人，从此开始了解「枘凿六合」，并且被「枘凿六合」拯救，被「枘凿六合」感动，被「枘凿六合」鼓励。

工造司有着数不胜数的杰作，但是从来没有一件作品能够象征工匠们的巧思与构造，直到「枘凿六合」的出现，彻底改变了现状。「枘凿六合」对我们来说，就是匠心，也是「创造一切的初心」。人有了这样的匠心，才能踏上大师之路。我们还在旅途中，就一定会有快乐和痛苦，但只要有「枘凿六合」在，我们就能对未来充满希望，微笑着活下去。

我等秘社的目标是，通过「枘凿六合」，让全世界的人都能收获意想不到的乐趣和感动，始终对生活充满了好奇与欣喜。

魔方秘社敬上。
E:
I am the president of the Hexanexus secret society. We are called the Hex Club.

"Have you heard of the Hexanexus?"

I have posed this question to countless people. Those I asked eventually began to learn about it, were saved by it, were moved by it, and became inspired by it.

There are innumerable masterpieces in the Artisanship Commission, but never has there been a pièce de résistance that symbolizes the artistry and workmanship of craftsmen — until the Hexanexus disrupted the status quo. To us, the Hexanexus represents the heart and soul of craft masters, and the original intent of creation. Only with such a soul can one begin their first step on the path to mastery. We who still walk the path will inevitably experience joy and sorrow, but as long as the Hexanexus exists, we can look at the future with hope and smiles.

Our society's goal is to spread unforeseen joy and passion to all the people in the world through the Hexanexus, to fill life with curiosity and euphoria.

With Utmost Respect,
The Hex Club

C: 从黑潮中诞生的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。\n手握携带诅咒的弓箭，能够在射击中同时捕捉多个方向的目标。任何出现在它视野中的活物，都无法回避被箭矢瞄准的绝境。

E: In order to prevent antiparticles from dissipating and annihilating normal matter, the Antimatter Legion created two types of miniature ion traps for transportation, collectively referred to as Baryons and Antibaryons.\nAntibaryons have basic intelligence, and can clear the path according to the commands and summons of Voidrangers on the battlefield.

C: 惊梦剧团的发条暴徒
E: Dreamjolt Troupe's Winder Goon

C: 反重子
E: Antibaryon

C: 赛飞儿
E: Cipher

C: 加拉赫
E: Gallagher

C: 道奇
E: Dodge

C: 惊魂未定的矿工
E: Frightened Miner

C: 神秘的女孩
E: Mysterious Girl

C: 捷德
E: Geed

C: 梦茗
E: Mengming

C: 愚致思
E: Poseman

C: 艾丽
E: Alley

C: 奎茵
E: Quinn

C: 艾丽卡
E: Erica

C: 元老凯妮斯
E: Elder Caenis

C: 波瑟芬妮
E: Possephone

C: 十敌
E: Yourdei

C: 巴列维
E: Balaway

C: 哭泣的孩子
E: Crying Kid

C: 神情紧张的小姑娘
E: Nervous Girl

C: 仙舟的观光客
E: Tourist of Xianzhou

C: 玩具商
E: Toy Merchant

C: 侍者
E: Attendant

C: 奇怪的皮皮西
E: Strange Pepeshi

C: 餐厅老板
E: Restaurant Owner

C: 狡猾的教官
E: Cunning Drillmaster

C: 「传谕梦母」
E: "Oracle Dreammother"

C: 热恋中的爱侣
E: Love Birds

C: 祭司
E: Priest

C: 维修科员
E: Maintenance Staff

C: 博识学会学士
E: Intelligentsia Guild Member

C: 奥赫玛的信仰中心和政治枢纽，祭司们凝望着负世泰坦，元老们在圆形会场中辩论不休。
E: The spiritual and political center of Okhema, where priests gaze upon the Worldbearing Titan, and Elders debate endlessly in the circular assembly hall.

C: 解开欧洛尼斯的谜题
E: Solve Oronyx's Puzzle

C: 「丰饶」，药师
E: Yaoshi the Abundance

C: 完成比赛并进入前#1名
E: Complete the race and place in the top #1

C: 你个可爱的！
E: You little fudger!

C: 怎么不收徒了？
E: Why aren't you taking in apprentices anymore?

C: 哪怕手中的瓶子开口和你说话了，砸碎它的时候也不必有心理负担！
E: Even if the bottle in your hand starts talking to you, there's no need for concern if you smash it!

C: 完成「银河之星」，记录莱斯利•迪恩的故事
E: Complete "Cosmic Star" and record Lesley Dean's story

C: 倾听筑梦师乔治的故事
E: Listening to the story of George the Dreamweaver

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 你跟随三月七和姬子，登上星穹列车，以「无名客」的身份开启星间旅行。列车缓缓开动，你出神地看向窗外，忽然一个声音叫住了你。
E: You boarded the Express with March 7th and Himeko, starting your journey across the stars as the Nameless. While the train began its departure, you stared blankly out the window until a voice unexpectedly addressed you.

C: 「现在，我赐给各位直视太阳的权利。」幕布拉开，星期日化身为「齐响诗班」多米尼克斯，展现神迹。
E: "I, now, permit you to gaze into the sun." The curtain lifted to show Sunday transformed into Dominicus of the Harmonious Choir, demonstrating miracles.

C: 来古士将你定格并放逐。刻律德菈与海瑟音尝试阻止来古士，却未能打断传送。「裁断命运的并非君主，而是…神明。」
E: Lygus froze you and cast you into exile. Cerydra and Hysilens tried to stop him, but failed to disrupt the teleportation. "What judges destiny is not the ruler, but gods."

C: 在风雪尽头，你们看到一座屹立于寒霜中的城市。杰帕德向你们问候：「欢迎来到『存护之城』——贝洛伯格。」
E: At the edge of the wind and snow, you saw a city standing in the cold. Gepard greeted you, "Welcome to Belobog — the City of Preservation."

C: 结束一天的探索后，你们来到歌德宾馆。丹恒觉得可可利亚在交流中的状态有些奇怪，并劝你早些休息，为明天的谈判养足精神。
E: After a day of exploration, you arrived at the Goethe Hotel. Dan Heng noted that Cocolia's demeanor during the conversation seemed strange and advised you to rest early to prepare for the negotiations tomorrow.

C: 奥列格赶来，称「地火」已清除机器人杂牌军。你们将寻找星核的诉求向其转述，奥列格称或许作为远古机器人的史瓦罗能知晓线索。
E: Oleg arrived and said that Wildfire had cleared out the robot troops. You relayed your intention to search for the Stellaron, and Oleg suggested that Svarog, an ancient robot, might hold some clues.

C: 你们来到「长乐天」。符玄卜卦，称太卜司受星核作祟，今日不可直达。符玄指派一位门人等候，待太卜司整顿完成，便接引你们前去。
E: You arrived at the Exalting Sanctum. Fu Xuan made a divination and declared that the Divination Commission was affected by the Stellaron and could not be reached today. Fu Xuan asked for a disciple to wait for you, and will come to fetch you there once the Divination Commission has been cleaned up.

C: 景元在战斗中身负重伤，与丹恒合力击败幻胧。封印星核的工作尚需时日，好在幻胧短期内不会再有能力兴风作浪。
E: Jing Yuan suffered severe wounds during battle, but successfully defeated Phantylia with Dan Heng. Sealing the Stellaron still required time, but thankfully, Phantylia would not have the power to wreak havoc again within the near future.

C: 你们来到迴星港，将弓送给驭空。久经行伍的驭空称停云是她另一种意义上的「战友」，共同率领商团为仙舟恢复生机。
E: You arrived at Stargazer Navalia and gave the bow to Yukong. Having long been in the military, Yukong said that Tingyun was also a comrade-in-arms in another way, one who led the merchant guild to create an opportunity for Xianzhou to recover itself.

C: 流萤决意独自迎战，与列车组告别，奔赴注定的命运与战场。
E: Determined to fight alone, Firefly bid farewell to the Express Crew and headed toward her destined battlefield and fate.

C: 于冥界的出口，你想回头再看一眼这片花海。一抹红色为你显现：<color=#ff3a3e>「不要回头，向前看。」</color>迷迷抓住你的手，带你重回人间。
E: At the entrance to the nether realm, you wanted to look back and see the sea of flowers one last time. Instead, a sea of crimson appeared in your mind's eye, repeating one thing over and over: <color=#ff3a3e>"Don't turn around. Keep looking forward."</color> With that, Mem took your hand and guided you back into the world of the living.

C: 在逐火旅途的尽头，所有人重逢于辽阔的星空下。在「开拓」的见证下，传唱「救世主」共通的名字，为世界写下结局吧。
E: At the end of the Flame-Chase Journey, everyone reunited beneath the vast starry sky. With the Trailblaze as witness, let the name shared by all Deliverers be sung, and write the finale of the world.

C: 面对决定星球命运的抉择，布洛妮娅委托你和三月七收集民意。与此同时，布洛妮娅会召集筑城者们商讨合同签署相关事宜。
E: Bronya faced a decision that would shape the future of the planet. She asked you and March 7th to gather the people's opinions while she convened with the Architects to deliberate the terms of the contract.

C: 一日训练结束，云璃与彦卿再次为谁的剑术更强而争执起来。椒丘来到花园中，亲眼验证罗浮与朱明两位剑士联手教学的流言。
E: After a day of training, Yunli and Yanqing once again argued over whose swordsmanship was superior. Jiaoqiu came to the garden to verify the rumors about the joint teaching sessions between the Luofu and Zhuming swordmasters.

C: 三月七与云璃、彦卿两位师父汇合。他们将直面呼雷，与之死斗。演武仪典的「猎狼守擂」正式开始。
E: March 7th reunited with Yunli and Yanqing. They would face Hoolay in a fight to the death. The Wardance's Wolfhunt Showdown officially began.

C: 岁阳「阿灼」蛊惑白露继续玩耍。为了救回白露，你们需要追上逃跑的她。
E: The heliobus Luxie enticed Bailu to keep playing. To save Bailu, you had to pursue and catch her as she fled.

C: 在演练中，你与三月七成功抓到了虎克。虎克称这次不算，真正的捉迷藏从现在开始。
E: During the practice round, you and March 7th successfully found Hook. She declared it didn't count, and that the real game was starting.

C: 在会见驭空前，你与三月七、瓦尔特讨论局势。瓦尔特鼓励大家认真应对驭空的提问，尽可能获取仙舟的信任，以便后续行动。
E: Before the meeting with Yukong, you, March 7th, and Welt discussed the situation. Welt encouraged everyone to take Yukong's questions seriously and to earn the trust of the Xianzhou as much as possible, ensuring smoother actions moving forward.

C: 姬子称玉界门重新开启，各位无名客可重返列车。瓦尔特与丹恒先行返回，你与三月七则留下向仙舟的朋友们道别。
E: Himeko said that the Jade Gate had opened again, and all the Nameless could return to the Express. Welt and Dan Heng returned first, while you and March 7th stayed to bid farewell to all your friends in Xianzhou.

C: 桑博解释自己的出现，称因你的努力，雅利洛-VI得以与银河接轨。他说要带你们体验「大人的世界」。
E: Sampo explained his arrival, saying that Jarilo-VI had reconnected with the cosmos thanks to your efforts. He said he wanted to show you the "adult world."

C: 猎犬家系成员将你与流萤拦截，称前方是闲人免进的施工重地。守卫的言语中没有通融余地，或许你可以试着对他使用钟表把戏。
E: A Bloodhound Family Member halted you and Firefly. They said that the construction zone ahead is restricted and that there is no room for accommodation. Perhaps you can try using Clockwork on him.

C: 黄泉向你们袒露她来到此地的原因。得知你们与她目的一致，黄泉邀请你们结伴同行，她可以保护你与黑天鹅免受伤害。
E: Acheron revealed to you why she was here. Once you discovered that your goals were aligned, she invited you to press on as companions, so she could prevent harm from befalling you or Black Swan.

C: 你调查怪物残骸。残骸被某种利器洞穿，其外壳下的组织似乎在短时间内因高热而爆发性地尽数蒸发，看来这只怪物死于某种高热反应。
E: As you investigated the monster's remains, you found that it was pierced by an unknown weapon, revealing inner tissues that had been seemingly evaporated rapidly due to intense heat.

C: 如此一来，就不会有人再打扰了。黑天鹅要为你与黄泉表演一个小魔术。
E: As such, no one would disturb all of you now. Black Swan wanted to perform a little magic trick for you and Acheron.

C: 按照与砂金的约定，黑天鹅挑起黄泉与萨姆之间的争斗，趁机将你带到砂金面前。砂金称黄泉隐瞒了身份，她并非一位「巡海游侠」。
E: According to Aventurine's promise, Black Swan provoked Acheron to engage Sam in battle, and took the opportunity to bring you to him. Aventurine claimed that Acheron was hiding her identity and that she was not a "Galaxy Ranger."

C: 星期日遇到一位醉醺醺的宾客。他卖掉全部家当，只为加入匹诺康尼的美梦，觉得匹诺康尼大剧院比故乡的月亮更好看。
E: Sunday encountered a drunken guest who had sold off all his belongings just to join Penacony's dream. The guest claimed that the Penacony Grand Theater looked better than the moon of his homeland.

C: 黄泉推测家族阴谋，丹恒决心使用结盟玉兆，向罗浮求援，力挽局势。
E: Acheron speculated The Family's plots. Dan Heng was determined to use the jade abacus of allying oath to seek help from the Luofu to salvage the situation.

C: 你找到「折纸」娃娃，它请你把其他<unbreak>998</unbreak>个娃娃叫回「黄金花火大树」。至于虚数中子弹，恐怕你只能到别处看看了啾。
E: You found the "Origami" Doll, who asked you to call the other <unbreak>998</unbreak> dolls back to the "Golden Sparkle Tree." As for the imaginary neutron bomb, you would have to look elsewhere!

C: 在筑梦蕉师的设计课上，你们与乱破相遇。乱破请你们小心行事，称此地亦有邪祟出没，名为「课堂」的道场中定有诡诈。
E: In Dreamweaver BananAdvisor's design class, you encountered Rappa. She warned you to be careful, saying that fiendlings lurk in these parts, and there was bound to be trickery in this dojo called "classroom."

C: 筑梦蕉师鼓励你前去创作，别忘了它*蕉*给你的技巧！
E: The Dreamweaver BananAdvisor encouraged you to start creating, never forget to go bananas with the technique they taught you!

C: 波提欧与见过「真正睡蕉小猴」的人搭话。对方袒露出笑意，然后不再言语。
E: Boothill struck up a conversation with someone who had seen the True Slumbernana Monkey. The person revealed a smile, then fell silent.

C: 芮克先生意识到，乱破的忍者世界观是其能免疫模因污染的原因。芮克先生请你使用钟表把戏。将乱破的记忆「剪辑」到胶卷上。
E: Mr. Reca realized that Rappa's ninja worldview was what made him immune to memetic contamination. Mr. Reca asked you to use Clockwork to "edit" Rappa's memory onto the film.

C: 乱破将「超•忍•卷轴」喷漆罐交给你和丹恒，其中封装着乱破的记忆。只要将「忍者」模因投入梦境，就可以覆盖睡蕉小猴的影响。
E: Rappa handed the Super Ninja Scroll spray can to you and Dan Heng, which contained Rappa's memory. By injecting the Ninja memetic pattern into the dreamscape, you could override the Slumbernana Monkey's influence.

C: 波提欧忘却自身本领。 助蕉声称，所谓「智识」，是一种常人无法忍受的 ▇ ▇。失去它， 你也不会变得更加不幸。
E: Boothill forgot his own abilities. Assistanana claimed that "Erudition" was an ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇ that the average person couldn't bear. Losing it wouldn't make you any more miserable.

C: 星期日询问瓦尔特何为开拓，瓦尔特指出开拓的对象不限于世界，也包括活生生的人。并指出万维克同样为星期日的一部分。
E: Sunday asked Welt what Trailblaze is. Welt pointed out that the target of Trailblaze was not limited to worlds, but also living people. He also pointed out that Wonweek was similarly a part of Sunday.

C: 为保护神殿中的难民，<color=#f29e38ff>白厄</color>对来自天外的你们保持警惕。在<color=#f29e38ff>缇宝</color>的调解下，白厄向你们道歉，答应为丹恒修理兵器，并邀请你们同行。
E: To protect the temple refugees, <color=#f29e38ff>Phainon</color> kept his distance from you, as you were strangers from beyond the sky. Thanks to <color=#f29e38ff>Tribbie's</color> intervention, Phainon apologized, offered to repair Dan Heng's weapon, and invited you to join them.

C: 阿格莱雅察觉到跟踪自己的元老凯妮斯。凯妮斯扬言，阿格莱雅对圣城亲力亲为的管理已难以为继，元老院终会从黄金裔手中收回权力。
E: Aglaia sensed Elder Caenis was tailing her, who then declared that Aglaea's hands-on management of the holy city had reached its limit. Sooner or later, Caenis said, the Council of Elders would strip the Chrysos Heirs of their authority.

C: 万敌在高温浴池遇到三名悬锋幼童，向他们打听克拉特鲁斯的去向。孩子们为万敌指路，期待万敌在接过「纷争」火种后带领族人还乡。
E: At the hot bath, Mydei met three Kremnoan children. He asked them about Krateros's whereabouts. The children eagerly gave directions, hoping Mydei would lead their people home once he bore the Coreflame of "Strife."

C: 在没有「水」的情况下，你尝试以其他方法让水车转动起来。然而在遐蝶、迷迷以及「卡吕普索」的注视下，你的尝试以失败告终。
E: Without any water available, you tried other methods to get the waterwheel turning. However, under the watchful eyes of Castorice, Mem, and Calypso, your attempts ended in failure.

C: 你与遐蝶、那刻夏前往浴宫，却被卫兵拒之门外。卫兵称阿格莱雅无暇接待任何人，遐蝶尝试用通信石板与阿格莱雅联络。
E: Arriving at the bath chamber, you, Castorice, and Anaxa were blocked by guards. They claimed that Aglaea was too occupied to receive anyone. Castorice then attempted to contact her through the teleslate.

C: 一位商人于冥河边叫卖，称他的鱼不卖给活人。遐蝶认出其是未能安息的灵魂，因未知原因无法前往冥界。赛飞儿出现在斯缇科西亚。
E: A merchant hawking his wares by the River of Souls refused to sell fish to the living. Castorice recognized him as a dead soul that never achieved rest. She realized that, for some reason, they could not enter the nether realm. Cipher also showed up in Styxia.

C: 你完成了一处「电路」的修复。继续前进，去找另一边的算碑吧。
E: You repaired one "circuit," and continued onward to find the tablet on the other side.

C: 你们看到刻法勒的火种保存于半神议会中央。白厄认为必须将火种带回涡心，做好随时进行「再创世」的准备，以免黑潮彻底摧毁世界。
E: You saw at the center of the Demigod Council the Coreflame of Kephale. Phainon insisted on bringing it to the Vortex, and be ready to begin Era Nova in case the black tide destroyed the world.

C: 你与丹恒会合后，发现盗火行者因未知原因陷入一动不动的僵直中。你们与卫士一行人趁机逃离战场。
E: When you reunited with Dan Heng, you found the Flame Reaver somehow standing stiff and still. Wasting no time, you and the guards slipped away from the chaos.

C: 你在预约会议时遇到谜之科员「L」，他认为你应该像个英雄一样无拘无束，闯出一片天地。他还提到星穹列车来访，建议你过去看看。
E: You ran into mysterious researcher "L" when booking meetings. He believed you should be free and bold like a real hero, and make a name for yourself. He mentioned that the Astral Express had arrived and urged you to go check it out.

C: 来古士介绍，逐火的军团攻入斯缇科西亚，在此遭遇无数自冥河中浮现的海妖。你面前的地狱，就是那场战役的重现。
E: Lygus revealed how the Flame-Chase Army invaded Styxia and encountered endless sea sirens surging from the River of Souls. The hellscape before you was a reenactment of that very battle.

C: 投票形成平局，你的意见至关重要。你环顾四周，发现三月七不知所踪。姬子鼓励你把三月七找出来。
E: The vote had ended in a tie, and your opinion was crucial. You looked around and noticed that March 7th was nowhere to be seen. Himeko encouraged you to find her.

C: 黑天鹅阅读一组窃忆者的记忆，得知它们在此寻找<color=#f29e38ff>「记忆」的种子</color>。
E: Black Swan read the memories of a group of Memosnatchers and learned that they were searching for <color=#f29e38ff>the Seed of Remembrance</color>.

C: 昔涟讲述每一世的逐火之旅，其内容被权杖系统记录归档。「记忆的种子」从中学习，逐渐成长。
E: Cyrene recounted the Flame-Chase Journey of every lifetime, and its content was recorded and archived by the Scepter System. The "Seed of Memory" learned and gradually grew from this content.

C: 火种破碎，黑暗笼罩空间。愿望的起点是无边无际的黑暗，但只需要一点点光，孤独的世界就能被照亮。
E: The Coreflames shattered, and darkness engulfed the surrounding space. The wish was born from boundless darkness, but it only took a spark of light to illuminate a lonely world.

C: 你拜访娜塔莎提到的「特效药」受害者，得知她的丈夫与孩子都死于特效药导致的病情恶化。
E: You visited the victim of the "wonder medicine" mentioned by Natasha and learned that her husband and child had died due to their conditions worsening from taking the medicine.

C: 玲可与佩拉来到雪原。玲可称，雪会在入夜前越下越大，必须尽快找到一处合适的露营地。
E: Lynx and Pela arrived at the Snow Plains. Lynx said the snowfall would get heavier before nightfall, and they needed to find a suitable campsite quickly.

C: 彦卿发现一地残骸，于是召来谛听追踪线索，自己则一路随行。
E: Yanqing discovered a path riddled with remains and summoned Diting to track the clues while following along himself.

C: 彦卿想到犯人若要逃离，则必须依赖星槎，当即决定前往码头。
E: Yanqing reasoned that if the fugitive wanted to escape, they would need a starskiff. He decided to head to the dock immediately.

C: 虽然「孤云」被熔掉了，但怀炎早已备好另一把剑作为演武仪典奖品。云璃反思自己太过冲动，祖孙二人一同前往金人巷观礼纪念仪式。
E: Though Guyun was ultimately melted down, Huaiyan had already prepared a replacement sword as the prize for the Wardance Ceremony. Yunli reflected on her impulsiveness. The two of them then headed to the Aurum Alley to attend the commemorative ceremony.

C: 椒丘检查受伤逃犯的伤势，向其询问是否知晓此地位置。呼雷放任椒丘离开一事，令椒丘疑惑不解。
E: Jiaoqiu examined an injured fugitive's wounds and asked if they knew their current location. Hoolay's decision to let him leave left Jiaoqiu deeply puzzled.

C: 灵砂嗅到怪异的香味就在附近，麻烦丹恒寻找香炉。
E: Lingsha smelled a strange scent nearby and asked Dan Heng to find the incense burner.

C: 人流一分为二，流光溢彩的漆面反照着驻足者与垃圾桶的面影…都市，最好的地方，也是最坏的地方。
E: The crowd splits in two and the glossy, radiant paint reflects the faces of bystanders and trashcans... The city is both the best place and the worst place.

C: 公司的少年培训班到访白日梦酒店。作为匹诺康尼的股东，你被翡翠邀请去做一番讲话。孩子们脸上写满了期待，显然早已听过你的故事。\n「别紧张，说什么都可以。」翡翠对你悄声道，「在孩子眼里，你就是最好的范例。」
E: A group from the IPC youth training program is visiting The Reverie. As a shareholder of Penacony, you are invited by Jade to deliver a speech. The children are positively glowing with anticipation — Clearly, they have heard about you before.\n"Don't worry, you can say anything you want." Jade whispers to you. "To them, you're the perfect role model."

C: 你在长乐天的茶摊前遇见了椒丘，他偏头倾听街道的喧嚣，仿佛在回忆什么。\n「治病救人好似推石上山，最后都难免白费力气。飞霄将军想医好我这心病，但我偶尔还是会像这样慨叹一番…果然，尝不出味道的话，品茶也少了些意思。」
E: You run into Jiaoqiu by a tea stand near the Exalting Sanctum. Surrounded by the hustle and bustle of the city, he seems deep in thought.\n"To heal and save a life is not unlike pushing a boulder uphill — Both are futile efforts in the end. General Feixiao wishes to cure my despondent heart, but I still find myself lamenting from time to time... I knew it. Blandness takes away even the joy of having tea."

C: 知更鸟计划在流梦礁举办多场义演，你凑巧参与了其中一次。然而，总有人不希望演出一帆风顺：当歌曲进行到最高潮时，麦克风突然被掐断了，背景音乐也归于沉寂。观众们窃窃私语起来，难道演出就要泡汤了？
E: Robin plans to hold multiple charity concerts in the Dreamflux Reef, and you attend one by chance. However, there is always someone who wishes the performances to go south. Just as the setlist progresses toward the apex, the microphone goes offline, and the backing track also gets muted. Whispers arise from the audience, wondering if the performance will be canceled.

C: ……很幸运，浮黎有据可查的一次现身，恰好是星际和平公司创始人兼终身名誉董事路易斯•弗莱明的最后一次对外露面。因此，在公司的档案里，保存了星神出现到离开的完整录像。那时，老弗莱明正在致辞，宣布将永久隐居，不再出席一切正式或非正式活动。考虑到他那时的岁数，大概是活腻了吧。就在他话音还未落的时候，彩光突如霞照，令在场的人大惊失色。「记忆」浮黎像幽灵一样，仿佛从空气中凝结般，出现在路易斯•弗莱明的面前。象征「财富」的人类和代表「记忆」的星神短暂对视，可能说了什么，也可能没说，反正录像没有拍到。接着，浮黎消失了，路易斯•弗莱明转身走开，从此再没出现在世人的视线里。说真的，这老头子是我见过面对星神最镇定的人，就连螺丝咕姆见到博识尊的时候，机轴都会咯吱作响哩……
E: ...Fortunately, the one time that Fuli's arrival was recorded was the last public appearance of Louis Fleming, the founder and lifetime honorable Board member of the Interastral Peace Corporation. Therefore, the IPC's archives preserved the complete recording of the Aeon's manifestation from the start to the end. Old Fleming was giving a speech at the time and declaring he was going to permanently retire from all official and unofficial events. Given how old he was, he was probably tired of living. But just as he was finishing the speech, there was suddenly a rainbow-colored light that threw everyone into disarray. Like a wraith that appeared in thin air, Fuli the Remembrance had condensed into being before Louis Fleming. The human representing wealth and the Aeon representing remembrance briefly locked eyes with each other. Maybe they exchanged some words, or maybe they didn't — The recording didn't manage to catch that. Fuli then disappeared, and Louis Fleming turned and walked off the stage, never to be seen again. Seriously, out of everyone who had faced an Aeon, that old man was the calmest I've seen. Even Screwllum's gears squeaked when he saw Nous...

C: 第二次鲁珀特之乱后，公司一度计划对全宇宙的机械生命进行残酷的灭绝。所幸在该计划尚未通过之时，#76螺丝咕姆被博识尊选中加入天才俱乐部的消息传到了公司的耳中。为了向新的天才示好，公司制造了这台机械咕咕钟作为礼物。以如今的眼光看来，这礼物也太过平平无奇——但那可是一个机械生命遭到迫害的年代。机械咕咕钟的诞生本身，就是和平的象征。
E: After the Second Rubert Rebellion, the IPC had once planned a brutal extermination of all mechanical life across the Cosmos. Fortunately, before the plan was passed, the IPC heard that #76 Screwllum was selected by Nous to join the Genius Society. The IPC then made this mechanical cuckoo clock as a gift to appease the new genius. This gift is very unremarkable in today's view, but that was an era when mechanical beings were persecuted. The birth of the mechanical cuckoo clock itself is a symbol of peace.

C:
智慧一场思维游戏，人类天真地从沙砾里捡出好看的石头，自诩洞察了世界的真理。所谓知识的大厦，只是一堆零散的积木，任凭外人堆砌。

你曾见过无耻的学士，用金钱扳倒了驳斥的声音，于是他成为了人们口中的先知，造假的资料令研究滞缓了三个琥珀纪。你也见过超前的学者，根治顽疾的药物要了数万家星际医疗的老命，他们说他是疯子，把他关进了精神病房里。

既然如此，为何掌握积木的人不能是你？知识不过是一种假象，只要人们相信，蠕虫也能辩论过星间的神明。
E:
Intellect is a game of thinking. Humans naively pick out pretty rocks from a sandy beach and claim to have grasped the truth of the world. This so-called "mansion of knowledge" is nothing more than scattered building blocks that outsiders can stack as they please.

You once saw a shameless scholar who used money to pay off any voices that would refute the findings of his research, such that he became a prophet in the eyes of the people. His falsified materials slowed scientific research by three Amber Eras. You also once witnessed a true genius whose thinking preceded his time, and his great cure for incurable diseases destroyed the careers of thousands of interstellar medical practitioners. He was therefore regarded by these doctors as a lunatic and committed to an asylum.

If that is the case, why can't you be the person to hold the building blocks? Knowledge is no more than an illusion. As long as people believe, even a worm can win debates against the stellar gods.

C:
请务必小心那些狂信者，我在哈图西里的小路上窥见的怪物。
污浊的短剑上是发臭的血渍，摇曳的瞳孔里唯余空洞，
他们定是金血与黑雾的私生子，自诞生起便失了神智，
否则怎会结队成群，将生灵献祭给死亡？
他们妄言，尘世已成地狱，故人生而不幸福，
唯有西风尽头，遍开花朵之地，才是我们的归处。
当世间再无生命，所有的灵魂都会在死亡的神国里，
再度迎来不朽的黄金时代。
我不知道他们如今在何处，或许，
他们早已捷足先登，踏上了去往冥界的旅途。
E:
Beware of those fanatics, the monsters I caught a glimpse of on the trails of Hattusili.
Their grimy daggers are smeared with foul blood, and their unsteady eyes reflect only a void.
They are undoubtedly the unhallowed spawn of golden blood and dark mist, devoid of sanity since birth.
Otherwise, how could they assemble in crowds, sacrificing living beings to the realm of death?
They falsely declare that the mortal realm has turned into a hellscape, dooming all to a life of unhappiness from the moment of birth.
Our true sanctuary lies only in the land where flowers bloom at the end of the west wind.
When the last living being ceased to exist in this world, all souls will find within the divine realm of death
A return to the endless Golden Age.
I have no clue where they are now.
Perhaps they've already set sail on their voyage to the nether realm.

C: 兽群•贪饕灾厄
E: Beast Horde: Voracious Catastrophe

C: 这枚骰子的各面并不规则，内部有奇异的光彩肆意流转，传说封印着恐怖而不可名状的邪神，必须避免在无光的环境下与之接触。过去有人不相信上述传说，执意在黑暗中与骰子共处一室，却发现骰子自身的光华无法遮蔽。由此产生了著名的「闪耀偏方三八面骰悖论」：你没法证明没法证明的事情。
E: This die has irregular sides and a wondrous light that twirls unrestrained within it. It is said to be the seal of a horrible and indescribable evil god, and one must avoid contact with it in dark places at all costs. Some people did not believe in the above myth and insisted on staying in a dark room with the die, only to find that the light within the die itself cannot be blocked out. That is how the famous Shining Trapezohedron Die Paradox came to be — You cannot prove something that cannot be proven.

C: 「人会在何时变成机械？机械又会在何时变成人？」这一天机械时午后三点，侵入性「无效念头」准点步入机械城某位有机体的脑内。起初，他对自己脑内不受控制的想法束手无策，紧接着，他发现写下记录可以有效对抗「无效念头」带来的焦虑和空虚。于是他开始提笔，如同呕吐一样，将那些杂乱无章、毫无意义却聒噪难耐的念头倾泻而出，转化为一行行乱码——他最终引起了谜语人的注意。
E: "When will the human race become machines? And when will machines become human?" Following the machine era calendar, on this day at three in the afternoon, the invasive "Cognito Invalidater" entered the mind of a certain organic individual in the Mechanical City. At the start, he was helpless against the uncontrolled thoughts in his own mind. Then, he realized writing notes could help him effectively counter the anxiety and meaninglessness the "Cognito Invalidater" inflicted on him. So he began to write, spewing forth words, expelling the chaotic and incoherent noises in his head that remained deafening loud despite being bereft of substance. He produced lines and lines of error code. This eventually drew the Riddlers' attention.

C: 在宇宙风的吹拂下，风帆孤独地飘荡。这张铺陈在太空的机械网络原本是文贰星巨构发电机的核心组件，它捕捉恒星喷吐的带电粒子流，将之转化为传输向地表的能源。但一切都结束在了绝灭大君「焚风」到来的刹那，而后便是超新星爆炸的火光，直到光芒渐褪、军团离去，一无所有的尘埃中，只剩一朵残花述说着历史曾经存在。
E: The sail floats alone under the caress of the cosmic wind. This mechanical web laid out in space was originally the core component of Wen-II's giant generator. It captures the charged particle beams breathed out by stars and converts them to energy that is then transported to the planet. However, everything ended the moment the Lord Ravager Zephyro arrived. What followed was the fire of a supernova exploding. When the light faded and the Legion left, only a single broken flower showed that history once existed among the now-empty dust plains.

C: 在艾丝妲小姐家中，怪异且贵重的东西数不胜数，一条奄奄一息的小狗反而有些惹人注目。 更何况她哭得很伤心，当父母安慰着艾丝妲，说捡来的狗多半活不长，不如给她再买一条的时候，她哭得更大声了。 而那条脏兮兮的小狗只是躺在那，甚至没力气抬起头看一眼周围的人们。哭喊、争吵、沉默，这一切都和它无关。 他一度以为它已经停止了呼吸，因此蹲下身探了探它的鼻息。突然，小狗用舌头舔了舔他的手指，这是它力所能及之下，能触碰的最远距离。 ——它的舌头湿漉漉的。 「想玩电子飞盘么？」 无神的眼睛亮了起来。
E: There are countless strange and valuable things around Miss Asta's house, but it's the dog at death's door that attracts the most attention. What's more, her forlorn cries only increase in volume as her parents attempt to comfort her — telling her that this dog she picked up won't live for very long, and they are better off buying her another one. That filthy pup just lies there without the strength to even lift up its head and look around the people surround it. The crying, arguing, and the silence... None of this has anything to do with it. At one point, he thinks it had already stopped breathing, so he bends down to check its nose. Just then, the dog suddenly licks his fingers — which is about the farthest distance it can stretch. — Its tongue is wet. "Wanna play holodisc?" Its lifeless eyes suddenly light up.

C: 当艾丝妲年纪尚小，却已经开始自行挑选望远镜时，耳旁总隐隐约约传来长辈的赞叹。她对此颇为自豪，因为望远镜的主镜工艺、导星系统，她看一眼便知。 直到有一天她走近偷听时，才发觉他们只是在啧啧称奇，一个小姑娘居然能挑中如此昂贵的物件。 个人喜好在看客眼中并不存在，他们只愿意将她当作一个养尊处优的小姑娘而已。 「喜欢星星？噢我懂，小姑娘嘛，喜欢亮晶晶的东西。」 「嗯…我在研究恒星胚胎，希望有一天由我发现的星星，也能以我的名字命名…就像那些厉害的天文学家一样……」 「就这点小事？今年的生日礼物，就用你的名字给这颗星球命名吧？两颗也行，没多少钱。」 「……」 「喂，艾丝妲你去哪，艾丝妲！」
E: Back when she was still a child but was already picking out her own telescopes, Asta would always hear the faint murmurings of elders praising her. She was quite proud of this, because she could discern the quality of a telescope's primary mirror and autoguider with a mere glance. It wasn't until she drew within earshot one day that she learned they were actually tutting and tsking at her — how could such a little girl manage to pick out such expensive items? Personal hobbies don't exist in the eyes of these people. All they chose to see is a pampered little princess. "You like stars? Oh, I get it. You're a little girl. You all like sparkly things." "Yes... I'm researching protostars at the moment. I hope to name the stars I discover after myself... Just like those famous astronomers of old." "Is that all? Shall we name this planet after you for your next birthday? How about two planets? Those are actually quite cheap." "..." "Hey, where are you going, Asta? Asta!!!"

C: 从披上银鬃铁卫战服的一刻起，少女已经做好了一切觉悟。但她参加的第一场葬礼，情境之沉重仍然远超想象。 那是她第一次领军出战，在北方的废墟中，铁卫与裂界造物展开残酷的厮杀。少女带领十余名兵士孤军深入，奋勇作战直到弹尽粮绝。紧急撤离的途中，恐怖的裂界幻影向她发起了突袭——致命的攻击被一名列兵舍身挡下，她甚至来不及看清救命恩人的面庞。 葬礼的悠长号角声响起。年轻的戍卫官看出了少女的悲戚，来到她的身旁。 「棺木是空的。我甚至来不及把他带回贝洛伯格……」 「不要自责，布洛妮娅小姐。为你，为这座城市，这里的每个人都愿意做出同样的牺牲。」 「…我真希望自己能和他互换位置。」 「学会咽下这些沉重的念想，也是成为领袖的必经之路。」
E: From the moment she donned her Silvermane Guard armor, she was already prepared. But the first funeral she ever attended was still far more heavy than she could ever have imagined. It was her first time leading a campaign. In the northern ruins, the Silvermane Guards and Fragmentum monsters engaged in brutal combat. She led a crack squad of about a dozen soldiers deep behind enemy lines, fighting bravely until they ran out of ammo and food. As they made their way to the evac point, the terrifying Fragmentum creatures ambushed her — but the fatal attack was blocked by a brave private at the cost of his life. She didn't even have the time to see the face of her savior. The prolonged wail of the funeral horn rang out. The young captain saw her grief, and came to her side. "The coffin's empty. I couldn't even manage to bring him back to Belobog..." "Don't blame yourself, Miss Bronya. For you and the city... everyone here is willing to make the same sacrifice." "...I really wish I could swap places with him." "Learning to bear these heavy burdens is the only way to become a true leader."

C: 自素裳响应罗浮云骑前来已有些时日。她平日已铆足气力四处逻察，却也不见半点鼠窃狗盗之扰，引得她是又恼又气。末了便只好依旧修武习剑，闲时便去听人说书，日子过得是百无聊赖。 这日，她正伛在「不夜侯」案几上，待说书先生做些预备，听他好好道一道罗浮「云上五骁」。可不等惊堂木落下，那云骑同僚便破门而入，冲堂内喝道： 「素裳，快来！那化外民又在作乱惑众了！」 听罢呼喊，她一双眸子登时瞪得煞是圆亮，快步抄起重剑夺门而出。临得现场，很快瞧见一赤发女子又是吞剑、又是喷火，搅得人群欣快绝伦；不多时，这女子竟又欲使出青花岗石大板，决计来段「胸口碎大石」。 「住手！此地交通素来不畅，岂是你杂耍逗趣的地方！」素裳一声厉喝，当即双膂一沉，大开大合间将『轩辕』剑尖指向女子。女子见她提掣不稳，当下也不惊惶，旋即斜身踏步，将那三尺火棍舞得火星连连，骇厉十足。 「本姑娘就先走为敬了！」那赤红女子朗声道，顺手一挥，枪棒钝头直向素裳一对手腕袭去。素裳急忙退开半丈，却不料女子竟从皮囊中摸出几件浑圆物事，向地猛砸，熏烟火燎一时四散，爆裂炸响不绝于耳。待她半晌回了神，只见女子早没了身影： 「这是甚么…爆竹？！」 「这化外民…真是不容小觑啊！」
E: It has been some time since Sushang answered the call of the Luofu's Cloud Knights. She keeps herself busy patrolling the streets, but never runs into any criminal activity, which leaves her even more annoyed and angry. In the end, she has no choice but to practice sword training and listen to storytelling in her spare time. These boring days stretch on endlessly. One day, she is lying on the table at the Sleepless Earl, waiting for the storyteller to get prepared and tell his tale of the Luofu's High-Cloud Quintet. But before the gavel could fall, her Cloud Knight peer bursts through the door, screaming out: "Sushang, come now! The Outworlders are making trouble again!" After hearing the shout, her eyes widen instantly, and she quickly picks up her greatsword to rush to the scene. Upon arriving, she sees a redhead woman performing sword-swallowing and fire-breathing, which send the crowd into hysterics. Before long, this woman is somehow pulling out a green granite slab, determined to perform a "Smashing Boulder on Chest" trick. "Stop! The traffic here has always been a problem. This isn't your darned circus, okay!?" Sushang shouts out sternly, steeling her stance as she heaves her Xuanyuan sword and points it at the woman. The woman notices her lack of stability and stays calm, side-stepping her before spinning up the fire-stick once more to great astonishment. "I'll leave then out of respect!" Says the redhead loudly. And with a wave of her hand, the blunt end of the redhead's spear stabs straight towards Sushang's clenched hands. Sushang backs away a pace, whereupon the woman unexpectedly takes several round objects out of her pouch, smashing them onto the ground to send smoke and fire in every direction, causing an incessant sound of explosions. When Sushang comes to, she realizes that the woman has disappeared: "What the heck was that... firecrackers!?" "This Outworlder... Cannot be underestimated!"

C: 「尊敬的母亲、父亲大人： 不知二位是否别来无恙？素裳已因您要求，随罗浮云骑四处正战历练有些日子，可以说小有所呈。在此分享给二位！ 在我看来，近期最重要的大事便为——素裳不依靠他人帮助，独自制服了一名危险分子！这化外民常常四处寻衅滋事，还持有大量爆炸物，严重威胁公共安全。不过，这人只因生机所迫，不得已而为之。在素裳的感化下，她决定重新做人——现在已是素裳的密友了！ 素裳还依二位吩咐，每日坚持练习剑术，自感大有长进。如果能得空回家为二位演示，想必二位也会为我的进步感到欣慰的！ 我想起当年起程时，两位让素裳务必沉下心随军历练，不要心愿意马。如今，女儿经历了许多，渐渐成长。虽仍有不足，但素裳能独霸一面了！还请二位不必挂心！ 素裳 于十月廿一」
E: Dearest Mother and Father, How have you two been? I've been fighting alongside the Cloud Knights on the Luofu for some time now as per your request, so that's something to report. I think I should share it here with the both of you! In my opinion, the most important event lately should be... me independently handling someone dangerous without relying on anyone else! This Outworlder always goes around making trouble, and always packs lots of explosives, threatening public safety. But this person is forced into this by vicissitudes of life. Inspired by me, she decided to turn over a new page — and now, we're even close friends! I also follow your advice and continue to practice swordcraft every day. I feel like I've been making great progress. If I can go home and show you two, I think you'd be pleased with my progress! I remembered back when I set off that you asked me not be too whimsical and train myself with the army. Well, now I've practiced a lot here, I am gradually becoming more mature. I still have so much to learn, but I can looking after myself now! So you both don't have to worry about me! Sushang October 21

C: 剑，长三尺七寸，轻如无物。 它并非凡铁熔铸，而是一截坚冰凝成，幽幽含光，如握一线月光在手。 「剑，长三尺七寸，重七斤有余。握在手上，用尖的那一端刺向敌人。」 戎装女子一手轻招，剑如有灵，自武备架上骨碌跳起，入掌出鞘，贯入女孩身侧，嗡鸣不休。 「学会了吗？会了的话，就以步离人陆战最常用的战兽为敌，杀够十只血眼睚眦，这第一课就算结束。」 她沉默不语，只是左顾右盼。这是被救以来，她第一次离开病房，也是她此生第一次摸到名为剑的武器。 「我已屏退了医士和医助，没我的命令，他们不会来找你的。」 「苍城罹难，活下来的人本就不多。我不知你在救援抵达前到底经历了些什么…但我不想看你就这样一辈子溺死在过去的恐惧里。」 「你不开口没关系，你可以用它说话。」 「你可以用它，让那些夺走我们一切的怪物彻底消失。似这般美好的东西，世上已不多了。」 戎装女子眉目不动，将视线投向女孩身侧的长剑。 如镜的剑刃让她照见自己的模样，无数锋利伤人的碎片风暴般卷起，将女孩拖入过去—— 幽暗的深空中，名唤罗睺的妖星悲鸣着，歌唱着，挟着燃烧的山脉与大地向所有人扑面而来。 长街上人们尖叫，在末日灭顶的绝望中挣扎、翻滚，任由金色的枝蔓在每个人的口鼻孔窍中滋长不休。 她看着一切发生，动弹不得。五内如沸，有一物自她的丹腑中勃然翻滚，仿佛熟透的谷粒即将脱壳挣出，膨胀至无限。 但迎面而来的山脉却让她明白，自己不过是蜉蝣，即将死于神使指尖的轻捻。 即将溺死的片刻，她抓住了身边唯一的浮草。 剑，长三尺七寸，重七斤有余。
E: A sword, 3 feet and 7 inches in length, that weighs nothing. It was not forged from any ordinary iron, but condensed from a shaft of sharp ice. It glowed with a dim light, as if it were a sliver of moonlight held in the wielder's hand. "A sword, 3 feet and 7 inches in length, weighing about 7 catties. Hold it in your hand, and stab the sharp end towards the enemy." With a gentle flip of her hand, the woman in armor called her sword. As if alive, the sword lept out of the weapon rack, sliding into her grasp and out of its sheath in one fell swoop. The blade then stabbed into the air beside the girl, humming intently. "You got that yet? If so, go fight the most common war beasts the borisin use in their ground forces. Once you've killed ten Bloodshot War Wyverns, I'll consider your first lesson completed." She remained silent, her eyes darting left and right. This was her first time stepping out of the ward since being rescued, and the first time ever in her life she had touched a weapon known as a sword. "I have dismissed the healers and helpers. They won't come to you without my orders." "The calamity in Cangcheng left few survivors. I don't know what you've been through before the rescue arrived... But I don't want to see you wallow in past horrors like this for the rest of your life." "It's okay if you don't wanna talk. You can speak with this." "You can use this to vanquish the monsters that took everything from us. There are now few things as wondrous as this left in the world." The woman in armor remained composed, her gaze cast onto the long sword by the girl's side. The mirror-like blade showed her reflection. Then, a swarm of razor shards swirled up in a tempest, dragging the girl into her past — In the dimly lit sky, the demonic planet named Rahu was wailing and singing, hurling towards everyone with lands and mountains ablaze. On the streets, people were screaming, writhing and rolling in apocalyptic despair, as the golden tendrils sprouted and grew feverishly in every orifice of theirs. She watched everything unfold, paralyzed. Her organs felt like they were boiling. Something suddenly surged and churned in her Core Esse, like a ripe wheat grain about to burst out of its husk and swell to infinity. The mountains hurling towards her face made her realize, she was but a mayfly, about to perish at the mere flick of an Emanator's fingertip. In that split moment before death claimed her, she grabbed the only thread she could hang by. A sword, 3 feet and 7 inches in length, weighing about 7 catties.

C: 「在连续发布三张专辑之后，她的音乐生涯逐渐走向顶峰。《使一颗心免于哀伤》、《在最美丽的一天》等等歌曲刷新了银河各大音乐排行榜，成为脍炙人口的热门单曲。令人不解的是，她却选择在此时退出了大众的视野之中。 谈起那段时期，她向我们展示了自己拍下的种种照片。在战争的废墟中，她帮助流离失所的人们重建家园；她为无法接受教育的孩子建立学校；她去往无人知晓的世界追寻即将绝迹的歌声…… 她关上手机，叹了一口气，讲起了做出这样决定的原因。 『那时，我越来越不知道自己为了什么而歌唱。』 『面对真实的灾难，歌声一无用处。歌唱是为了讨好上位者，还是为了粉饰苦难，给予人虚假的希望？』 在那段旅途的最后一站，她回到了天环族故地的坠毁之处。原本惨烈的废墟已被青草覆盖，在微风与花香中，她枕靠在崎岖的岩石之上，看着天光透过云层照亮大地。 『我一再地想起母亲的歌声，我曾以为那是徒劳无益的声音，因为我根本不记得那是怎样的声音，也改变不了覆灭的结局。但直到现在我才明白，歌曲传递的并非只有声音本身…我还记得母亲的心跳，身旁兄长的颤抖，我们三人彼此依靠的温暖…即使在无可改变的结局面前，依然能够毫不颤抖地唱出自己的声音，就一定能传达到……』 窗外的雨渐渐停了，她沉醉于那时的回忆。不幸的是，一阵电话铃声打破了迷人的寂静，我们的采访也就此中止。 因为工作变动，知更鸟小姐需要马上动身前往匹诺康尼。亲爱的读者朋友，我们也将在梦的国度再会。」   ——摘自《鸟儿与天空：知更鸟独家专访》
E: "After the consecutive releases of her next three albums, her musical career gradually soared to its highest peak. Songs like If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking and On That Most Beautiful Day swept the charts across the cosmos and became hugely popular singles. What no one could understand was why she chose this moment to retreat from the public eye. When she spoke of this time, she showed us all sorts of pictures she had taken back then. Among the ruins of war, she helped those who had lost everything to rebuild their homes. She built schools for children who had no chance to receive education, she went to unknown realms in search of songs that were about to fall into extinction... She locked her phone, sighed, and began to speak about why she made this decision. 'At that time, I became less and less clear on my reason for singing.' 'In the face of true disaster, songs have no use at all. Do we sing to placate those in power, or to cover up suffering and give people false hope?' As the final stop of this journey of hers, she returned to the site where the Halovians' homeland fell. The once miserable ruins had been covered with a fresh growth of green grass. Bathed in the gentle breeze and scent of flowers, she lay on the rugged rocks and watched as the sky's light shone through the clouds and illuminated the ground below. 'I could not stop thinking about my mother's song. I always thought that it was a futile song, because I could not remember how it sounded in the slightest, nor could it change the destruction that ensued. It wasn't until now that I realized that what the song conveyed was not the sound itself... I still remember my mother's heartbeat, my brother trembling beside me, the warmth of us three relying on each other... Even in the face of an immutable fate, if you can still sing out without a tremble in your voice, it will definitely be felt...' The pattering of the rain outside the window came to a halt as she fell deep into her memories of the time. Unfortunately, that enchanting silence was abruptly shattered by the ringing of a telephone. This is where our interview came to an end. Miss Robin was required to head to Penacony immediately due to last-minute schedule alterations. Dear readers and friends, may we meet again in the kingdom of dreams." Excerpt from Birds and the Sky: Exclusive Interview with Robin

C:
就像是每部电影都会发生的经典桥段再现——电梯无法正常启动。
三月七口中那位「万能的丹恒老师」虽然及时赶到，却也对此束手无策。
但他救助下来的防卫科负责人阿兰，应该知道答案——
果然是万能的丹恒老师。
E:
Just like in all those classic movie scenes — the elevator doesn't work.
Despite March 7th calling him a "walking encyclopedia," even Dan Heng, who somehow made it in time, doesn't know what to do.
However, Arlan, the head of the Security Department rescued by Dan Heng, probably knows the answer...
As expected, Dan Heng saves the day once more.

C: 那位戍卫官的言语犹在耳畔：坚定的「筑城者」们建立了这永屹之城；贝洛伯格虽受风雪侵凌，却永远温暖…\n他引用典籍的奇怪语调已经深深烙进了你的脑海…但愿这不会影响你享受高档酒店的床榻。\n话说回来，距离夜幕降临还有段时间，你不妨在这古老的城市中随意游览一番。
E: The Captain's words linger: The steadfast Architects built this Towering Citadel. Belobog remains forever warm in the face of unrelenting cold...\nHis tone was strange, as if he was quoting a historical record, and made a deep impression on you... Hopefully, this doesn't ruin your enjoyment of the fancy hotel's fluffy mattress.\nThere's still some time before nightfall. Why don't you take a tour around the ancient city in the meantime?

C: 三月七试图说服你，但结果呢？你突然不是那么在乎了，因为你在此时此刻遭到了小朋友的挑衅。\n这你可忍不了！——是时候让小朋友感受成年人世界的严酷了。\n这群小鬼还不知道的是，刚才的演练不过是热身罢了…真正残忍的「捉迷藏游戏」才刚刚开始！
E: March 7th attempts to convince you but you no longer care for it as much anymore, because the kids have started taunting you.\nYou will not stand for this! It's time to show these children the cruelty of the grown-ups' world.\nLittle do they know that the practice just now was just a warm-up... The cruel and real Hide-and-seek is only about to begin!

C: 果不其然，你在八角笼里发现了冷厉如故的丹恒。尽管你在情感上接受了丹恒就在这里的事实，但你的理性实在无法解释他为何会出现在这里。\n总之，先帮助这位抛下同伴来参加搏击的「冷面小青龙」度过眼前的难关，再向他仔细问清楚好了。\n不过既然是丹恒，想必会说出「就算你们不来，我一个人也能解决」之类的话吧…
E: Just as you expected, you find Dan Heng with the same cold and fierce expression in the octagon. Although you've accepted the fact that he's here, you still can't logically understand the reason for it.\nAnyways, help this companion known as the Cold Dragon Young get through the challenge presented first. The questioning can come afterward.\nHowever, being Dan Heng, he'll probably say something along the lines of "I can take them on my own, you know." ...

C: 司辰宫中，满心以为会获得支持的你们却遭到了驭空的回绝。\n所幸云骑军将军景元现身定策。但他并未将搜索星核的重任交给你们，而是让你们找到行踪无定的卡芙卡。\n出得司辰宫，你们暂得片刻休憩，而后，你们将开始猎手与猎物间的追逐。
E: In the Palace of Astrum, the hopeful Trailblazers are rejected by Yukong.\nFortunately, General Jing Yuan of Luofu's Cloud Knights appears and intervenes. However, he does not entrust you with the task of searching for the Stellaron, instead instructing you to locate Kafka's unpredictable whereabouts.\nAfter leaving the Palace of Astrum, you have a short rest before commencing with your game of cat and mouse.

C: 翻看卡芙卡所留下的通讯影像，你意识到她的邀请中潜藏着致命的危险——她的同伴，名为「刃」的男子，与你之间曾有刻骨宿怨。\n你决心违犯禁令，再踏罗浮。然而当你登陆流云渡，却察觉着卡芙卡所言非虚，受星核作祟，罗浮已然陷入灾变。
E: As you review the video communication sent by Kafka, you realize there is a hidden and lethal danger in her invitation — Her companion, the man named Blade, has an ancient and indelible feud with you.\nYou decide to go against the ban and set foot on the Luofu once again. Yet, when you land on Cloudford, you feel that Kafka was not lying. The Luofu has fallen into a catastrophe due to the influences of the Stellaron.

C: 追踪星核猎手——你们想象着这桩任务的艰巨危险，猜测卡芙卡会准备怎样的诡计和陷阱。她却悠闲自若地现身，告诉你们已等候许久。一切并不如你们所想的那样。
E: Tracking the Stellaron Hunter — You could feel the gravity and danger of the task at hand and speculated on the tricks and traps Kafka prepared for you. But instead, she shows up at ease and tells you that she's been waiting for your arrival for a long time. It's not at all how you imagined it.

C: 在踏入鳞渊境时，你并未想到自己会遭遇如此纷乱的局势。旧恨寻仇拦住你的去路，而追猎他行踪的少年剑士也决意不放你们二人离开。及至景元将军登场，你才明白，自己在仙舟上的过去终于还是卷土重来。\n身为持明龙尊的转世之身，有人将你引至此处，有人要你重现过去的奇迹——唯独没有人问你，你是否接受这一切。
E: When you stepped into Scalegorge Waterscape, you never thought that you would encounter such a chaotic situation. The old nemesis who sought vengeance blocked your way, and the young swordsman pursuing him was determined to not let either of you leave. It wasn't until General Jing Yuan appeared that you realized your past on the Xianzhou was finally catching up to you.\nSomeone had led you, the reincarnation of the Vidyadhara high elder, to this place. Someone is asking you to reproduce the miracles of the past — except no one ever asked you whether you consent to all this.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 筑梦拼图在匹诺康尼无处不在。通常来说，看到筑梦拼图就等于看到了一扇大门…不知是有意还是无意，这种诡异的设计在匹诺康尼简直泛滥成灾，让你深感家族是不是没有新活可以整了。\n终于，你集齐了所有碎片。是时候离开这座空荡荡的鬼城了。
E: Dream Jigsaws are ubiquitous in Penacony. Generally speaking, seeing a Dream Jigsaw is the same as seeing a door... Intentional or not, this creepy design is so common in Penacony that it makes you wonder whether The Family has run out of creative ideas.\nFinally, you have collected all the fragments. It's high time to leave this desolate and eerie place.

C: 加拉赫示意各位择地继续讨论。他将你们带到了「惊梦酒吧」，浮华美梦中一处毫不起眼的清冷角落。考虑到案情复杂，他决定浅露一手，调制特饮款待各位，以免交涉过程过于冗长——要是接下来的二十分钟你都将在听故事中度过，没有任何操作，那就没意思了。\n你可以在惊梦酒吧各处寻找调饮用的原材料，加拉赫会用神秘的魔法将它们完美调和。
E: Gallagher gestures for everyone to adjourn the discussion to somewhere else. He brings you to the Dreamjolt Hostelry — A quiet and ordinary corner in this frolicking dream. Considering the complexity of the cases, he decides to showcase his skills by preparing special drinks to keep everyone entertained. Otherwise, the negotiation process would be too boring. It will be dull if you have to spend the next <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes listening to stories with no gameplay!\nYou can explore the Dreamjolt Hostelry for ingredients. Gallagher will then use magic to make perfect concoctions out of them.

C: 流萤向你解释了此前她种种不寻常举动背后的深层原因，并指引你下潜至家族宣扬的「噩梦」——美梦之外的原初忆域——「流梦礁」。而这一举动也揭露了「死亡」的部分真相：不过是协助有心之人往返美梦的驯化迷因，而「闭上眼睛」则是唤来它的奇妙咒语。\n你们乘坐电梯向上，轿厢的老旧部件吱呀作响，仿佛旧日的灵魂幽幽哀叹。在这「噩梦」深处等待着你的，究竟会是什么呢？
E: Firefly explains to you the deeper reasons behind her various inexplicable behaviors, and guides you to dive deeper into a place declared as a "nightmare" by The Family... The primitive Memory Zone outside of the sweet dream: "Dreamflux Reef." This move also exposes some of the truths behind "Death" — It is nothing but a tamed memetic entity that assists specific people who wish to travel between dreams. "Closing your eyes" is merely a strange invocation used to summon them.\nAs you ascend in the elevator, the sound of the old car parts creaking and groaning sounds like the lamenting cries of long-dead souls. Just what could be awaiting you in the depths of this "nightmare"?

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 黑天鹅向你揭示了一个令人毛骨悚然的事实：原来在与星期日的对抗中，列车组的各位、乃至匹诺康尼的所有人都失败了，无人生还。\n不过，事情还有转机。忆者表示，在你亲身经历的这段故事中，存在一处致命的破绽。而那一线生机，就藏在这破绽的背后。\n现在，你已经看穿了太一之梦的迷障——但要想让整个阿斯德纳清醒，只有你们还远远不够……
E: Black Swan reveals a bone-chilling truth to you: It turned out the entire Express Crew, as well as everyone in Penacony, lost their lives in their battle against Sunday. There were no survivors.\nHowever, there is still a chance to turn this around. The Memokeeper points out that there is a fatal flaw in the story that you experienced. Behind this fatal flaw lies a glimmer of hope.\nNow, you have seen through the illusion of Ena's Dream... However, if you wish to awaken everyone in Asdana, you will need far more people on your side...

C: 你终于来到了真正的折纸大学，方才的怪梦可能只是厌学症的表现…但看看这所流光溢彩的华丽校园，看看这群热情洋溢的精英校友，还有什么好怕的呢？让玫瑰色的青春吞噬灰色的你吧！\n去找三月七与丹恒——你未来的好同学打个招呼吧。
E: You finally step into the real Paperfold University. The bizarre dream back then might just be a manifestation of your fear of school... But what is there to fear now that you've seen this glittering and magnificent campus, together with the passionate elite classmates? Let the rosy vitality of youth consume your gray!\nGo say hello to Dan Heng and March 7th, your future classmates.

C: 你费了好大工夫，才让被家族管控的迷因把你送到了这个鸟不拉屎的地方。这里没看到什么目标的线索，天气差得要命，但麦芽果汁还凑合。\n没办法，只能自己找找线索了，谁叫你那一枪欠了不少人情呢？
E: You spent a great amount of effort to get the meme controlled by The Family to send you to this dump. Not much here looks helpful, and the weather's been a nightmare, but hey, the malt juice ain't half bad.\nGotta sleuth out clues on your lonesome. That shot you took's got you owing favors left and right.

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 幸存者的名字往往就是「不幸」，正因她曾为绝灭大君所害，天才才得以扭转生死——往事毕，或许该看向未来了。\n稍作休整，和大家聊聊之后的计划吧。
E: Survivors are often called "unfortunate." It was because she lost her life due to the Lord Ravager that the genius was able to reverse her death... The past is in the past. Perhaps it is best to look towards the future.\nTake a rest and discuss the plan from here with the others.

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。
E: We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures.

C: {NICKNAME}成功打开悬锋城的往世之门，来到过去的悬锋城。彼时正值悬锋祭典，尼卡多利的失神刚刚开始，悬锋城仍然喧嚣繁荣。
E: {NICKNAME} unlocked the door to the past in Castrum Kremnos, stepping into the city's former days. It was the time of the Kremnos Festival, and Nikador had just begun to lose their mind. Castrum Kremnos was still prosperous and vibrant with life.

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 前去友爱之馆前，查看沿途是否有遗漏的资料。\n和风堇交换一下各自找到的情报吧。
E: Before heading to the Library of Philia, look for any documents left behind along the way.\nLet's exchange information with Hyacine.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶想要述说，一段关于哀地里亚的回忆。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nCastorice would like to illustrate a sequence of memories concerning Aidonia.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

C: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n你的十五个门扉时终将结束，最后一场表演即将开幕。
E: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYour fifteen Entry Hours are done. The last performance is about to begin.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
E: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

C: 悄悄地偷看对手们的情报，打枪滴不要。
E: Peek at the enemy teams' intel on the sly. Nice and slow.

C: 既然开拓者并没有给牛仔发出短信，那么，在影视乐园等待他们的究竟是…
E: Since Trailblazer never texted the Cowboy, what exactly is waiting at the theme park?

C: 哎，如果不是在这种场合相遇，有点音乐的点缀也未尝不可。
E: *sigh* Shame we had to meet in a place like this. Otherwise, a little music wouldn't hurt.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 据遐蝶和赛飞儿所说，黄金裔们在大战结束后便出现在星穹列车之中。或许，这就是史诗落幕前，最后的一次告别机会了。多和伙伴们聊聊天吧，这大概是他们此生唯一一次登上星穹列车的机会了。
E: According to Castorice and Cipher, the Chrysos Heirs appeared on the Astral Express after the great battle. Perhaps this is the last chance to say goodbye before the epic tale comes to an end. Take some time to chat with your companions, for this might be their only opportunity to ever board the Astral Express.

C: 「军团」战役暂告息止，行进于茫茫星海中，来自「黑塔」的星声余音再度传来——在艾丝妲与全体科员的群策群力下，作为寰宇明珠的空间站，似乎正开展着名为「复兴计划」的行动，亟需有志之士加入。\n而阿兰认为，你是一等一的好选择。
E: The Legion's campaign has come to a temporary end. Traveling amongst the vast sea of stars, the star echo remnants from Herta Space Station are heard once again — with the combined strength of Asta and all the researchers, the peerless space station seems to be expanding and recruiting for an operation known as Project Revival.\nArlan believes that you are the most suitable candidate for this.

C: 踏入熟悉的支援舱段，求救声从目力不可及的深处传来。营救受困的神秘科员，也许他会带来意想不到的「猎彗人」讯息。
E: After stepping into the familiar Supply Zone, a cry for help could be heard from somewhere out of sight. Rescue the mysterious researcher who was trapped, and maybe he'll tell you something you don't know about the Comet Hunter.

C: 怪物清缴完毕，向艾丝妲远程复命
E: Monster elimination complete, report to Asta remotely

C: 接受艾丝妲的远程协助，了解收容舱段的状况
E: Receive remote assistance from Asta and learn about the condition of the storage zone

C: 前往中央房间
E: Head to the central room

C: 列车…竟被巨真蛰虫吞进了腹中？！
E: Has the Express somehow... been swallowed up by a Giant Sting!?

C: 阿德勒的失踪令事件更加扑朔迷离，但温世玲似乎还记得他失踪前的反常举动
E: Adler's disappearance made the case even more enigmatic, but Wen Shiling seems to still remember his odd behavior before his disappearance.

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区收集完了。该去下层了。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Finished in the Overworld. Time to go to the Underworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n结局圆满。人人都有光明的未来。完美。\n帕姆注：算了…我还是去看姬子的日报帕……
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHappy end. Everyone has a bright future. Perfection.\nPom-Pom's Notes: Never mind... I'm gonna go read Himeko's daily report...

C: 你在裂界中发现了一个神态异常的小女孩，希莉儿。\n你帮助她解开了两次谜题，但她依然不愿随你离开裂界。\n桑博终于同意帮你解决这个麻烦了——现在你要回到边缘通路，向他证明你没有发疯。
E: You find a strange little girl, Cyrille, in the Fragmentum.\nYou helped her to solve two puzzles, but somehow she still doesn't want to leave the Fragmentum with you.\nSampo finally agrees to help you resolve things — Go back to Backwater Pass and prove to him you're not crazy.

C: 矿车工老师傅似乎为你准备了新的谜题——去问问他准备的如何了吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator seems to have prepared a new puzzle. Go and inquire about his preparation

C: 娜塔莎已经下定决心，要借助你的力量一举捣毁倒卖假药的虚假「互助会」。\n你打倒了「互助会」的看门小喽啰，藏匿「特效药」的地点一定就在前方不远处。
E: Natasha has decided to destroy the mutual aid society that sells counterfeit drugs with your help.\nYou defeat the gatekeepers of the mutual aid society. The wonder medicine must be hidden nearby.

C: 你将有关「特效药」的事向娜塔莎和盘托出，她也坚定了对于「互助会」倒卖药物行为的反对态度。\n为了聆听有关「特效药」的不同意见，娜塔莎建议你去和她诊所内的患者交流一下。
E: You tell Natasha about the wonder medicine. She states that she's strongly against the mutual aid society selling drugs.\nNatasha suggests you talk to the patients in her clinic to hear different opinions on the wonder medicine.

C: 你成功地从裂界怪物身上拿到了它的盔甲，尽管它散发着令人不适的气息，但你此刻只想尽快赶回搏击俱乐部门口，找史考特拿到奖金的尾款。只不过，在一手交钱一手交货后，你隐隐觉得这盔甲似乎有些问题……
E: You successfully acquire the armor of a Fragmentum monster. It stinks, but all you can think of right now is to return to the Fight Club and ask Scott for the money. When you finally receive the whole reward, you have a strange feeling that there's something wrong with the armor...

C: 听闻大矿区遭到裂界怪物入侵，铁卫与「地火」当即携手结成战线，而杰帕德已率领先锋部队赶往事发地点。\n救人于水火当然是开拓者们的天职——如果你已经准备好了，那么就与希露瓦一道出发吧。
E: Hearing news that the Great Mine is invaded by Fragmentum monsters, the Guards and Wildfire instantly form a coalition and Gepard is already leading the vanguards to the incident site.\nIt is the duty of Trailblazers to save people — once you are ready, head out with Serval.

C: 展品盗窃案圆满——呃，姑且算是圆满——地解决了。\n佩拉告诉你，博物馆前台的艾丽斯小姐正在找你。\n回去找艾丽斯小姐聊聊，看看她给你准备了什么惊喜吧。
E: The theft cases were solved without a— Uhhh, more or less solved without a hitch.\nPela told you that Miss Eris is looking for you in the museum reception.\nGo back and speak with Miss Eris to see what surprises she has in store for you.

C: 真是没想到，丹枢竟然是药王秘传的一员。也许你无法轻易接受这个事实，也许你早就看穿了她的真面目…无论如何，你都要早些找到她，避免她做出更糟糕的事情。
E: Surprise, surprise. Dan Shu is a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus. You might not be able to accept that fact easily, but you have seen through her... No matter what, time is of the essence. You need to find her before she does something worse.

C: 按照陶德在短信里所说的位置，你决定前往星槎海，看看这家伙到底在干什么。
E: Following the location Todd mentioned in the message, you decide to go to Starskiff Haven to see what he is up to.

C: 你原本是想心平气和地引开这位医士的，但是没想到他竟然如此暴戾。尽管他本人不省人事，但是你还是有办法搞清楚他的目的。\n简而言之，查查这位可疑人士的随身物吧。
E: You were going to peacefully misdirect the healer, but he was immediately hostile. Even if he is now out cold, you still have a way to figure out his objective.\nTo put simply, check the belongings of this suspicious person.

C: 无趣的搜证工作终于结束，接下来就该开始紧张刺激的推理环节了！\n名侦探三月七信心满满，此番必定要抽丝剥茧，将事实真相大白于天下！\n祝她成功。
E: The boring evidence-collection task finally ended, and it is time for the mind-bending, action-packed deduction segment!\nGenius Detective March 7th is confident to reveal the truth to the world as she gets to the bottom of the case.\nLuck be with her.

C: 梁沐给半夏准备了包裹希望由你转交，显然他还不知道半夏已经离去了。这些包裹你先收下，再与小神医商量一下如何处理吧。\n不会是什么情书吧，太肉麻的就不看了。
E: Liangmu wishes you can hand the parcel he prepared for Banxia to her. Obviously, he didn't know about Banxia's passing. Keep the parcel and discuss it with the little healer about how to deal with it.\nIt can't be a love letter, can it? Better not read it in case of cringe.

C: 你决心单刀赴会，绝不再让前生恩怨牵扯列车上的朋友。\n按信的来意推测，你认为那位手持利剑、意欲向你清算旧怨的星核猎手是最有可能的寄信者。可他的「邀请」从来直接而锋利，如今发出这封信的意义何在？你准备前往神策府，向将军打听此人目前的下落。
E: Unwilling to let your friend on the Express become entangled in grievances from a previous life, you decide to enter the fray on your own volition.\nSpeculating on the intentions of the letter, you believe that blade-wielding Stellaron Hunter to be the most likely sender, fixated on sorting out past grudges. However, his "invitations" have always been direct and aggressive. What would be the purpose of sending this letter? You decide to head to the Seat of Divine Foresight and inquire after the whereabouts of the Hunter's location from the general.

C: 神策府中，不速之客不止一人。骁卫彦卿、策士青镞正自头疼不已。他们要接待一位「贵客」，也要押送一名囚犯。她的音容搅动了你深藏许久的记忆，你明白来者不善。
E: There is more than one unexpected guest at the Seat of Divine Foresight. Lieutenant Yanqing and Counselor Qingzu both have a headache. They must welcome an "esteemed guest" and also accompany a prisoner. Her voice and visage stir your long-buried memories. You understand that she does not come on friendly terms.

C: 缅怀既毕，你跟随她前往鳞渊境，不知为何她兴起了寻医问药的念头。而在丹鼎司中，也许没人比那位龙女更有资格为罗浮前代剑首把脉看诊了。
E: Respects paid, you follow her towards the Scalegorge Waterscape. For some reason, she now has the desire to seek medical counsel. No one is more qualified in the Alchemy Commission than that Dragon Lady to read the pulse and diagnose the Luofu's previous Sword Champion.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 纷乱的渡口，被押解运送的犯人逃脱，少年剑士霜锋出鞘，却被人捷足先登。
E: The escorted prisoner attempts to escape amidst the chaos at the harbor. The young swordsman's frosty blade unsheathes, but someone else was a step ahead of him.

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 在释放诱饵后，天击将军真正的追猎开始了。云骑军锁定呼雷的所在，开赴长乐天。而呼雷所宣告的袭击也即将开始。
E: With the bait set, the Merlin's Claw's true hunt begins. Having locked onto Hoolay's whereabouts, the Cloud Knights depart for the Exalting Sanctum. However, Hoolay's promised assault is also set to begin.

C: 那时候的我，个子可真够小的。\n周围的人们都说，我比同龄人早熟，也比同龄人聪明。但我知道那都是我刻意营造出的假想。我只不过是个打肿脸充胖子的小姑娘罢了，强装出一副聪明世故的模样，来掩盖内心的不安。\n父亲死前对我说，生在帝王家，只有工于心计的人才能幸存。我并不擅长那些政治操弄，但我想活下去。
E: Back then, I was really little.\nEveryone around me said I was mature beyond my years and smarter than my peers. But I'm sure that was just an illusion I created. I was just an insecure little girl, pretending to be wise and smart.\nBefore my father died, he told me — in the royal family, only the cunning survive. I wasn't great at politics, but I wanted to survive.

C: 你在筑梦边境遇到了一位目光深邃的老人，你们的对话被猎犬家系粗暴地打断。\n钟表小子认为老人身上缺失了某种情绪——等猎犬离开之后再去帮老人修复情绪吧。
E: You encounter an old man with a profound gaze at the Dream's Edge, but your discussion is harshly interrupted by the Bloodhound Family.\nClockie believes that the old man is lacking a certain mood. Help fix his lost emotions after the Bloodhound Family members leave.

C: 阿格莱雅发来消息称，大地兽工坊附近有骚乱发生。在这关键时刻可容不得闪失——你知道，圣城的墙垣并不稳固。\n矛盾解决后，许多公民仍意犹未尽。他们的真心话往往用最随性的方式表露。
E: Aglaea has sent word that there has been a disturbance in the Dromas Workshop. There is no room for error at this critical moment. You know that the walls of the holy city are not stable.\nAfter the conflict is resolved, many of the citizens have lingering concerns. Their true feelings are often expressed in the most careless ways.

C: 在纷争面前，浪漫似乎总是无力的，纤细的丝保护不了任何东西。那丝依然能在黑暗中隐隐发光，即便最终破碎消亡，也能让人赞赏它残余的美好——你说，那破碎的丝破碎之时，是否会思考自己破碎得美不美呢？\n「人们把追求爱的胜利看成光荣，把这方面的失败看成羞耻。为了争取胜利，他可以做出种种离奇的事。」
E: Romance is seemingly powerless in the face of strife. Its brittle thread is unable to protect anything. This thread can still glow faintly in the darkness. Even if it is broken and withered, people can still appreciate its lingering beauty... Tell me, when that broken thread breaks, do you think it reflects on the beauty of its own end?\n"People regard victory in the pursuit of love as glory and failure as shame. People can do all sorts of strange things in order to achieve this victory."

C: 阿德勒最近老是一副神神秘秘的样子，找他问问看到底在打什么主意。
E: Adler had been acting mysterious and strange lately. Go and see what he's up to.

C: 前往磐岩镇，调查奇怪的地方，也许你能找到马克西姆丢失的记忆……
E: Head to Boulder Town to investigate the strange place. Maybe you'll be able to find Maxime's lost memories...

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n她委托你去上层区的「长夏」花店打听和她有关的信息。\n真是一位有事业心的小演员，尽你所能帮她的忙吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nShe asked you to find out about Tamila at the Overworld's Eversummer Florist.\nWhat an ambitious aspiring actress. Help her to the best of your abilities.

C: 你凭借着自己的智慧给出了最优解。\n去「棋鬼」旁边领取宝箱奖励吧。
E: You provided the optimal solution with your superior intellect.\nClaim your treasure chest reward next to the Chess Ghost.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 机巧鸟似乎探测到行医市集附近存在一个未知来源的信号…去那里找找看吧，也许会有意外收获。
E: The cycrane seems to have detected an unknown signal near the Healer's Market... Go have a look and you might just find some surprise there.

C: 面对黑潮肆虐的现况，你当然也不能无动于衷。在克拉特鲁斯的建议下，你决定和柯库翁一起探查对面圣殿的情况。
E: Faced with the havoc the black tide is wreaking, you cannot stand idle. Heeding Krateros's advice, you and Glykon both investigate the situation of the temple across from you.

C: 事情尘埃落定。你们付出了一些代价，终究还是守住了这里。赶来支援的卫兵接管了防卫事务，去问问他们情况吧，也别忘了问候问候柯库翁。
E: The dust has settled. You paid a price, but you managed to hold the area. The reinforcements have taken over security duties. Ask them about the situation and don't forget to check in with Glykon.

C: 想要进一步了解驭空的过去，果然还是应该去司辰宫找找看。陪晴霓到处找找吧，她在这里见证的过去，也许会改变她的人生。
E: To know more about Yukong's past, you would have to go to the Palace of Astrum sooner or later. Look around with Qingni. The past she will witness here may change her life.

C: 你从伦纳德那里得知了奇怪短信的始末，为了解释《太空大战争》是什么，他的目光看向了监控室内的电脑…
E: You learn the whole story of the strange message from Leonard, whose gaze drifts toward the computer in the monitoring room as he begins to explain what Cosmic Warfare is...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是收容舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Storage Zone...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是铆钉镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Rivet Town...

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 谈判将近，先确认一下手上的谈判材料吧。\n与小秘书一起确认材料，争取在接下的言语交锋中取得优势。
E: The time of negotiations is drawing near. You should go over your negotiation materials first.\nConfirm your negotiation materials with Miss Secretary and strive to claim the advantage in the upcoming clash of words.

C: 金人巷应该有了新的进展，要回去看看吗？\n常回金人巷看看。
E: There should be new developments at Aurum Alley. Would you like to go back and check it out?\nVisit Aurum Alley regularly

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 祈龙坛上利剑高悬，年轻的云骑剑士盯着似真似幻的剑阵痴迷钻研，似要从中领悟什么秘密。当你们抵达时，参悟剑艺的少年已不知觉堕入执迷中，要和你们比斗一番。
E: Atop the Dragonprayer Terrace, where gleaming swords hang, the young Cloud Knight fixates intently upon the mirage-like sword formation and studies it with an insatiable thirst, as if intending to obtain some secret insight within. By the time you arrive, the young swordmaster has succumbed to his obsession, yearning for a duel with you.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n继续去接待顾客吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nLet's continue serving the customers.

C: 一份赃物，以及一条大鱼。
E: Some stolen goods and a large fish.

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n本层的拍摄已经完成，去下一个片场吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nFilming on this floor has concluded. Go to the next location!

C: 《美梦往事》剧组接受了鸢尾花家系的合作方案，筹备了一部名为《美梦仙踪》的广告片，去帮帮忙吧！
E: The Dreamjoy Memoir crew accepted the collaboration from the Iris Family and planned a commercial named Dreamjoy Ascension. Go help them!

C: 在引导员的指引下开始属于你们的热砂假日。
E: Start your Scorchsand Vacation under the guide's instructions

C: 前方传来隐隐的喧闹，准备前往舞台吧。
E: There is a faint noise ahead. Prepare to head to the stage.

C: 前方传来隐隐的喧闹，准备前往舞台吧。
E: There is a faint noise ahead. Prepare to head to the stage.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n十五日中，你们多次与银狼一同经历「江湖奇遇」，也许可以向银狼寻求一点建议。
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nYou've both experienced numerous "wanderlust escapades" with Silver Wolf during this period. It could be a good idea to ask Silver Wolf for some advice.

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了。\n利用这段时间，为接下来的比赛做好准备吧。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather.\nUse this time to prepare for the upcoming match.

C: 雪国飘摇寒苦愁，孤拳铁铸赴仙舟。\n古来僻壤生豪勇，天下少年第一流。
E: From snowbound sorrow, by his lonefist to the Xianzhou.\nThe barren land birthed a brave soul, the epitome of young morals.

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了。\n利用这段时间，为接下来的比赛做好准备吧。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather.\nUse this time to prepare for the upcoming match.

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 回到最初的位置，完成记忆中的自我迭代。
E: Return to the initial position and complete self-iteration in the memory

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
