E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 万里无云的一日，正是大地兽学公开课开讲的最佳时机，有时间的话，不妨去听听看吧。
E: A cloudless day is the perfect weather for an open lecture on dromas studies. If you've got time, why not drop by and check it out?

C: 利用假身份信息通过安全验证
E: Use a fake identity to get past security check

C: 前往最上层乘坐电梯，到达主控舱段
E: Go to the upper level and take the elevator to the master control zone

C: 寻找裂界出口，逃脱追捕
E: Find a way to leave the Fragmentum and shake off the pursuers

C: 寻找三月七和丹恒
E: Find March 7th and Dan Heng

C: 进入「搏击俱乐部」
E: Enter the Fight Club

C: 寻找「地火」安排的向导
E: Find the guide arranged by Wildfire

C: 与希露瓦交涉，借机械屋藏身
E: Talk to Serval and hide at the workshop

C: 搜寻可能与卡芙卡有关的线索
E: Search for any clues that may be related to Kafka

C: 解除三处持明封印
E: Remove the three Vidyadhara seals

C: 与黄泉交谈
E: Speak with Acheron

C: 利用梦境的特性继续前进
E: Use the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards

C: 补全筑梦师的心绪表盘
E: Complete the Dreamweaver's Emo Dial

C: 向猎犬们打听线索
E: Ask the Bloodhounds for clues

C: 跟随米沙，前往贸易区寻找同伴
E: Follow Misha and head to the trading district to search for your partners

C: 前往房间另一头
E: Go to the other end of the room

C: 前往贵宾休息区寻找丹恒
E: Head to the VIP Lounge Rest Area and find Dan Heng

C: 继续追赶睡蕉小猴
E: Continue pursuing the Slumbernana Monkey

C: 阻止筑梦蕉师的错误「蕉学」
E: Stop the Dreamweaver BananAdvisor's misleading banacademic lecture

C: 忍侠潜于梦土暗面，新的狩猎即将开始……
E: The Ninja Hero lingers in the shadows of the Dreamlands, heralding a new upcoming hunt...

C: 追上普利蒙蕉授，终结颠倒•梦想！
E: Catch up with Profnana Primon and put an end to this inverted dream!

C: （可选）忍徒修行：唤醒<unbreak>40</unbreak>只睡蕉小猴，当前进度：
E: (Optional) Ninja Training: Awaken <unbreak>40</unbreak> Slumbernana Monkeys. Progress:{SPACE}

C: 在附近找找和停云有关的线索
E: Search in the vicinity for clues related to Tingyun

C: 与白厄一同前进，扫清敌人
E: Travel with Phainon and eliminate the enemies

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

C: 靠近第一面镜，推进谒见进程
E: Approach the First Mirror to advance the audience's progress

C: 查看哈托努斯的状况
E: Check Chartonus' current condition

C: 陪缇宁前往缇里西庇俄丝的卧房
E: Walk with Trinnon to Tribios' bedroom

C: 前往生命花园，与黄金裔商量接下来的打算
E: Head to the Garden of Life and discuss what to do next with the Chrysos Heirs

C: 继续探索龙骸古城，寻找通往高塔的通路
E: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and seek a path to higher ground

C: 前往半神议会，见证公民大会结果
E: Head to the Demigod Council and witness the results of the citizens' assembly

C: 落座并聆听白厄对公民们的演讲
E: Sit down and listen to Phainon's speech to the public

C: 前往「永恒圣城」奥赫玛，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Eternal Holy City" Okhema and continue your adventure

C: 尝试操纵风场，前往浑象仪所在处
E: Try to control the wind field to reach the celestial globe's location

C: 获取刻法勒的火种
E: Obtain Kephale's Coreflame

C: 前往云石天宫
E: Go to the Marmoreal Palace

C: 跟随那刻夏，取得「理性」的火种
E: Follow Anaxa to obtain the Coreflame of Reason

C: 击败钟表老子
E: Defeat Old Clockie

C: 找出葛瑞迪的真身
E: Find Grady's true body

C: 返回「记忆的谏书」，继续冒险
E: Return to the "Epistle of Remembrance" and continue the adventure

C: 继续「开拓」之旅
E: Continue the Trailblazing Expedition

C: 收集此空间的泰坦符文
E: Collect Titan Runes in This Area

C: 追逐记忆的种子
E: Chase the Seed of Memory

C: 到机修间去！或许老翁将给出意外报酬
E: Go to the maintenance room! Maybe the old man will give you a reward

C: 见证「波少」粉丝梦碎现场
E: Witness the scene of the fans of Master Capote having their hearts broken

C: （可选）与伦纳德交谈
E: (Optional) Talk to Leonard

C: 拜访小阿德勒
E: Visit little Adler

C: 回到诊所，找娜塔莎包装礼物
E: Return to the clinic and ask Natasha to wrap the present

C: 寻找银鬃铁卫队长邓恩
E: Find Silvermane Captain Dunn

C: 与希莉儿交谈
E: Talk to Cyrille

C: 与尤利安交谈调查的结果
E: Discuss the results of the investigation with Julian

C: 在「残响回廊」中寻找线索
E: Look for clues in the Corridor of Fading Echoes

C: 抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》4/<unbreak>500</unbreak>
E: Copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation 4/500 times

C: 按照密信的要求，在长乐天截获邮包
E: Go to the Exalting Sanctum and intercept the parcel according to the instruction of the missive

C: 在长乐天与丹枢交谈，领取她的谢礼
E: Talk to Dan Shu at the Exalting Sanctum and accept her gift

C: 将收集到的拓片交给陶德
E: Hand the collected rubbings over to Todd

C: 前往地衡司举报陶德的所作所为
E: Go to the Realm-Keeping Commission and report on Todd's doings

C: 前往黛青小姐的约定地点
E: Go to the location agreed upon with Ms. Daiqing

C: 找黛青小姐的经纪人问问
E: Get answers from Ms. Daiqing's manager

C: 回复小聪的信息
E: Respond to Cong's message

C: 赶往花火的藏身之处
E: Hurry to Sparkle's hiding spot

C: 跟随云璃，让她请你吃好吃的
E: Follow Yunli and take up her offer to a delicious treat

C: 离开司辰宫
E: Leave the Palace of Astrum

C: 帮助彦卿与公司成员辩论
E: Help Yanqing debate with the IPC staff

C: 与云璃汇合，前往演武擂台
E: Meet up with Yunli and head toward the Wardance arena

C: 找到第三位联觉梦境的主人
E: Find the third creator of the Synesthesia Dreamscape

C: 保护公主殿下免遭戕害
E: Protect the Princess from harm

C: 进入「湛蓝爵士」的心绪空间
E: Enter Dr. Blues' Emoscape

C: 前往筑梦师聚集的地方
E: Go to where the Dreamweavers gather

C: 与彦卿对话，等待朱明仙舟的客人
E: Speak with Yanqing and wait for the guests from the Xianzhou Zhuming

C: 等待审判开始
E: Wait for judgment to begin

C: 触碰最后的记忆
E: Touch the final memory

C: 将吉尔伯特的信件和花束交给莉拉
E: Give Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila

C: 和歌德宾馆的雷金聊聊
E: Speak with Regin at the Goethe Hotel

C: 和黄金歌剧院前的塞琳聊聊
E: Speak with Celine in front of the Golden Theater

C: 给查威拍照
E: Take a photo of Chavez

C: 领取奖励
E: Claim rewards

C: 来到开启的房间中寻找「宝藏」· 三
E: Enter the unlocked room to search for "treasure" (III)

C: 与伊来内对话
E: Speak with Alain

C: 寻找帮助了居民的「幽灵」
E: Find the "ghost" that helped the residents

C: 探索「模拟宇宙」
E: Explore the Simulated Universe

C: 继续调查姐妹俩留下的痕迹
E: Continue investigating the traces left by the sisters

C: 继续迎击黑潮造物
E: Continue facing the Black Tide Creatures

C: 修复藏品
E: Restore exhibits

C: 与沃森对话
E: Talk to Watson

C: 与燕翠对话
E: Speak with Yancui

C: 与明曦对话
E: Speak with Mingxi

C: 跟黑塔对话
E: Speak with Herta

C: 与邓恩进行超链接对决
E: Have a Hyperlink Match with Dunn

C: 进入「模拟宇宙：黄金与机械」
E: Enter the Simulated Universe: Gold and Gears.

C: （可选）使用喷漆装扮合照场景
E: (Optional) Use spray paint to touch up the background for the photo.

C: 帮助情绪失控的迷钟
E: Assist the out-of-control Ticker.

C: 找到藏于丰厚战利品中的线索
E: Find the clues within the Bountiful Treasure

C: 找到所有散落于错乱空间中的线索
E: Find all the scattered clues within the chaotic space

C: 与皮斯进行交流
E: Speak with Pisce

C: 与匆匆忙忙的导演交谈
E: Talk with the hurrying director

C: 前往第二道关卡的入口
E: Go to the second stage entrance

C: 与银狼交谈
E: Talk to Silver Wolf

C: 与伦道夫对话完成今日拍摄
E: Talk to Randolph about today's filming

C: 协助伦道夫拍摄离散忆质
E: Assist Randolph in filming the scattered memoria

C: 通过海关，来到罗浮
E: Clear the customs and enter the Luofu

C: 返回休息室
E: Return to the lounge

C: 听青雀对玉兆的分析结果
E: Listen to Qingque's analysis regarding the jade abacus

C: 返回休息室
E: Return to the lounge

C: 探查善逝的历史记录
E: Review Sugata's historical records

C: 向现场观众求助，等待乱破归来
E: Ask the live audience for help and wait for Rappa's return

C: 与桑博对话
E: Speak with Sampo

C: 将客厅建造完成
E: Complete building the living room

C: 找到合适的雕像
E: Find a suitable statue

C: 拍摄机巧鸟阵列的照片
E: Take a photo of the cycrane formation

C: 看看究竟发生了什么
E: Check out what is happening.

C: 开始今日的营业
E: Open for business for the day

C: 招待下一位客人
E: Welcome the next guest

C: 陪伴驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大，让它恢复健康吧！
E: Stay with Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas and help it recover!

C: 三月，打得好，不愧是我的徒弟。
E: Well fought, March. As expected of my disciple.

C: 三月，你的对剑也在为你欢呼。
E: March, your sword is also cheering for you.

C: 安排至少2次力量训练：本日所有行动额外提高#1点力量
E: Plan at least 2 sessions of Strength Training: All actions today additionally increases Strength by #1

C: 距离最终试剑
E: Time to Final Sword Trial

C: 距离第二次试剑
E: Time to Second Sword Trial

C: 金风
E: Golden Gale

C: 融会剑法
E: Integrated Swordplay

C: 早啊，{NICKNAME}。你很准时嘛。
E: Morning, {NICKNAME}. You're very punctual.

C: 很抱歉打断了你们的聚会。但相信听完我的请求，你们会理解我的冒昧。我要请你们——
E: Apologies for interrupting your little get-together. But I'm sure once you've heard my request you'll forgive me. I'd like you to make a...

C: 我和她已经没关系了。
E: I have nothing to do with her anymore.

C: 再等一等，会议就开始了。
E: The meeting will start soon.

C: 小事。虽然我和瓦尔特先生没有参与这次「开拓」，但你们在雅利洛-Ⅵ上的一举一动，我们全都看在眼里。
E: *chuckles* Don't mention it. Welt and I may have stayed on the Express this whole time, but we've been watching over you the moment you set foot on Jarilo-VI.

C: 当然可以。我们不缺时间。
E: Sure, ask away. We've got plenty of time.

C: 终端上显示「紧急避难」，负责接待的前台服从了指示。
E: "Emergency Evacuation" flashed onto the display, and the front-of-house receptionist carried out the instructions.

C: 光栅拦住了你的去路。
E: A galvanized gate blocks the way.

C: 想必他的工作就像是这个电子屏一样，已经出现了一定的耗能危机，却还在继续坚持吧。
E: I bet his work is like this screen... it may be having an energy-consuming crisis yet it is still insisting on working.

C: 屏幕上布满了方形的监控画面，似乎并没有出现异常情况。
E: The entire screen is filled with surveillance screens, none of which show anything unusual.

C: 一排绿色植物，纯粹的摆设。
E: A row of greenery purely for decoration.

C: 都这时候了还计较啥啊。这个大活人就在我们眼前，总不能是假的吧。
E: Who cares? They're here and alive. Do they look like a mannequin to you?

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 你不必担心会拖后腿。封锁电梯权限一事，在主控舱段也可以进行操作吧？
E: You won't slow us down. And you should be able to shut down the elevators from the master control zone, right?

C: …那不是我这种身份的人能够接触到的信息。
E: ...That's not the kind of information someone in my position would have access to.

C: 别说话了，好好休息。
E: Alright, I'll leave you to get some rest.

C: 每个人都这么说，「会好起来的」，「不会总这么倒霉」……
E: Everyone keeps saying that. "Things will get better, things won't always be this bad."

C: 随后它又补充道：「<unbreak>26</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: It later added, "<unbreak>26</unbreak> points!"

C: 眼睛瞪大，它颤动着感知、测算，拼尽全力。「无法测定！」眼睛似乎受到了强烈的刺激，它陡然紧闭，不再执着于无解的答案。
E: Its eyes fly wide open, trembling as it strains to sense and calculate. "Rating invalid!" Overwhelmed, the eyes snap shut, giving up on the impossible answer.

C: 你睁开眼，从想象中醒来。黑色的羽翼依旧在飞舞，像是在诉说一段故事，像是在歌唱一个世界。
E: You open your eyes and wake from your imagination. The black feathered wings fly still, as if recounting a story, as if singing a whole world.

C: 我经常委托他们在其他星球帮我弄点东西，他们也经常来找我解决点难题。
E: Every once in a while, I'll need them to get me things from other planets, and they often come to me to help them solve problems.

C: 可惜还没好好聊上几句，列车却要出发了，你还有什么想和我说的吗？
E: It's a pity that we haven't had the chance to talk much, and now the Express is about to leave. Do you have any questions?

C: 这样啊…那么，我也尊重你的选择。
E: Is that so... Well, I respect your choice.

C: 最近应该有不少人都会这么跟你说：「你是特殊的」。但这里是星穹列车，车上的乘客多少都沾点不能说的秘密。
E: Pom-Pom's sure there have been lots of people telling you how special you are lately, but this is the Astral Express, and everyone on here has their secrets.

C: 啊，我听姬子说之前是你救了三月七乘客？
E: Ah, Pom-Pom remembers Himeko saying that you saved her...

C: 门被锁住，但是门内隐约透出一缕奇特的咖啡清香。
E: The door is locked, but there's a peculiar scent of coffee coming out of the room.

C: 哎哟，你怎么像杨叔一样，成天担心一些还没有发生的事情？
E: Ah! You're just like Mr. Yang, always worrying about things that haven't even happened yet.

C: 「连结」世界与世界，踏出永不断绝的道路。
E: Connect worlds together, carving an endless path.

C: 所以我们打算另辟蹊径…就找到了你。
E: So we decided a different approach... with you.

C: （那不是他之前的语调，他应该是在引用某段典籍。）
E: (A marked change in tone. It sounds like he's quoting from a historical record.)

C: 你们把当前的情况分析得很清楚。没错，我们的确遭遇了这些灾祸，有些至今仍是我们的麻烦…但那与各位有什么干系？
E: Your analysis of our current circumstances is clear. We have indeed suffered the disasters you speak of, some of which prove vexatious to us even today... but why should you care?

C: 喂，嘀咕什么呢？快跟我们走！
E: Hey, what are you whispering? Let's get going!

C: 外面的风雪这么厉害，要是没有靠谱的供暖手段，贝洛伯格上下早就变成一座死城了。
E: The blizzards here are brutal. If we didn't have a reliable way of keeping warm, Belobog would long since have become a dead city — both above and below the surface.

C: 佩拉格娅•谢尔盖…
E: Pelageya Sergeyevna...

C: 蓝色的结晶体是什么？
E: What are those blue crystals?

C: 最危险的地方也最安全，宾馆！
E: We should hide in plain sight. To the hotel!

C: 你对「星核」了解多少？
E: How much do you know about the Stellaron?

C: 要好…还谈不上吧，只是我答应过她……
E: Close is... a bit much. But I made her a promise...

C: 我们去帮你拿回属于你的东西。
E: We'll help you take back what is rightfully yours.

C: 不、不过我一定会努力的！反正我一个人都是这么过来的……
E: But... but I will try my best! After all, I've already gone through so much on my own.

C: 咦…这么快就准备好了嘛？她的身体状况……
E: Huh? That's sooner than I expected. Is she well enough to...

C: 可可利亚•兰德的牺牲为我们翻开了历史的新篇章。城墙外的风雪将会逐渐平息，裂界的扩张也必将被铁卫的攻势抑制。
E: The sacrifice of Cocolia Rand ushers in a new chapter. The blizzard beyond the walls will die away and the offensives of our Silvermane Guards will begin to contain the Fragmentum's advance.

C: 我明白了，那这张照片我可得好好保管。晚点我也会帮你复制一份的，克拉拉。
E: *sigh* I understand. Well, this photo will always be close to my heart. I'll make a copy for you too, Clara.

C: {NICKNAME}，你有过类似的感受吗？偶尔停下脚步，回想自己曾经做过的事…你会感叹自己一路以来居然战胜了那么多的困难，感叹自己曾经坚强得难以置信……
E: I don't know if you've ever had that feeling, {NICKNAME}... When you stop and look back on the things you've done, and wonder at all the obstacles you've overcome, the strength you've displayed...

C: 然后你会陷入自我怀疑。怀疑你已经失去了当初的那份能量…怀疑如果一切再重来一次，你会无法复制那个勇敢的自己。
E: And then you start to doubt yourself, and wonder if you've lost that drive... If everything were to happen again, would you still stand strong?

C: 有什么问题吗？
E: Is something wrong?

C: 我可以帮你咨询一下专家意见…
E: I can consult an expert opinion on your behalf...

C: 嗯…个中原因或许没有那么简单。
E: Mm... I think there's more than one element to it.

C: 她们似乎还没谈完。希望不会发生争执…我们还是进去看看吧。
E: Doesn't seem like they've finished talking yet. I hope it's not turning into a shouting match... Let's go in.

C: 既然你这么好奇，那我就介绍一下。
E: Since you're so curious, I'll give you the whole story.

C: …辛苦你陪姐姐再折腾一会儿了，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...Well done for putting up with her for this long, {NICKNAME}.

C: {NICKNAME}，你…确实是个很可靠的人。她能受你这样优秀的旅伴照顾，就连我也感到很幸运。
E: You're... a very reliable person, {NICKNAME}. Even I feel lucky to have you as her travel companion.

C: 你对悬疑剧的关注引起一旁小孩儿的注意，他带着一脸「我要剧透你」的得意坏笑朝着你走了过来，快跑！
E: Your focus on the suspense drama seems to attract the attention of a kid that's sitting nearby. He's running to you with a devious smile and an expression that clearly says, "I'm gonna drop some spoilers on that person." Let's high tail it out of here!

C: 你看见《水晶日报》，架子上的它缺了几期。
E: You spot the Crystal Daily. It is missing a few issues on the shelf.

C: 珍贵的行李就这样无人看管地放着——这座城市拥有路不拾遗的优良品德。
E: Unattended precious luggage — the city has the exemplary virtue of not picking up things off the road.

C: 一座售卖食物的小屋，屋子里没有人。
E: A hut that sells food with no one inside.

C: 一：『这封遗书将是我人生的注脚。因此在生命的最未，我』
E: 1. "I hereby tender my resignation. On this, my final day of work, I"

C: 花呀，送花我就很喜欢～
E: Flowers. I love flowers~

C: 即使这样你也要打开它吗？
E: Be that as it may, you gonna open it?

C: 怎么会有人会管自己叫垃圾之王？他自己就不觉得丢人吗？
E: Why would he call himself Garbage King? Isn't he embarrassed?

C: 我也没见着奥列格。矿民说看到他带一批人往深处去了。
E: I haven't seen Oleg. The miners said they saw him take a group further in.

C: 我们是自愿主动来帮忙的。
E: We came here willing to help out.

C: 等价交换，这很合理。
E: Sounds like a fair trade off.

C: 明白了，你搞不定这些孩子。
E: I get it. You're being bullied by children.

C: 可以，你问吧！
E: Okay, let's hear it.

C: 他的外号可是「千面尤利安」，是个伪装高手！就算只是个小孩子，也可以打扮成……
E: He's known as "Julian of a Thousand Faces" — a master of disguise! That kid can even make himself look like...

C: 别伪装啦，声音已经把你暴露了……
E: Alright, the jig is up, your voice gave it away...

C: 下层区四处都是岩壁，没有明显的区域规划，只有分散的矿区和小镇，就像是贝洛伯格的郊区。
E: Well, the Underworld is surrounded by cliffs, and there's no obvious structure. It seems like a spread out collection of mines and small towns — just like the outskirts of Belobog.

C: 这个人奸懒谗猾，我不喜欢！看见他就讨厌。
E: That guy!? He's lazy, lying, cunning, and evil! I don't like him — can't stand the sight of him.

C: 哈哈哈，没事，你也不是第一位有这反应的客人了。
E: Hahaha, it's fine. You aren't the first guest to have that reaction.

C: 守、守夜？这么复古吗？！那不是奇幻小说里的冒险团才会干的事吗？
E: K—Keep watch? Are we space cowboys now? I guess this is the cosmic wild west.

C: 好困…希望这次能睡个好觉。
E: So tired... hope I can get a good night's sleep.

C: （又是那个声音…这个梦也太诡异了。）
E: (That voice again... such a strange dream.)

C: 陪我在这地下走走吧，暂时忘掉这些烦心事。
E: Walk with me. Let's forget our problems for a while.

C: 你要一起来吗？我看你很疲惫的样子。
E: You want to come as well? But you look quite tired.

C: （不能跑太远，跟着布洛妮娅吧。）
E: (This is a little far, I should follow Bronya.)

C: 太鲁莽了…根据银鬃铁卫的军规，巡查裂界至少需要四人为一组，还必须配备专门的通讯官。
E: So reckless... According to the rules of the Silvermane Guards, any expedition into the Fragmentum must have a squad of at least four members, as well as a communications officer.

C: 只要我还是守护者继承人，就迟早会接触到那些真相。但母亲为什么要对我隐瞒这些，又为什么要我追捕知晓「星核」本质的外来者…我怎么也想不通。
E: As long as I am the guardian's successor, those truths will come out sooner or later. But why does my mother hide it from me, and why does she want me to hunt down the outsiders who know about the nature of the Stellaron... It just... it doesn't make sense.

C: 还愣着干嘛？快去快回，你晚回来一天，拳馆就要养这群寄生虫一天，再这么下去我可就亏大了！
E: So what are you waiting for? Get moving, the longer you take, the longer I need to feed those parasites. What a filthy waste of money!

C: 我去看看他的身体情况…
E: I'll go and check on him.

C: 怎么办，难道只有亲自跑一趟铆钉镇了吗……
E: What should I do? Must I really go to Rivet Town in person?

C: 新赛季的比赛还没开始，凑热闹的都先散了吧，想报名参赛的请找史考特老板咨询详情……
E: The new seasonal tournament hasn't started yet, so don't loiter around. Go see Mr. Scott if you have any questions or want to sign up for the tournament.

C: 老板说了，您来打比赛那相当于免费给拳手们指导业务，我们巴不得您多来喂喂招儿呢。
E: Boss said you coming to the challenges is like free tutorials for the boxers. We wish you were here more often!

C: 接下来的一段时间，搏击俱乐部会暂时歇业，等待新赛季的来临！相关的前期工作正在紧密筹备中，敬请期待！
E: Now the Fight Club will be temporarily closed. We'll be working hard behind the scenes to prepare for the next season! Stay tuned!

C: 去看看情况吧，兴许还能帮上些忙。
E: We should take a look, maybe we can help.

C: 哎，居然是你们仨！你们怎么这么快就回来下层啦？
E: Oh, it's you three! Back in the Underworld so soon?

C: 忙着忙着，整个旅店突然开始剧烈摇晃——我赶紧带着大家跑了出来，只有匹克小伙不小心被天花板掉下来的碎瓦片砸中了……
E: There we were hard at work, when all of a sudden the hotel started shaking... I got everyone outside as fast as I could, but I think Peak was hit by a ceiling tile...

C: 这是…好久之前的一张照片啊。我还以为老早就弄丢了，没想到居然……
E: ...an old photo. I thought I lost this ages ago. How did it get...

C: 没问题！你们不说话，我这第一班车绝对不开走！
E: No problem, this car won't be leaving without you!

C: 那…阿丽娜上去了以后，会不会被其他小朋友笑话呀？
E: Then... will other children laugh at me when we go up?

C: 我向二位保证，铁卫此行绝非为抢功夺权而来。如若无法第一时间取得下层居民的信任，我们愿意从点滴做起，成为「地火」身边的助力，协助维持下层安定。
E: I can assure you that the Guards are not here to seize power. If it takes time for the people to trust us, so be it. We're willing to take small measures and serve as an auxiliary force to Wildfire to help maintain peace.

C: 就等你这句话了——我们走！
E: That's all you needed to say! Let's go.

C: {NICKNAME}，老弟——我改变主意了。
E: {NICKNAME}, Gepard, I changed my mind.

C: 改变什么主意？
E: Changed your mind on what?

C: 边缘通路…是在上层区吗？露天咖啡馆又是什么东西……
E: Backwater Pass, hmmm...? Is that up in the Overworld? And what is an open-air café...

C: 我收集齐了《冒险鼹鼠队》…
E: I collected all of The Adventurous Moles...

C: 原来如此，看来是我给大人找借口了。
E: I see. It seems that I just made an excuse for adults.

C: 从沙袋上你能学会的事：如果一声不吭，就没人知道你有多痛。
E: What you learned from observing the sandbag: If you don't make a sound, no one would know how much pain you're in.

C: 星际和平播报将持续追踪报道巴兰扎事件，让我们为遇难者哀悼，祈愿和平的降临。
E: The Interastral Peace Broadcast remains committed to following the Baranza event closely. We'd like to extend our condolences to the victims and hope that peace will prevail.

C: 见笑了。我负责接渡来往的商客。这些文绉绉的场面话，我隔三差五要说一通的。
E: That's too kind of you. My job involves ferrying business delegates to and from Starskiff Haven, so I do this kind of introduction all the time.

C: 景元将军——
E: General Jing Yuan—

C: 还是把注意力放在正事上吧。既然驭空司舵极力拒绝我们介入，想来天舶司对卡芙卡的下落多少有些头绪？
E: We should focus on our objective first. Seeing as Helm Master Yukong was extremely reluctant to get us involved, am I right to speculate that the Sky-Faring Commission has some leads on the whereabouts of Kafka?

C: 不知道。我看够呛，这么一闹，老板也没收入了啊……
E: No idea. I doubt it. The boss probably has no money to pay us, what with this fiasco...

C: 咱这话可能不中听，但是——你们将军可是说好了，审讯卡芙卡时我们也得在场喔。
E: Um, you might not wanna hear this, but your general gave us his word. We have to be present when you question Kafka.

C: 等等，什么叫胡思乱想啊！
E: Wait a minute — clear my head of what!?

C: 请用您的玉兆手镯登记……
E: Please register with your...

C: 反正都是传说罢了。我上下班路上，天天都能瞧见这般景色，看也看腻味了。
E: Anyway, it's just a legend. I see this view every day on my way to work — I'm kinda bored of it.

C: 唉，傻师弟，别去送死
E: Silly Ziming, don't go seeking your own demise

C: 谈谈你吧。
E: Let's talk about you.

C: 或者，问问附近的人吧？这里人来人往，一定有人看见过停云小姐。这也是收集信息的一种手段，应该不算作弊吧？
E: Or... we could ask around? Look how busy this place is, someone must have seen Miss Tingyun. That's not cheating, right? We're just collecting intel.

C: 别气啊！您说的这姑娘我刚巧见过。就刚才，我瞧她转进了宣夜大道。您往那儿溜达溜达，快几步兴许还来得及找见。
E: Stay calm, stay calm! I did see the girl you're looking for. She took a turn from here into Starwatcher Avenue. I'd suggest you head over that way — she might still be there.

C: 想向您打听个人……
E: We were just wondering if you could help us find somebody...

C: 骁勇云骑清危险，
E: Brave Cloud Knights clear out danger,

C: 驭空大人可是命你…
E: But Madam Yukong ordered you to...

C: 一旦遇上卡芙卡，追捕和战斗交给我们。辛苦你替我们引路了。
E: When we run into Kafka, we'll do the fighting — and the capturing for that matter. Thank you for showing us the way.

C: 可是这儿什么也看不见啊？是卡芙卡布下的陷阱吗？让小谛听来探一探吧。
E: I can't see anything fishy... Did Kafka lay a trap for us? Let's get Diting to investigate.

C: 太卜司，符玄。
E: Fu Xuan, Divination Commission.

C: 抱歉，三月七，我无法给出肯定的答复。原本的停云身在何方，又是何时被偷梁换柱，随着那具身躯的消散，我们已无从查究。
E: I'm sorry March, I can't say with any certainty where the real Tingyun may be, or at what point she was replaced by the impostor. Without knowing where the body vanished to, it'll be tough to get an answer.

C: …我对帝弓咒誓，必为同袍报仇雪恨。
E: ...I swear to the Arbiter that I will avenge my comrades.

C: 咱们想了那么多办法，花了短生种几辈子的时间，「建木」却没有一丝活过来的迹象。
E: We tried many methods, spending multiple lifetimes of short-life species, yet the Arbor showed no signs of resurrection.

C: 哪有这么快。咱们得加紧脚步了。
E: Not thin enough. We need to hurry.

C: 停云小姐是…军团的「绝灭大君」？！这、这到底是怎么回事啊？！
E: Miss Tingyun... is a Lord Ravager of the Antimatter Legion!? But— How can that be?

C: 景元的跟班小子…景元没教你审时度势么……
E: Jing Yuan's lapdog... Did the general not teach you to choose your battles wisely...?

C: 喂，你快走远些。待会儿刀剑无眼——咦？
E: Hey, move back. Things are about to... Huh?

C: （云骑军似乎正在为了星核灾变而集结…但卡芙卡为什么要我们过来？他们怎么样了，刃又怎么样了？）
E: (The Cloud Knights seem to be gathering for the Stellaron disaster... but why did Kafka want us to come here? What happened to them? And what happened to Blade?)

C: （伸出手）
E: (Hold out hand)

C: 雕像上那人就是……
E: The statue... is that...

C: …其实，我在想那个符太卜能不能帮我个忙。
E: ...Actually, I was wondering if Diviner Fu could do me a favor.

C: 所有仓促而至的死亡、未能实现的愿望，都在提醒我们…长生种的生命依然只是微不足道的有限片刻。
E: All of these sudden deaths and unfulfilled wishes remind us... that long-life species still live out insignificant and limited lives.

C: 停云姐姐喝不到了，我就请各位来饮这一杯，当作是对她的纪念吧。
E: Seeing as Tingyun won't be able to try it... we should drink a cup to her memory.

C: 真是辛苦了，不如我当场露一手，为大家做一道菜，请你们品尝品尝，就当是回礼了。
E: Really, thank you so much. Why don't I give you all a demonstration and prepare a dish? My treat — I'd love to repay this kindness.

C: 准备好了。
E: I'm ready to go.

C: 幸好没有。
E: Thankfully, they didn't.

C: …所以在出发前，我就告诉小三月和丹恒啦。
E: ...before we set off, I told March 7th and Dan Heng about this.

C: 原来只有我被蒙在鼓里啊。
E: So I was the only one kept in the dark then.

C: 你应该找姬子，或瓦尔特。
E: You should go talk to Himeko or Welt.

C: 这是我的房间啊。
E: This is my room.

C: 纸条？您是在房间里捡到的吗？
E: Note? Did you find it in the room?

C: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
E: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

C: 咦，这…这人是谁？
E: Eh? Who... Who's this?

C: 我是猎犬家系的加拉赫，那些蠢货是我豢养的幼犬。
E: I'm Gallagher from the Bloodhound Family, and those idiots are some young Bloodhounds I've been training.

C: 好可爱一钟表。
E: He looks cute.

C: 接下来带你去个能好好玩的地方。
E: Next, I'll bring you somewhere you can really have fun.

C: 哈哈哈，看哪，你被挡住了！真是可怜！
E: Hahaha! Your way is blocked! How pitiful!

C: 口口声声说自己是匹诺康尼本地人，内行的门路却一点不懂——小偷小摸的本事倒不少，究竟是什么人啊？亲爱的，你就一刻也没怀疑过她？
E: She claims to be a local but doesn't know how this world works — all she's got is street smarts. Who exactly is she? You don't find her the least bit... suspicious?

C: 愚者——从应邀参加这场盛会起，你就没得挑了。及时选边站，别让自己血本无归。
E: Fool, you've been left with no choice since the moment you accepted the invitation to be here. You better pick a side while you have the chance, or else you'll end up losing everything.

C: …哈哈哈哈哈！
E: ...Hahahahaha!

C: 噢，原来就是{M#他}{F#她}！
E: Oh, it's {M#him}{F#her}!

C: 是因为害怕从「梦」中醒来。
E: It is because they're afraid to wake up from the dream.

C: 两位也不必再耍其他小聪明了。请回吧，这对你我都好。
E: None of your tricks are going to work. Please do yourself and me a favor and go home.

C: 不过对着自己一个人…总有些不习惯。要一起吗？就当是留个纪念。
E: I feel a little awkward taking it by myself. Would you like to join me? Let's commemorate this moment.

C: 就像踩上水中的漂浮木板一样。
E: It's like stepping on planks floating on water.

C: 您终于来了……
E: You're finally here...

C: 您只需完成一件事——<color=#dbc291ff>帮助垃圾桶们从烦扰中解脱，取得三个「信任的证明」。</color>
E: You have one mission — <color=#dbc291ff>help the trashcans with their troubles and collect three Proofs of Trust</color>.

C: （这是到决战之地了吗…心情好复杂啊……）
E: (Is this where the final battle will take place... Not sure how I feel about this...)

C: 不出所料…
E: As I expected...

C: 你能确认流萤的安危吗？
E: Can you confirm Firefly is safe?

C: 怎么样，身体没有不舒服吧？
E: What's wrong? Are you not feeling well?

C: 你的意思是…流萤？
E: Do you mean... Firefly?

C: 可惜这条路，最终通向「死亡」的巢穴……
E: Unfortunately, this path ultimately leads one to the lair of "Death."

C: 你欺骗了我？
E: You betrayed me?

C: 我知道你很疑惑，也很…悲伤。无论那女孩是谁，一个活生生的人，一段不应结束的「记忆」…就这样被抹去了，仿佛溶解在水中的泡沫，烟消云散……
E: I know you're confused and... sad. Whoever that girl might have been, a living soul, a "memory" that was meant to last... she simply vanished, like the dissolution of bubbles in water, disappearing in an instant...

C: 门…打不开……
E: The door... It won't open...

C: 知更鸟竟然也…
E: Could Robin actually...

C: 砂金说的是实话，这段「记忆」是真实的，没有任何歪曲嫁接的部分。
E: Aventurine is telling the truth. This "memory" is a real one, and there's no sign of any distortion grafting on.

C: 「茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ在市场开拓部指导下，根据《星际和平宪章》，已建立独立自主的联合酋长国，在星际和平会议上取得合法席位——」
E: "Under the watchful guidance of the Marketing Development Department and in accordance with the Interstellar Peace Charter, the independent Sigonian Sovereignty has hereby been established, and shall take a legislative seat at the Interstellar Congress..."

C: 但我总有种预感…即便发生了这么多事，我们依然在有关<color=#dbc291ff>「遗产」</color>的漩涡中打转……
E: ...I've still got this sense of foreboding. It's like we're stuck in a whirlpool — spinning around <color=#dbc291ff>that Legacy</color> even after everything that's happened...

C: 因此，我前来寻求各位的帮助。我没有足够的证据，但想提出一种可能：<color=#dbc291ff>一切悲剧的源头正潜伏于家族中</color>。如果你愿意信任我…我们可以一起找到用以佐证的事实。
E: That's why I've come to ask for your help. I don't have enough proof yet, but I'd like to speculate something: <color=#dbc291ff>the source of all tragedy lies within The Family</color>. If you could trust me... we could find the proof to support this claim, together.

C: …你在说什么？
E: ...Excuse me?

C: 也许我们也得这么来一遍，去看看吧。当然，穷举也是个办法。
E: Maybe we should do the same. Let's go and take a look. Of course, we can also use brute force.

C: （再踢它一脚。）
E: (Kick it again.)

C: 而我会帮他把那个杀人凶手揪出来。碍于身份和立场，他自己办不到这事，但我可以，这就是「利益」。
E: And I'll help him find the murderer. He can't do it due to his status and position, but I can, and that's "benefit."

C: 但我也听闻战略投资部的{RUBY_B#石心十人}十位精英{RUBY_E#}极为团结，在公司利益面前共同进退。
E: But I've also heard the {RUBY_B#Ten Stonehearts}ten elites{RUBY_E#} in the Strategic Investment Department have united, progressing together in the interests of the IPC.

C: 至于恶徒…愿他退后受辱。
E: As for the villain... I hope he retreats in humiliation.

C: …而是一场彻头彻尾的私刑，对吗？
E: It's an outright execution.

C: 唉…如你们所见，公司在匹诺康尼可是不太受欢迎。家族的地主之谊也只是表面客气，曾经的边陲监狱，如今要反过来给公司职员戴上镣铐啦。
E: ...As you see — the IPC isn't very popular here on Penacony. Cordiality from The Family is a mere facade. The former frontier prison has turned around and cuffed its shackles on the IPC staff now.

C: 喏，就在后边跟着呢，找他们就行——正好，帮我转移下视线，一直被人盯着太难受啦。
E: Yep, they're tailing us right now. Why not go and talk to them... it'll take the spotlight off me, being constantly stared at is really uncomfortable.

C: …等等，我好像见过你，灰头发的。
E: ...Hold on a minute. I think I've seen you before, the gray-haired one.

C: 梦主来了也不能进吗？
E: Even the Dreammaster isn't getting in?

C: 这什么玩意…医嘱？
E: What's this...? Medical advice?

C: 谢谢。这个字头一回听着这么亲切。
E: Then I'll thank you. The word "no" has never sounded so pleasing.

C: ——都是那帮*混蛋鸢尾花*害的！是他们逼的舒翁无路可走，只能躲在这里，经营一间怪物酒吧…都是算计和阴谋！
E: Those darn Iris jerks! They're the ones who forced Siobhan into hiding here, running this pesky bar... It's all their dirty scheming!

C: 用这杯「谋杀与创造之时」向你致意，变革者——
E: Here's to you, innovator, with this glass of "Time to Murder and Create"...

C: 你们想借这个机会让「钟表匠」露出马脚？
E: So, you want to seize this opportunity to expose the Watchmaker?

C: 毕竟是家族的手笔。除了信仰「存护」的那帮人，就属他们最擅长建造奇观。
E: Well, it's a masterpiece from The Family after all. Besides the followers of the Preservation, The Family members are the best at creating mind-blowing marvels.

C: 嗯…这花纹样式独特，甚是张扬。从尺码来看，应该是男款。
E: Well... there's a unique pattern here — flamboyant even. And judging by the size, I'd say these were men's shoes.

C: 这世上的大部分人，终其一生只为抵达一种结果…而我就是那个结果。
E: Most people in this world spend their entire lives just to reach one outcome... and I am that outcome.

C: 哼，你看不出的事情多了去了…所以你也看不出我要如何赢得一切。
E: Hmph, there is so much you don't see... Which is also why you'll never see how I'll win it all.

C: 你想说「胶片电影」吧。
E: I think you mean "film."

C: …但那究竟是谁的「死亡」？
E: ..."Death," but whose, exactly?

C: 承认吧，你累了。
E: Admit it. You're tired.

C: 埃维金人有仇必报。母神在呼唤我，爸爸妈妈在等我，我必须回应。但她将好运赐给你，要你活下去。
E: The Avgin always return their blood debts. Gaiathra calls for me, while Papa and Mama are waiting for me. I must answer the call. But she will bless you with good fortune and help you survive.

C: 在你眼中，我也一样吗？
E: In your eyes, am I the same?

C: 居然收到了知更鸟小姐的礼物…简直像是做梦一样！不对，我这不是已经在梦里了吗？
E: I can't believe I received a gift from Miss Robin... It feels like I'm dreaming! Wait — I AM in a dream!

C: 爱玛和安迪都是我收养的孤儿，双目失明的卡萝在匹诺康尼外环的营养房做工，加里从小便患有孤独症。他们尚未成年，也无法去往家族的美梦中。
E: Emma and Andy are orphans I took under my wing. Carol, there, with her blind eyes, used to work at a nutrition center in the outer ring of Penacony. And as for Gary, he's been living with autism since he was a child. They're not old enough to enter the sweet dream managed by The Family.

C: 我们在梦里学会生活，然后回到现实…学会生存。
E: You see, in dreams, we learn how to live. Once we return to reality... we learn how to survive.

C: 醒醒啦！算我求你了……
E: Please, come to your senses! I'm begging you...

C: 很好，孩子们，看来你们心里已经各有答案了。你们的愿景无比美满，我衷心企盼它们能以各自的方式实现。
E: Well said, kids. It seems each of you has found your own answer. Your insights are truly remarkable, and I hope they come true in their own way.

C: …告诉我知更鸟在哪里。现在。
E: ...Where is Robin? Tell me. Now.

C: …先让我见到知更鸟。
E: ...Show me Robin first.

C: 知更鸟……
E: Robin...

C: 你说的完全正确，所以不妨猜猜看，这意味着什么吧？
E: You're totally correct. So, care to take a guess at what that means?

C: 哦，比我想得更顺利嘛，这么快就锁定嫌犯了。还是说，你事先调查做得挺充分？
E: Well, that was easier than I thought. Did you conduct your own investigation already?

C: 身世…我还不知道啦，但本姑娘确实身怀绝技！
E: I don't know much about my life story... but I do have extraordinary skills!

C: 即便在美梦中，也必须有人时刻保持清醒。
E: Well, someone has to stay awake even in this sweet dream.

C: 匹诺康尼只是一场梦。它无法消除现实中的烦恼和痛苦，给人带来真正的幸福…它能做的无非为人们提供一个逃避现实的去处，但也仅此而已。
E: Penacony is nothing more than a dream. It can't erase the worries and pain of reality or bring true happiness... It only offers an escape from reality. Nothing more.

C: 在你看来，这件事没有意义吗？
E: Does this seem pointless to you?

C: 什么话啊？信不信由你！
E: What's that supposed to mean!? You'd better believe it!

C: 是植入广告啊……
E: Isn't this just product placement...?

C: 为了捍卫苏乐达™的尊严，我将飞上天空，成为最闪亮的猩，呜喳喳喳！
E: To safeguard the integrity of SoulGlad™, I will soar high into the sky and become its shiniest star, whoosh!

C: 哼…哼！
E: Hmph... Hmph!

C: 但试问——{NICKNAME}，如果你没有星核赋予的特殊身份，你只是芸芸众生中脆弱的一员…你会更喜欢哪一种匹诺康尼？
E: But I would dare ask: {NICKNAME}, if you did not possess the special status of having a Stellaron, and you were but an anonymous and frail member among the masses... Which Penacony would you prefer?

C: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
E: <size=36>CUT!</size>

C: 我获悉庆典召开在即，便让「希世难得号」开足马力，将我引领至匹诺康尼。然而没有「纯美」看顾的银河举世混浊，我在前来途中为救死扶伤耽搁许久……
E: Upon hearing of the impending festivities, I commanded the One and Only to bring me to Penacony with full haste. Alas, in a cosmos unguarded by the Beauty, disorder prevails, thus my passage was delayed by tending to the sick and injured...
Hmm...

C: 谢谢你，纯美骑士！我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见。
E: Thank you, Knight of Beauty! We don't have much time left... May we meet again.

C: 梦境贩售店的爱德华医生告诉我，梦境由记忆凝聚而成，如果内核空无一物，梦泡是无法成形的。
E: Dr. Edward from the Dreamscape Sales Store told me that dreams are formed from memories, and a dream bubble can't take shape if its core is empty.

C: 可我们先前了解到的故事里，并没提到「钟表匠」有后人。这个名字也不少见，可能只是个巧合。
E: But we haven't heard anything about the Watchmaker having descendants, and the name "Mikhail" is not rare. Perhaps it's merely a coincidence.

C: 看来真相已经呼之欲出了。我们这就去出口的对面一探究竟吧。
E: Looks like we're just one step from revealing the truth. Let's get to the other side and investigate.

C: 想要入梦的渴望，想要沉睡的怠惰，还有逃避、放弃…人们在无形中被催生的情绪，成了「秩序」美梦诞生的摇篮。
E: A desire to dream, to slumber and escape reality... All those hidden emotions have given birth to the sweet dream of the Order.

C: 列车？该不会是……
E: A train? Could it be...

C: …出发前，「命运的奴隶」告诉我，此行会让我得到难以忘怀的收获。他给出的剧本只有寥寥数行，却让人难以忽视。
E: ...Before I left, Destiny's Slave told me that this journey would bring unforgettable rewards. Even though the script he gave me only had a few lines, I couldn't ignore them.

C: 那就祝贺你又为旅途添上了新的注脚吧。
E: Well, congratulations on adding another footnote to your journey.

C: 「祂使星尘汇成河流，指认那善与义的在上游，那恶与不义的在下游。」
E: "THEY molded stardust into flowing rivers, assigning the righteous upstream and the unjust downstream."

C: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
E: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

C: 准备好，想必又要开战了……
E: Get ready. Looks like another fight is about to begin...

C: 这回我总算听明白了，这最后一幕戏是要给「秩序」歌功颂德了。
E: Oh, I get it now. The last scene is all about singing the praises of the Order.

C: 你为何要向我们发出决斗邀请？
E: Why did you invite us to this duel?

C: 呃…在某种意义上，是景元将军帮咱们打下来的。
E: Uh... kind of, it was General Jing Yuan who helped us shoot it down.

C: 那…知更鸟小姐会怎么样？她和星期日都和这场谐乐大典脱不了干系吧，还是亲兄妹……
E: Then... what's going to happen to Miss Robin? She and Sunday won't be able to deny their involvement in the Charmony Festival, they're siblings after all...

C: 没有麦芽果汁也就算了，好歹来点别的嘛！比如「白宝石」之类稀烂贱的牌子，又不贵。
E: I can live without malt juice, but at least stock somethin' else! Like that "White Gem," common as dirt and not too pricey.

C: 我只是…在你的「记忆」中发现了一处非常有趣的地方。
E: I just... stumbled upon a particularly fascinating spot in your memory.

C: 呵呵，小米沙…或者现在应该称呼他为「钟表匠」先生？
E: Heh, little Misha... or should I call him the Watchmaker?

C: 那你们两个先回列车吧。我去接小三月，顺便办理退房——还有，黑天鹅小姐也找我有事，对吧？
E: You two head back to the Express first. I'll pick up March and deal with the check-out procedure. Oh also, Miss Black Swan, you have a matter to discuss with me, yes?

C: 你们去吧，各位。我毕竟是个外人，就不给久别重逢添乱了。
E: You guys go. I'm an outsider after all — I'd rather not disrupt a long-awaited reunion.

C: 波提欧
E: Boothill

C: {NICKNAME}，有兴趣和我聊聊天么？这边。
E: {NICKNAME}, how about a chat? Over here.

C: 而其中有些人，他们存在的痕迹过于强烈，以致在这一簇簇浪花里留下了自己的倒影。
E: And for some, their presence leaves such a strong mark that it's reflected in the waves.

C: 你是在守望我吗？
E: Are you watching over me?

C: 有趣。但既然那是「钻石」的决议，没有人能够提前猜到答案。
E: Interesting. But since it's Diamond's call, no one can predict the outcome.

C: 此人只垂着眸子，不知对着何物痴痴笑着。
E: Their eyes simply droop as they giggle like a fool at only god knows what.

C: 一位P<unbreak>45</unbreak>级的高管在梦境中遭到袭击、几近丧命，公司不可能对此坐视不理。再加上谐乐大典期间的骚乱…匹诺康尼在大众眼里的公信力也已经降到了新低。
E: One of our P<unbreak>45</unbreak> executives was attacked and nearly killed in the Dreamscape. The IPC can't simply ignore this incident. Moreover, considering the turbulence during the Charmony Festival... Penacony's credibility has taken a hit in the public's eyes.

C: 苦口的吧。
E: Bitter.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 将所有的回忆和感情倒在一起，搅拌均匀，透过时间的滤网，留在杯中的便是值得回味的东西。
E: Blend all your memories and emotions together and stir them well. Through the filter of time, what remains in the glass is something to savor.

C: 信用良好、暴利、有发展前景，哪怕经历这次劫难，依旧是银河中一等一的优质资产，这点毫无疑问。
E: Yes, despite its recent calamity, Penacony remains a top-quality asset within the Cosmos, with good credit, lucrative potential, and promising prospects.

C: 不巧，我的习惯是先将军、再落子。直接说结论吧：第一，你的计划不可能实现。匹诺康尼绝无绕过公司「上市」的可能。
E: Unfortunately, I'd like to speak the harsh truth before laying out my plan. Let's cut to the chase. First, your plan won't work. Penacony has no way of sidestepping the IPC and going public.

C: 这个案子本就是砂金揽下来的，而你是他指定的项目伙伴。若不是那孩子玩得太过火，我也不会被推到幕前来。
E: Aventurine initiated this case, and you were his project partner. If that kid hadn't overplayed his hand, I wouldn't have been pushed to the forefront.

C: 我叫…星期日。
E: My name is... Sunday.

C: 我讨厌喧闹的场合，对沉思有害而无益…简直浪费时间。
E: I detest noisy gatherings, as they intrude upon my thoughts... What a waste of time.

C: 「剧本」的结局还没到来——我们还会再见的！
E: The "script" hasn't reached its end yet — we will meet again!

C: 是不是很惊喜、很意外、很恐慌？没有吗？真的？好吧，太可惜了。你真该学学怎么讨女孩子欢心！
E: Was it surprising, shocking, horrifying? No? Really? Fine. That's too bad then. You really ought to learn how to win a girl over!

C: 我二呢？
E: Where's two?

C: …哦，等等，匹诺康尼的家族没买这首歌的版权，不能在这里播放。这样吧，我来为您朗诵一段好了——接下来请欣赏诗朗诵《不抛弃，不放弃》！
E: ...Oh, hang on, Penacony's Family have not purchased the rights to this song — we can't play it here. How about this, I'll recite it for you — next up, please enjoy a recital of Never Give Up, Never Surrender!

C: 必须指出的是，这只娃娃没有任何可疑的地方，它由内自外地散发着一个完美「芙莫」娃娃该有的气息，而非一枚虚数中子弹。
E: It must be pointed out that this doll has no suspicious features at all. It exudes from within an aura befitting of a "Furmur" doll, not that of an imaginary neutron bomb.

C: 哪里的话，你们为「钟表匠」做了太多，我们无以为报，就让我作为流梦礁的代表，再敬各位无名客一杯吧。
E: Oh, that's alright. You've all done so much for the Watchmaker, and we are forever indebted. Allow me, as the representative of Dreamflux Reef, to make another toast to all the Nameless.

C: 即便无关，但我们活在当下
E: Regardless of the significance, we live in the present

C: <color=#ff3a3e>但有些事是不会改变的。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>But some things will never change.</color>

C: 没有人知道帕姆是什么时候登上列车的，但可以想见的是，它这一路上一定经历了许多我们难以想象的相见和离别。
E: No one knows exactly when Pom-Pom boarded the Express, but one can surmise that their journey has been filled with many hellos and goodbyes, probably more than we can imagine.

C: 很可爱的房间呢，三月小姐——和你本人一样。
E: It's a very cute room, Miss March... just like you.

C: ——哎呀，贵宾，我刚说话有点大声了，您多见谅！猎犬们只是在进行例行检查，现在客房设施一切正常，您尽管放心入住。
E: Ahem, I beg your pardon, esteemed guest. I was a bit brusque earlier. The Bloodhounds are just carrying out a routine inspection. All guest rooms and facilities are in good order, so please be at ease and enjoy your stay.

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉……
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na... ♪

C: 多么奇妙但又融洽的氛围！无论如何，你应该加入其中，拥抱小猴子们的悦耳*蕉声*和香蕉气息——
E: What a wonderful yet harmonious atmosphere! No matter what, you should join in, embrace the pleasant Banagibberish and the scent of bananas from the little monkeys—

C: 银河球棒侠。
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 这群邪祟的出现乃是大祸之兆，是我等忍侠的{RUBY_B#猎物}死敌{RUBY_E#}在觊觎此地的证明——
E: The appearance of these fiendlings are a sign of impending disaster. It is proof that the Ninja Hero's {RUBY_B#prey}archenemy{RUBY_E#} has their eyes set on the land.

C: 这…应该是个头套吧？
E: That's just a mascot head, right?

C: 我知道你是匹诺康尼的盛会巨星，所以我希望这次你也能发挥相应的实力——
E: I know you're Penacony's Festive Superstar, so I expect you to show me what you're made of.

C: 这样啊，恭喜你，有清晰的「目标」，影片票房一定不会低。
E: I see. Congratulations on having a clear goal. Your film will surely be a hit at the box office.

C: 反正也没损失，就先试试看呗。你们呢？去了哪个学院？
E: It's no skin off my back anyway, so I thought I'd give it a shot. What about you two? What academy did you get?

C: 坏学生，不许欺负同学！
E: Bad freshman! Don't bully your schoolmate!

C: 各位大佬身份如此显赫，也一定有着独到的消费眼光，让我来为你们介绍模玩社的主力商品——「睡蕉小猴玩偶」！
E: Someone with your eminent status must have a keen eye for consumer products. Let me introduce you to the Toys and Models Club's bestseller — the Slumbernana Monkey Figurine!

C: 等等，先别过去，纪检部正在搜查违反校规的学生。
E: Wait, don't go there. The Disciplinary Committee is searching for a student who broke school rules.

C: 这俩词是一个意思？
E: They both mean the same thing?

C: …你知道她在说什么吗？
E: ...Do you know what she's talking about?

C: 一种事物受到追捧自然有它的原因，你迟早会明白。
E: There's a reason why things become popular. You'll understand some day.

C: 哼，睡蕉小猴？
E: Hmm. Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 通过了，先生，你真是令人刮目相看！请进请进。
E: Congratulations, you've passed! That was impressive! This way, sir.

C: 哦，原来是乱破派你来的？难怪说话和她一样弯绕。
E: Oh, Rappa sent you? No wonder you're talking in that same convoluted manner.

C: 但至少，知更鸟小姐能将选择的权利重新摆到他们面前。
E: But I hope Miss Robin would at least give them that right to choose once again.

C: 巧了，我就是来搭把手的。给你们指个地儿，去那儿待着吧。
E: Oh? That's exactly what I'm here for! Here, head over to this place and just wait for it.

C: 嗯，让我们开场吧。
E: Yes, let's get this party started.

C: 你喊着什么正义勇气开拓，将周身气力用于双臂，试图使它为你打开一条代表希望与财富的缝隙——
E: You yell out something about trailblazing justice and courage, channeling all your strength into your arms, and attempt to make it open a crevice representing hope and fortune for you...

C: …睡蕉小猴？它身上有个标签——「财富学院，蕉开富贵」。
E: ...Slumbernana Monkey? I see a tag on it: "Peelin' Richie, Fortune Academy."

C: 蕉蕉蕉！富贵同学，怎么能这么对客户说话呢？
E: Richie! Bana tsk! How could you speak so rudely to your customers?

C: 我也要当小猴！
E: I want to be a monkey too!

C: 谐乐蕉师，这边几位候选演员，不知能否满足你的要求？
E: Charmony BananAdvisor, I have a few candidates here. Perhaps they will be to your liking?

C: 猖狂地说脏话
E: Brazenly spew swear words

C: 真有病！
E: You're a sicko!

C: 一个站在原始博士这边的巡海游侠，一位经由培养而诞生的背叛者…这值得再多写几篇论文。
E: A Galaxy Ranger that stands on the side of Dr. Primitive, a traitor born from nurture... this warrants several more research papers.

C: 小可爱，我不是来给你们上课的……
E: See, I'm not here to teach a class, shirtbrain...

C: 从那一刻起，「睡蕉的时刻」就已注定会诞生。
E: From that point onward, the Moment of Slumbernana was fated to be born.

C: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪蕉？
E: {NICKNAME}, where are you going, bana?

C: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>，我们需要提升三号的精神抗性。
E: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>, we need to increase No. 3's mental resilience.

C: 别弯弯绕绕的了，你就是见不得她受苦吧？
E: Enough with these lame excuses. You just can't bear to see her suffer, can you?

C: 在下已是真正的忍者了吗？
E: Am I really a true ninja now?

C: 这场实验是我们一起进行的，我们亲手把她变成了现在的模样——卓绝的智慧、超凡的感知、强大的力量……
E: We conducted this experiment together. We were the ones who shaped her into this: Someone with unparalleled intelligence, extraordinary perception, and incredible power...

C: {NICKNAME}，折纸大学与流梦礁的人们还在危险中，准备出发吧…蕉。
E: {NICKNAME}, the people in Paperfold University and Dreamflux Reef are still in grave danger. Let's set off... bana.

C: …刚刚的*蕉声*消失了。
E: ...The Banagibberish sounds from before have stopped.

C: 可叹，可叹。
E: Alas...

C: 根据苦茶大师的指示，乱破踏入了忍•科学的玄妙器皿中……
E: Following Master Kucha's instructions, Rappa ventures into the magical vessel made of ninja tech...

C: {NICKNAME}•忍者
E: Ninja {NICKNAME}

C: 使用秘技冲刺
E: Use Technique and Sprint

C: 最后…{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}宝库就在眼前了。
E: Finally... the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} Vault is right ahead.

C: 即便是来自天外的{NICKNAME}，也无法逃离死神的十指。而在那场「死亡」的试炼中，人们得到和失去的……
E: Even {NICKNAME}, coming from beyond the sky, could not escape the Reaper's two hands. And what people gained and lost in that trial of "Death"...

C: 根据格奈乌斯的说法，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}虽是灾厄的化身之一，却也肩负着抵御黑潮的使命……
E: According to Gnaeus, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, though one of the embodiments of Calamity, also bears the responsibility of fending off the black tide...

C: 滚吧！你们的王权，带上！悬锋的印戒，享受染血的荣光，你们自己！
E: Get out! Symbol of your sovereignty, take it! Signet of Kremnos, bask in blood-soaked glory, your kind alone!

C: …{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}试炼真正的门户。
E: ...The true entrance to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} trial.

C: 丹恒，你起得真早。
E: You're up so early, Dan Heng!

C: 奥赫玛将两位卷入{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，令你们身处险境，实属无奈。我等对两位的「开拓」义举感激不尽，愿以奥赫玛最上等的礼仪相谢。
E: For all that has happened, it was never our intention to drag you two into the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and jeopardize your safety. To express our gratitude for your kind Trailblazing endeavors, we would like to present you with the highest honor of Okhema.

C: 真是的…别这么快放弃，至少也像只小兔子一样挣扎一下吧。
E: Come now... Don't give up so easily! At least struggle a bit like a scared bunny!

C: 不过，这也意味着<color=#dbc291ff>金丝</color>确实与泰坦显迹系于一身了——没有金丝勾勒，我们绝无可能看到它们。
E: However, this also means that <color=#dbc291ff>the golden thread</color> has definitely connected with the Titan's presence. Without the golden thread's outlines, we would not have been able to see them at all.

C: 马上……
E: Almost...

C: 声音是从…那边发出来的。
E: The voice is coming from... over there.

C: 以防你良心受到谴责，还是再好好想想吧。别让你的伙伴失望！
E: To avoid a guilty conscience, think it over carefully. Don't let your partners down!

C: 一人一个问题…啊，那小兔子不算在内。问罢。
E: I'll allow each of you to ask a question... Ah, but not the little bunny. So, ask away.

C: 以你对人类社会普遍水准的理解，争强好胜是生命的天性——蝴蝶定当也不例外——而掠夺共同的猎物必定能唤醒这种深藏于基因中的原始本能。
E: Understanding the common nature of human society, you believe that the drive to compete is an innate instinct of all living beings — surely the butterfly is no exception — and that vying for shared prey should awaken this primal urge deeply embedded in its genes.

C: *泰坦悲伤的低鸣*
E: *Titan's sad cries*

C: 若西风有其尽头，吾等便在那重逢罢。
E: If the west wind ever ends, let that be the place where we reunite.

C: 炼金就是这么…不可思议。
E: Alchemy is truly... incredible.

C: 我…我不知道啊，大人，哈哈…怎么上去的？
E: I—I don't know, my lord, ahaha... How did it come to be?

C: 在行将毁灭的时代，谈论血统没有意义。
E: Bloodlines no longer hold any significance in this era of destruction.

C: 悬锋人？这片惨状…是他们造成的？
E: Kremnoan? This is... their doing?

C: 「好多人」同时因为池水高温昏迷？浴场的管理人在何处？
E: Multiple individuals fainting simultaneously from the hot pool's steam? Where is the manager of the baths?
Oh...

C: 第一反应竟然是否定么？不愧是那刻夏的门生。
E: So, your first reaction is in fact denial? You're indeed Anaxa's student.

C: …「纷争」的时刻终究会到来。
E: ...The instant of "Strife" shall inevitably arrive.

C: …她们为了保护树庭、抗争黑潮，战至最后一刻了。
E: ...They fought until their last breath against the black tide to defend the Grove.

C: 呵，这下倒好——她甚至不愿意见我一面。
E: Hmph, that's just great. She refuses to even see me.

C: 呵呵。不过，只有一个人是不够的。等你长大了，一定会遇见许多朋友。你要尽全力团结他们，这也是我们身为祭司的职责。
E: Hehe. But one person alone is not enough. Once you're older, you'll make a lot of friends. You must do your best to unite them because that's also our duty as priests.

C: 这些景象，也都是岁月的涟漪吗？
E: Are these visions also fragments of the past?

C: 哇…缇宝、缇宁，快看，好厉害！
E: Wow! Tribbie! Trinnon! Look at this! So cool!

C: 来吧！悬锋人的投矛一向利落——命运自会为我制导枪头！
E: Come! The Kremnoans' spear always finds their mark — Fate itself shall forge my speartip!

C: 我知道。难以想象，人类唯二能仰赖的泰坦竟在如此短的时间内先后遭遇毒手…金线前所未有地紧绷，仿若一触即溃。
E: I know. It's beyond my imagination that the only two Titans humankind can still rely on fell in such quick succession... I've never seen the golden thread pulled this taut, as if it could snap at any moment.

C: 说说看，凭什么你们觉得——结局不会是又一颗火种的丢失？
E: Tell me, what makes you think this won't end with us losing another Coreflame?

C: 是的！感受到大家热切的目光了吗？这么重大的场合，可不能让他们失望呀！
E: Yeah! Can you feel their fervent gazes? This is a big deal! We can't let everyone down!

C: 我将卸下，所谓「王」的名号。
E: Will be to renounce the title of "King."

C: 但你们会踏上唯一的出路，它的尽头将是崭新的世界。
E: Yet, you shall tread the only path out, one that leads to a brand-new world at its end.

C: 还乡…也许吧。现在悬锋城不仅是我的故乡，还是我命运的归宿。
E: Returning home, you say... Heh, maybe. At this moment, Castrum Kremnos is not just my birthplace, but also my fated destination.

C: 我想…「纷争」的神也许该改名了。
E: I'm thinking... Maybe it's about time the god of "Strife" gets a new name.

C: 为了悬锋！为了王！
E: For Kremnos! For the king!

C: 因为呀…这场仪式，可能会持续很久。
E: Because... this ritual might take a long time.

C: 您…看到了吗…？
E: Did you... see that?

C: 现在，无论众神满意与否……
E: Now, with or without the gods' blessing...

C: 好，好。吾不过是想提醒一句……
E: Fine, fine. All I want is to remind you...

C: 那与死亡如影随形的女孩，已做足准备了么？
E: The girl who's walking with death... is she fully prepared?

C: 请保持距离，圣女。
E: Please stay clear, Holy Maiden.

C: 正是！阿格莱雅大人已经知晓了情况，她还托人捎来口信——
E: Yes! Lady Aglaea already knows about the situation and sent along a message.

C: 我必赢不了。
E: There's no way I'm winning this.

C: 说到「朋友」，一位{RUBY_B#波提欧}「潜在的友人」{RUBY_E#}也回到了匹诺康尼。很显然，我们不可能与他建立任何官方往来…但好在他之前曾和你交换过情报，建立了些许信任。
E: Speaking of allies, a {RUBY_B#Boothill}certain someone{RUBY_E#} has returned to Penacony. Obviously, we can't have any official dealings with him... but since you've exchanged intel before, there's a little trust between you two.

C: 斯科特先生？怎么又是你？怎么老是你？
E: Skott!? You again? Why is it always you?

C: 是你？哼，真是糟糕的重逢。
E: You? Tch... What a terrible reunion.

C: 是的，您就是我的御主，而我是您的从者。
E: Yes, you are my Master. And I am your Servant.

C: 好嘞，您就放心吧，除了上菜，绝不会有任何人来打扰您的。
E: Alright, you can rest easy. No one's gonna bother you while you're eating.

C: 我也收到了。是群发的吗？
E: I got one too. Was it a mass text?

C: 我就喜欢直面陷阱。
E: I like diving right into the trap.

C: …可惜了，明明特意为我创造了这样的幻境，却连个坐骑也没有。
E: ...What a shame. She's created such a fantasy for me, yet I don't even have a mount.

C: 要知道，地概科的工作可没你想象中轻松。
E: Just so you know, working at the Department of Cosmic Geography isn't as easy as you think.

C: 月度经费审批。
E: Monthly Budget Review.

C: 而「圣杯战争」的举行，显然已经让他得到了远超这些成本的收益。
E: And... I fear the Holy Grail War has already given him returns far beyond what he's put into it.

C: 挣扎、失意、抗争…最终又沦为无名的过客，这位前辈是那个匹诺康尼时代的缩影，是令人捧腹绝倒的小丑，也是货真价实的英雄。
E: He has had his struggles, disappointments, and defiance... only to be reduced to another nameless nobody. That man is a symbol of the Penacony of his times, a most ridiculous clown... And a most genuine hero.

C: 早点去死吧！
E: I wish you were already dead.

C: 破旧的电视机摇摇晃晃地发出噪音，但可惜，这是默片，你无法听到雪花噪点的沙沙声。
E: The battered TV wobbles, buzzing with static noise. But alas, this is a silent film. You can't hear a single crackle of the snowflakes.

C: 你是什么职阶？Bomber？
E: What class are you? Bomber?

C: 这不是版权，是垄断！
E: That's not copyright. That's monopolization!

C: 妖孽，还不束手就擒！
E: Monster! Surrender, or face justice!

C: 我无法允诺你们一个天堂。但我可以保证，我会永远站在最前面身先士卒，而非躲在背后看你们送死。
E: I can't promise you paradise. But I swear I'll always fight on the front lines, not hide behind you while you die.

C: 吾王剑锋所指，吾等心之所向！
E: Wheresoever my king's sword points, our hearts shall follow!

C: 在失去耐心以前，我还可以给你一个弃明投暗的机会。杀死你身边的家伙，回到我们身边。
E: Before I lose my patience, here's your chance to switch sides. Kill the one next to you and return to us.

C: 不可能！你们居然找到了破解诅咒的方法！这是作弊！不算数，再来一局！
E: Impossible! You actually found a way to break the curse!? That's cheating! Doesn't count! I demand a rematch!

C: 哈？
E: Huh?

C: 自欺的心
E: Self-deceiving Heart

C: 好一个咄咄逼人、有趣、张狂的演员！难得有人能将我驳斥到哑口无言……
E: What a sharp-tongued, amusing, and flamboyant actor you are! It's rare for anyone to make me go completely speechless during a debate...

C: 攻城战和集结的战士，终于有点战争的感觉了。
E: A siege and warriors assembled to storm the walls. Now, this is starting to feel like a real war.

C: 很遗憾，那位慈玉女士没有给出任何指示。
E: Regrettably, Lady Bonajade didn't drop so much as a hint about it.

C: 是因为歌斐木先生。他常常在公园里停留，观察众生百态。于先生而言，这也是疲惫时休憩的方式。
E: No, it was for Mr. Gopher Wood. He used to stop by the park to people-watch and appreciate the vibrancy of life. This was his way of recharging whenever things wore him out.

C: 我现在的身份是逃犯。
E: May I remind you that I'm currently on the run?

C: 万维克，请出来吧。我们能仰赖的人多了一位。
E: Come on out, Wonweek. We've found ourselves an ally.

C: 那毕竟是个无名客认知外的世界，所以我发信给她，希望包罗万象的「智识」能提供更多信息。
E: It's a world beyond the knowledge of the Nameless, after all. I wrote to her hoping that the all-encompassing Erudition could provide us with some information.

C: 黑塔女士也一样。不过她倒是来了兴致，说要调查一番，大概是因为背后是流光忆庭吧，她一直对「记忆」的技术很感兴趣。
E: Madam Herta said the same, but it did pique her interest, and she agreed to do a little digging. My guess is that there's a chance the Garden of Recollection is behind it. She's always had a keen interest in the Remembrance's technology, after all.

C: 呀，几位莫不是来找小女子的？
E: Oh, were you all looking for me?

C: 但有人不这么认为，而我恰好能满足他的要求。
E: But someone didn't agree with that assessment, and it just so happens I was able to fulfill his request.

C: 这当真是我自己支的摊子…？
E: Did I really make this stall?

C: 接下来是景元将军。
E: Next is General Jing Yuan.

C: 不用谢。
E: You're welcome.

C: 哇…当然可以，太客气啦。
E: Wow, that's really nice of you!

C: 此前阮•梅只身造访罗浮，也提到了你的事，与星穹列车发来消息几乎是同一时间。
E: When Ruan Mei visited the Luofu earlier, she mentioned what happened to you. This coincided with when the message sent by the Astral Express arrived.

C: 让他留下吧，不会碍事的。
E: Let him stay. He won't be in the way.

C: 忙里偷闲，想找个安静的地方散心，最好能看见星星。走着走着就到了这里。
E: I'm taking a break. I wanted to find a quiet place to relax, ideally somewhere where I could see the stars. Before I knew it, I'd walked all the way here.

C: 我讨厌轻佻的人，就连模仿他们的样子也会感到不适。即便经历失败，我也不会轻易放下某些坚持，比如「得体」，比如「高洁」。
E: I dislike people who are frivolous. It makes me uncomfortable to even emulate them. If I fail, I will still uphold my principles, such as decorum and stateliness.

C: 请勿担心。篡夺星核，假借谐乐大典复活已死的星神，这场动乱的主谋确实是橡木家系，各位已经战胜了幕后黑手。
E: Don't worry. The Oak Family was indeed behind seizing the Stellaron and resurrecting the fallen Aeon during the Charmony Festival, and you've already defeated them.

C: 可是在这场交锋中，你和他是最直接的对手。你的想法尤为重要。
E: But in this battle, you were the one who directly confronted him. Your opinion holds the most weight.

C: 你是位可敬的对手。
E: You're a worthy adversary.

C: 甚至，可能是星神本人垂迹。
E: I would even go as far as to say Aeons THEMSELVES.

C: 再等等。
E: Hold on a moment.

C: 悟性挺高的嘛，镜子。
E: Hm, very perceptive for a mirror.

C: 把我宝贵的「谒见系统」搞得一团糟，也是为了把我本人引来这里，为你们带路……
E: And messing with my precious Audience System is just a ruse to lure me here so I can lead you to THEM...

C: 惩罚的时长…也不该太严苛，就取<color=#dbc291ff>百分之一的人生吧？</color>这点时间，足够你好好反省了。
E: As for the length of your punishment... Let's keep it mildly punitive. <color=#dbc291ff>How about a hundredth of a lifetime?</color> That should be enough for some serious self-reflection.

C: 但要是我不管那两个入侵者，继续往前…等机器头向空间站投下目光，那一瞬间的能量保准会把他们烧成焦炭。
E: But if I were to ignore those two intruders and continue onward... When Droidhead casts THEIR gaze upon the space station, the blast of energy generated in that instant is sure to burn them to a crisp.

C: 坏消息是，他们可能对外来者怀有敌意。
E: We can only hope they're not hostile toward outsiders.

C: 我怀疑过他们在刻意制造偶遇，但这些难民…怎么看都不像是演的。暂时只能认为，他们和袭击者不是一股势力。
E: I suspected they might have staged the encounter, but these refugees... they're clearly not pretending. For now, it's reasonable to assume they're not on the same side as the attackers.

C: 语言居然互通，不奇怪吗？
E: How is it even remotely possible that we share a common language?

C: 你是说，你们的文明面临着末日？
E: Are you saying your civilization is coming to an end?
...Hmm?

C: 骑乘大地兽。
E: Ride the dromas.

C: 神殿好冷……
E: The temple is so cold...

C: 看不到居民，已经疏散了吗？
E: I don't see any more residents. Have they been evacuated?

C: 奥赫玛，黄金裔，一群懦夫。忠诚和荣耀，铸就我们。欺瞒和软弱，捏成你们。
E: Okhema, Chrysos Heirs — what cowards. We live by loyalty and glory, while you live by weakness and deceit.

C: 妈妈，我怕…
E: Mommy, I'm scared...

C: 哈哈！那二位算是找对人了，不才达米亚诺斯，对旅行和留影颇有研究——毕竟我的身份，就是圣城家喻户晓的探险家！
E: Aha! You met the right person! The name's Damionis, and I may have some humble insight on travel and photography... After all, everyone in this holy city knows me as the explorer!

C: …喂，记住「约定」。
E: ...Hey, remember the agreement.

C: …这话听着像星核猎手的台词。
E: ...Why are you speaking like a Stellaron Hunter all of a sudden?

C: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
E: Have you seen Damionis?

C: 达米亚诺斯？那个自命不凡的探险家？
E: Damionis? That explorer who thinks very highly of himself?

C: 那您可来对地方了！看，我这儿刚进了些小零食，都是您和您的姐妹们最喜欢的口味！
E: Then you've come to the right place! Look at all these snacks that I've just gotten. They are all flavors that you and your sisters love!

C: 比起热水浴，持明更爱清凉的水流。这是一种…天性。
E: Well, actually... the Vidyadhara prefer cooler waters over hot baths. It's our... nature.

C: 然后，你终于明白了……
E: Then, you finally understand...

C: …睡吧。睡去。打扰…不该。
E: ...Sleep. Go sleep. Disturb... should not.

C: 如此一来，远征悬锋城的队伍已经成型。哀丽秘榭的白厄，悬锋城的万敌，还有…来自异乡的{NICKNAME}。
E: The party that will embark on the expedition to Castrum Kremnos is decided: Phainon from Aedes Elysiae, Mydei from Castrum Kremnos, and... {NICKNAME} from the outlands.

C: 那里。从那道门走出去，就是卫城。
E: There. Once we pass through that gate, we'll be in the acropolis.

C: 尽是些堕入邪道的小卒，干脆利落地击碎它们就是最大的仁慈。
E: They're minions who've succumbed to depravity. Smashing them to pieces would be the greatest mercy.

C: 先别急着走，{NICKNAME}——我有种直觉，这房间里还藏着什么秘密。
E: Wait, {NICKNAME}, don't leave yet. My intuition tells me this room is still hiding a secret.

C: 她应该对这种景色不感兴趣。
E: She is likely not interested in such scenery.

C: 这样就好了吧？但愿别再被莫名其妙的机关挡住去路了。
E: This should work now. Let's just hope no more strange mechanisms get in our way.

C: 成为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的利刃…贯穿敌人的心脏与机核……
E: You shall become {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s blade... to pierce through the enemy's heart and core...

C: 还有另一件事。悬锋堡的石板上提到了「渗透」……
E: There's one other thing. We found a slate in Kremnos that mentioned an infiltration...

C: 悬锋城这两去两回，缇安已经用光了力气，需要些时间恢复。
E: The two trips to and from Castrum Kremnos have completely drained Trianne. She'll need some time to recover.

C: 还有扎格列斯之手的石台，遍地都是。正好省了走回头路的麻烦。
E: There are also stone platforms for the Hand of Zagreus all around. This will save us the trouble of doubling back.

C: 比「世界的命运」更为沉重之物……
E: Something that has more weight than the fate of the world...

C: 「等待…讨厌，等待……」
E: "Waiting... Hate waiting..."

C: 「等待…讨厌，等待……」
E: "Waiting... Hate waiting..."

C: 我们需要让过去重现。
E: We have to recreate the past.

C: 用「奇迹宝珠」或许能映照出通路。
E: Perhaps the Miracle Orbs can illuminate the way forward.

C: 拜托了。缇宝老师——能再劳烦你一次吗？
E: I'll leave it to you. Tribbie... Could I trouble you once again?

C: 喔，这位温婉优雅的女士！您也是来听利波献唱的吗？
E: Oh, elegant lady! Are you here to listen to Lipos' song?

C: （姐姐，你说的话好深奥…我听不太懂。）
E: (Big sis, your words are so hard to understand. I'm really confused.)

C: 嘿，嘿嘿……
E: Heh heheh...

C: 别倒下——我们还没到终点。
E: Stay strong. We have not reached the end yet.

C: 「吾等，将神王的『坚韧』封藏于剑皿之中。」
E: "We shall hereby seal the god-king's Tenacity within this sword vessel."

C: 嗯…只剩下那最后缺失的一瓣神性。
E: Hm... We're now left with the final missing fragment of divinity.

C: 我知道该去哪里寻找了。
E: I believe I know where it is.

C: 容不得再拖延了。
E: We can't put this off any longer.

C: 稍微清洁一下就看不出是二手的了，哈……
E: With a bit of sprucing up, no one will guess it's second-hand, heh...

C: 天真的孩子，你考虑得如此之多，却唯独忘记了一件事——
E: You have thought much about this, sweet child, but there is one thing you overlooked.

C: 「救世主」…是什么意思？
E: Deliverer...? What does that mean?

C: 你有自己的想法，我理解。不妨换个时间，细细讨论。
E: I understand your stance. Let's continue this discussion another time.

C: …脱离了经历而独立存在的记忆？
E: ...Memories that exist outside of your own experiences?

C: 说到留影，先前为阁下拍摄照片时，出于礼貌，不能翻阅石机里的照片。但我也很好奇那位「粉霞天女」的故事。
E: Speaking of taking photographs, when I was helping you to take the photo previously, I did not look through the photos in your photostone out of courtesy. But I'm also very curious about the story of the Rosy Celestial Maiden.

C: …下次回折纸大学，该让你重温下考试长什么样了。
E: ...Perhaps you should retake some exams next time we visit Paperfold University.

C: 我担心那刻夏老师会被元老院利用。
E: I'm afraid that the Council of Elders might want to take advantage of Professor Anaxa.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 我从未这样触碰过「生者」。有失礼节之处，还望阁下体谅……
E: I have never touched the living in this way before. If my actions are in any way disrespectful, I hope that you can forgive me...

C: 吾实在好奇，汝要如何在双方的矛头下委曲求全，便来旁听了。
E: I was really curious to see how you would find the middle ground between both factions, so I came to listen in.

C: 多么掷地有声！不愧是敢与那位「金织」分庭抗礼的英雄。
E: What strong conviction you have! As expected of the hero who dared to stand up to the Goldweaver.

C: 呵呵…明白了。我会妥善处理此事。
E: Fine, I will handle this matter appropriately.

C: 愿您能为这濒毁的世界，带来真正的「变革」。
E: It is my hope that you bring a much-needed change to this world which is on the brink of destruction.

C: （卡吕普索？她是七贤人…树庭的人？）
E: (Calypso? She's one of the Seven Sages... A member of the Grove?)

C: 但，现在…或许我还有最后一次机会。
E: But now... perhaps I might have one last chance.

C: 很久以前，缇宁老师为我解读过一则预言。她说：<color=#dbc291ff>「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖；相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」</color>
E: Long ago, Trinnon read a prophecy to me: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips, and after an embrace... there shall be eternal separation."</color>

C: 对此我并不惊讶，因为她说的仿佛并非预言，而是我过去的全部写照。
E: I found no surprise in it, for her words sounded not like a foretelling, but a perfect reflection of my past.

C: 而你，赛飞儿：当你不再迷茫时，也必然会做出同样的选择。
E: ...As will you, Cipher, when you finally make up your mind.

C: 翁法罗斯货币和我们的不一样。
E: The currency I use isn't the same as the one in Amphoreus.

C: （硬币…赛飞儿？她还帮我把被子盖好了？！）
E: (This is... a coin...? It was Cipher? And she even tucked me in!?)

C: 毕竟人家不止外表可爱，还是实力派呢。
E: Being cute isn't my only forte. I'm strong, too!

C: 不，别杀我……
E: No... Please don't kill me...

C: 一，二，三…早就超过十根手指的天数了。
E: One, two, three... It's been much longer than ten days since we left Mommy.

C: 等等…赛飞儿阁下？
E: Wait a minute... Lady Cipher?

C: 阁下，战争早已结束了。斯缇科西亚…已经不存在了。
E: Sir, the war ended long ago. Styxia... no longer exists.

C: 无妨，圣女，至少您回应了我的期许…请将「死亡」赐给我吧。
E: That's alright, Holy Maiden. At least you are able to respond to me. Please... grant me "Death."

C: …但自从听说你已濒临死去的消息，我就更加确信——为这世间抹除「死亡」便是我的使命。
E: But I've never been more firm in my conviction, now that I've learned about your near-death state — It is my duty to wipe "Death" from the face of this world.

C: 明明拍过很多照片…却都是些黑白色调的风景，都没留下一张和大家的合照。
E: I took countless photos in the past, but they're all black-and-white landscapes. I don't have a single one with friends.

C: 感谢您…为我带来了最后的钥匙。
E: Thank you... for bringing me the final key.

C: 在现在的你看来…这或许有些不可思议吧？
E: From where you stand now, I suppose that's a bit hard to believe, right?

C: 我明白，你很不安…别害怕……
E: And I know you're anxious... Shh, don't be afraid...

C: 所以现在，请带领我渡过冥海，回到冥界，就像你曾经做的那样……
E: So please, carry me across the Sea of Souls again and return me to the nether realm, just like you did in the past...

C: 可以告诉我吗？上一次「再创世」……
E: Can you tell me... about the last Era Nova?

C: 可惜命运早已注定…在我徒劳的尝试下，它以意想不到的形式兑现了。
E: But our fates were already decided... and manifested in unexpected ways in response to my futile actions.

C: 我们走过不同的路，却品尝着同样的滋味。
E: We walked different paths, yet experienced the same pain.

C: 但直到不久前，我才意识到：若非你的赐福，我也无法理解那些感情从何而来，无法理解自己的使命——
E: But I realized recently that if it weren't for your blessing, I wouldn't have understood the source of these emotions, nor would I have realized my purpose...
"Strife"... "Protection"...

C: 对！阿格莱雅现在独木难支了——因为，在虫豸们于光天化日下望风捕影、酝酿阴谋之时，她正呕心沥血地编织圣城的防御网，以对抗世间无孔不入的恶毒！
E: It is true that Aglaea has reached her limit. Why? Because she has been working tirelessly to weave the defenses of our holy city against the encroaching evil — all while these vermin are making up baseless accusations about her and scheming in the shadows!

C: 他们想欺骗你们，把这场大会粗暴地归结成「人」与「神」的对立。还记得我的请求吗？奥赫玛的公民们，请擦亮双眼，仔细端详一下站在你们身边的人吧！
E: They attempt to mislead you and reduce this assembly to a crude standoff between gods and humans, but citizens of Okhema! Once more, I implore you to open your eyes and look at those around you!

C: 是你误会了，凯妮斯阁下。你不了解我，我从不关心你们那可怜的政治游戏。什么阵营、立场，无一例外，全都是笑话。我的选择从未变过……
E: If you really understood me, Lady Caenis, you'd realize that I never had any interest in your pathetic little game of politics. Factions, standpoints... they are jokes in my eyes. I have never once switched sides...

C: 只有我自己，才是唯一确凿的真理。
E: Because I, and I alone, am the truth.

C: 瓦尔特将星穹列车的坐标分享给了大黑塔……
E: Welt shares the Astral Express's coordinates with The Herta...

C: 只是…临行前，灰宝却遇上了那种麻烦…我身为医师，本该陪在{M#他}{F#她}身旁的。
E: It's just... I never thought Grayie would meet with something like that before we set off... As a physician, I should have been there by {M#his}{F#her} side.

C: 呵，仅仅掌握泰坦的神力，未免太过肤浅。
E: Hah, why stop at harnessing the power of the Titans when I can do so much more?

C: 当然，我会一锤定音，给你想要的解答。
E: Of course, I'll bring this to a conclusive end and give you the answer you so desire.

C: 我该回家拿祭祀的坛子来，拿花冠来，拿焚烧的乳香来——
E: I should've gone back home to fetch a sacrificial vessel, some floral crowns, and frankincense to burn and offer...

C: 就在此时，一位巧言令色的学者来到了宫廷。他提议用龙骨和龙血复活公主——故事里，骗子称之为「炼金」的秘法。
E: It was then that a devious, smooth-talking scholar arrived at the palace and suggested that the princess could be revived through the use of dragon bone and dragon blood. That liar called this process the secret art of "alchemy."

C: 看来，我的部分猜想已经证毕：<color=#dbc291ff>「这些英雄正是泰坦们成神前的模样。」</color>
E: Looks like one hypothesis of mine has already been proven true: <color=#dbc291ff>"These heroes are the true forms of the Titans, before they attained their divinity."</color>

C: 在战场上，灾厄吞噬了所有人。只有我回到城邦，人们为我举行了不甚愉快的酒会。我也觉得自己仿佛留在了战场，回来的只剩一副躯壳。
E: The calamity had devoured everybody on the battlefield but me. When I returned to the city alone, the citizens held a banquet for me that was far from pleasant. I felt as though I was still on the battlefield, and the person who had returned was nothing but an empty shell.

C: 「现在，请你让开，别遮住了我的星光。」
E: "Now, please go away and don't block my starlight."

C: 操纵「浑象仪」
E: Operate celestial globe

C: …我们继续吧。
E: ...Let's move on.

C: 塞涅俄丝的胜利没能改变她的族人。一部分天空之民将她奉为新的神明，转而开始压迫不愿抛弃旧日信仰的人们……
E: Seliose's victory couldn't change her people. Some Skyfolk revered her as a new goddess, and began to oppress those unwilling to abandon their old beliefs...

C: 「驱赶神明吧，『天象画壁』。」
E: "Drive out the gods, Celestial Mural."

C: 见证天空之子的真实历史。
E: Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.

C: 灰宝，你会站在我身边吗？
E: Grayie, will you stand by my side?

C: 如果传入你我耳中的救世神谕有万分之一的可能成为现实……
E: Should the Prophecy of Deliverance we've heard hold even the slightest chance of becoming reality...

C: ——想念你的，缇宋。
E: — Missing you, Trissha

C: 没时间了…既然天空堡垒是由艾格勒的神力驱动的，如果我能运用火种……
E: We're out of time. The fortress runs on Aquila's divine energy — if I can channel the Coreflame...

C: 是黑潮裹挟着它起死回生了吗？
E: Did the black tide bring them back to life?

C: 赠予我们治愈的虹彩！
E: Bestow upon us the healing rainbow!

C: 还差一点…一鼓作气吧！
E: Almost there... keep the momentum going!

C: 当年在「金织」打正经工的时候，我倒是见过不少这种……
E: Back in the days when I was doing honest work for the Goldweaver, I saw my fair share of these...

C: 知道为什么要带你来这儿吗，疯狗——我听说，你之前跟那个金毛小狮子大战过一场啊？
E: Do you know why I dragged you here, mutt? Word is, you've tangled with that golden-haired lion before.

C: 白厄…人家，好像也感觉到了什么……
E: Phainon... I feel something too...

C: 正如你们生来背负神谕的指引，在沐浴来自遥远星辰的视线之后，我同样看见了至深至暗的命运……
E: Just as you were all born to shoulder the guidance of the prophecy, I too, having bathed in the gaze of distant stars, have seen the deepest, darkest of destinies...

C: 「纷争」…
E: "Strife"...

C: 明天见，缇安。
E: See you tomorrow, Trianne.

C: 暂且忘记过去吧，它让人感到悲伤——但现在不应该哀伤，你需要前进的动力。
E: Forget the past for now — it only brings sorrow. But sadness has no place in this moment. What you need is the drive to move forward.

C: 不过话说回来，赛飞儿小姐把我们叫到这儿，她自己怎么不见啦……
E: By the way, it was Miss Cipher who asked us to come here, but where has she gone...?

C: 把他拉回来吧，伙伴！
E: Drag him back here, friend!

C: 要是占卜结果里提到的吉兆都是真实的…那我的家乡，哀丽秘榭，也就不会消失了。
E: If the good omens foretold by divination were true... my hometown, Aedes Elysiae, wouldn't have disappeared.

C: 明明公民大会刚刚结束不久…为什么还会有人想要搞破坏？
E: The citizens' assembly just wrapped up... Why is there still unrest?

C: 我还记得，这座能俯瞰整座天宫的浴场，是元老院于九百年前主张兴建的。
E: I still remember, this bath that overlooks the entire Palace was built by the Council of Elders nine hundred years ago.

C: 这装置…是欧洛尼斯的祭司设计的玩具吧？你能玩明白吗？
E: Was this device designed by priests of Oronyx? Do you think you can handle it?

C: 呵，想想还真是不公平呀。仅仅是因为生错了地方，就得承受这样的灭顶之灾…反倒是那些奥赫玛人，只因为背靠负世泰坦，所以能一直维系到现在……
E: Heh, it does seem unfair, doesn't it? Just because they were born in the wrong place, they had to face such... devastation. Meanwhile, those in Okhema, simply because they're supported by the Worldbearing Titan, continue to survive...

C: 说到负世泰坦，赛飞儿大姐头，你以前是不是和我说起来过…<color=#dbc291ff>你曾经在刻法勒的祭司院当过学徒？</color>
E: Speaking of the Worldbearing Titan, Cipher, didn't you tell me once... <color=#dbc291ff>you used to be an apprentice at Kephale's Priestly Court?</color>

C: 冷静…这也可能是她的什么计策。直到亲眼确认之前……
E: Stay calm... this could just be one of her schemes. I won't believe it until I see it for myself...

C: 难以置信，她怎么可能被区区几个刺客……
E: I can't imagine, how she could've been taken down by a handful of assassins...

C: 我必须主动示弱，引得那些毒蛇失去耐心，蠢蠢欲动。当它们以为自己将要得偿所愿，露出毒牙咬向我的脚踵时——我将以最后的火焰点燃蛇巢，焚烧阴影中的威胁。
E: I must feign weakness deliberately, to make those serpents lose patience and act rashly. Just as they think they've struck and sunk their fangs into my heels — that's when I'll strike back, igniting the final blaze to burn away the threats hidden in the shadows.

C: 你怎么会来云石天宫？
E: What brings you to Marmoreal Palace?

C: 所以我采取了他的策略。我将站在对立面的论敌贬低为虫豸，抨击他们的品格，并列数他们的罪行。
E: I followed his strategy. I painted my opponents as nothing more than pests, tore apart their character, and laid out their crimes.

C: 这歌声…好熟悉呀！
E: That singing sounds so familiar!

C: 嘟嘟…嘟？
E: Doot-Doot... Doot?

C: 嗯。
E: Right.

C: 我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，大家叫我风堇——很高兴认识您！
E: I'm Hyacinthia from the Twilight Courtyard. Everyone calls me Hyacine — pleased to meet you!

C: 是因为丹宝的性格很容易伤春悲秋吧？缇宁大人每天都要解读许多预言，这也只是其中普普通通的一条而已，不必太在意啦。
E: You've always been a bit of a sensitive soul, haven't you, Dannie? Lady Trinnon deciphers countless prophecies every day, and this one's just another among many. Don't worry too much about it.

C: 对。我的祖母雅辛缇娅是一位斗士，她也曾替昏光庭院参加过悬锋祭典。
E: Yes. My grandmother Jacyntha was a warrior. She represented the Twilight Courtyard in the Kremnos Festival.

C: 呵…你还是那么乐观啊，和小时候一模一样。
E: Heh... you're still as optimistic as ever, just like when you were a kid.

C: 刚才那句话就是我发自内心的赞许，{NICKNAME}。要是那时我没有听从自己的直觉，信任你和丹恒，奥赫玛现在不知道会变成什么模样……
E: That praise was heartfelt, {NICKNAME}. Had I not trusted my instincts and put my faith in you and Dan Heng, it's hard to imagine what might have become of Okh-

C: 他们一定能摘得「天空」的火种…为逐火之旅写下圆满的终章！
E: They'll surely seize the Coreflame of Sky... and bring the Flame-Chase Journey to its perfect conclusion!

C: 如何，有头绪吗？
E: How about it? Got any leads?

C: 烈阳的子民将你的行为视作对他们的偏袒，并以此为由挤压我族……
E: The Sunborn see your behavior as an act of favoritism towards them, and weaponize this reason to oppress my people...

C: 大地？大地是我们的夙敌！
E: The land? It is our eternal nemesis!

C: 身后也有…保持阵型，当心包围！
E: They're behind us as well... Maintain formation, and don't get surrounded!

C: 这个小家伙，它是……
E: This little one...

C: 抱歉，小家伙…希望此后我们还有时间一起聊天。
E: Sorry, little one... I hope we still have time to talk later.

C: 这个结果…可以预见。
E: This outcome... was foreseeable.

C: 风堇，搭个桥。
E: Hyacine, give us a bridge.

C: 把必要的事做完以后再回来吧。
E: Let's come back after we've done everything we need to do.

C: 想法不错——可惜现实太过残酷。
E: Not a bad idea — pity it doesn't work.

C: 这也是黑潮的影响么…看来我们只能跑下山了。
E: Is this also a result of the black tide...? Looks like all we can do is sprint down the mountain.

C: 还远没到放松的时候…那盗火行者精通各种诡术，就算是万敌也不一定能限制住它的行动。
E: It's too early to relax... The Flame Reaver is a master in the art of deceit. Even Mydei may not be able to restrain them.

C: 神谕模糊不清，即便归还了第十二颗火种，也没人知道「再创世」究竟会以怎样的面目显现…更遑论「奇迹」是否能眷顾两位天外来客。
E: The prophecy has always remained shrouded in ambiguity even if the twelfth Coreflame is returned, no one knows how the Era Nova will manifest... let alone if the miracle will extend its favor to two visitors from beyond the sky.

C: 在踏入未知的命运之前，我能为你们做到的最后一件事…就是帮助你们回到家人的身边。
E: Before stepping into a fate unknown, the last thing I can do... is help you return to your family.

C: 刻法勒的火种…你知道它在哪儿吗？
E: Kephale's Coreflame... You know where it is?

C: …{NICKNAME}？！你…这是怎么回事？白厄在哪？
E: ...{NICKNAME}!? What are you doing here? Where's Phainon?

C: 这里交给我和圣城卫士…泽弗，你带他们走！
E: Leave this to me and the Holy City Guards... Zeph, take them and go!

C: 只要随身携带，个体的数据结构就能得到保护，不受激烈的数字海啸影响。必要时，它也能成为内外沟通的桥梁。
E: As long as you carry it with you, your individual data structure will be protected and will remain unaffected by the influence of digital tsunamis. When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world.

C: 告诉我：{NICKNAME}能不为翁法罗斯的规则制约，平安返回{F#她}{M#他}的家乡。
E: Promise me {NICKNAME} can return safely to {M#his}{F#her} homeland, unbound by Amphoreus's laws.

C: 以神礼观众之名，我见到：翁法罗斯已选择了她的命运。
E: As the Theoros, I declare: Amphoreus has determined her path.

C: 可是，还记得么？即便成为了理性的化身，他仍有一道未能解答的难题……
E: Oh, but you'll remember, even as the embodiment of Reason, one mystery remained beyond his grasp...

C: 嗯…你也是吗？难怪醒来以后，总觉得心里惴惴不安呢。
E: Yes... you too? That would explain this lingering sense of unease...

C: 喔，已读不回啊，让人有点伤心呢。
E: Oh, giving me the silent treatment? How cruel!

C: 呃…大概吧。
E: Well... probably.

C: 以织与剑的轮舞开篇，那便以同样的优雅谢幕吧。
E: A dance of thread and blade set the stage, so shall it end as gracefully as it started.

C: 那里有纷争的战场，有金色流光的圣城，还有许多他暂时无法理解的话语，和他自幼熟悉的、近乎亘古不变的村子殊异。
E: They brought tales of raging battles, of cities crowned in holy light, and of wonders beyond his understanding... each story so far removed from his simple village life.

C: 是啊。正如…那立于山巅的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}。
E: Yes. Just like {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, standing eternal atop the mountain.

C: 还挺会戳人痛处。
E: Right for the jugular, huh?

C: 我也是这样想的，这些心愿…并不是沉重的东西，相反，像哀丽秘榭的孩子们喜欢的糖果纸，在有阳光的地方更加闪闪发亮。
E: I can't disagree with you. These wishes aren't weights to bear. They're like those candy wrappers the Aedes Elysiae children love, shining even brighter when bathed in sunlight.

C: 别慌张。有圣女大人主持场面，我们只要安心等待就好……
E: Calm yourselves. The Holy Maiden has everything under control. We need only wait patiently...

C: 但这里是外邦，客随主便，我告诉你也无妨——
E: But as we're in foreign lands, I'll indulge you—

C: 可如今，却只剩下我们了啊。
E: Yet now, we're the only ones left standing.

C: 那刻夏老师用生命证明了创世并非空谈。身为神谕中的黄金裔，我们将为世界燃烧自己的结局也早已注定……
E: Professor Anaxa proved the truth of Genesis with his sacrifice. As Chrysos Heirs of the prophecy, we were always destined to immolate ourselves for this world...

C: 这扇门的背后，就是英雄们苦苦追寻的新世界。也是这段漫长记忆的主人，一生行向的终点……
E: Beyond this gate lies the new world that our heroes sought through their trials, as well as the terminus that the owner of these long memories has been hurtling towards their entire life...

C: 无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……
E: None of that matters now. This brutal Flame-Chase Journey has stripped away my delusions. I know the future isn't some peaceful paradise with gentle west winds, just waiting to welcome us to step in...

C: 它们都是岁月长河的片段，代表他从此踏上的漫长征程，或者换一种说法……
E: Each is a drop from the river of time, representing the long journey he would take, or rather...

C: 嘟！嘟嘟。
E: Doot! Doot-Doot!

C: 世界的进程，便再无回头的可能了。
E: The world's course... will be forever irreversible.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而是一场献给黑潮的「深度学习」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>They were a deep-learning program made for the black tide.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>在那梦里出现的，欧洛尼斯背后的神明。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And the god behind Oronyx that appeared in that dream.</color>

C: 我本无意争锋。所以，请记住，海瑟音阁下：如果我的剑因为恻隐而变得迟钝……
E: I had no intention of fighting. So, remember this, Lady Hysilens: If my sword shows any hesitation...

C: ——欢呼「毁灭」的英雄，初次点燃生命的微光。
E: Cheering for the hero of the Destruction, who had ignited the faint spark of life for the first time.

C: 就算这样，本大爷也会用遭世人唾弃的神力，实现那亿分之一的可能……
E: Even so, I'll use my divine power, despised by the people of this world, to achieve that one-in-a-hundred-million possibility...

C: 呵，怪不得。
E: Heh, of course.

C: 去吧，三月。祝愿你们，能写下一段无比浪漫的故事呀♪
E: Your story awaits, March. Make it an epic one♪

C: 「黎明机器的光芒永不熄灭…刻法勒的庇佑没有尽头！」
E: "The light of the Dawn Device never fades... Kephale's protection has no end!"

C: 塔兰顿已死。现在，我即是「律法」——
E: Talanton is long gone. Now, I am the Law...

C: …两位？
E: ...Guests, please.

C: 维吉妮娅，没什么好怕的，你只要把吟诗的气场拿出来——啊，两位英雄已经来了？
E: Verginia, don't be so nervous. Once they hear your poetry... Ah! Heroes, you're already here?

C: 不仅如此，还有一柄帕福斯弯刀给那可怜人做了陪葬。我实在难以想象，这位忠诚的战士临死前受了多少折磨……
E: Moreover, the poor soul was buried with a Paphas curved blade. It pains me to imagine what agonies this loyal warrior endured before his death...

C: 每天要和这么多人打交道…凯撒大人真是辛苦呀。
E: It must be tiring, dealing with so many people every day, Great Imperator.

C: 和泰坦的战争，也算是牺牲的一部分吗？
E: Is the war with the Titans also part of that sacrifice?

C: 啊…「事实」二字，从未如此令人迷醉。
E: Ah... the word "fact" has never been so intoxicating.

C: 所以…您答应与我们合作了？
E: So... you agree to cooperate with us?
Hah...

C: 如欧洛尼斯说的那般，那两人来了。也正如你所说，他们展现出了对「律法」的渴求……
E: Those two arrived just as Oronyx described. And just as you said, they showed a thirst for "Law"...

C: 等到那条掠食的鱼儿汇入水流，将<color=#dbc291ff>质疑「天外之界」的愚氓</color>尽数抹去…可就没法享受这恰到好处的水温咯。
E: Once that predatory fish joins the flow of water and eliminates all <color=#dbc291ff>the fools questioning the "world beyond the sky"</color>... you won't be able to enjoy this perfect water temperature anymore.

C: 都是我猜的。怎么，猜中了？
E: It's all just a guess. What, did I guess right?

C: 骗人，明明从浴宫回来时还很精神来着。让我猜猜，是在操心谁的事，海瑟音？还是小赛飞儿？
E: Lies. You were pretty energized when you came back from the bath chamber. Lemme guess... Are you worrying about someone? About Hysilens? Or little Cipher?

C: 贵客无须担心，宴会的安保不会因此削弱分毫——她根本喝不过我！
E: Don't worry, dear guests. The banquet's security won't be compromised. I'd never get drunk before her!

C: …现在学游泳还来得及吗？
E: ...Is it too late to start learning how to swim?

C: 咕嘟……
E: Glug...

C: …你有这么高速运转的毁灭进入翁法罗斯。
E: ...So you have this super duper speedy rotation of Destruction into Amphoreus.

C: 现在，运用你的身份，再加入一点点经验和魅力…向凯撒证明吧，就像我们承诺的那样。
E: Now, use your identity, and add in a bit of experience and charm... and testify to the Imperator as we promised.

C: 「铁墓」…它是翁法罗斯命运的终点，行于「毁灭」命途的恐怖化身，根本不可能被驯服。
E: "Irontomb"... is the ultimate end of Amphoreus's destiny. It is an embodiment of pure horror that walks the Path of Destruction, and can never be tamed.

C: 第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次永劫回归 光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年
E: <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th eternal recurrence. Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>

C: 时光飞逝，距离「救世主」遭逢意外，已经过去了两百年啊……
E: Time flies. Two hundred years have passed since the Deliverer's fall...

C: 我反对<color=#dbc291ff>迁都</color>。奥赫玛有{RUBY_B#黎明机器}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑，不比那死城安全多了？
E: I'm against <color=#dbc291ff>relocating</color>. With {RUBY_B#Dawn Device}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection, isn't Okhema far safer than that dead city?

C: 「随后，缇里西庇俄丝踏上远行。同年，悬锋王欧利庞携王子迈德漠斯加入同盟，投身救世之战，为圣城保驾护航。」
E: "Soon after, Tribios departed on a long journey. That same year, the Kremnoan king Eurypon, along with his son, prince Mydeimos, joined the alliance to safeguard the holy city in the battle of deliverance."

C: 别把事情想太简单，来古士刚发现奥赫玛过去五十年都是座空城，想必一定气急败坏，什么事都做得出来。
E: Don't oversimplify it. Lygus just found out Okhema's been an empty shell for the past fifty years. He's bound to be furious. At this rate, he could've done anything.

C: 「奥赫玛将永远屹立」…赛飞儿小姐的谎言，终究还是破灭了呀。
E: "Okhema will stand eternal." Miss Cipher's lie has crumbled after all...

C: 一代又一代黄金裔英雄或甘愿四分五裂，或在孤寂中独守，披肝沥胆，妄图征服命运……
E: Generation after generation of Chrysos Heir heroes have tried to defy fate with their blood and tears, either voluntarily shattering their souls or waiting in eternal solitude...

C: 鱼儿们！待到「纷争」的长矛降临，你们便可隐退。
E: My little fishlings! When the spear of Strife falls, you may retreat in peace.
