C: 啊，两簇被抛弃的数据，似乎在等待谁的归来。
E: Ah, two discarded data clusters. Waiting for someone's return, it seems.

C: 这座旧世的墓碑是海妖幻境的锚点，海列屈拉用于自缚的符号。同时，它也正是好戏开幕时我曾声明的，翁法罗斯的缩影……
E: This tombstone of the old world serves as the anchor of the siren's illusion, a sigil Helektra used to bind herself. At the same time, it is the very thing I once proclaimed at the start of the show: a microcosm of Amphoreus itself...

C: 快步迈向我们的重逢吧…救世主。
E: Hurry now... the time of our reunion draws near, Deliverer.

C: 前进吧，为了逐火的信念！
E: Go forth. For the belief in Flame-Chase!

C: 你精心打造的面具已被揭开，我们解明了翁法罗斯的真身：<color=#dbc291ff>它是历史上第一台「权杖」，最初的原型机——博识尊神体的一部分。</color>
E: We've torn off your meticulous mask and figured out Amphoreus's true form: <color=#dbc291ff>It's part of the primordial Prototype Machine, the first Scepter ever created... In other words, it's a detached part of Nous's divine corpus.</color>

C: 嘻，{NICKNAME}也太诚实了吧？不过，这种纯粹正是你独一无二的魅力。
E: Hahaha, {NICKNAME} is way too honest! But that innocence is what makes you so uniquely charming.

C: 新的黎明即将升起，何不向着它的光芒游去？
E: A new dawn is about to rise. Why not swim towards it?

C: 这是谬论。那「公司」不可能单凭财货实现如此伟业。就算它表面上十足体面，内里也必定沾染着血腥的杀戮和剥削。
E: That cannot be true. That "IPC" would never have grown so big on trade alone. It may pretend to be a wealthy merchant with clean hands, but I am willing to bet that it grew fat on gory oppression and bloodshed.

C: 自由！解放！暴君死了！去，到街上宣告这番要闻！
E: Freedom! Liberty! The tyrant is dead! Go, shout this news in the streets!

C: 现在，在「开拓」身后，正有众多银河势力将目光投向翁法罗斯。他们秉持的理念各不相同，但在共同的敌人面前，生存的意志会将人们团结。
E: Right now, following behind the Trailblaze, numerous cosmic powers have cast their sights on Amphoreus. They all have vastly different philosophies, but the desire to survive will unite them against a common enemy.

C: 你究竟有什么目的？
E: What exactly do you want?

C: 答案很简单……
E: The answer is simple.

C: 「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的。」
E: "If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead."

C: 「很遗憾，误入此地的女士，我不能再放任你恣意妄为了。」
E: "Apologies, lost young lady, but I simply cannot allow you to keep acting as you please."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>见证空白的「岁月」里，另一场延续三千万世的徒劳，是如何被世界遗忘。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And witness how, in a blank space of Time, another futile journey across thirty million lifetimes was forgotten by this world.</color>

C: 开个玩笑，这是「我」第一次来到你的面前……
E: I'm just messing with you. This is the first time "I" have met you...

C: 昔涟看似在讲述故事，实则是在进行「信息传送」。
E: It might have looked like Cyrene was reading a story, but she was actually carrying out a "data transfer."

C: 好朋友，<color=#dbc291ff>第<unbreak>33550335</unbreak>次…</color>我会把这本书念给你听。
E: My good friend, I'll read this book to you... for <color=#dbc291ff>the <unbreak>33,550,335</unbreak>th time</color>.

C: 你的意思是，昔涟受到了欺骗。
E: You mean... Cyrene was deceived.

C: 别离我太远，「识刻锚」会保护我们。
E: Don't get too far from me. The Chronocognitive Anchor will protect us.

C: 看，她在那里。
E: Look. She's over there.

C: 三千万次启程，三千万次分裂，然后，是三千万世逐火的起点。命运辜负了缇里西庇俄丝，但世人绝不辜负。
E: Thirty million departures. Thirty million shatterings. And the beginning of thirty million Flame-Chase Journeys. Fate betrayed Tribios, but she was never betrayed by humanity.

C: 最后，鱼儿回到了「海洋」，她一无所有的家乡。在深海的尽头，她为后世坚守涡心，直到最后一刻。
E: In the end, the fish returned to the Ocean, her home where there was nothing left. For the sake of the future, she guarded the Vortex at the end of the deep sea until the very last moment.

C: 在我离去的时间里，翁法罗斯的历史流逝千年。昔涟在荒废的奥赫玛城留下了过往的记忆：黄金裔与来古士进行了漫长的战争，付出了巨大的牺牲，为我铺就了再创世的道路。
E: While I was away, a thousand years had passed in Amphoreus. Amidst the desolation of Okhema, Cyrene left behind memories of a long war between the Chrysos Heirs and Lygus. Their sacrifices laid the groundwork for my return, and with it, the Era Nova.

C: 趁还有时间，一起挑挑吧？给三月做手账的素材。
E: While we still have time, shall we pick out some materials for March's journal?

C: 嗯，但不能放松警惕。
E: Yes, but we can't let our guard down.
"Over here..."

C: 来——抓住我的手，我们一起躲进{NICKNAME}最深处的记忆。
E: Grab my hand, let's hide away in the deepest corner of your memories, {NICKNAME}.

C: 那几条分支剧情，不打算细说吗？
E: Are you going to say more about those branching storylines?

C: 昔涟在哪里？！
E: Where's Cyrene!?

C: 缇里西庇俄丝女士。是我，{NICKNAME}的同伴，丹恒。
E: Lady Tribios, I am Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}'s companion.

C: 明白了，我这就去找她。谢谢你们。
E: I see. In that case, I'll go look for her now. Thank you.

C: …你脑海中遗留的过往，远比我想的更多。
E: ...Your mind retains far more of the past than I had imagined.

C: 但是，若不同甘共苦，持明便不能成为联盟命运的一员，而只是他人苦难的旁观者。
E: But the Vidyadhara cannot become a part of the Alliance's destiny if we do not share in its joys and sorrows. We would only be bystanders to everyone else's suffering.

C: 别说这种话。
E: Nonsense.

C: 不惜沉沦在过去中，你的「记忆」都变成了这幅样貌…值得么？
E: You sank willingly into the past, and now your "memories" have turned into this form... Was it worth it?

C: 加入复活「大地」的献祭！
E: And become part of the sacrifice to resurrect the "Earth"!

C: 在哪里？还能想起来么？
E: Where was it? Can you remember?

C: 出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
E: Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!

C: 窃忆者本该大量涌入翁法罗斯，这里应该「热闹非凡」才对……
E: Memosnatchers should be swarming into Amphoreus. I was expecting this place to be "very lively"...

C: 「我们。是牺牲品。忆庭。利用了我们。<color=#dbc291ff>『无漏净子』。抛弃了我们。</color>」
E: "We. Are the sacrifice. The Garden. Used us. <color=#dbc291ff>The 'Pure Child of Anāsrava.' Abandoned us.</color>"

C: 现在，我终于能理解你们的恐惧了。
E: Heh. I can finally understand your fears now.

C: 「难以测算。逻辑：未知变数『三月小姐』的干涉方式尚不明朗。」
E: "That is difficult to project. Logic: It is currently unclear how the unknown variable 'Miss March' conducts her interference."

C: …算了，那就让我来扫清前路。
E: ...Never mind. Let me clear the way.

C: 我得事先提醒一句，螺丝在「再创世」进程里设置的后门，顶多帮你们攻入权杖内部。
E: Lemme give you a warning. The backdoor Screwy set up in the Era Nova system can only get you as far as breaching the core of the Scepter, nothing more.

C: 那要记住的名字，是不是有点太多啦！
E: Isn't that gonna be way too many names to remember?

C: …没什么好说的，动摇军心。叫他们注意安全就行。
E: ...That would be unnecessary. It'll only shake their morale. Just tell them to stay safe.

C: 但也正因如此，我们才有不输给任何人的决心。
E: But that's exactly why we have a resolve that's second to none.

C: 「然后，为世界带来『明天』的预言。」
E: "And then, bring the prophecy of 'tomorrow' to this world."

C: 那我们就更不能停下脚步了。上前见证这一刻吧。
E: All the more reason we can't afford to slow down our pace. Let's go witness this moment for ourselves.

C: 前面那是？
E: What's that up ahead?

C: 推测：可以骇入终端，逆转算力发动攻击。
E: Projection: We can hack the terminal, reverse the computation, and turn it into an attack.

C: 启程吧——踏上最后的「逐火之旅」。
E: Let's embark on the final Flame-Chase Journey.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>以凡人之名——「纷争的冠军，万敌」——此人为荣耀和自由迈向群星，并如愿以偿！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the mortal, Mydei, Champion of Strife, this soul rises to the stars, for glory and freedom, to have his wish fulfilled!</color>

C: 这次，是光在拒绝我们呢。
E: Looks like the light's turning us away this time.

C: 还记得当初的约定吗？
E: Do you remember the promise we made back then?

C: 就在刚才，识刻锚传来讯息：<color=#dbc291ff>「铁墓」对「再创世」产生了反应。</color>
E: The Chronocognitive Anchor just transmitted a message stating that <color=#dbc291ff>"Irontomb" has reacted to the "Era Nova."</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>最初的智种，德谬歌…它就在这里。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The first Nouspore, the Demiurge... is right here.</color>

C: 「当明日到来，再将你亲手创造的奇迹同我分享。」
E: "And when tomorrow comes, share with me the miracle you've created with your own hands."

C: 「神谕已经降下，翁法罗斯将飞向星空！」
E: "The prophecy has arrived. Amphoreus will fly into the starry skies!"

C: 然后用一场斗争，让银河见证——
E: Then, through a single battle, let the cosmos witness.

C: 踏上「记忆」命途。
E: Tread on the Path of Remembrance.

C: 拾线月，我吐露金丝编织「纯美」——
E: In the Month of Weaving, I extend golden threads to weave Beauty...

C: 耕耘月，我化作「不朽」的脊梁——
E: In the Month of Cultivation, I turn into the ridges and peaks of Permanence...
No—

C: 如果可以，请带上我的遗体，去到沦亡的<color=#dbc291ff>亚德丽芬</color>。那里有一行公式，是「赞达尔」给你的礼物。
E: If you can, take my body to the fallen <color=#dbc291ff>Adlivun</color>. There, you'll find a formula. It is "Zandar's" final gift to you.

C: 敬踏出洞穴的囚徒们，请在我的墓碑前……
E: To the prisoners who stepped out of the cave, stand before my tombstone...

C: 别担心。我们一起战胜了铁墓，对吧？
E: Don't worry. We beat Irontomb together, right?

C: 哈…像是你会给出的回答。
E: Hah... that's exactly the kind of answer I'd expect from you.

C: 个个都要如此写意么？依我看，还是给后人留下些真正的「箴言」为好。
E: Does everyone have to be so poetic? In my opinion, we should leave some real "words of wisdom" for future generations.

C: 那么，下课。
E: Then... Class dismissed.

C: 反正，人家一直都和你心照不宣呀♪
E: After all, we've always had this unspoken understanding between us ♪

C: 对了，那最后的音符……
E: Oh, that final note...

C: 宛若停滞的时光……
E: It's like time itself has stopped...

C: 最后的「涟漪」，滋润了大树……
E: The final "ripple" nourished the Great Tree...

C: 时光静静地，在欢笑中流淌。
E: Time quietly flowed by... in the midst of laughter.

C: 学习
E: Learn

C: 可这样一来，故事就不成立啦……
E: But then... the story won't exist anymore...
Huh...

C: 但无论如何，人家很高兴。我接住了那颗星星，对吗？
E: But I'm still so happy. I caught that star, didn't I?

C: 我本以为，你不会把{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#81}我{RUBY_E#}卷入这个「课题」了，黑塔。
E: I thought you were not going to involve {RUBY_B#Genius Society#81}me{RUBY_E#} in this "topic" anymore, Herta.

C: 在创世涡心与海瑟音告别之际，我察觉到了「岁月」火种的异样，随即被「长夜月」拖入到「忘却」的忆潮之中…她曾是三月献出全部记忆实现的隐藏力量，如今心中却另有暗账。
E: As I bid farewell to Hysilens at the Vortex of Genesis, I noticed something strange about the "Time" Coreflame, and was immediately dragged into the memoria tide of "Oblivion" by "Evernight"... She was once the hidden power that March manifested by sacrificing all of her memories, yet now she harbors other secret intentions in her heart.

C: 牛仔•忍者殿下，汝无故发难，莫非是受猴子•叛忍蛊惑，堕入邪魔外道了么？
E: Lord Cowboy Ninja, you have turned on me for no reason. Don't tell me the traitorous Monkey Ninja bewitched you. Are you walking the path of heretics now?

C: 我重要的两位演员在宇宙里漂流了这么久，你们愣是找不着。无奈，我只好自己来，不然之后找谁和我演对手戏呢？
E: My two prized actors were drifting through space for ages, and you all couldn't find them. What choice did I have but to come myself? Otherwise, who's going to share the stage with me?

C: 权杖报废后，翁法罗斯星域空间持续紊乱了许久，哪怕有信号定位，想找到他们也并非易事。
E: With the Scepter put out of commission, there was a lot of chaos across the Amphoreus segmentum. Even with signal tracking, finding them was no simple task.

C: 赛飞儿
E: Cipher

C: 刻律德菈
E: Cerydra

C: 你刚刚看什么东西那么津津有味？也给我瞧瞧？
E: What were you looking at so intently just now? Let me see.

C: 一定是想拿到这个奇物的心情过于急切，我得帮他把事办完……
E: He must've been really eager to get the Curio, so I have to get this done for him...

C: 别白费力气了，那启示上所写「温命得」落款，显然是水魈的公然挑衅。
E: Don't waste your time. The note signed "Wen Mingy" was obviously a blatant mockery of me by the Xenohydro.

C: 这附近因「军团」入侵而受损的资产，无论动产不动产，统统要<color=#dbc291ff>拍照定损</color>，报给「星际和平公司」。
E: All assets damaged by the Legion in the area, whether mobile or immobile, must be <color=#dbc291ff>photographed</color> and reported to IPC.

C: 这几千项货损，不仔细看，谁会发现啊。
E: With the thousands of things listed here, who's going to know the difference unless they check every one?

C: 老爹我啊，是这儿的维修师温天翁。活得最久，资历最老，手也最稳——
E: I am Wen Tianweng, the mechanic. I am number one around here in terms of age, experience, and skills.

C: 你要一般的报酬，我没有，呵呵……
E: If you want a reward, I don't have any, hehe...

C: 事发突然，防卫科的支援还在路上。
E: It happened so suddenly. The support from the Security Department is still on the way.

C: 这玩意嘛…就是前几天我去取包裹的时候，看到前台有几张单子指名站长签收。
E: ...I picked it up a few days ago when I was collecting a package. I saw a few receipts requiring the lead researcher's signature.

C: 歼、歼星舰？！
E: S—Starnought!?

C: （「艾丝妲小姐」？）
E: (Miss Asta?)

C: 你看到一段视角古怪的画面，在仔细辨认后，你确信画面中的身躯正是反物质军团的残党，镜头似乎挂在这个怪物的身上。
E: You see a group of images shot in strange angles. After much thought, you become convinced that the torso in the images is a remnant of the Antimatter Legion. The camera seems to be attached on this monster's body.

C: 啊？我在写诗。你没看见嘛，那边的桌面上已经摆了好几版了。
E: Oh, I am just writing a poem. Can't you see the drafts on the desk?

C: 哈，你也喜欢这一版！他们都说这一版用词太过粗鄙，没想到你才是我的知音。
E: Ha, you like this one too! They all say my choice of words is too rough. It turns out you know me best!

C: 太好了！
E: Nice!

C: <unbreak>52</unbreak>月<unbreak>-55</unbreak>月
E: <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE, Months <unbreak>52</unbreak>–<unbreak>55</unbreak>

C: 你说是不是？
E: Don't you agree?

C: 解剖着时间。询问爱情的花瓣已经下坠
E: To dissect time. Petals inquiring for love are falling,

C: 人总是需要伙伴…
E: Everyone needs a partner...

C: 如果各位没有异议，我不希望再听到任何对体力劳动的抱怨，也不想再看到任何工作推诿。
E: If you don't mind, I don't want to hear any more complaints about physical labor, nor do I want to see anyone putting off work.

C: 呵呵，你说得也有道理。
E: Hehe, you have a point.

C: 好了，看这位「新来的」脚下轻便，就算怪物突袭，也能立马灵活走位的样子。
E: Well, look at you, newcomer. You're so agile. You can easily escape from any monster raid.

C: 不好意思，年轻人。如你所见，向导的治疗过程出了一点小意外，我不得不请阁下先出去，在外等上一阵。
E: Sorry, young one. As you can see, there was a little accident during the treatment procedure. I have to ask you to leave and wait outside for a while.

C: 没错，你有什么要紧话，全都倒出来吧。
E: That's right. If you have anything important to say, spill it.

C: 谢谢你<color=#eb4d3dff>我只是法政科的一介向导而已</color>{NICKNAME}。我想还有一场<color=#eb4d3dff>我志愿将自己的一切都贡献给法政科</color>更长的梦在等着我。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. <color=#eb4d3dff>I'm just a guide in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics</color>. I think there is an even longer dream waiting for me. One where <color=#eb4d3dff>I willingly dedicate everything to the department</color>.

C: 三个。一个不多，一个不少。这一路辛苦你了，年轻人。坐下来歇一会儿吧。
E: Three. Not one too many. You've worked hard, young one. Sit down and have a rest.

C: （之前她嘴里神神叨叨的念词，也只是在模仿猫科动物的叫声。）
E: (So she was just imitating the sound of cats last time.)

C: 看来还是兼容性出了问题……
E: It seems to be some compatibility issues...

C: 抱歉啊，您别着急，我等会儿就去把这几台机组拆下来。保证不会影响到现有算力。
E: Sorry, please give me some time. Let me remove these units. I assure you the existing computing power won't be affected.

C: 光学身份校验程序已经架设完毕，终端机目前算力充足，请便！
E: The optical identity verification program is all set. The terminal has sufficient computing power. Please help yourself!

C: 当然，但监控录像中也找不到阿兰的行踪。
E: Of course! I didn't see him...

C: 我，我刚才可没说这个吧？你是不是听错了？
E: I—I didn't say that! Did you mishear it?

C: 你，你别乱说啊！那可是有严格考核制度的。
E: D—Don't joke about that! Promotions have a strict assessment process!

C: 别说是开除我。哪怕你今天用我的命来威胁我，我也会对你大声说「不」！
E: Why not threaten to KILL me while you're at it? I've said it once and I'll say it again — I will not yield!

C: 这回我就亲自和你讲讲这背后的……
E: Now, let me tell you exactly what—

C: 小姐，你没事吧？
E: Are you okay, my lady?

C: 小姐，我之所以进行这些挑战，从来都不是因为你的缘故。
E: Lady Asta, please, I didn't do any of these trials because of you.

C: 从心、从镜、从我……？
E: Of the heart, of the mirror, of the self...?

C: 你你你、你是没看到那东西有多恐怖……
E: Youyouyouyou... you didn't see just how scary that thing is...

C: 过奖了过奖了，法政科风气如此，我也不过是发扬应有的品格。
E: You are flattering me. This is just how we do things in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and I'm merely doing my part.

C: （这只呜呜伯不再言语。）
E: (The Wubbaboo stops responding.)

C: 除非你们能证明自己的善意，它可以考虑把据点所在位置告诉你们。
E: "If you can prove that your intentions are benevolent, I will consider telling you the location of our base."

C: 不知道，之前小家伙拜托我的时候我也问过，但它总是闭口不谈。
E: I don't know. I asked the little buddy before, but it never answered.

C: 也许吧。毕竟他写就日记已经是「军团」入侵之前的事情。
E: Maybe. After all, his diary only records events from before the Legion's invasion.

C: 或许还差点什么？
E: Maybe there's still something missing?

C: 你在说什么啊！这怎么看都是…一滴汗？
E: What are you talking about!? This looks like... a drop of sweat?

C: 监控拍到了她的样子，「银狼」，和公司通缉令上的照片一模一样。让我看看她在做什么……
E: The surveillance camera captured her face — "Silver Wolf." It's exactly the same as the photo on the IPC's wanted list. Let me see what she was up to...

C: 没什么印象。
E: Don't know much.

C: 真的要关停模拟宇宙吗？
E: Are you really shutting down the Simulated Universe?

C: 我们出发吧。
E: Let's get going.

C: 还好。
E: I'm fine.

C: 你们是对的，敌人的入侵已蔓延至模拟宇宙深处，距离以太卡带所在的数据链只有毫厘之差，我们看到的就是当时的影像。
E: You were right. The enemy's invasion has spread to the deepest parts of the Simulated Universe. They were only a hair away from the Aether Cartridge's data link. What we are seeing are the projections of what happened in those moments.

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 我不是铤而走险，而是跃跃欲试，明白吗？螺丝咕姆，你知道你出现的那一刻，我有多兴奋吗。
E: You think I came here out of desperation, but I've been bursting with excitement this whole time. Do you know how happy I was when you showed up, Screwllum?

C: 什么！喂，等等——
E: What!? Hey, hold on a minute!

C: 我说了，我没有朝思暮想，而且……
E: I told you, I'm not obsessed with it... Besides...

C: 就是它了。这种<color=#dbc291ff>「等级」</color>涂鸦通常成对出现，可以通过它来改变敌人的强度等级，增强或削弱他们的力量。
E: This is it. These <color=#dbc291ff>"Level"</color> graffitis usually come in pairs. You can use them to change the strength levels of your enemies, to either strengthen them or weaken them.

C: 而在我看来，除了技术升级外，更重要的是提升科员们的防范意识——银狼的许多攻击都是利用了个人的不良习惯，防不胜防。
E: In my opinion, aside from technical upgrades, it is more important to increase staff members' awareness and precaution. Many of Silver Wolf's attacks honed in on individual bad habits, and those are too difficult to defend against.

C: 说什么呢！我那是…是…示范！对，是为了更直观的说明，故意做的示范！
E: Nonsense! What I did was... was... a demonstration! That's right. It's a demonstration to illustrate my point in a more direct manner!

C: 那你赚到大钱了不？
E: Did you manage to make a bunch of money in the end?

C: 我知道，小三月，你现在立刻退后。
E: I know. March, get out of there right now.

C: …啊？什么玩意，信息素？我，我可不知道啊……
E: Huh? Phero-who? What is that? Is it bad?

C: 身为骑士，我肩负必胜的决心与荣誉；我的身躯经过无数次训武淬炼，绝不会轻易被折断。
E: Worry not. As a knight, I bear the resolve and honor of assured victory — my body, tempered by countless battles, will not easily be broken.

C: 认同银枝。
E: I agree with Argenti.

C: 抱歉，情况特殊，我真的不能多说，只能告诉你是个秘密任务。
E: I'm sorry. The situation is very delicate. I can't say anything except that it's a secret mission.

C: 委托的内容，是寻找一件连名字都知之不详的奇物。
E: And the assignment involves a Curio that doesn't even have a name.

C: 阿德勒，阿德勒他不见了呜呜呜啊啊啊啊……
E: Adler, he... he disappeared... *sob*

C: 好、好像是「香味」什么的！
E: He kept saying the word "phrase."

C: 这本小册子上记载着一种能穿梭相位的火焰，据说其「燃烧诸界，留下了众多火焰后裔」。
E: This booklet describes a kind of fire that can phase through dimensions, claiming it "burns through worlds, leaving numerous scions of flame behind".

C: 所谓「暴徒自火焰中降临」，就这点程度？看来原始博士所言不假。
E: So this is the extent of "miscreants materializing from the inferno"? Seems like Dr. Primitive wasn't wrong.

C: 但要记得，以后遇到类似的事情，在弄明白发生了什么前，要先把表情藏起来，否则……
E: But remember, the next time something like this happens it's crucial to mask your expression until you've ascertained the situation. If not...

C: 「芝士流心」是最棒的！它的情绪感染力如此之强，它的正能量感染了我们所有人。
E: Molten Cheese Tart is the best! Its outlook is infectious! Its positive mood has influenced us all!

C: （…汪汪汪…）
E: (...Woof! Woof! Woof!)

C: 其实芝士流心大人一直在和「豆沙灰灰」进行口味抗争。芝士流心大人坚信人们的生活要积极向上。
E: You see, the honorable Molten Cheese Tart has always been fighting against Gray Bean Paste in terms of flavor. The honorable Molten Cheese Tart is a firm believer that people's lives need to be optimistic.

C: 以防万一，我需要一位能帮我说话的人——也就是你。
E: Just in case, I want someone who will be on my side — in other words, you.

C: 虽然没有邀请你——但欢迎，{NICKNAME}，记住这历史性的一刻。三位天才共处一室，这事有多久没发生了？下一次又得多久以后？
E: Though you weren't invited, I welcome you to remember this historical moment, {NICKNAME}. How long has it been since three geniuses were in the same room together? And how long will we have to wait for it to happen again?

C: （呜呜…阮•梅…呜呜…）
E: (*sob*... Ruan Mei... *sob*)

C: 权限开启，嘶嘶。
E: Permission granted, *buzz*.

C: 事实上，我并不喜欢一切总如我规划的那样进行，没有变数的实验是乏味的。
E: I must admit, I'm not fond of scenarios where everything aligns perfectly with my expectations. An experiment should have its unforeseen twists.

C: 巨大的蓝绿色恒星沿着星轨运行，万丈光芒下，只有白茫茫的天地。
E: Following its celestial trajectory, the great teal star illuminates an endless sea of white across both the sky and land.

C: 这台小机器人就是他们的「特产」。
E: This little robot is one of their "souvenirs."

C: 更值得庆幸的是，我们的友谊还产生出了结晶——《民间科学》。作为贝洛伯格第一部私人创办的科学期刊，我很荣幸成为它的赞助人。
E: What's even more worth celebrating is that our friendship has also produced something great — Citizen Science. As the first privately owned scientific journal in Belobog, I am honored to become one of its sponsors.

C: 你勾起了我的好奇心。
E: You've piqued my curiosity.

C: 检测到对象情绪异常。正在启动辅助功能。
E: Emotional abnormality detected in target. Activating support function.

C: 那你肯定捡到过漂流瓶吧！
E: Then you must have picked up a Drift Bottle right?

C: 行，行，我记住了。说实话，没想到在这冰天雪地里能遇见同行。最近买卖不好干，不过你们放心，我桑博从不吃独食，外边这宝藏大得很，有财大家一起赚嘛，哈哈哈。
E: Excellent, I'll remember the name. I never thought I'd run into friends from the same line of work out here in this frozen wasteland. *sigh* Business is bad these days, but fear not, Sampo Koski isn't interested in hoarding. There's more than enough treasure to go around, so let's get rich together! Hahaha.

C: 被当成罪犯，感觉更火大了！
E: Ugh, so I'm a criminal, huh? Forget Sampo, wait until I get my hands on YOU!

C: 哼哼…这件一直躺在我的衣柜里，这下总算有机会穿出来了！
E: It's been sitting in my wardrobe collecting dust for far too long. But now I've finally got the chance to wear it!

C: 你带帕姆玩偶干嘛？
E: Why are you bringing Pom-Pom doll?

C: 嗯…恐怕是的。
E: Yes... I'm afraid so.

C: 居然又演变成了这样…
E: Here we go again...

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我们走！
E: Let's get moving!

C: 其实我没听懂。
E: Not sure, strong accent.

C: …欸？但是史瓦罗先生，有客人的话……
E: Huh? But if you have a guest, maybe I should...

C: 呃…你是谁，说话这么嚣张？「公司」武器的威力，难道还没见识过吗？
E: And who might you be? You have quite the attitude... This is our jurisdiction now — we are all-powerful here.

C: 呃，这是…这是领导层的决定！我们只是负责执行，你跟我们说这些也没用。
E: Hmph, don't blame me, I'm simply following orders. Do you think I get to make those kinds of decisions?

C: 有一点她说得没错，这个选择的确太艰难了。
E: In any case, she wasn't wrong when she said this would be an extremely difficult decision.

C: 我没有异议。
E: I have no objections.

C: 既然各位都没有意见，我们就散会吧。
E: If there are no further remarks, this meeting is concluded.

C: 有件重要的事需要你的意见。
E: We need your opinion on an important matter.

C: 这…你们说的这些都是真实的吗？！不会是编出来捉弄人的故事吧？
E: Really...? You better not be making things up!

C: 呼…一、一下跑了这么多地方，我已经开始喘了……
E: Whew... All that running around has worn me out.

C: 你相信她的判断吗？
E: Do you trust her judgment?

C: 这地儿是不是风水不行…
E: Is this place cursed or something...

C: 倒卖文物、假扮铁卫——这一条条的，听着都是大罪啊！
E: Selling cultural relics and impersonating Silvermane Guards are both heinous crimes!

C: 呃…是，这你居然都知道？
E: Ahem... Yes, y—you knew that, too?

C: 走吧，我们去找到她，告诉她布洛妮娅的决定。
E: Let's find her and tell her about Bronya's decision.

C: 真的假的？
E: Are you serious?

C: 解释「互助会」的情报
E: Explain what you found out about the mutual aid society.

C: 这件事得从头说起…瓦赫从小就有一个理想——研制出名为「风雪免疫」的药物。
E: *sigh* That's a long story... Ever since he was little, Vache had always wanted to develop a medicine called "Blizzard Immunity."

C: 没问题，这座八角笼与全场观众时刻等候你的归来！
E: No problem, the octagon and the audience await your return!

C: 应该是刚到空间站的时候，那时空间站新来了个「爱管闲事的年轻人」的消息还传得沸沸扬扬呢。
E: I think it was when you first arrived at the space station. At the time, word of a "young busybody" was spreading around the space station.

C: 嗯？你的本体不该是星核吗？竟然是一种外置的东西吗？
E: Huh? Isn't your body the Stellaron? So it's an external object?

C: 那个共犯就是拉明娜。
E: Lamina is the accomplice.

C: 只是没想到来的是你，拉明娜心慈手软，想要给你一个机会，计划才从「武力清除」变成了「循循善诱」——
E: But I didn't expect you to come. Lamina was soft. She wanted to give you a chance. And so we changed the plan from "elimination" to "persuasion"—

C: 它就像一面镜子，照出了我无所遁形的丑态。是那么卑微。那么弱小。那么…无力。
E: It's like a mirror, it showed me my pitiful appearance, so humble, so weak, so... powerless.

C: 沿着道路移动吧，先确保安全，再作下一步计划。
E: Let's follow the path. We need to guarantee our own safety before making any further plans.

C: 「他」在说胡话？这是裂界…
E: Is "he" talking nonsense? We are in the Fragmentum...

C: 可这里已经什么都没有了……
E: But there's nothing here anymore...

C: 你看，这边……
E: Look! Over there...

C: ——你确定不是出现幻觉了吗？我和你说，娜塔莎那儿什么药都有，不止能治失眠……
E: Are you sure you weren't hallucinating? I'm telling you, Natasha has all kinds of medicines for you. Anything!

C: 不过…考虑到这里是裂界，这事儿也不能完全怪你。这破地方就是这么离奇——不瞒你说，我也在裂界里见过各种奇异现象，等你跟我一样习惯了以后，就不会一惊一乍了。
E: But... since we're affected by the Fragmentum here, you're not completely to blame. It's just how weird this place is — and to tell you the truth, I've seen all kinds of strange stuff in the Fragmentum. You'll get used to it soon enough.

C: 一枚小巧的卵形相框中载着略微泛黄的肖像，静静地躺在地砖改装成的暗格中。
E: A small oval frame containing a slightly yellowish portrait lies quietly in a secret compartment hidden in the tile.

C: 现在的话…我只感觉好像有某种珍贵的东西从内心中残酷地消失了……
E: Alas, now I just feel like something precious has been cruelly ripped from my heart...

C: 哇，一个箭头！好神奇呀！
E: Wow, an arrow! How amazing!

C: 那个…这段手稿是什么？
E: So... What are these texts?

C: （记录在佩拉的手记上吧。）
E: (Write it down in Pela's notebook.)

C: （似乎可以控制栈桥旋转了。）
E: (The rotation of the gear bridge seems to be operable again.)

C: 如此温暖……
E: So warm...

C: 娜塔，你有事找我吗？
E: Nat, do you have something to ask?

C: 老实说，「流星碎片」不是唯一失窃的展品…但现在的当务之急是先让综合馆对公众开放，后续的追查工作可以暂缓。
E: Truth be told, the Meteor Fragment isn't the only item that was stolen... but we want the museum to open as soon as possible. We can worry about the other missing items later.

C: 你答应了？太好了！
E: So that's a yes? Great!

C: 没有拒绝的选项。
E: ...They didn't even give me the option to refuse.

C: 您看起来很有干劲呢！那我们就开始吧？
E: That's the spirit! Let's get started then.

C: 原来如此，怪不得铁卫和「地火」花了这么长时间都没找到「齿轮与智慧」……
E: No wonder Wildfire and the Silvermane Guards were never able to find Gears and Wisdom...

C: 幻灯片投影是这次博物馆翻新后才会推出的新项目，同时也是我们为前来观展的市民准备的惊喜——要是找不到原片，历史区的开放就只能无限期地后延了。
E: Slide projection is a new addition to the museum — it was intended to be a surprise for visitors when the History-Culture Hall reopened. If we don't recover the microfilm, the Hall's opening will have to be postponed indefinitely.

C: 走一步看一步，没什么头绪。
E: I'm just taking it one step at a time. There doesn't seem to be much headway.

C: 一个一个全问过去吧！
E: Let's interrogate them all one by one!

C: …咳，不好意思。还是回归正题吧，您有任何能与文物失窃案联系上的线索吗？或者，您最近有没有察觉到身边有什么异样？
E: ...Ahem, sorry about that. Back to the topic at hand — do you have any clues that could be linked to the theft of the museum's artifacts? Have you noticed anything unusual lately?

C: 唔，您说「失联」，意思是您现在已经联系不上这位朋友了？
E: So by "no longer hear from," you mean you've been unable to get in touch with this friend of yours?

C: 原来如此，是莱姆士汀家的少爷提供的消息啊。
E: I see. It was the man from the Limestein family who provided the information.

C: 稍微费了点功夫，但有几个胆子小的侍从很快就开口了——
E: It took a little prodding, but a few of the more timid attendants started speaking up...

C: 听、听见了，您放心吧，诺尔伯特少爷！
E: Don't worry Mr. Norbert, I understand.

C: 我们是来把你绳之以法的！
E: We're here to bring you to justice!

C: 啊，对了，我有件事想跟您说来着：之前有位蓝色头发的先生跑来这里，给我留下了一张便笺，请我转交给博物馆的经理。
E: Oh, right! There's something I want to tell you: A man with blue hair came along and left this message with me. He asked me to pass this on to the manager of the museum.

C: 近期，我和佩拉小姐又筛选了一批博物馆志愿导览员推荐信，终于发现了合适的人选……
E: Pela and I have been screening prospective volunteer guides for the museum recently, and we've finally found the right candidate...

C: 呵呵，不敢当。那么，接下来的流程是怎样的呢？
E: Hehe, you're too kind. So then, what's the next step in the application process?

C: 没关系，我很乐意帮忙。
E: That's fine. I'd love to help.

C: …你真的是希露瓦吗？！
E: ...Are you really the Serval I know!?

C: …算了，你就填没有吧。我替地火办的那些个事，实在是不好说啊。
E: ...Forget it. Just say that I have no experience. I can't really disclose any of the jobs I have done for the Wildfire.

C: 就是我。
E: Yep, that's me!

C: 他们是群靠谱的家伙。相信我，要是没有他们，这里早就跟铆钉镇一样被怪物占领了。
E: They're a reliable group. Trust me, if we didn't have them, this area would be packed with monsters already. Just like Rivet Town.

C: …能当作姐姐没有提到吗？现在不是谈论这个的时候。
E: ...Could you pretend like you didn't hear anything? Now's not the time.

C: 来吧来吧，输入你们想要寻找的物件名字。查宝来帮忙。
E: Come on. Input the name of the object you are looking for. Findie can help.

C: 哎哟喂，别打了别打了！这小鬼怎么这么厉害，哎哟，疼！
E: Ow! Stop it, stop it! How's a kid so strong... Ah! Owwww!

C: 可能是因为我常拿它寻找矿脉，结果被不怀好意的家伙盯上了吧？
E: I often carried it around looking for a new claim, I suppose some villains must have taken notice.

C: 唔，大人可真是狡猾！虎克要一个一个问问看！
E: Ugh, adults are so dishonest! Hook's gonna question them one by one!

C: …虎克知道！
E: ...I know!

C: 爽快！
E: Great!

C: 费斯曼老爷子吗？他是个好人，虽然…呃，没什么。
E: Mr. Fersman? He's a good person. Though... oh, er, uh, never mind.

C: 当然是真的！你不信的话去挖挖看不就知道了，我保证绝对能挖到好东西。
E: Of course, it is legit! Just go dig it up the treasure and see for yourself if you don't believe me. I promise there will be good stuff.

C: 我听说过民间的传闻——「披上庄严人形的裂界幻影，是往昔守护者的意志凝结成的回响」。
E: I heard rumors about this kind of monster... "Shadows in the Fragmentum that assume human forms are echoes of the will of past guardians."
█ ██ have to██stand █ █ ██in my way ███ ██ █...!

C: 所以，我和老弟不得已才想了这一招，想请你代我们去侦查一下！
E: So, that's why Gepard and I came up with this idea. We'd like you to help us find out what's going on!

C: 不。这里是风口，还有冰原狼活动的痕迹…在这里扎营会有危险的。
E: Nope. The wind blows strongly through here, and there are signs of direwolf activity... It'd be too dangerous to make camp.

C: 原来如此…那我们还是把它放回去吧。
E: I see... In that case, please tell me we can put it back?

C: 这是我经过长期观察总结出的经验。至于那些失踪的铁卫…我想应该是在追逐中迷了路，所以才都没能全身而退吧。
E: That's my conclusion from my long-term observations. As for those lost Guards... maybe they were chasing these little creatures and couldn't find their way back.

C: 我也觉得他们的做法不好。
E: I didn't exactly see eye to eye with them...

C: 不管怎么说，这次多亏有{NICKNAME}你在——不然，老弟怕是要担心得觉都睡不好了。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}, for being around for this. Gepard was too anxious to sleep.

C: 完全没听她提起过。
E: Pela never mentioned...

C: 能看出来，她的性格如此。
E: I can understand why...

C: 你怎么不说话了？哑巴了吗？
E: What? Nothing to say?

C: 嘿…嘿咻……
史瓦罗为什么要介入矿区事件？
E: Why did Svarog want to get involved in the incident in the mines?

C: 我找到了这个，你拿着吧。
E: I found this. Here, take it.

C: 从前，孤儿院的小孩子跟镇上的小孩子可是死对头！那些家伙仗着有爸妈给的零花钱，经常来欺负我们。
E: In the past, the kids in town were archrivals to us at the orphanage! Those kids used to bully us, relying on the pocket money that their parents gave 'em.

C: ——藏好了吗？嘿嘿，那我要来咯！
E: Ready or not, here I come!

C: 好主意耶！小孩子已经就位，只差棒棒糖了！
E: Great idea! Shame we don't have any.

C: 该去和娜塔莎告状了…
E: Maybe we should go and get Natasha...

C: 所以…为什么带我们来这里？
E: So... why did you bring us here?

C: 看上去…好简陋呀。
E: It looks so... lame.

C: 协议…启启启启启……
E: Protocol... Inish-nish-nish-nish-nish...

C: ——我不该跟你说起这个，还是说回你们的研究吧。我不可能将这些研究报告公之于众，博士。除非……
E: ...I shouldn't be telling you this — let's return to your research, doctor. I'm afraid I cannot make these reports known to the public. Unless...

C: 还是让我先说吧。
E: I have to tell you something first.

C: 实话实说，你肯定是奔着「地髓矿脉探针」来的吧？
E: You've obviously come here for the Geomarrow Probe, right?

C: 虎克收下了，这样就有七百五十冬城盾用来参加拍卖啦！
E: Hook generously accepts the reward! We've got <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield for the auction!

C: 虎克做的是正确的事！才、才不会后悔……
E: I did the right thing! H—Hook regrets nothing...

C: 啊，还没有！{NICKNAME}，你愿意来参加虎克的生日聚会吗？
E: Oh! Not yet! {NICKNAME}, do you wanna come to my birthday party?

C: 还好有「菌菌」一直陪在虎克身边。老爹不在的时候，是「菌菌」让你不至于感到孤单。所以，老爹我……
E: But fortunately, Junjun was always with you to keep you company when I wasn't around. I...

C: 你是怎么靠肉眼辨认机器人的……
E: How did you know that was Perkins...

C: 刚才…克拉拉感觉到了很大的震动，似乎是从上面传下来的。史瓦罗先生说，那大概率是…是……
E: There was a huge shaking just now coming up through the ground. Mr. Svarog said it... must have been...

C: 喔、喔喔！地、「地火」竟然派人来了吗…这可太好了！
E: Oh! W—Wildfire has sent someone... That's fantastic!

C: 哎呀，多个人帮忙可是件大好事…那你等会儿，我、我得组织下语言，把昨晚的经历告诉你……
E: It's great that there are more people here to solve this case... H—Hold on, I'll explain what happened last night. Just let me gather my thoughts first...

C: 啊！它好像要逃走了……！
E: Ah! It's running away!

C: 这么说来，克拉拉刚才做的事情，和那些叔叔阿姨们说的「宠物升级」是不是有些类似呢……
E: Hmm, but what I just did... Is it any different from those pet upgrades that the vagrants perform...?

C: 先别着急说，让我歇会儿…
E: Wait a minute, let me take a quick break...

C: 这样…克拉拉就不用一直躲在史瓦罗先生的身后了。
E: That way... I won't have to hide behind Mr. Svarog anymore.

C: 但，帕斯卡的情感智能…
E: But what about Pascal's emotional intelligence...

C: ——你知道这种可能性十分微小，克拉拉。
E: You know the chances of that are incredibly low, Clara.

C: 好、好的。克拉拉也会再冷静考虑一下……
E: Okay. I'll think about it some more too.

C: 史瓦罗先生也这么说——他认为帕斯卡的情感智能类似某种病毒，在不知什么时候感染了连接基地网络的全部个体。
E: That's what Mr. Svarog said. He said Pascal's emotional intelligence was like a virus that infected the entire base network at some point.

C: 那就走吧，先想个办法到桥对岸去。
E: Haha, let's go then. First, we need to think of a way to get to the other side.

C: 接着前进吧，两台终端都启动不了，咱们得去找源头的供能设备了。
E: Let's press on. We can't activate either of these terminals, so let's look for the energy supply installation itself.

C: 动静会不会太大…
E: Won't this cause a commotion...?

C: 要么一路冲过封锁线，要么以理服人——随机应变！
E: Well, either we reason with them or charge straight through the blockade... Let's play it by ear!

C: 接下来就该寻找「星核」了。
E: Let the Stellaron hunt begin.

C: 禁区的大门一旦打开，另一头的怪物就会倾巢出动。银鬃铁卫能做到的，就是尽量拖住敌人，给你们争取一些时间。
E: As soon as the restricted zone gate is open, the monsters on the other side will turn out in full force. The Guards will do their best to stall them and buy you some time.

C: 我们准备好了。
E: We're ready.

C: 欸？希露瓦，你不和我们一起去找「星核」吗？
E: Huh? Serval, aren't you gonna look for the Stellaron with us?

C: 哎呀算了算了，不管了！你要是能跟铁卫对着干，对付几个发疯的机器人应该不算什么吧？
E: Oh, whatever! If you can put up a fight against the Silvermane Guards, those crazy robots must just be a piece of cake for you, right?

C: 我记得你…比现在年轻很多。
E: I remember you... back when you were much younger.

C: 离追上布洛妮娅又进了一步。快走吧！
E: We're one step closer to Bronya. Let's move!

C: 在列车组、布洛妮娅和希儿的共同努力下，可可利亚战败，{RUBY_B#祂}星核{RUBY_E#}制造的威胁被暂时解除。
E: With the combined efforts of the Crew, Bronya, and Seele, Cocolia was defeated and the threat created by the Stellaron was temporarily averted.

C: 但我们早就夸下海口…
E: But we said we could reverse it...

C: 为什么非得说谎不可呢…不知道啦，我弃权，我还是更喜欢说真话。虽然…我也理解你们就是了。
E: Why do we have to lie? ...I'm abstaining — I like telling the truth. But... I get what you're trying to do.

C: 该上台了，姐姐。
E: The stage is yours, sister.

C: 你知道名叫希莉儿的大守护者吗？
E: Do you know the Supreme Guardian Cyrille?

C: 这…这是……
E: It's... this...

C: 如果还有什么需要就尽管和我说，克里珀堡一定会不遗余力地为你提供帮助。
E: Just let me know if you need anything else. Qlipoth Fort will pull out all the stops to offer you support.

C: 比如我会问你<color=#dbc291ff>「蓝色的客运型星槎有多少艘？」</color>，需要根据你的观察，正确地回答我的问题。
E: For example, I might ask <color=#dbc291ff>"How many blue passenger starskiffs went past?"</color> You will need to answer my questions according to your observation.

C: 梅姐再见。
E: Goodbye, Mei.

C: 她听见那个<color=#dbc291ff>肇事星槎的引擎声音非常大，跟一般星槎不太一样。</color>
E: She heard the <color=#dbc291ff>sound of the engine of the starskiff that had caused the accident. It was loud and different from ordinary starskiffs.</color>

C: 我已经知道真相了。
E: I already know what happened.

C: 是吗…那这样吧，俺来告诉你，家里大大小小的事情该要怎么做，这样俺才会放心。
E: Then... let me tell you how to do all the housework. That way I can put my mind at ease.

C: 从这里到这里，讲的是房间清洁的顺序…啊，对了，芦慧姑娘你不爱丢垃圾，垃圾全部堆在厨房旁边，始终不记得去丢。听梅姐的，垃圾可不能过夜啊。
E: From here to here, it's about the order of cleaning the rooms... Oh, another thing, you always leave trash in the kitchen and forget to take them out. Now that I'm gone, you need to remember not to let the trash pile up for more than one night.

C: 你说的对，现在不是后悔的时候…吗？
E: Right, now's not the time for regrets... is it?

C: 孩子，这些长生种都是一伙儿的。
E: My child, all these long-life species are the same.

C: 我恐怕满足不了你的要求。
E: I don't meet your requirements, though.

C: 但规矩就是规矩，丹鼎司大乱后，所有的手续都要被复核了。
E: But rules are rules. After what happened in the Alchemy Commission, everything has to be re-approved.

C: 深吸一口气，抬腿踹向树。
E: Take a deep breath and kick the tree.

C: 什么赔付专员？
E: What's a claims specialist?

C: 我和虎克回来了…
E: Hook and I are back...

C: 听说你在找我？
E: I heard you're looking for me?

C: 「杀气蔚蒸作烟云，寒光闪闪阵刀行。笑看白刃染朱红，云骑从来岂顾勋。」
E: "The air is filled with killing intent, rising like mist and cloud. The cold light shines, blades in formation marching loud. With laughter, watching as white blades turn crimson. The Cloud Knights care not for glory, nor their victory."

C: 你读过小聪主人写的糟粕吗？毫无感情，简直比杀了我还痛苦。
E: Have you read the doggerel that Master Cong writes? No emotion. You may as well just kill me.

C: 我将这句诗刻在了灵感玉兆上，以此纪念今日之所见。来，给你。
E: I've engraved this poem on the Inspo Jade Abacus to commemorate the experience of today. Here you go.

C: 静斋有什么爱好吗？
E: Does Jingzhai have any hobbies?

C: 谢谢你，原来孤屿早就已经蜕生了…但是我感觉好像错过了什么。
E: Thank you. I see Guyu has already gone through the hatching rebirth... Still, I feel like I have missed out on something.

C: 不要拿你世俗的眼光来评价我们表达爱意的行为！
E: Don't use your profane worldview to judge our acts of love!

C: 我还是帮你选临时寄件吧。
E: I'll change your choice to "Deliver a parcel now."

C: 但是你一开始为什么要伪装？
E: But why are you catfishing in the first place?

C: 听着，对我们来说，「狐仙黛青」不是一个聊天室账号，那是我们和拐角里那个人，一起打造的幻想。
E: Look, to us, Foxian Beauty Daiqing is not just an account on a chatroom. It is a fantasy that we created with the person around that corner.

C: 别呀。
E: Please don't.

C: 啊，你来了，我拜托你调查的事情进展如何？
E: Oh, you're here. How goes the thing I asked you to investigate?

C: 机巧鸟要进入航道了，接下来只能坐星槎去追了。
E: The cycrane is entering the lane as we speak. The only way to keep up with it is with a starskiff.

C: 这种事情非得要「美丽狐仙」自己讲出来吗？
E: Does this kind of thing have to be told by the "Foxian Beauty" herself?

C: 现任的龙尊就不长这样。
E: The current high elder doesn't look like this.

C: 一本笔记被弃置在龙尊雕像的底座附近。
E: A notebook is left near the base of the high elder statue.

C: {NICKNAME}，你是个出类拔萃的年轻人，而老夫…而我，动了收徒的念头。
E: {NICKNAME}, you are an outstanding young {F#woman}{M#man}, and this old timer... Well, you've inspired me to reconsider taking on an apprentice.

C: {NICKNAME}…总有一天，我们都会变老的。
E: {NICKNAME}... One day, we'll all be old.

C: 不不，这回不用了。你已经为我做了很多很多了。比我的老师和弟子们加起来都多。而我已不需要再麻烦任何人了。
E: No no, no need this time. You've already done so much for me. More than my teachers and apprentices combined. And I don't want to bother anyone else anymore.

C: 本小姐这次出逃…离开丹鼎司，是官方认证的「外出问诊」！不不不是擅自出逃！这位医护姐姐可以为我作证！
E: Hmph, I only escaped — I—I mean LEFT the Alchemy Commission for an official medical visit! There's nothing more to it, okay!? The nurse here can vouch for me!

C: 对不上暗号，也敢自称与我同事。
E: You claim to walk the same path, yet you don't even know the code.

C: 看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
E: Still, it's clear you know something... I'm not done questioning you.

C: 【药王秘传的信笺】
E: Disciples of Sanctus Medicus Letter

C: ……等你长大了可一定要到仙舟外面瞧瞧哦！
E: ...Once you grow older, you simply have to step off the Xianzhou to take a look at the cosmos outside!

C: 他偶尔察觉到你的存在，好奇地看向你，但很快却无法集中注意力，又被奇异的景观夺去了心神。
E: Every now and again, he seems to notice you and he looks on with curiosity. But before long, he can no longer concentrate as he's distracted by the fantastical landscape.

C: 谢谢你，白露大人…但是，不能再继续耽误下去了。
E: Thanks, Lady Bailu... but we can't delay any longer.

C: 他没事就好。咱们…接着走……
E: *sigh* I just hope he's okay. Let's... keep walking...

C: …听你这么说，我就放心了。
E: ...Thank you, I'm glad to hear you say that.

C: 休想得逞。
E: Don't even think about it.

C: …他是一个谨慎的人，你还记得他的留言纸条吗？他要我「一个人前来」。
E: ...He's cautious by nature. Do you remember his note? He told me to "come alone."

C: 这可由不得你了！
E: You don't get to decide that!

C: 你们把路上发生的事情，都告诉了梁沐。
E: You tell Liangmu everything about what happened on the way over.

C: 治疗……
E: Heal...

C: 你和白露狠狠地收拾了这名自称无辜的化外民。
E: You and Bailu taught this deceitful Outworlder a harsh but well-deserved lesson.

C: 浥尘客栈里先躲躲？
E: How about Petrichor Inn?

C: 你和三月相处太久了……
E: ...You've been spending too much time with March.

C: 嗯…那还真是可惜呀。
E: Ah... that is a pity.

C: 唉，太慢了。本小姐在这边可是等了你们很久很久啊。
E: *sigh* So slow. I've been waiting for you here for aaaages.

C: 是我来保护你们，有我在，一点小伤都不会让你们受的！
E: Hey, I'm doing the protecting here! Nobody's getting hurt with me around!

C: 我拒绝了龙师们的要求，他们要我离开。
E: I refused a request from the Preceptors, so they asked me to leave.

C: 需要我做什么？
E: Is there anything I can do for you?

C: 让我重温一下之前的行动。
E: Let me re-visit the previous operations.

C: 什么叫「也」困了，我可精神着呢！
E: Resting? Booooring!

C: 哦？他啊。这人我有印象，他是个宇宙行商，做买卖的，还懂点医术。他在联盟的注册名…叫什么来着……
E: Oh, him? I remember him. He's a traveling merchant. He trades throughout the universe, knows a thing or two about remedial arts too. He registered himself on the Xianzhou as... what was it again...

C: 您肯相信我们，我们已经很感激了。绝不会给您添麻烦。
E: We're thankful that you're entrusting this to us — we'll keep it by the book.

C: 你不是神探吗…
E: Aren't you the genius detective?

C: 我们快去快回，不会让杨叔久等的。
E: We'll be back soon, don't get too comfortable!

C: 那你知不知道我们是什么来路？
E: The question is, do you know who we are?

C: 瞧，这真是天助我也！神探刚遇到死胡同，立刻就出现了新的线索。
E: Ha! That's more like it! New clues always turn up in the nick of time.

C: 就连小三月都做不出这种事吧。
E: Oddly specific, March...

C: 杨叔，我害怕。
E: Mr. Yang, I'm scared.

C: 可恶帕，给我记住帕！
E: Darn it! This isn't over!

C: 已经很久没见过这么浪漫的人了。
E: A man of romantic sensibilities, one might say.

C: 这种时候别捧哏。
E: We're not rehearsing...

C: 现在不是闲聊的时候。救人要紧。
E: I'm afraid there's no time for chit-chat — lives could be at stake.

C: 我本来应当坐镇司辰宫批阅公文。但晴霓以身犯险，贪功冒进，甚至要惊动贵客周护她的安全。我这个做母亲的怎么还能坐得住？
E: Indeed, I should be reviewing files in the Palace of Astrum. However, Qingni decided to put herself in danger and trouble our esteemed guests with her safety... As her mother, I couldn't sit idly by.

C: 作为驭空大人的女儿，我很自豪。打从懂事起，我就希望未来能像她那样成为传奇。
E: I'm proud to be Madam Yukong's daughter. I've wanted to become a legend like her for as long as I can remember.

C: 翘班了？
E: She skipped work?

C: 右边。
E: Right side.

C: （但这似乎不是现在该提出的话题。）
E: (...Still, it doesn't seem like something to bring up now.)

C: 是吗？…她还留在仙舟啊。
E: Really? So she's still on the Xianzhou.

C: 刃和丹恒是什么关系？
E: What is the connection between Blade and Dan Heng?

C: 你是真的很想改变我的「预言」呢，两次战斗的可能性都被你避开了啊。
E: That's the second time you've evaded the possibility of a battle... You really do want to change my prediction, don't you...

C: 你以前是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 我记得你。
E: I remember you.

C: 什么…这里是……
E: What... This place...

C: 这个，呃，我不方便透露，我只是接到命令过来救援平民的…说实话，我也不知道。总之你俩跟我走就是啦。
E: I, uh... I can't comment on that. I was just ordered to rescue the civilians... Actually, I have no idea either. Anyway, you two just need to come with me.

C: 你呀，说话挺讨喜，做事却恩将仇报。我们救了你耶，你却想让士兵抓我们！还好杨叔会说话……
E: Y'know, you sound sweet enough, but you were talking about getting us escorted away by your Cloud Knights. If it weren't for Mr. Yang...

C: …别管…我，前面……
E: ...Up ahead... Please, leave me...

C: 还是让{NICKNAME}来吧。球棒虽然比不上物理学圣剑，总比手指好用。
E: Let {NICKNAME} do it. A bat's not as good as a crowbar, but it's definitely better than your fingers.

C: 谢天谢地，这里有艘星槎。
E: Phew, thank goodness, there's still one starskiff left.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 小弟弟，不要愁眉苦脸的。我已向联盟自首，便不会背弃诺言，一走了之。何况你家将军也答应了我的请求。
E: Lower your guard, young man. I have already surrendered myself to the Alliance, and I will keep my word. Besides, your general has already agreed to my request.

C: 我本瞧不上他那狷狂的个性，不料再度相遇时，他所造兵器已令匠人师傅望尘莫及，就连颁授给工造司之首的「百冶」头衔也被他摘得。
E: At first, I wasn't too fond of his defiant nature, but when we met again, he was able to craft weapons that astonished the master craftsmen. He even snatched the Artisanship Commission title of "Furnace Master."

C: 本小姐还真没遇到过这样的奇症，也许详加研究，可以录入医经。能带你朋友常来我这看诊吗？
E: I've never seen anything like it. With more research, I might be able to make a new entry in the medical records. Can you and your friend come back for follow-up visits?

C: 什么时候丹鼎司里连来看病的动物都这么多了？
E: When did so many creatures start visiting the Alchemy Commission?

C: 有人邀请你故地重游…
E: Someone's inviting you to return to old ground...

C: 需要我帮忙吗？
E: Do you need any help?

C: 不过倒没想到，景元安排的随行之人竟是你。看来你我颇有缘分。
E: However, I never thought Jing Yuan would send you to accompany me. Hehe, it would seem our fates are intertwined.

C: 星核降临，建木苏生，天舶司的接渡使遭人偷梁换柱，真身则是毁灭的令使。
E: The Stellaron's descent, the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection, the Destruction Emanator's impersonation of the Amicassador...

C: …这样，人便到齐了。没想到阔别数百年后，「云上五骁」还能再度聚首。
E: ...And so, everyone is present. I never thought the High-Cloud Quintet would be able to gather again in the same place after hundreds of years.

C: 多谢你们的帮助，列车团的朋友。时局变化无常，各位多加小心。
E: Thank you again for your help, friends from the Express. The situation remains unpredictable, so take care.

C: 女子的眼神如坚冰般灰暗冷酷，仿佛眼前发生的一切无聊之极，不值一提。
E: The lady's eyes were as dark and cold as ice, as if the things happening in front of her were dull and uninteresting.

C: 来得好…小崽子。就用你的血…浇灌仙迹。
E: You've come at the perfect time, little one. We can use your blood... to irrigate the celestial traces.

C: 你相信我好不好！我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
E: You're here undercover, right? So am I! You've got to believe me!

C: 你开始抄写这册《千手慈怀药王救世品》。
E: You start copying the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation.

C: 你隐去敏感信息，向梓桥简单叙述了自己正在执行的任务。
E: You hide the sensitive message and give Ziqiao a quick rundown on your mission.

C: …我听闻「建木」早已枯朽…怎会突然生长蔓延？
E: ...I heard that the Ambrosial Arbor shriveled and died a long time ago... How could it suddenly spring back to life and start growing again?

C: 麻烦。
E: It's a pain.

C: 吾已对照了幽囚狱的绘影图形名册，并无匹配。
E: I ran your facial profile against the records in The Shackling Prison just now. Indeed, there were no matches to be found.

C: 等等，既然记不得，又怎么知道这件东西是不是在失去记忆前获得的？
E: Before I lost my memory... So, something I don't remember getting? Even then, I couldn't be sure it was from before I lost my memory, right?

C: 如果你没有做好准备，我们可以暂停推演。本座万万不希望自己好心办了坏事，反而使你受到伤害。
E: If you're not ready, we can pause the inference process. I would never wish for good intentions to result in harm.

C: 将军大人，你好呀！
E: General, hello!

C: 我…我还挺满足的……
E: I... I'm satisfied...

C: 安心吧，只要还在穷观阵里，本座就会保障你的安全。
E: Rest easy, I can guarantee your safety while you're inside the Matrix of Prescience.

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 我不好说。
E: I don't know about that...

C: 怎么，你觉得够吗？
E: Hmm? Do you think it'll be enough?

C: 还真是一根球棒。
E: So, it really is a baseball bat.

C: 说回来，光是观察剑还是不够的——爷爷说过，言语能欺瞒人，表情能欺瞒人，在生死相搏中，剑招从不欺骗人…演武仪典近在眼前，你会上台的对吧？对吧？
E: But just looking at a sword is not enough. Grandpa always says, words and expressions can be deceiving, but in a fight to the death, a sword's movements never lie... The Wardance is just around the corner. You'll be participating, right?

C: 好久不见了，{NICKNAME}。
E: It has been a while, {NICKNAME}.

C: 没有比这更好的安排了！
E: That's the best possible outcome.

C: （听她刚才的话，似乎准备潜入工造司带走那把剑？）
E: (Is she planning to sneak into the Artisanship Commission and steal that sword?)

C: 也就是说，除却参与赠剑仪式的你们之外，也只有使团相关人有机会接触这把剑。
E: So, besides the ceremony participants, only the delegation members had access to the sword.

C: 代理决斗？
E: A representative?

C: 在此之后，我的命运将由你们决定。小姑娘，你害怕见证我的过去吗？
E: After that, I'll leave my destiny in your hands. Are you afraid to witness my past, little girl?

C: 我能感受到，这是一场孤独的战争。
E: I can feel that it was a lonely war.

C: …我好像，我好像明白了那位骑士所说的「纯美」究竟为何了。
E: ...I think I understand the "beauty" the Knight was talking about now.

C: 剑匣一开始有没有被锁上，这一点只有将宝剑送来工造司的人最清楚。
E: As to why the case was never locked in the first place, only the people who delivered it to the Artisanship Commission would know.

C: 别担心，太过粗暴的方式有违我的记忆美学，所以等我离开所有人的视线，你们就能重新想起一切了。以及……
E: Don't worry. Such a crude approach violates my aesthetics of memory, so once you leave my sight, you'll be able to remember everything again. And also...

C: 「别让我等太久，亲爱的。在匹诺康尼被搅得天翻地覆前，试着找到我~抓住我~阻止我吧~」
E: "Don't leave me waiting, my dear. Before Penacony gets flipped upside down, try to find me~ catch me~ and stop me~"

C: 我得提醒你一句，那花火可是个假面愚者，你打算在一个假面愚者的脑袋里找逻辑？
E: I have to remind you that Sparkle is a Masked Fool. Do you plan on finding logic in the mind of a Masked Fool?

C: 嘿！亲爱的忆者，还有寒腿叔叔——你们可算来了！
E: Hey! Dear Memokeeper, and Mr. Cold Feet — you made it!

C: 当时走得匆忙，没有听完整个谜面，我姑且做出如下推测：凶手在前夜杀害了死者，但并没有反锁房门。
E: At the time I was in such a hurry that I didn't hear the whole mystery. I tentatively speculated that the murderer had killed the victim the night before, but hadn't locked the door from the inside.

C: 「花火」，伪装成了「花火的尸体」。
E: Sparkle was disguised as Sparkle's body.

C: 所以，凶手究竟是谁？
E: So who exactly is the murderer?

C: 我们只是旁听一场审问，结束就离开。
E: We're just here for the questioning. We'll leave as soon as it's over.

C: 青雀这孩子虽然平时看着不靠谱，关键时刻倒也尽力。
E: Qingque is often unreliable, but she comes through for us when the need arises.

C: 这阵法我不识得啊？
E: I don't know anything about this Matrix of Prescience.

C: 你……盯着我干什么？
E: You... Why are you staring at me?

C: 放心，小伙子，你师傅的安全……
E: Don't worry, young sir. Your master's safety is our—

C: 大门锁了。老规矩，咱们撬锁，还是翻进去？
E: *sigh* Another locked gate. Time for the old dilemma — break in or climb over?

C: 谢谢工造司的师傅们高抬贵手嗷～得亏有这些缺点，给天舶司留点颜面。
E: Thank goodness you take the time to perfect these inventions, master! If not, the Sky-Faring Commission would've become quite redundant by now.

C: 其中有名为「岁阳」的精怪孽物，以纯粹能量的形态存世，又极其渴望体察血肉凡胎的七情六欲，故而时时穿过仙舟的洞天穹顶，蛊惑人类，寄生在身体中。
E: Among them were abominations known as heliobi. They existed in the form of pure energy, but craved the sensations and desires of mortal flesh and blood. Sometimes they managed to infiltrate the delves of the Xianzhou in order to bewitch humans and become parasites in their bodies.

C: （还有其他事）
E: (Other things to do)

C: 他们平日里便取笑我眼睛瞧不见东西，总爱在我面前使绊子，偷我的东西。
E: They always laugh at me for being blind. They like to trip me up, and steal my things.

C: 看来你还没有原谅在下…在下对此并无怨言。
E: Looks like you have yet to forgive me... I understand.

C: （与丹枢开战）
E: (Battle with Dan Shu)

C: （这是…骨头？更准确地说，应该是骨头渣子…嚼得真碎啊。不知道凶手究竟是什么猛兽。不管是什么，这玩意儿牙口肯定不错。）
E: (Is this... a bone? To be more precise, it's the scraps of a bone... It's been chewed to such fine pieces. Whatever beast is the culprit, I'm sure it's got strong teeth.)

C: 好啦好啦，你们不要再打起来了。总而言之，给我们师徒二人的入会试炼已经敲定了——想办法解决「三大善人」之间的「食物链难题」。
E: Okay, okay. Please don't start another fight. Anyway, the newcomer trial for us two, as the master and a student, has been decided: We have to solve the food chain problem among the Three Benevolent Ones.

C: 你说的…该不会是最近才重回公司贸易体的那个…雅…雅萝莉八号？
E: Are you talking about the one that has returned to the IPC's economical sphere recently? Ya... Yaloli-8?

C: 区区机兵…我可砸趴下不少。
E: These automatons are nothing. I've destroyed many of them before.

C: 道理，我都懂。但…你管这玩意儿叫…植物？
E: I can understand the theoreticals, but... are you sure this kind of thing is a plant?

C: （身负重伤的冬妮娅正在抽泣，还是不要打扰她了。）
E: (The badly injured Tonya is sobbing. I'd better leave her alone.)

C: 可别指望我手下留情啊。
E: Don't expect me to hold back.

C: 我明白了，你怕了。我能理解，我也很害怕，不过我相信勇气迟早会回到你身上的。家人，我会一直在这儿等你！
E: I get it — you're scared. I'm scared too. I'm sure you'll find your courage sooner or later. I'll be here waiting for you when you do!

C: 我有点怕，让我再考虑一下…
E: I'm a little scared. Let me think it over...

C: 嗯。它们喜爱寄生在有智慧的生命身上，汲取他们的体验，品尝他们的情绪。
E: Yes. They attach themselves to sentient beings, feeding off their host's experiences and emotions.

C: 尾巴也要一起吗？
E: Is Tail coming too?

C: 出发吗？
E: Shall we go?

C: 美味的宿主，你尝起来很特别。你和我依附过的所有人都不一样。你的身体深处…那是什么东西？一颗太阳？噢噢，它好烫！
E: Oh, my delicious host, you taste so special... different from anyone else I've ever possessed. But what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!

C: 小嘴还挺硬的嘛。不打紧，等你在这儿多转悠几圈，你会服软的。
E: Aren't you a stubborn one? But that's okay. You'll come around once you've walked a few more circles in this place.

C: 说起当年那场大战，可谓是惊天地，泣鬼神！燎原幻化无穷，水淹火灼，山崩雷劈，与那位将军斗到难分难解，五五对开！
E: The battle between the general and Ignamar was an earth-shaking contest of devastating proportions! Ignamar underwent countless transformations, causing floods, fires, and thunderous landslides... They were locked in a standoff — an evenly matched fight!

C: 为什么岁阳要挑战将军？
E: Why did the heliobi challenge the general?

C: 你闭嘴！
E: Shut your trap!

C: 浮烟～是浮烟～你赢了～你赢了……
E: Cirrus~ It's Cirrus~ You won~ You won...

C: 浮烟直直盯着你，不再说话，阴鸷和谋算在他的双眼中闪过。
E: Cirrus stares at you in silence, and you can tell from their eyes that they are conspiring.

C: 你如何看待藿藿的尾巴？
E: What do you think about Huohuo's tail?

C: （怎么感觉有点磕磕绊绊的……）
E: (Why does it feel a bit forced...)

C: 柯柯娜小姐，你还好吗？
E: Miss Cocona, are you feeling all right?

C: 高强度工作会对精神造成很大的负担，或许她就是工作压力太大了吧？久而久之，情绪就会变得低落。
E: High-intensity work will severely burden one's mental well-being. Perhaps she's too stressed at work? Over time, that would eventually cause depression.

C: （上面只录了一首歌，名字是…「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」。）
E: (There's only one song recorded on it, and its name is... "Envision a Rose Forthcoming.")

C: 你该彻彻底底地改掉自己的毛病，平时多向你的同事学习。
E: You should absolutely rid yourself of your bad habits and learn from your coworkers.

C: 继续吧，柯柯娜…抛弃那些无用之物，去满足他人对你的期望吧。
E: Continue forth, Cocona... Abandon all meaningless material objects, and fulfill the expectations others have for you.

C: 我想清楚了。我不想再继续这样生活下去了。
E: I've thought it through. I do not wish to continue living like this.

C: …欸？您怎么会知道？我有和您提过这件事吗……
E: ...Huh? How did you know that? Have I ever mentioned it to you...

C: 真的是他…我要晕了！
E: It's really him... I'm going to faint!

C: 请为我签名。
E: May I have an autograph?

C: 这可不妙…客人在梦中明确地感知到了异常，甚至做出了「忘记如何醒来」这种表述……
E: This is not good... A client clearly experienced an irregularity, to the point that they would describe it as "forgetting how to wake up..."

C: 我大概知道原因…
E: I think I know why...

C: 她是谁？
E: Who is she?

C: 嗯嗯，角度没有偏差，画像也很清晰，就该这样才是。
E: Mm-mm, the angle's all right, and the portrait looks sharp too. This is how things should be.

C: 摆出来试试呗。
E: Put it here and we'll see.

C: 浓稠的苏乐达浆液流过你的喉咙，经过消化道，进入胃部…然后，它开始烧灼你的胃壁，剧烈的酸楚感化为一阵波浪翻涌而上，令你发出一阵干呕。
E: The thick SoulGlad slurry flows down your throat, traverses your digestive tract, and enters your stomach... And then, it begins to sear your stomach, leading to an intense acid reflux that results in a series of retching.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}，匹诺康尼集团的股东。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}, and I'm a shareholder of the Penacony Conglomerate.

C: 我已经通过系统为您分配了最好的客房！请您乘电梯至酒店<unbreak>135</unbreak>层——那里会有服务人员负责接待。
E: I've already assigned you to the best suite in the system! Please take the elevator up to the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor... Our staff will be waiting to meet you there.

C: 噢…是不是一路旅行颠簸太久，也想体验下坐班生活？早说嘛，战略投资部最近正在扩招，我直接给你安排个项目经理当当不就行了？
E: Oh... Are you tired from so much travel, and you want to experience what it's like keeping office hours? Why didn't you say so... The Strategic Investment Department is recruiting at the moment. How about I give you a project manager role?

C: 我想应该不用麻烦你了——你看，这边有好多人都举着相机呢。
E: I think you're spared the trouble. Look how many people have their cameras on us.

C: 结果还是变成这样了…
E: In the end, we still have to resort to violence...

C: 只、只要能再多收一些会费…没错，只要「四尺圣堂」的经费再充足一些，打败这些巨人族就根本不在话下！
E: I—I just need to raise the membership fee... That's right. As long as the Four-Foot Hall has sufficient funds, we'll surely be able to finish off these giants!

C: 三月，你让我感到很大的压力…
E: March, I feel like you're putting a lot of pressure on me...

C: 老罗浮的口味，居家旅行必备。
E: The taste of the Luofu, a must-have anywhere.

C: 符玄大人累了吧，我这里还有苏打豆汁儿，给您接风洗尘！
E: You must be tired, Master Diviner Fu. I have some mung bean soda. Please take one cup as a welcome back gift!

C: 你说的对，丢了就丢了嘛。
E: You're right. What's lost is lost.

C: 太好了，你负责九成的区域，我负责一成，出发！
E: Great. You take care of ninety percent of the area, and I'll take the rest. Go!

C: 这是一份设计手稿，手稿上详细记录了金人的外观设计。未署名的匠人对审美有所坚持，在设计稿上愤然写下「蠢货们根本什么都不懂，只知道说我的金人丑」。
E: This is a blueprint for the aurumatons' exterior design, meticulously documented by an anonymous craftsman who seemed to have an unwavering commitment to aesthetics. This craftsman scrawled in frustration upon this manuscript: "Those fools know nothing of beauty! All they do is besmirch my gorgeous aurumatons".

C: 我也有点想来一杯仙人快乐茶了，走吧走吧。
E: I'm thinking a cup of Immortal's Delight tea would be good. Let's go.

C: 我也什么都不想吃。
E: I don't want to eat anything, either.

C: 「好的设计应该是历久弥新的」，明明这也是他老人家经常说的话……
E: But he always used to say "good design should be timeless"...

C: 星槎的全部生长信息都储存在种子之中。也就说，这些种子都是出身自带「设计稿」的，种子会按照着设计规划一步步成长。
E: All of the growth data for a starskiff is stored inside its seed. In other words, these seeds come with their own "design manuscripts," and each seed grows step-by-step based on the design plan.

C: 通常来说、其中培养液中的催生化合物比例是较为固定的，但也有根据船只设计进行调整的时候，根据成分比例不同，船身的强度、成型速度也是不同的。
E: Generally speaking, the ratio of catalyzers in the culture medium is fixed. However, it can be adjusted based on the design of the ship. Depending on the composition ratio, the strength and growth speed of the hull will vary.

C: 船尾有一块圆形的空缺，那就是用来组装「玦轮」的地方，也就是我刚才提到的星槎引擎。那是一种整合了重力控制与动力的玉兆装置。
E: There's a circular cutaway on the tail which is where the jade wheel gets installed — that's the starskiff engine I was just talking about. It's an integrated jade abacus that controls gravity and motion.

C: 现在你还在不安吗？
E: Are you still uneasy?

C: 但现在看来，我的担忧是多余的，莱恩老师的设计稿肯定是能超越时代的，即便是一百年后的现在，它仍然站在设计最前沿，老师真是太厉害了！
E: But now, I've realized my concern is unfounded, as Master Ryan's design is undoubtedly timeless. Even though the design is century-old, it still stands at the forefront of the trend. I'm so impressed!

C: 何以见得？
E: Care to elaborate?

C: 谢谢担心，但咱可不能就这么放弃了啊。
E: Thanks for your concern, but we can't give up so easily.

C: 真是太感谢你了，现在需要将这块装着「傻瓜式」系统的玉兆装在金人身上，能麻烦你再帮个忙吗？
E: Thanks a lot! Now, we need to fix this jade abacus with the set-and-forget system on the aurumaton. Could you please do me another favor?

C: 我是觉得他们说的也没有什么道理。
E: It doesn't make any sense to me.

C: …应该坐不进去吧，这不就是个临时的说法吗？
E: ...I don't think so.

C: 才监控了四艘星槎就已经崩溃了，你想想平时一条航道里的星槎有多少？
E: The system collapses while it's monitoring the 4th starskiff. Think about how many starskiffs there are in a lane on a normal day.

C: …去你们的吧！事已至此，我也豁出去了！反正要是这事传出去，我也别想在这附近混了…老子今天就跟你们拼了！
E: ...F—Fist of a champion, huh? Hmph, I've come this far — I won't be able to show my face around here if news gets out... Do your worst!

C: 不过你之前说，这只是完成了第一步…我斗胆问问，你这「试炼」一共分了几步？
E: You said this was the first step, right...? So just how many steps does your training have, exactly?

C: 这条手臂——呵，其实没什么故事！在一场保卫战里走神的结果，连具体年月我都记不清了。
E: This arm — well, it's not that exciting. It's all because I got distracted in a defense campaign. I can't even remember the date of that fight.

C: {NICKNAME}，我想…我想咱们还是忘了这事吧。你觉得呢？
E: {NICKNAME}, maybe we should... forget about all this. What do you say?

C: 无处不在的鼹鼠党…
E: The Moles are everywhere...

C: 也没有到要为此情此景吟诗的地步啦！只是想到上一回抵达仙舟时的波折和惊悚……
E: Hey, I'm not actually gonna recite a poem! I was just thinking about all the twists and turns we went through when we first arrived on the Xianzhou...

C: 真的诶！我们赶紧去找他汇合吧！
E: Really! Let's go catch up with him!

C: 方才彦卿出言无状，让您见笑了。
E: I'm sorry for Yanqing's rudeness.

C: 她一下星槎就跑了个没影，说有事要办，拦都拦不住。
E: As soon as she disembarked from the starskiff, she mentioned having something to attend to and simply disappeared.

C: 各位！我瞧见你们了。这边！
E: There you are! Everyone, this way!

C: 当然，我相信我们双方都希望事情能和平解决。
E: Of course, I'm sure we both want a peaceful resolution.

C: 按照仙舟与公司所签署的进出口法规，一切生物制品，只有确认其对外界不会造成危害或失去生物活性，才能离开港口。
E: According to the import and export regulations signed between the Xianzhou and IPC, all biological shipments can only leave the port when they have confirmed to be of no threat, or when all biological activity expires.

C: 兄弟们，都让开吧，让他们查。
E: Step aside, guys. Let them do the inspection.

C: {NICKNAME}！你回罗浮了啊！怎么也不提前在群里说一声！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! You're back! Why didn't you say anything in the group chat?

C: 帝弓的光矢威力无伦，能斫断建木，却无法断去凡物延续自我的渴望。
E: While the Lux Arrow from the Reignbow possesses unparalleled power to sever the Ambrosial Arbor, it can't sever mortals' desire to prolong their existence.

C: 「云骑不可令武备脱手」的教条你听过吧？眼下我自然可以还给你，但是上了战场，可就不一样了。哎，这柄飞剑该有多可怜呐。
E: You know the Cloud Knight saying: "A Cloud Knight must never let slip their weapon," yes? Well, sure, I can give it back to you now, but on the battlefield, that's a whole different story. Poor flying sword.

C: 我前任留下的烂账还真不少啊。
E: Looks like my predecessors left quite a mess.

C: 我嘛，我只是一个来丹鼎司求医问药的病人，顺道路过的看客。
E: Me? I'm just a patient seeking medicine from the Alchemy Commission. A passerby, if you will.

C: 多谢飞霄大人出手了。若是您再晚来些，我已准备点上迷香，麻翻他们两个了。
E: Thanks for stepping in, General Feixiao. Otherwise, I'd have had to knock them out with my incense.

C: 老朽一直在想…到底什么样的人才能配得上这柄剑呢？思前想后，不如就趁这次守擂竞锋，将它当作奖品送出吧！竞锋胜者想必英雄过人，与宝剑正相匹配。
E: I've been wondering... who would be worthy of such a sword? And then it hit me — I can award it to the champion of the Ringmaster's Challenge! The ceremony's champion is sure to be a perfect match for the sword.

C: 演武仪典就是他的试金石。为此，他甚至将云璃也一块儿拉下了水。原本只是两个年轻人之间的竞技赌斗…现在却成了你俩联手教导三月七。
E: And he wants to see it for himself during the Wardance, which is why he even dragged Yunli into this. What began as a simple contest between two swordmasters... has now evolved into you two collaborating to mentor March.

C: 不过，在我们找到失事地点之前，就已经有人到过现场了。
E: However, someone had already been on the scene before we arrived.

C: 毕竟是应承了怀炎将军的要求，彦卿不敢怠慢。我特地起了个大早，来教授三月小姐剑术。
E: Well, it was a promise to General Huaiyan, after all. I woke up especially early, so I could start teaching Miss March swordplay.

C: 临时检查。为什么有无关的人在迴星港出没？还是几个小不点。
E: An impromptu inspection. Why are there outsiders loitering in Stargazer Navalia? And a bunch of kids at that!

C: 首先，本小姐是成年人了。其次，我可不算随随便便闯进来的——
E: First of all, I'm an adult. Second, I didn't just break in...

C: 可疑的狐人伸手瞬间
E: The moment the suspicious foxian reaches out.

C: 我不知道。但他们似乎准备带走那堆货箱。我有个主意，我们可以躲进那些箱子里，跟着他们。
E: I have no clue, but they seem to be moving those crates. I've got an idea. We can hide inside the crates and follow them.

C: 不对味，有奇怪的味道…
E: Something doesn't smell right. There's a weird scent...

C: 瞧瞧，一艘货运星槎。至少够送走二十名弟兄。我还会联络其他成员，让他们准备更多。
E: Look at this, a freight starskiff with enough room to fit at least twenty of my men. I'll let the others know and have them prepare more starskiffs.

C: 必须尽快将这件事报告给神策府！
E: We've got to report this to the Seat of Divine Foresight!

C: 要不是罗浮放逐了丹恒，持明族群龙无首，化作一盘散沙，星核又怎会被神不知鬼不觉地放入建木玄根中？
E: If the Luofu hadn't exiled Dan Heng, leaving the Vidyadhara with no leader, they wouldn't have fallen into chaos, and there wouldn't have been the opportunity to bring the Stellaron to the Roots of the Arbor unnoticed.

C: 这个问题不该由我们来回答。我们只是来解决星核危机的，丹枢的阴谋细节，无名客怎么会知道啊？
E: I don't believe we are in a position to answer this question. We Nameless came here to resolve the Stellaron crisis, and we cannot be expected to know the details of Dan Shu's conspiracy.

C: 说的不错，这才是常人的反应。这个问题就放过二位吧。
E: You make a valid point. That's how innocent people should react. Let's skip this question for now.

C: 飞霄点了点头。
E: Feixiao gives a nod.

C: 吃了吧。呼雷这厮和所有步离人一样，能释放名唤「狼毒」的信息素，唤起内心的恐惧。
E: Just swallow it already. Hoolay is like all borisin, he can release a pheromone called Lupitoxin that induces fear.

C: 我就知道你是个通情达理的人。药我们已咽下了，走吧。
E: I knew you were a reasonable person. Now that we've taken the medicine, let's proceed.

C: 都是机缘巧合，机缘巧合。
E: It was all a lucky coincidence.

C: 丹鼎司的人检查过机甲，这东西内部隐含着非同一般的结构。
E: The Alchemy Commission members examined them and found some unusual structures within.

C: 果然咱们所到之处没有太平。
E: Like I said, wherever we go, we always end up in trouble.

C: 切莫让吾再再再次损坏…会丢失记记记记忆。
E: Just don't let me be d—d—damaged again... I'll lose my m—m—memories.

C: 我也想活着出去。
E: I want to make it out alive, too.

C: 不错，呼雷所犯的罪行不仅是杀戮。数千场战争中，我们尽力剿灭步离人，但他凭着不知源头的邪术，将无数狐人化为受它驱策的走卒与器兽，一再卷土重来。
E: Exactly. The atrocities committed by Hoolay went beyond mere massacres. Throughout numerous wars, we made every effort to eradicate the borisin, but Hoolay, with his mysterious sorcery, turned countless foxians into his pawns, and so the borisin kept returning.

C: 这些步离人伪装成了狐人的样子，拜托了，请立刻通报云骑。
E: These borisin are disguised as foxians. Please warn the Cloud Knights immediately.

C: 倘若彦卿没有「打草惊蛇」，眼前恐怕还毫无头绪呢。
E: If Yanqing hadn't scared them off, we would not have many clues.

C: 拙劣的伪装到此为止了，就算他们想要隐瞒也不可能逃脱。
E: Their flimsy disguise has been exposed. Even if they try to hide, there's no way they can escape us.

C: 不是所有狐人都能有幸出生在仙舟疆域中的…我成长在步离人所放牧的世界。曜青称那些地方为「沦陷地」。
E: Not all foxians are lucky enough to be born on a Xianzhou ship... I grew up in one of the worlds where borisin roam, known as the "fallen territories" by the people of the Yaoqing.

C: 对狼头恩主们而言，狐人只是他们的财产…是战场冲锋时用来拖住仙舟攻势的炮灰。
E: To the wolf masters, foxians are nothing but property, cannon fodder used to slow down the Xianzhou attacks on the battlefield.

C: 我听见了，我听得很清楚。
E: I do. Loud and clear.

C: 竟、竟然有这种事！这可是大新闻！噗，对不起，虽然不太礼貌，但…该不会是三月小姐干的吧。
E: I—I had no idea it was that serious! That's a huge scoop! *ahem* I do not wish to offend you with this question but... This was not your doing, was it, Miss March?

C: 没什么状况，可以说是风平「狼」静。
E: Nothing out of the ordinary. I guess you could say it's all fair winds and calm "wolves."

C: 已经来不及让你紧张了，时间就要到了！
E: It's too late for nerves now. It's almost time!

C: 在看到敌人下战书的那一刻，就意味着对方已经开始行动了。
E: The moment you see your enemy's declaration of war, it means that they have already begun to take action.

C: 还想再去一次。
E: I want to go there one more time.

C: 你家将军一直是这样吗？
E: Has that general of yours always been like this?

C: 你怎么回来了！？
E: What are you doing back here!?

C: …可要是呼雷没有打算袭击演武仪典，又该怎么办呢？
E: ...But what do we do if Hoolay is not planning to attack the Wardance?

C: 三月现在就待在选手休息室里，也不知道她准备得如何了……
E: March is in the contestant's lounge right now. I wonder how her preparations are coming along...

C: 演武仪典即将开始，请各位选手进入赛场就位。
E: The Wardance is about to begin. Contestants, please make your way to the arena.

C: 将军的安排终于还是派上了用场…我必须尽快找到云璃他们。
E: It looks like the general's arrangements are finally coming in handy... I need to find Yunli and the others as soon as possible.

C: 战首回来了！她会带领我们的！
E: The Warhead has returned! She has come to lead us!

C: 我何尝不知持明所面临的问题。求生也并非罪过。
E: I'm well aware of the challenges the Vidyadhara face. Fighting for survival isn't a sin.

C: 我也是听从医嘱的人，白露小姐说我可以随便走走，我才出来走走的。
E: I'm just following the doctor's advice. Miss Bailu said I could take a stroll, so here I am.

C: …誓要击落一名绝灭大君，令烬灭军团明白「巡猎」的意义。
E: ...I vow to take down a Lord Ravager and teach the Ruin Legion the true meaning of The Hunt.

C: 今天之所以召各位汇聚此处，不仅仅是为了商议罗浮的难题，还有一件事需要我们三人同时在场——
E: We gathered today not just to tackle the Luofu's predicaments but also to address a matter requiring our collective presence.

C: 你看，「家族」成员理应在{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}的律法下融为一体，却总免不了各自残留些私心。
E: Look, The Family's members theoretically should all be united as one under the banner of {RUBY_B#Harmony}the Great One{RUBY_E#}'s teachings, but you inevitably can't dismiss the tinges of personal avarice within them.

C: 明白！我明白！我保证绝不再犯！
E: Understood! Absolutely! I promise never to do it again!

C: 真安静啊，街上也没有「家族」的人，和酒店里差别真大啊。
E: So very quiet, and no Family members on the streets, so different from the hotel premises.

C: 老实点！
E: Don't try anything funny!

C: 哦～朕亲爱的臣民，你又来了！有什么需要朕帮忙的事情吗？
E: Oh! My dear subject, you're back! Is there anything I can help you with?

C: 没有其他问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你本就不该出现在这里——最好别再给自己找不痛快。
E: You shouldn't have been here in the first place. I advise you to behave yourself.

C: 我恰好认识几位「天才」。
E: I happen to know a few of its members.

C: 卡尔德隆•查德威克……
E: Calderon Chadwick...

C: 你很难想象那位老人会对《仙舟持明族民乐考》感兴趣，或许他真的已经在这里待了太久了。
E: You find it hard to believe that old man would be interested in Xianzhou Vidyadhara Folk Music Theory — or perhaps he must have lived here for too long.

C: 一张老照片从资料的折页中滑落。相纸看着有些年头，泛黄的纸上印着四个年轻的身影。
E: An old photograph slips out from one of the folded pages of the file stack. It looks dated, with four young figures printed on its faded yellow background.

C: 「白日梦酒店」刚开始动工，希望他不要闯进什么危险的地方。
E: The Reverie's construction just started. I hope he doesn't barge into anywhere dangerous.

C: 没有，但已经不需要它们了。
E: Nope, but we don't need them anymore.

C: 蓝色的折纸鸟如玩偶般安静，它拒绝再次开口。
E: The blue origami bird is as quiet as a doll, it refuses to speak again.

C: 在矛盾逐渐激化时，一个老者从人群中走了出来。
E: As the conflict gradually reaches breaking point, a geezer emerges from the crowd.

C: 哈哈，看来你已经把善举当成了习惯。我认为我们有深入交流的必要。
E: Haha, it looks like you're a habitual altruist. I believe it necessary for us to have a deeper conversation.

C: 讨厌嘛，倒也算不上，就是有的外邦人确实不太守规矩……
E: I wouldn't say that, but some outlanders really flout the laws here...

C: 你不给那些公民不就行了？
E: Couldn't you have just not offered any to those citizens?

C: 那位老者真是舌灿莲花。拉莱德不是第一次做局刁难外邦人了，没想到这回给自己碰了一鼻子灰，哈哈~
E: That old man sure has a silver tongue. It's not the first time Liluder has tried to make things difficult for outlanders. Well, that backfired on him this time, haha!

C: …泡澡这种事，讲究一个量力而行。我老了，太刺激的吃不消。请你先将就一下吧。
E: ...A bath is all about knowing your limits. Thrills aren't my strong suit at my age, please bear with me for a moment.

C: 灾厄中的资源有限，奥赫玛没法接纳太多外邦人，来者不拒只会让城邦陷入混乱。
E: Resources during disasters are scarce, and Okhema can't take in too many outlanders. Welcoming everyone will only plunge the city into chaos.

C: 说罢，帕拉滕便掏出药袋、向受伤的外邦人跑去……
E: With that said, Palaten takes out the medicine pouch and runs in the wounded outlanders' direction...

C: 原来是和两位黄金裔并肩作战的异邦英雄，失礼了。
E: It's the outlander hero who fought alongside the two Chrysos Heirs. My apologies.

C: 帕里斯…看来是你的言谈令塞纳托斯都感到厌烦，让它把你从冥河里丢了出来。
E: Paris... I see even Thanatos grew weary of your incessant ramblings and cast you out from the River of Souls themselves.

C: 你们…为什么要救我？
E: Why... Why are you trying to save me?

C: 你拿自己的祭品当报酬？
E: You are using your own offerings as payment?

C: ——不，阿卡迪亚肯定是存在的。因为我手中就有从阿卡迪亚流出的<color=#dbc291ff>蜕生金丝</color>。
E: ...No. Arcadia definitely exists. Because I hold in my hand a <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Thread of Rebirth</color> from Arcadia itself.

C: 不会吧，难道是你把戍卫长打成这样的？
E: It can't be... Did you do this to captain?

C: 到了现在，我也不明白，他说的「浪漫」到底是什么模样。
E: To this day, I still do not understand what this "romance" is that he spoke of.

C: 我们得再回到另一个时空。
E: We need to return to the other spacetime.

C: 在奥赫玛的城外，战士徘徊在注定的疯狂中……
E: On the outskirts of Okhema, the soldiers wander in doomed madness...

C: 她从梦中解读出未来的轨迹，选中那些被命运所昭示的人，给予他们谕示，指点迷津。
E: She foresaw the trails of the future in her dreams, and hand-picked those summoned by destiny, bestowing prophecies upon them, to guide the lost through the fog.

C: 早在雅努萨波利斯还未毁灭的时候，命运三相殿里的祭司就常常杜撰神谕，和那些该死的政治家狼狈为奸。
E: Before Janusopolis was destroyed, the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates frequently concocted prophecies, colluding with those scummy politicians.

C: 咳咳咳，我先喘喘。
E: *coughs* Let me catch my breath.

C: 谢谢你的关心，但这和你的结论似乎没有关系呢。
E: Thank you for your concern, but this doesn't seem to be related to the conclusion you've drawn.

C: 让帕西提亚再做一次三相祈祷！给泰坦献上最好的祭品。或许，欧洛尼斯会回心转意？然后改写我们的命运。
E: Have Pasithea plead with the Three Fates once more! Proffer the most luxurious of sacrifice to the Titan. Mayhaps Oronyx will change their mind? Then they will rewrite our fate.

C: 你斟酌的修辞会被无数后人引用，你的名字也会被树庭的学者们所牢记。
E: Your eloquent rhetoric will be quoted by countless others after you. Your name will also be remembered by scholars of the Grove.

C: 保持缄默。
E: Maintain silence.

C: 残存的回忆消散在了空中，从今以后，帕西提亚的梦里再也不会有「幽灵」的声音了。
E: The lingering memories fade into the air. From today on, Pasithea's dreams will not be haunted by the echoes of "the ghost" anymore.

C: 命运，我一路追逐它来到这里，最后却扑了个空。欧洛尼斯，还有妈妈，我们有成功挣脱自己的命运吗？
E: I chased destiny to this point, only to end up with nothing. Oronyx, and my mother... have we truly succeeded in breaking free from our own destinies?

C: 嘘嘘！要是让大家听见，恐怕得登上《水晶日报》的头版头条了。
E: Shhhh! If everyone hears about this, it'll make the front page of Crystal Daily for sure!

C: 那，昔涟呢？
E: So, what happened to Cyrene?

C: 只是这件事发生在「过去」。而在她的时间里，这一切就是「永恒」。
E: But that had already happened in the "past." In her subjective time, everything has become "eternal."

C: 这个名字，将为数个琥珀纪以来一潭死水的人文学科掀起狂风骤雨！我只需如刻法勒般端坐源头，课题、经费便会如同黄金血般汩汩流向万千学者……
E: This name will stir up a storm in the waters of humanities that have been stagnant for several Amber Eras! I need only sit at the source like Kephale, and research topics and funding will flow like golden blood to thousands of scholars...

C: 至于具体的方向和计划，就拜托你来指点下她吧。
E: As for the specifics about the teaching plan, it's totally up to you.

C: …收到，笔记已保存。
E: ...Got it, note saved.

C: 这么快就学完了？
E: That was quick.

C: 古恩让我当你的老师。
E: Gunn made me your teacher.

C: 但你毕竟是个仿生人…
E: But you are an android after all...

C: 今天的风很喧嚣哦。
E: It sure is windy today.

C: 放心吧，我们会追查的。
E: Leave it to us. We'll get to the bottom of it.

C: 这些机器人是艾丝妲站长自费购入的，都是定制产品，花了不少钱。
E: Lead Researcher Asta bought these robots with her own money. They are all custom-made and cost a lot.

C: 要先确定是哪里故障…这样我修理起来就快多了。
E: I need to confirm where the fault is... then I'll have an easier time fixing them.

C: 是为了那个「防盗门」来的吧？我就知道肯定有人把这个消息泄露出去了，哼。
E: It's about that security door, right? I knew it. Someone leaked that info. Hmph.

C: 啊！星神一定对我有特殊的眷顾，才让我拥有如此非凡的才华……
E: Ah! The Aeons must have cast their special blessings upon me, bestowing such extraordinary talents...

C: …你这不是废话嘛，眼前这个就是啊！
E: ...What are you talking about? The thing in front of you is the Curio!

C: 该怎么做才好…
E: How should I do this...

C: 我，即新星！
E: I am the rising star!

C: 「大大的期待！」嗯，没错，暗号就是这个。
E: "A big expectation!" Yes, this is the passphrase.

C: 那是大半年前的款式…现在还流不流行都要打个问号了。
E: That was from more than six months ago... I'm not sure if it's still in fashion.

C: 「琥珀星光」——琥珀色底色，带有自定义变色星光纹路，关了灯特别酷炫，在人群里就是最亮的崽！
E: Amber Starlight — With an amber-hued background and customizable, color-changing starlight patterns, it looks super cool when the lights are off. You'll be the coolest person all around!

C: 我的心中没有任何杂念，只想交一个真心朋友。反倒是我接触的那些人顾忌太多，或是对我的家世怀有疑问，或是对我抱持着无中生有的偏见。
E: I have no other intentions. I just want to make true friends. It was the people I came into contact with... They were too cautious. Some of them had suspicions about my family background, and some held prejudices against me for no reason.

C: 好了，该去帮我找朋友了。和以往一样，要找的人由我来指定。
E: All right, it's time to help me make friends. Just like before, I will decide who I want to make friends with.

C: …照片？真是奇怪，一般的戏迷都更偏向于给我写信…好吧，让我看看。
E: Photo? That's weird. My fans usually write me letters. Well, I'll take a look.

C: 你打开回收箱，看见垃圾袋向里凹陷，空出一个人的形状——是谁把这里当作了床？
E: You open the recycle bin and see a caved-in section among the bags of rubbish, in the shape of a person... Has someone been sleeping here?

C: 但这真的是我的矿镐吗？我不记得在上面刻过字啊…算了，想那么多干嘛，就当是它吧。
E: Is this really my mining pick? I don't remember carving my name on it... Anyway, does it matter?

C: 我觉得「地火」也能处理这事…
E: I think Wildfire can handle this too...

C: 喂，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！这里这里，赶紧过来！
E: Hey, honorary member {NICKNAME}! Here, here, come here!

C: 你还没忘记「鼹鼠党振兴计划」吧？告诉你哦，根据我的线人报告，「地火」今天又要送很多份物资——这不正是鼹鼠党出动的好时机嘛！
E: You haven't forgotten The Moles Reinvigoration Plan, have you? Let me tell you, according to my informant's report, Wildfire needs to send lots of supplies today — isn't this a good time for The Moles to make a move?

C: 用不了多久，有关咱们的英雄事迹就会传遍下层区了…怎么样，是不是很期待？
E: Before long, our legendary story will be told throughout the Underworld. Don't you feel excited!?

C: 下层区的铆钉镇…
E: Rivet Town in the Underworld...

C: 你是吉尔伯特的女儿吗？
E: Are you Gilbert's daughter?

C: 今天需要帮忙吗，老头子？
E: Do you need help, old man?

C: …你当真这么觉得？可是他们已经把这事报告给上面了……
E: You really think so? But they've even asked their superior about this...

C: 仔细一看，你不是那个喜欢多管闲事的人吗？那你来得正好，有些事情需要你帮忙。
E: Wait a minute, aren't you that meddler who loves to get involved in other people's business? Well, you're in luck, as I do need a helper right now.

C: 哎…果然。请回吧，等你能答出这个问题，再来提交你的大作吧。你也不要怪我，这都是规章制度，要是破例给你放进去，我是要吃处分的。抱歉了。
E: I see... I thought as much... Come back when you can actually answer this question, and after that, you can show me your masterpiece. Don't even bother complaining, since I don't make the rules. If I make an exception for you, I'm the one getting punished.

C: 哎…果然。请回吧，等你能答出这个问题，再来提交你的大作吧。你也不要怪我，这都是规章制度，要是破例给你放进去，我是要吃处分的。抱歉了。
E: I see... I thought as much... Come back when you can actually answer this question, and after that, you can show me your masterpiece. Don't even bother complaining, since I don't make the rules. If I make an exception for you, I'm the one getting punished.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，看来你也只能到此为止了啊！
E: Hahaha! Looks like this is as far as you come, then!

C: 你脑子才不好用呢。
E: You said yourself, you're the blunt one!

C: 你这是遇见波瓦大臣了吧？我跟你说，最坏的就是这个糟老头子。
E: Did you run into Minister Bova? I'm telling ya, this old codger's the meanest of the lot.

C: 能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。什么时候您又想活动活动脑筋了，欢迎再来找我。
E: It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. When you want to exercise your brain, please come again.

C: 听说波瓦大臣要退休了？
E: I heard Minister Bova is thinking about retiring soon?

C: 咦？您是从哪里得到的消息？我完全没听说……
E: Hmm? Where'd you hear that? I haven't heard anything...

C: 关于塔米拉…
E: About Tamila...

C: 为了给她推荐书籍，我还特地去看了一下这本书…是一本爱情小说的残卷，并不完整。
E: I even read this book so I could make some suggestions for her... It's an excerpt from an unfinished romance novel.

C: 从这个角度出发，我们「正当权益会社」显然是个公益组织。
E: If you view it that way, then The Rightful Rights Society is certainly a charitable organization.

C: 「正当权益会社——会员 亚诺 发布了一则委托。有意向提供协助的社友请前往面洽！」
E: "Amo, a member of the Rightful Rights Society, has issued an assignment. Please contact Amo if you are interested in offering your help!"

C: 你怎么回事，这菜单上不写着「暂停供应」嘛。咖啡豆在贝洛伯格可太珍贵了，我也就小时候见妈妈喝过一次…还是帮你点杯「哞哞热牛奶」吧。
E: What's up with you? The menu already says it's temporarily unavailable. Coffee beans are so precious in Belobog and I've only ever seen my mother drink coffee once in my life... I'll get you a Moo-Moo Hot Milk instead.

C: 我还是不知道该聊什么…
E: I don't know what to chat about.

C: （去找拉雯妮问问看吧……）
E: (I'll ask Lavonne about it...)

C: 兄弟们，跟我一起上！千万别让他向铁卫报了案！
E: Come with me, friends! Don't let this one report us to the Guards!

C: 「一名海上落难者靠着野外求生的技巧，最后在荒岛上生存下来…」我记得只有我一人对这故事感兴趣，我还说这要真的就有意思了。
E: "A person lost at sea uses their wilderness survival skills to survive on a deserted island..." I remember I was the only person who cared about this story. I thought it would be interesting if it really happened.

C: 如果你又发现了类似的情况，<color=#dbc291ff>你就自己处理掉吧。</color>除非，这漂流瓶里存在着确凿的证据。
E: If you come across anything similar, <color=#dbc291ff>just deal with it yourself.</color> That is unless you find conclusive evidence inside the drift bottle.

C: 你阅读完底稿之后，从字里行间感受到了信件那按耐不住的表达欲——无论是抱怨年轻人在长生社会找不到工作，还是星际和平公司带来的外部压力……
E: Upon reading the draft, you sense its uncontrollable urge to express itself: Be it lamenting the fact that young people cannot find jobs within a long-living society, or the external pressure brought about by the Interastral Peace Corporation...

C: 海滩上放着一本书，你敏锐地察觉到了这并不对劲。难道这又是放生帮干的好事？「放生知识」——放眼整个放生界，这也是一个全新的课题。
E: You find a book on the beach and keenly perceive that something is not right about it. Could this be the work of the Unshackled, too? Unshackling knowledge — Even among the vast realm of unshackling, this is a whole new venture.

C: 因为这意味着和过去告别。
E: Because this means saying farewell to your past.

C: …这也许是「巡猎」命途的体现。至少在当下，你走在「巡猎」的命途上。下次去模拟宇宙的时候，试试「巡猎」开局如何？
E: ...Perhaps this is a manifestation of the Path of The Hunt. At least, for now, you are ambling on the Path of The Hunt. How about trying out The Hunt at the start of your next Simulated Universe run?

C: 啊，我知道主人的疑惑。我可以先回答你的问题，放心，这不算在愿望里。
E: Ah, I understand your suspicion, master. Allow me to answer your questions first. Fear not, this will not count as your wish.

C: 奇怪了，我自己尝的时候就没事。难道是体质问题？你该不会是什么敏感肌敏感胃吧？
E: But why did nothing happen when I tried it myself? Are you sensitive to certain ingredients?

C: 我瞧你这情况才出现没多久啊，喝之前还好好的，感觉应该是配方里的碳酸气体加多了。
E: You only started burping after having the tea. Maybe I added too much carbonated gas.

C: 「黑潮」，奇怪的名字…难道和星核有关？
E: The "Black Tide." What a strange name... Could that be related to Stellarons?

C: 欧洛尼斯的神像
E: Oronyx's Statue

C: 别吵啦！别吵啦！悬锋城现在飘到了哪里我们都还不知道呢，上哪儿找尼卡多利呀……
E: Stop fighting! Stop fighting! We don't know where Castrum Kremnos has drifted off to. Where are we supposed to go in search of Nikador...?

C: 走吧，但愿帕西提亚大人能挺过来。
E: Let's go. Hope Lady Pasithea can make it.

C: …我不懂您的意思。
E: ...I don't understand what you are saying.

C: 你记住了「曾乘坐过大地兽」
E: You remembered "Riding Dromas."

C: 布满裂纹的书架上，散落着数不清的卷轴，曾经用以精心捆绑的金线已经风化断裂，你深刻地感受到什么叫岁月无情。
E: Cracked shelves hold countless scrolls. The gold threads once used to meticulously bind the volumes are all now decayed and broken, making you keenly feel relentless time's cruelty.
