C: 好吧，人类没法进行两场相同的战斗，即使在你的幻想中也不行。不管如何，你击败了那位剑士，获得了最终胜利。
E: Well, no one can fight the same battle twice, not even in your imagination. Regardless, you defeated the swordsman and claimed ultimate victory.

C: 你成功了！不会再有人来质疑你的意志力，你是最终的胜者！但…代价是什么呢？
E: You've succeeded! No one will question your resolve again. You are the ultimate victor! But... at what cost?

C: 圣女大人，对于布利萨城的未来…命运泰坦们给予了怎样的神谕？
E: Great Maiden, what prophecy have the Fate Titans shown you... regarding the fate of Bulsa City?

C: 这其中是否有某种…深意？
E: Does it carry some... deeper meaning?

C: 周遭的时间流速变得缓慢，就像是浓黑迷雾笼罩了你，你再也看不清眼前的一切，头顶似有星光闪烁，你只得努力抬头张望。
E: The flow of time around you slows as if a dense black mist is enveloping you. Your vision blurs, and distant starlight flickers above — you strain to look up.

C: 熄灭圣烛。
E: Extinguish the holy candle.

C: 本狮向来以发言谨慎著称，更不会轻易奉承任何人，但你身上的优秀品质过分闪耀，让本狮不由得就说出了赞美之词吼！
E: I am famous for speaking with utmost care, and would never offer flattery lightly, but your remarkable qualities shine so brightly that I can't help but praise you!

C: 相传，她将自己的研究以不为人知的方式保存了下来，又把它们分散到了翁法罗斯各地。这些石板可能是她的手笔…但有些细节还是难以解释。
E: It's said that she preserved her research in ways unknown and scattered it across Amphoreus. These slates may be her handiwork... but certain details remain unexplained.

C: o((⊙'ω´⊙ )っ「刚才你指挥得不错欧，伙伴！我正为了出海募集船员…就由你来当掌舵手吧！」)∋
E: o((⊙'ω´⊙ )っ "You did great giving orders earlier, partner! I'm looking for more crew to sail out... Why don't you take the helm?" )∋

C: o((⊙'ω´- )っ「咕呜，追逐梦想的道路果然充满了阻碍。看来远航的计划要搁浅了欧——」)∋
E: o((⊙'ω´- )っ "Uh-oh, the dream chaser's path is indeed filled with obstacles. Looks like the grand voyage has beached—" )∋

C: Σ(:３っ「但是坚持了一段时间之后，刺头很尖，很锐，很亮！像加了特技一样~」)∋
E: Σ(:３っ "That said, after having used it for a while, my spikes became very pointy, very stylish, and very glossy! Like they have special effects~" )∋

C: 既然黎明机器已经熄灭，就说明异乡人阁下他们成功了，艾格勒的「天空诅咒」此刻肯定也不存在了……
E: If the Dawn Device has been extinguished, then it means the outlander succeeded. Aquila's curse is surely gone now...

C: 昏光庭院的风堇，你心中最温柔的黄金裔。她已将天空缝补，向大地展露着治愈的笑容。现在你之所见，只是记忆复现出的残像。
E: Hyacine of the Twilight Courtyard, the gentlest Chrysos Heir in your heart. She has mended the sky, and offers a healing smile to the earth. What you now behold is merely an afterimage reproduced from memory.

C: 或许是因为再创世在即，四溢的神性也随之开始重新凝聚。你伸手触碰它，却没有得到任何回应。
E: Perhaps it is because the Era Nova is imminent, and the overflowing divine energy has begun to coalesce once more. You reach out to touch it, but receive no response.

C: 门扉顶部的巨眼闪烁着苍白的光芒，它正审视着每一位胆敢靠近的访客。
E: The giant eye atop the door flickers with a pale light, scrutinizing every visitor who dares to approach.

C: 想要和你聊聊。
E: I want to have a chat with you.

C: ——传来了自然的声音。
E: The sound of nature echoed forth.

C: 如果去小妖精家里做客的话，头肯定会撞到门框吧。
E: If you ever visit a fairy's house, you might want to lower your head to avoid a collision with the door frame.

C: 仍然沸腾的炭火、倾倒的铁砧，却不见打铁的工匠。据说第一次与那位铁匠对话的勇士，都学会了「欢呼」的表达方式。
E: Still-glowing embers. A toppled anvil. But no blacksmith in sight. Legend has it that any warrior who speaks to that smith learns how to cheer.

C: 不去管它。
E: Forget about it.

C: 在落幕的斯缇科西亚，海妖公主缔造的欢宴仍在延续，仿佛要将酣歌带往来世……
E: In the twilight of Styxia, the Princess Sea Siren's grand feast lives on, as if the song and revelry will echo into the afterlife...

C: 圣城奥赫玛公派的学生。
E: Officially sponsored students from the holy city Okhema.

C: 作为你的老师，我当然希望你能在充分学习之后赞同我的观点。但是你如果不同意我的观点，你最好有足以反驳我的学识与思考……
E: As your teacher, I'd love you to agree with me after sufficient study. But if you disagree, you'd better back it up with enough knowledge and reasoning...

C: …都怪老师太喜欢大地兽了。
E: ...It's all because the professor's so obsessed with dromas.

C: 在{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的奇迹中，此处似乎是空无一人——
E: Within {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s miracle, this place appears utterly deserted—

C: 她为你留下了一小片花圃，它足以证明那一刻并非短暂的梦境，而是真实的回忆。
E: She left you a small garden — a testament that moment wasn't a fleeting dream but a true memory.

C: 吓到了？哀丽秘榭的微风，可不该把你的心弦吹得如此紧绷，放轻松点。
E: Surprised, are you? The gentle breeze of Aedes Elysiae shouldn't have pulled your heartstrings so taut. Relax.

C: 好意外的计划…
E: What an unexpected plan...

C: 感谢你，吉奥刻勒斯，是你说服了树庭的学者，让我能够来此访学。
E: Thank you, Geocles, for convincing the scholars of the Grove to let me study here.

C: 算了，我只是太过紧张了，你尽可以仰望星空，事情还没有那么糟糕。
E: Never mind, I'm just being overly anxious. You're free to look up at the stars. Things aren't that bad yet.

C: 回去就能见着他。
E: You'll see it once you return.

C: 这里风景很好吧。在遇见你之前，我已经独自看了好久好久…谢谢你来到这里，为这个世界带来改变。
E: Beautiful view, isn't it? I'd been watching it alone for such a long, long time before I met you... Thank you for coming here and bringing change to this world.

C: 独孤…求一败！
E: Lonely... I long for a defeat!

C: 呃，所以我主动来见你了呀，让我解释一下——
E: Erm, that's why I'm here. Let me explain—

C: 所以忆庭决定收集并保管他们的记忆。灾难结束后，这些记忆的碎片将为消逝的一切拼出重生的蓝图。
E: That is why Garden of Recollection has decided to collect and safe keep their memories. Once the crisis ends, the fragments of these memories will shape a blueprint of rebirth for everything that has disappeared.

C: 这样的人会拥有怎样的过去和未来，又将为宇宙留下怎样的忆质？流光忆庭对此很有兴趣。
E: The Garden of Recollection is very interested in what kind of a past, future, and influence on the universe someone like this will have.

C: 向你致敬，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: I salute you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 我离开上层太久，早就看不懂那些稀奇古怪的发明了。不过谁知道呢？指不定有惊喜，哈哈。
E: I've been away from the Overworld so long now that I've long given up hope of understanding those weird gizmos. But, who knows? Maybe we'll be surprised, haha.

C: 还是算了。
E: I'll pass.

C: （佩佩知道，所以佩佩要努力探案，为小姐减轻负担！）
E: (Peppy knows, and that's why Peppy is investigating hard, to reduce the burden on Miss Asta!)

C: 好嘤！你们人好好哦！
E: Eeep! You are kind people!

C: 关于管家，你还知道什么？
E: What do you know about the butler?

C: 是有人在求救吗？
E: Is someone calling for help?

C: 你注意到围观的「阮•梅」造物似乎并没有动摇。
E: You notice that the onlooking creations of Ruan Mei do not seem to be wavering.

C: 明显有别的原因！
E: There must be another explanation!

C: 没错。喜欢是很单纯、自然的行为哦？如果{NICKNAME}也有喜欢的人，无论亲情、友情还是爱，不妨大胆一些，全部表达出来吧！
E: That's right. Liking someone is a simple and natural part of life. If {NICKNAME} has got someone special: family, friend, or romance, muster your courage and express yourself freely!

C: {NICKNAME}说得很对呢，就像「裁剪衣服」时一样，失去…反倒让她留下的事物更加美好了吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, you're right. Just like when tailoring clothes, loss... actually makes what remains even more beautiful, doesn't it?

C: 总之先按暂停键。
E: Let's just hit pause for now.

C: 别这么说呀，大家不是还在为「新世界」竭尽全力吗？人家相信…那会是一个美好的明天。
E: Don't say that! Isn't everyone doing their best for the "new world"? I believe... it will be a bright tomorrow.

C: *欠条*
E: *IOU document*

C: 我受伤了！用拼图治疗我！
E: I'm injured! Use the puzzle to treat me!

C: 像鹰一样观察……
E: Be observant like a hawk...

C: 好想挂在那里…
E: How I wish I could be hung there too...

C: 我也觉得。这不就是个有门楼的机械偃偶吗？肯定没人买账的。
E: I feel so too. Isn't it just a mechanical puppet with a gate? I don't think anyone would buy it.

C: 「匣里流光」的设计还不够充分，这几次测试中暴露的问题，全是过去出现过的。
E: The Luminflux Pyxis' design is not good enough. The problems exposed in these tests have all occurred in the past.

C: 哈哈，到时候就得叫他们「金人驾驶员」了。
E: Haha. We have to call them "aurumaton drivers" by then.

C: 怎么能说和太卜司无关？
E: How could you say it has nothing to do with the Divination Commission?

C: 哈哈，就是因为快要瞒不下去了，所以想要借助阵法占算一下。
E: Haha, it's exactly because I can't hide things for much longer that I need to borrow the matrix for a quick divination.

C: 等一下。
E: Wait a moment.

C: 说实话，我们交手这么多次，你有没有一次觉得「棋逢对手」？
E: Seriously, after facing me so many times, have you ever felt like you "met your match"?

C: 最后一题了，快点吧。
E: Last question. Hurry it up.

C: 让您看笑话了，我再重新给您介绍下这次活动好了。
E: My apologies for the mix-up. As amends, why don't I introduce the event to you again?

C: 帝弓为你关上一扇门，就会为你打开一扇窗。我虽然眼睛不好，但我耳朵特别灵，靠「听声辨位」也能下棋。
E: When the Reignbow closes a door, THEY open a window. My eyes may have failed, but my ears are particularly sharp. I can play simply by discerning the pieces' locations by sound.

C: 不是师傅，是私服。就是说，私自架设服务器，是对知识产权危害最大的犯罪行为之一。
E: Not that kind of server. I meant a computer that shares information with other computers. In other words, setting up a server privately ranks among the gravest offenses against intellectual property.

C: 然后他们地衡司说我的威胁程度比较大，还是关幽囚狱比较好，就联系了判官。
E: Later, the Realm-Keeping Commission declared that my threat level was high and it would be safer to lock me up in The Shackling Prison, so they contacted the judges.

C: 推广游戏都推广到监狱里了…魔方秘社的人这么狂的吗？
E: To think they even promote their game in the prison... Are the members of the Hex Club obsessed with it?

C: 滴、答…游客，我们又见面了。
E: Tick, tock... We meet again, guest.

C: 再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
E: Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.
Six warriors.
Nine warriors.

C: 把我的宝箱还来！
E: Give me back my chest!

C: 我就说呢！这一手本领可不是凡人能有的。
E: I knew it! No mortal could have such powers.

C: 扎格列斯老祖留下的名言警句可多着呢，可惜现在的人有眼无珠，只认可瑟希斯的智慧——殊不知，瑟希斯的那点小聪明，都是扎格列斯老祖偷剩下的呢。
E: Ancestor Zagreus left many pearls of wisdom. Alas, people nowadays are selectively blind, only heeding Cerces' words — they can't even fathom that the paltry tricks of Cerces are all that remains after Zagreus stole everything else.

C: 「笑死，谁吃果子会吃核儿啊？」
E: "Hah, who would eat the seeds of a fruit?"

C: 放弃吧，你追不上的！
E: Give up, you'll never catch me!

C: 哦哟，没有在这{RUBY_B#树庭}树林子{RUBY_E#}里迷路啊，不错不错。
E: Oh my, finding your way through {RUBY_B#the Grove}the woods{RUBY_E#} without getting lost? Impressive, impressive.

C: 识得这里是什么吗？一位泰坦的心脏！桀桀桀，若是能做得「偷心大盗」，我巴特鲁斯也算是不枉此生呀……
E: Recognize this place? You're standing in a Titan's heart! Hehehe, if I could manage to steal that, I, Bartholos, would go down in history as the greatest thief of all...

C: 扎格列斯这么有文化？
E: Zagreus? That's profound of them.

C: 桀桀，我欣赏你的坏心眼！您有一颗多么纯粹的心灵呀……
E: Hehe, I can admire that kind of wickedness! Truly, what a pure heart you have...

C: 啧，还说你不是扎格列斯……
E: Tsk, yet you insist you're not Zagreus...

C: 哎呀哎呀，刚才真是好大的风，吹得咱脚都站不稳了。来来来，快来扶咱一把！
E: Goodness gracious, what a gust that was! Nearly knocked me over. Come on, give me a hand!

C: 我的话已经是最简洁的了，真没法再缩减了喀。
E: I've already made it as simple as possible — can't possibly trim it down more, you know.

C: 唔，被我吃了？桀桀，开玩笑的。
E: Hmm, maybe I ate them? Hehe, only joking.

C: 好啦好啦，俏皮话咱也不适合说太多…您要是有兴趣，就和咱一起去夺取宝藏吧！
E: Alright, alright, enough with the jokes... If you're interested, why not come treasure hunting with me?

C: 和「小猪」玩一下。
E: Play with "piggies."

C: 咳咳…天机不可泄露，老巴特鲁斯一不小心好像又说得太多。好啦，咱说话算话——
E: Ahem... Some secrets are better left unknown. Looks like ol' Bartholos got carried away again. Anyway, as promised...

C: 那么，就借我<unbreak>14</unbreak>个如何？每天两两一换，既可以轮流展示，也有足够的数量在手头研究。
E: In that case, how about lending me <unbreak>14</unbreak> trophies? We can swap out two each day — it'll keep the exhibits fresh while ensuring I have enough for research.

C: 《因为太阳将要毁伤》
E: For the Sun is Set to Die

C: 迷津展露，交给你了。
E: The Maze has been revealed. I'll leave it to you.

C: 我来交付雅努斯的神谕。
E: I've come to deliver Janus's prophecy.

C: 还愣着干什么，赶紧点上啊。
E: What are you waiting for? Next!

C: 即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
E: Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

C: 呃啊…还是想不起来……
E: Ugh... I still can't remember...

C: 什么情况？
E: What's going on?

C: 抱歉…早知道不让你俩跟我走了，你们要是自己走，没准都到了……
E: I'm sorry... If I'd known I wouldn't have got you to come with me. You'd probably be there by now if you'd gone by yourself...

C: 很好，别担心，你的行动权限暂时被我锁了，先听我解释一下：
E: Very well. Don't worry. I've temporarily revoked your activity permissions. Let me explain.

C: 吸引星神？
E: Attract Aeons?

C: 我是阿基维利…
E: I am Akivili...

C: 我已经升级了「模拟宇宙」。现在它有更大的内存，可以支持更长的流程。我猜上一局应该挺无聊的，所以我会让斯蒂芬多加点有趣的东西。
E: I've upgraded the Simulated Universe — it now has more memory and can support longer sessions. The last round must've been pretty boring — I'll get Stephen to add a few more interesting things.

C: 好耶，我喜欢有趣的游戏！
E: Yay! I love fun games!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「对不起，这是我的过失。」</color>黑塔的声音在你耳边响起，<color=#dbc291ff>「纳努克没见过阿基维利，没想到祂对陌生的星神也这么粗暴，你一下子就被祂分解了。我只好用系统指令还原了一个你。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"I'm sorry. This is my fault."</color> You hear Herta's voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"Nanook has never met Akivili. I didn't expect THEM to be so violent even towards an unknown Aeon. You were disintegrated instantly. I had to use system commands to restore a backup of you."</color>

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 里面的星神真的是虚拟的吗？
E: Are the Aeons in there really simulations?

C: 唔，他是我们的第四个合伙人，#84「怪人」斯蒂芬•劳艾德。作为一个天才，这家伙对发挥才能毫无兴趣，每天2/3的时间花在他养父的水果店里。
E: Oh, he's our fourth partner, member #84, Stephen "Weirdo" Lloyd. That guy's a genius with no interest in using his abilities, and spends two-thirds of his time in his adoptive father's fruit shop.

C: 「说了这不可能。」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，「除非我把祂的出生日期用修改器强行调一下。但这还有什么意义？」
E: "I've told you that isn't possible." Herta scrunches her nose and adds, "Unless I change THEIR date of birth with the modifier, but what's the point in doing so?"

C: 壳褶与神音的颤抖在彩色血液四溅下被掩盖，生着獠牙与触角的原初之卵从祂身侧脚旁逃逸、奔流，并在离开祂的躯壳时立刻死去！祂的汁液涂裹大地，盛大的分娩于热烈与死亡之中发生——在众卵禁忌、欢欣的逃散中！
E: The trembling of the shell folds and the Aeon's sound is overshadowed by the splattering of colorful blood. The primordial eggs, bearing fangs and antennae, escape and slip away, only to perish immediately upon leaving the Aeon's body! The ground is covered by THEIR fluid, as a grand labor takes place in the middle of fervor and death — amidst the forbidden dispersal and joyous escape of the eggs!

C: 因为爱就是很痛的，至少你还可以表达。
E: It's because it hurts to love someone. At least, you know how to express your love.

C: 祂的身下有帝国轰鸣，信众轰然发出和声；祂似浮空却身形厚重，其面容有圣歌般的光辉；祂发出的每个字都像有纵向排列的音节，带有或黯淡或富丽的色调。
E: Empires thunder beneath the Aeon as the believers roar in harmony. The Aeon appears to float despite THEIR massive and heavy body, and THEIR countenance glows like a sacred hymn. Every word THEY utter sounds like vertically aligned syllables with either a somber or posh tone.

C: 在失去昼夜的宙斯忒赫特拉星，天空被虫潮遮蔽。众人本已放弃一切，而阴霾却突然消退——天亮了。宙斯忒赫特拉星自此开始了持续三个自然日的胜利怒号，你于半途加入其中，又与众人痛饮了十八个日夜，直到你终于反应过来——天似乎已亮了很久。
E: On planet Zeus Tehtera, where the distinction between day and night has long been blurred by the all-encompassing darkness wrought by the Swarm, the residents have already resigned themselves to their doomed fate. However, the shroud of darkness suddenly lifts — and the light of dawn breaks through. A triumphant and exultant celebration ensues, lasting for three full natural days and nights. You join in the revelry halfway through, imbibing to your heart's content with the jubilant crowd for eighteen days and nights, until a realization dawns upon you: The daylight has persisted for far too long.

C: …你挥了挥手，狠狠地把聒噪的*言语*消灭！哦，现在终于清净了不少。
E: ...You wave your hand, dispelling the incessant *words*. Ah, peace and quiet at last.

C: 接着，「自灭者」伸出手，难经诱惑地吞着口水，他终于在第四日想起了<color=#dbc291ff>「自灭」的自我</color>。
E: Just then, the Self-Annihilator stretches out his hand, gulping as if to keep some temptation at bay, and on the fourth day, he finally remembers the <color=#dbc291ff>annihilation of self</color>.

C: 「走啦，{NICKNAME}。你怎么不接着玩模拟宇宙了？」黑塔突然出现，她不知道你发生了什么。
E: "Time to go, {NICKNAME}. Why aren't you still playing in the Simulated Universe?" Herta suddenly appears. She doesn't know what happened to you.

C: 你路过「筑城者」的城墙脚下，这里有一尊厚重的城前雕塑：但是他会呼吸。他的身躯苍老、庞大无比，他像一堵墙，胡须随时空的流逝变得很长。一些路过城墙脚下的旅行者，曾想点燃火焰给他清理胡须，但都被他拒绝。
E: You pass by the foot of the Architects' wall where a sturdy statue can be seen before the city — except it is breathing. His body is old and massive like a wall, his whiskers grown long as time itself. Travelers passing by thought of setting his beard on fire to clean him up, but he always declined their help.

C: 根据宇宙各地的虫群活动痕迹，我总觉得「繁育」的命途不像「塔伊兹育罗斯」陨落后应有的萎靡状态。但祂的确是陨落了…
E: According to tracked Swarm activity across the universe, I keep thinking that the Path of Propagation isn't as debilitated as it's supposed to be after the fall of Tayzzyronth. But THEY definitely have fallen...

C: 远离*危险*。
E: Stay out of *danger*.

C: 认知拓宽：「血色吊唁」•其二
E: Broadened Cognition: Sanguine Condolences (II)

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我恨。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I hate them.

C: 螺丝。
E: A Screwhead.

C: 他忽然觉得所有的有机生命，都是伪造出来，用以欺骗的「机器」，只有自己拥有「自由意志」。
E: Suddenly, it occurred to him that all organic lives were artificial machines made for deceptive purposes. Meanwhile, he was the only being with free will.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我可以救它…让我再找找办法。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I can save it... Let me think of a way.

C: 微微躺在地上，滚烫的岩石带来痛楚，你已经许久不曾如此真切地感受到自己仍活着。死去就是死去，能够替代生命的，唯有生命本身。
E: Lying down ever so gently on the ground, you feel the boiling rocks hurting your skin. It has been such a long time since you have felt so clearly that you are still alive. If you die, you die — the only thing that can replace life is life itself.

C: 没路了，往回跑！
E: No room. Back up!

C: 嘭！
E: Bang!

C: 野蛮的伊始。
E: The beginnings of savagery.

C: 「小雅你就知足吧。你不知道，为了批下这台机器，我就差给财务主管磕头了…诶诶，快放下，别弄坏了。」一个秃头老男人把你夺走，他的头顶反射着光芒，令你的前置摄像头炫目。
E: "Xiaoya, I wish you would be more grateful for what you have. You have no idea the lengths I went to and how I bowed to the finance manager to secure this machine... Hey, hey! Put that down. Don't break it!" A bald-headed man steals you away. As the light reflects off of his head, your front camera is blinded.

C: 经过十个琥珀纪的检索和理解，你终于翻到了最后一页。那是一列瀑布般的名单，篆刻着这颗星球上每代烛墨学派学者的名字。他们是文明的记录者，却只给自己留下微不足道的笔墨。
E: After ten Amber Eras of searching and understanding, you finally reach the last page of history. You find a cascading list of engraved names, those of each generation of Candelagraphos scholars. Though they are the ones that record the history of this world, all they leave of themselves is a mere signature.

C: 「我们负责辛苦把花养大，他们负责裁下花冠供资本欣赏。」普拉多斯向你抱怨。
E: "We are responsible for carefully nurturing the flowers, while all they do is cut them down to wear as laurels," complains Prados.

C: 你环顾四周。三个系统时前，这个报告厅还挤满了「星际能源学派」学者和「技术研发部」工程师，而现在只剩下你们两人。
E: You look around you. Three hours ago, this lecture hall was filled with scholars of the School of Interstellar Energy Resources and engineers from the Technology Department. Yet now, only the two of you remain.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机体。
E: Determining "intra-cognition" - I am inorganic.

C: 作为宇宙知识的存储与中转站，伊斯梅尔储存的知识成为学士最大的依仗。利用馆藏资源和各自的研究，你们分工合作，开始在图书馆内生产生活。
E: As the repository and transit hub of the universe's knowledge, the knowledge stored in Izmael is the greatest pillar that scholars can rely on. Deploying stashed resources and your own research, you all toil away at your designated tasks, beginning a life within the library itself.

C: 黑塔女士，你已与外部失联了<unbreak>34</unbreak>个标准时，{NICKNAME}受我的邀请，专程为寻找你而来。
E: Madam Herta, you have been out of contact with the outside world for <unbreak>34</unbreak> universal hours. I specifically requested that {NICKNAME} come to find you.

C: 就像有双无形的手，不断阻止我走出已知的圆圈，组成一片连续的「不可知域」。
E: It's like there was a pair of invisible hands constantly preventing me from leaving the circle of the known, creating a continuous Unknowable Domain.

C: 溜了溜了。
E: I'm out of here.

C: 「怎么弄都行，赶紧开始吧。」
E: "Do whatever is required. Just get it started."

C: 焦虑和恐惧被一阵突如其来欢欣之风焚尽。亢奋、癫狂、无上的愉悦攫住你的感官。模拟宇宙的天幕上响起一声惊雷般清脆的声音——
E: Anxiety and fear are burned away by a sudden gust of joyous wind. Exhilaration, madness, and unparalleled delight grip your senses. A crisp and thunderous sound rings through the sky of the Simulated Universe.

C: 这次模拟演算失败了？
E: This simulated extrapolation failed?

C: 星际和平公司的董事会理事「疤眼夫人」坐在你对面，她的左眼有一道狭长的疤，你感受到她正观察你。
E: Madam Scarred Eye, board member of the IPC, sits across from you. A long and narrow scar cuts through her left eye. You can sense her gaze on you.

C: 「它们很混乱，我就干脆把这团代码装起来，塞在了奇物里。」黑塔说。「把它带着，暂时会给让你的行为记录产生偏差，但我很快就会修好它。」
E: "The bundle of codes was a mess, so I packed it up and stuffed it into a Curio," Herta says. "Carrying it around will cause a deviation in your behavioral record, but I will fix it in no time."

C: 你走近车厢，他朝你招手。「阿基维利曾化身普通人，与布达安尔利人一起开拓冒险，我们交换旅程中的有趣经历。」
E: He approaches and waves at you. "Akivili had an adventure with us under the guise of a civilian. We exchanged a lot of fun experiences during the journey."

C: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们忧郁地注视着你…
E: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty stare at you with melancholic expressions...

C: 你感到自己变得虚弱了…你的肠胃有些不适！可恶的混沌医师！你决定立刻绕路逃跑。
E: You can feel yourself getting weak... your stomach twisting and churning! It must be the fault of that Doctor of Chaos! You decide to take a detour and leave immediately.

C: 你等待着星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…但它纹丝未动。
E: You wait for the Interastral Peace Investment Device to open its *belly*... but it stays motionless.

C: 遇见你也是一种惊喜。
E: Meeting you is also a surprise in itself.

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 今天，这个毛，你是摸定了！
E: You'll be caressing this fur today, whether the ape likes it or not!

C: 你行走在普尔普冰晶海的滩涂边缘，往日瑰丽的景色被一具具山峦般的尸骸阻挡，巨大的彗星蝉搁浅在岸上，散发出阵阵恶臭。
E: You walk along the beach of the Purpu Crystal Ocean, its once breathtaking scenery eclipsed by one mountainous corpse after another. The comet cicadas lay beached, emitting a putrid stench.

C: 受到匿名人士举报，寿司飞船实为一位进行了基因改造的原教旨主义寿司学者。这位巨大的参赛者表示，他在以自身为原料，制造太空军舰寿司。
E: An anonymous source complained that the sushi spaceship is actually a genetically modified fundamentalist sushi scholar. This enormous contestant states that he wishes to serve as a sushi spaceship, using himself as the raw material.

C: 「孩子，你有想要的东西吗？」老人不紧不慢地放下手头的塑料玩具，浑浊的眸子温和地望向你，展柜里，重力盘、引擎碎片和白乳胶粘连成千奇百怪的玩具。
E: "Is there something you want, child?" The old man unhurriedly puts down the plastic toy in his hands and gently shifts his turbid eyes at you. In the display case, centrifuge chambers and engine fragments and white latex are stuck together into various bizarre toys.

C: 加油，年轻的骇客，相信你会有成功的那天！
E: Keep persevering, young hacker. Your triumph will come one day!

C: 「我要去追逐它们。」你的内心因渴望而发出呼喊
E: "I have to chase after them." Your heart yells out in desire.

C: 不知走了多久，坚实的触感终于抵达你的脚尖。劫后余生，你长吁一口气，瘫倒在地上。
E: You can't tell how long you've walked, but a sturdy sensation finally meets your toes. Having survived the calamity, you let out a long sigh of relief and collapse to the ground.

C: 在他曾停留的地方，泛着绚烂色彩的宝物安谧地沉睡着。只不过，长年被黑潮侵蚀的财宝，似乎也早已染上灰黯之手的气息。
E: Where he once stood, treasures gleaming in vibrant hues now rest in serene slumber. Yet, they have long been eroded by the black tide, their luster dulled with the Hand of Shadow's taint.

C: 塔兰顿在上，为了胜利，你愿意付出何等代价？
E: Talanton above, what is the price you're willing to pay for victory?

C: 那些云仍在燃烧。
E: Those clouds still smolder.

C: 它也曾藏起过塔兰顿的天平，致使人间丢失了公平和正义的准绳。用于平衡良善和恶的砝码掉落人间，欺骗和妒忌，偷盗和掠夺就此应运而生。
E: They also concealed Talanton's scales, disrupting the balance of justice on earth. As the weights balancing good and evil fell to the earth, deceit, envy, theft, and plunder emerged, flourishing in their wake.

C: 生命从此会衰老。
E: From that moment, life became capable of aging.

C: 这就是死亡。
E: This is death.

C: 你已经见过了常人不曾见过的风景，至于后面更美的景色，留给不要命的人看吧。
E: You've witnessed sights that few ever will. As for the even grander views beyond? Those are for the reckless to pursue.

C: 你握紧门把手，卯足了劲推开门，这门的重量却如羽毛一样轻，你摔了进去。
E: You grip the handle tightly, plant your feet, and shove with all your strength. But the moment the door moves, it swings open effortlessly, sending you tumbling inside.

C: 人类还在，说明结果是好的。
E: Well, humanity's still here, so the outcome can't be that bad.

C: 这就是神的智慧吗？
E: This is divine wisdom?

C: 被好胜心蒙蔽的艾格勒急于证明自己，它用鸟喙啄下自己的一双眼睛，和它的雷枪一起投进吉奥里亚的脊髓。
E: Blinded by pride and the desire to prove themself, Aquila tore out one of their own pairs of eyes with their beak and cast those — along with their lightning spear — into Georios's spine.

C: 而这座立在巨人脚下的城市，后来被人们如此称呼——圣城奥赫玛。
E: And this city, founded beneath the giant, would one day be known as the Holy City of Okhema.

C: 宿敌就是宿敌。
E: Nemeses will always be nemeses.

C: 「…就这样，故事结束了。追求永生的国王再也不会死去，但他的青春却在时光中一点点凋零…这个故事告诉我们，许愿时一定要很小心，很小心呀。」
E: "...And so the story ends. The king who sought immortality would never die, but his youth slowly withered away with time... The moral of the story is: Be very, very careful what you wish for."

C: 黑塔女士最欣赏这种有思想有觉悟且敢于说实话的年轻科员！科员！
E: Madam Herta admires such thoughtful and conscious young researchers who dare to tell the truth! Dare to tell the truth!

C: 预约会议。
E: Book a meeting.

C: 离会议开始的时间尚早，先去其他地方转转吧。
E: It's still too soon for the meeting to start, so let's take a stroll elsewhere.

C: 你研读榜单规则许久，发现第一名的奖励「黑塔女士签名照」毫无含金量，就算拿到第一也没什么意义，你悻悻收回手。
E: You pore over the leaderboard rules and discover that the first prize — A Signed Photo of Madam Herta — is worthless. Even if you won, it would be meaningless. You resentfully withdraw your hand.

C: 你还会品尝那杯咖啡吗？
E: Would you still try that cup of coffee?

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：星神。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Aeon."

C: 卢卡，你最近在研究什么新的必杀技吗？
E: Luka, have you been working on some new ultimate technique lately?

C: 没错，我就是贝洛伯格的传奇。
E: You're right. I'm the legend of Belobog.

C: 我不是为了争夺什么荣誉才参加搏击比赛的…嗐，听着是不是有点故作谦虚的意思？但我真的是这么想的，你得信我！
E: I didn't compete for glory or anything... Now that I listen to myself say that, it does sound rather pretentious, doesn't it? But it's true. Please believe me!

C: 舞台正上演着一出你不知内容的古典歌剧。《国王寻欢作乐》——如果你没记错的话，这应该是那剧目高贵的名字。其实，你可以问问身旁的雷诺阿先生……
E: An unfamiliar classical opera is playing on the stage. "The King's Pleasure" ...If you are not mistaken, that's the opera's elegant title. Actually, you could ask Mr. Renoir, who's sitting next to you, about it...

C: 这时席间有人起身。「普朗托，」那人的语气中带有试探，又像是在质问，「你在此次行动中责任重大——海量的任务是否会令你感觉有失信心？」
E: At that moment, someone from the audience stands up. "Pronto," the person speaks in a tentative and questioning tone, "you are assigned a very important role in the mission. Will your confidence be swayed by the amount of work?"

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：偷窥。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Peeping."

C: 你就这样团坐在自适应椅上，盖着绒毯，手捧温热的马克杯…你的闲暇时光正在进行中。窗外的雪片自天空悠悠落下，散发荧光，随风飘荡——但那已经与你无关了。
E: You curl up on an adaptive chair and cover yourself with a fleecy blanket. There's a nice warm cup of hot cocoa in your hands... Your free time has truly begun. Outside the window, snowflakes gently fall from the sky. They give off a florescent glow as they drift wherever the wind takes them — but that no longer has anything to do with you.

C: 果然我的耐热修炼还不够，得再加把劲儿才行嗡！
E: Seems like I haven't done enough heat resistance training. I need to go all out!

C: 一道沉默又威严的铁艺栅栏门横亘在此处。
E: A quiet and foreboding wrought iron fence blocks the way.

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 钻啊钻…
E: Burrow, burrow...

C: …失去的两成是女矿头对你的失望。
E: ...The drop consists of her disappointment in you.

C: …那，那我们就收下了。
E: ...Well. I guess we'll take it.

C: 回头见，伙计！
E: See ya later, pal!

C: 很遗憾…您虽然成功吃下了5盘蟹肉，但是<unbreak>20</unbreak>秒的挑战时间已经超时——
E: You did manage to eat all five plates of crab meat, but unfortunately... you went over twenty seconds.

C: 太冰，太淡，还散发出一股真菌发霉的味道。糟糕透顶。
E: Too cold, too bland, and stinks of musty mold. Utterly terrible.

C: （还是不打扰她了……）
E: (Don't bother her...)

C: 什么罚单？
E: A ticket?

C: 啊～你是说现在正扒在窗户外的那位吗？
E: Ah. You must be talking about the one that is outside the window, right?

C: 呜啊…多谢你喀！过了这么久，总算又有人来到这里了喀。
E: Whoa... Thank you so much! Finally, another visitor here after all this time.

C: 温暖的太阳在何方？柔软的死亡在何方？等待着我的爱人在何方？书写传说的英雄在何方？
E: Where is the warm sun? Where is soft death? Where is my lover waiting? Where are the heroes from the epics?

C: 已经找到<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>只若虫了！
E: You have found <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> nymphs so far!

C: 嘘——小声点，别惊扰了这些小蝶喀！
E: Hush now, we wouldn't wanna startle these tiny butterflies, crrk!

C: 我们是不是见过面？
E: Have we met?

C: 你抬头看着那片雄伟的矿脉…橙色的面容缓和慈祥。仔细聆听…它似乎对这次完美的挥镐发表了自己的看法。
E: You look up at the majestic vein... The orange surface has a warmth and kindness to it... Listening closely, you can almost hear it give its own take on your perfect swing.

C: 留步嗡，远道而来的旅客！
E: Halt, traveler from afar, buzz!

C: 听说月亮上也有萤生活，它耀眼的光芒就是它们发出来的。真想上去和它们一起生活啊嘤~
E: It's said that glowworms also live on the moon. Its brilliant glow comes from them. I'd love to live with them up there, eep~

C: 继续航向远方…
E: Onward, to the distant horizon...

C: ——没想到，这只机巧鸟突然一激灵，恶狠狠地盯着你，没错，这只机巧鸟能动。
E: Unexpectedly, this cycrane suddenly quivers and squints at you menacingly. Yes... this little cycrane can move.

C: 在你眼中，我是男的还是女的？
E: In your ocular sensors, am I male or female?

C: 请问，我是男的还是女的？
E: Excuse me, am I male or female?

C: 你是{F#男的}{M#女的}。
E: You are {F#male}{M#female}.

C: 但是很快，你又从它那造型蠢萌的眼神中觉察到了一丝疑惑。这只机巧鸟原本以为自己会有胜利的喜悦，但这种情绪就像是指缝间流沙，稍纵即逝。
E: Soon, however, you noticed a sense of doubt from the gaze it gives out in its cute, dumb eyes. This cycrane thought it would feel the thrill of victory, but the emotion was merely fleeting like sands in an hourglass.

C: （趁恶龙苏醒之前赶紧离开）
E: (Leave before the dragon wakes up)

C: 就在你发力的瞬间，这只物流机巧鸟，从高高的金山上摔了下来。
E: Just as you're about to strike, this courier cycrane drops straight out of the sky.

C: 我还没有哭呢。
E: I haven't cried yet.

C: 原本我是想启动「暴怒模式」的，结果反而被愤怒冲昏了头脑…机巧鸟就应该学会冷静，沸腾的水再一直烧下去，只是会蒸发殆尽而已。
E: I wanted to activate the Wrath Mode, but was knocked out by my own rage... I should study how to play it cool. If we continue to boil boiling water, it will eventually evaporate away.

C: 你自己的道路你自己决定。
E: You have to resolve your own path.

C: 嗯？这就是你夸人的态度吗！
E: Eh? Is that how you compliment others!?
Shh!

C: 这不公平！
E: That's not fair!

C: 不行！
E: The answer would still be no!

C: 想知道吗？
E: Want to know?

C: 在「外交」环节，你可以任意运用外交手段，向你的对手争取比赛中主动权！
E: During the Diplomacy phase, you can use any kind of diplomatic means available to seize the initiative over your opponents!

C: 把自己的包子放到别人那里！
E: Place your buns over to someone else!

C: 呃…虽然{NICKNAME}选手因体力不支提前倒下……
E: Um... Even though Contestant {NICKNAME} couldn't handle the amount of food and ended up passing out...

C: 你们不会抹除了它们的智能吧？
E: You won't wipe their intelligence, will you?

C: 吨吨吨…
E: Glug, glug, glug...

C: 为时已晚，有机体。
E: It's too late, organism.

C: 连心率<unbreak>40%</unbreak>。
E: Synchronization rate <unbreak>40%</unbreak>.

C: 我都在记忆里看到你了，这就是你的记忆。
E: I saw you in the memory. They are totally your memory.

C: 你发现某些陌生的情景开始浮上你的心版，你眼角的余光总是控制不住瞥向森森，每次注视着她就会心跳加速。
E: You notice some unfamiliar memory emerging in your mind. Your gaze keeps darting toward Sensen, and each time, you find your heart rate rise.

C: 给，拿去吧——别客气，这是我应该做的。
E: Here you go, take it. Don't be polite. It's the least I could do.

C: 感谢你的配合！剩下的交给我们就好，你可以走了……
E: Thank you for your cooperation! Just leave the rest to us. You may take your leave...

C: 他跟我说自己是工造司的，我当然不信了，什么年代了，不会真有人自报家门吧？
E: He said he's from the Artisanship Commission, so of course I didn't believe him. In this economy, why would anyone reveal their true background?

C: 好哇，居然还设下局等我，这厮竟然如此阴毒。哼，我这就酝酿一下，得好好写篇檄文将他的龌龊行为公之于众！
E: Wow, he even set up a trap for me to fall into. He's so despicable. Hmph, I shall be ready and write a denunciation to expose his dirty deeds to the public!

C: 克劳克影视乐园的导览图，文图简洁生动、一看就懂，适用于各类人群。
E: The map of Clock Studios Theme Park is bright, simple, obvious at a glance, and suitable for all types of people.

C: 原来如此…谢谢你，我对有机生命的了解又增加了不少。
E: I see... Thank you, my understanding of organic beings has increased considerably.

C: 你深吸了一口气，侧耳倾听乘客们的交谈，他们说，列车上有免费的甜点，他们说，列车就要来了。
E: You take a deep breath and listen in on the passengers' banter. They are saying that the train has free desserts, and that it's arriving.

C: 别提了，鞋里全是土…
E: Don't remind me. There's dirt in my shoe...

C: 可以，但你动静得小点。
E: Sure, but you have to keep it down.

C: 喂！你们两个！在干什么呢！
E: Hey, you two! Whaddaya think you're doing!

C: 列车长的眼光是不会出错的。{NICKNAME}乘客，现在的你，已经不再是过去的你了！
E: A conductor's eyes never lie. {NICKNAME}, you are not the same person that you were!

C: 我初来乍到，不太懂这个…
E: I'm new here, and don't really understand how things work...

C: 再说一遍，请不要把列车长当作小孩子！
E: Again, please don't treat Pom-Pom like a child!

C: 呜哇！好惊险，还好你们当时没出事！
E: Wow! So thrilling. You guys are lucky not to get hurt!

C: 感觉有点无聊。
E: It's pretty boring.

C: （如实测量记录数据）
E: (Truthfully measure and record the data)

C: 无论是身体状况，还是行李什么的…需要检查有没有什么安全隐患，以及有什么需要帮忙的地方。
E: Whether it's their health, their luggage, or... if there's any potential hazards that need checking, or if there's any way Pom-Pom can help...

C: …{NICKNAME}乘客脑袋里就不能想点正常的事情吗？
E: ...{NICKNAME}, can you think of something normal for a change, please?

C: 想必会有精通于此的人帕！你有什么推荐的人选吗？
E: Some of them must be proficient in management! Do you have any recommendations for candidates?

C: 我一度怀疑丹恒乘客的舌头是不是有什么问题…不过他偶然跟我透露过，原来他认为姬子的咖啡是用来锤炼心性的绝佳工具。
E: I used to wonder if there was something wrong with Dan Heng's taste buds... but later he mentioned to me in passing that he regards Himeko's coffee as an excellent tool to test his grit.

C: 关于姬子：姬子的咖啡手艺
E: About Himeko: Himeko's hand-blended coffee

C: 鹤运物流真诚感谢志愿者的协助，请收下我们的谢礼。
E: Heron Express wishes to sincerely thank those volunteers for their support. Please accept this as thanks.

C: 罢了，不必详细解释。强者自有修炼秘诀，我懂！
E: Never mind. No need to go over the details. The strong have their own ways for getting stronger. I get it!

C: 从今天开始，我每天要多加五十个引体向上，再加一百个俯卧撑！哈！哈！哈！
E: Starting today, I'm going to do fifty more pull-ups and one hundred push-ups, every day! Bwahaha!

C: 唔…这颗核心怎么被丢到那么远的角落去了？也不知道是谁干的……
E: Whoa... How did this core make it all the way over there? Who did that...

C: 大守护者？！
E: The Supreme Guardian?

C: 居然能面不改色心不跳地说出这种话…看来你确实不是一般人！
E: You got to be something else to say that with a straight face!

C: 那是寄宿在歌德宾馆里的恶魔！它沉睡在肮脏的、无人打扫的小阁楼里…专门以可怜又无辜的外来者为食。
E: That's the Goethe Hotel's resident devil! It hibernates in dirty unattended small attics, specifically feeding on innocent and vulnerable outsiders.

C: 下一步该去哪儿？
E: Where to go next?

C: 继续向西。
E: Go further west.

C: 西北方有什么？
E: What's in the northwest?

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 群山，群山，还是群山。你几乎看到了军团来犯之后，无助的灾民躲入山间，等待末日来临的凄惨景象。
E: Mountains, mountains, and even more mountains. You can almost see how miserable it must've been for all those refugees who fled into the mountains, seeking shelter after the Legion's attack while helplessly waiting for calamity's arrival.

C: 空的、空的、还是空的。难道这些书籍只是为了显示书桌主人高贵教养的装饰品吗？
E: Empty, empty, and still empty. Could these books merely be ornaments to show off the classy upbringing of their owner?

C: 噗…别一本正经地道歉了，今天这事就当没发生过吧。
E: Pfft... Don't be so serious. Let's pretend that this never happened today.

C: 拿走你的战利品吧！不管里面装了什么，那都是你应得的。
E: Take your spoils. You deserve everything inside.

C: 你注意到他呼吸粗重，面色潮红，显然屏幕上有些「了不得」的玩意儿令他兴奋不已。
E: You notice his heavy breathing, his face flushed, and he's clearly excited by something "amazing" on the screen.

C: 不堪入目，赶紧关掉。
E: How unsightly. Shut it off, now.

C: 罐子中突然传来一声怪叫。成为「无名客」已有一段时日了，你自认见多识广，但还是吓了一大跳。
E: A sudden strange cry emanates from the vase. You've been a Nameless for a while now and consider yourself experienced in many things, but this is still a shock.

C: 于是，或许是因为心血来潮，你拿起盒旁的纸笔，决心代那位不知所踪的「逍遥先生」，为可怜的来信者奉上回信——
E: So, perhaps carried away on a whim, you pick up the pen and paper beside the box and decide to compose a reply to the poor correspondent on behalf of this missing Mr. Carefree —

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在授事厅附近。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索授事厅<color=#dbc291ff>平台下方</color>、飞檐上方。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near the Conclave Hall. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>under the terrace</color> of the Conclave Hall, above the cornices.

C: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在行医市集附近，根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索商铺<color=#dbc291ff>屋檐上方</color>。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near Healer's Market. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>above the store roofs</color>.

C: 前往下一片区域
E: Head to the next area

C: 我相信它总之有一天会有用的。
E: I trust that it'll be useful someday.

C: 在长乐天有一家叫<color=#dbc291ff>「三余书肆」</color>的书店，去那里看看吧。
E: There's a bookstore over in the Exalting Sanctum called the <color=#dbc291ff>Spare Time Book Shop</color>. Go check it out!

C: 愚致思把口袋里的钞票扔向空中——他大概只有在梦里才能如此尽兴地挥霍。
E: Poseman throws all the bills from his pockets into the air — no doubt he only squanders money so crazily when he's in a dream.

C: 或许您会觉得我过于小题大做了，但那个姆利斯…唉，实话告诉您吧，他之前跟踪过我的其他客人，还对他们进行人身威胁……
E: You might think I'm making a mountain out of a molehill, but that guy Mullich... Well, to be honest, he stalked one of my clients before, and physically threatened them...

C: 广告牌怎么了？广告牌就能随随便便荼毒他人了吗——我告诉你，现在这个破广告给我造成了严重的心理创伤，你打算怎么补偿？
E: So what if you're a billboard? Billboards can still deliver wanton suffering to people — let me tell you, this evil ad has brought me severe psychological trauma. How do you plan on making compensation?

C: 再说了，就算真欺负它又如何——怎么着，一个广告牌还能举报我？
E: And what's more, even if it really was bullying — so what? Is a billboard capable of reporting me?

C: 一个个本事没多少，脾气大得不得了；鼻子翘上天，不懂得尊师重道。那些人能拍出什么好片子才怪！
E: None of them have any talent, and they're all extremely short-tempered. Yet they look down on everyone and don't know how to respect their teachers. What kind of film is someone like that going to shoot, I ask you!

C: 我就喜欢看她明明嫉妒我、却又不得不装出一幅关心我的嘴脸，嘻嘻…真是我的好姐姐。
E: I just like the look of her being so obviously jealous of me yet still having to pretend to care, teehee... That's my big sis.

C: 唉，有机体总是喜欢把自己改造成机械，韦兰也不例外……
E: *sigh* Organic creatures love modding themselves into robots. Wyland was no exception...

C: 有一次，我受博识学会委托，前去回收位于「新伊甸」大黑洞附近的一个侦测信标。报酬非常优厚，所以我没多想就同意了。
E: There was this one time on an assignment from the Intelligentsia Guild, when we were retrieving a probe beacon from nearby this mega black hole called the New Eden. The pay was so fat that we agreed without thinking too much about it.

C: 一般般吧。
E: Mid.

C: 怪不得自从来到这里后就总觉得少了点什么——情绪跟动力是息息相关的啊！
E: No wonder I've been feeling as though something's missing since I came here — emotion and motivation are intimately connected!

C: 我们走后，你可不许做什么危害星际和平的事！
E: We'll be keeping our eyes on you for when you endanger the interstellar peace!

C: 唉，真可惜，没有小小的悲剧作衬托，美梦又怎能凸显价值呢？
E: *sigh* What a pity. Without a little melancholy, how can we bring out the happiness in better dreams?

C: …看出来了，你对这个行业实在没什么了解。
E: ...I can tell. You know nothing about this industry.

C: 这么看来，有可能影响我和奇迹本杰明口碑的就只有……
E: If that's the case, the only thing that can undermine Miracle Benjamin Studio's and my reputation is...

C: 你怎么评价筑梦边境项目？
E: What do you think about the Dream's Edge project?

C: 就算不被外界看好，我们也必须相信自己。没错，我们正在做的事情是历史性的，开创性的……
E: Even though no one thinks highly of us, we must believe in ourselves. What we're doing is unprecedented and is going to make history...

C: 多往好处想，这个项目能帮我们累积足够的开发资金，支持我们未来去做真正的大事。
E: Let's look on the bright side. We'll be able to earn enough capital through this project to fund what we really want to do.

C: 话也别说得那么难听嘛…谁还没个年轻气盛的时候呢，说不定人家已经在反省了。
E: Cut that poor guy some slack... We've all been young before, right? He's probably learned from his mistake already.

C: 我还有事要办，没空闲聊…最后再听我一句劝，随便去哪个店里整件漂亮衣裳吧。多少给自己留点体面，行吗？
E: I've got things to do, so I don't have time for idle chatter... Just go into any store and get yourself a decent outfit, will you?

C: 来，拿几张走，看到什么值…咳，看到什么上档次的玩意就贴一张上去！记住了，一切都是为了社会的公正和进步！
E: Here, take a couple and go. Slap them on anything that's worth... Ahem, anything that looks important! Remember, it's all about social justice and civilization!

C: 咻咻…目前存在的风险：该广告牌所宣传的产品是艾默里奇先生的发明，且艾默里奇先生与其分销商就销售额分成一事仍存争论。
E: *Beep*... Current risk: The billboard is advertising Mr. Emmrich's invention, and he's currently in a dispute with his distributor over the sales share.

C: 看不出来啊，你这高个子手脚还怪麻利的！快，把过程给我讲讲！
E: Honestly, I didn't expect tall folks with such quick reflexes. Well, tell me how you did it!

C: 为什么…为什么明明我发明出了那么多好东西，大家还是不重视我？
E: Why... Why is it that people still don't take me seriously, even with all the awesome stuff I've invented?

C: 你就是个守财奴。
E: You're just a miser.

C: 男人愤慨地谈论起他第三次一见钟情的对象——复制品科蒂在他身旁不为所动。
E: The man resentfully recounts the experience about his third love at first sight, while the replica Coty remains unfazed.

C: 实不相瞒，这是业内的普遍看法，因为鸢尾花家系的明星们越来越差劲了。
E: To be fair, it's a common view within the industry — because stars from the Iris Family are losing their edge.

C: 那时我和每个刚入行的年轻人一样，相信自己终有一天会身披群星的辉光，成为宇宙中独一无二的主角。
E: Back then, I was like any other young person entering the industry, believing that I'd shine like a unique star in the whole universe.

C: 说的好啊，自己的人生就应该把握在自己手中！
E: Well said! Everyone should be the director of their own life!

C: 亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，对我来说，没有什么事情比这更加可怕了。
E: But to me, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, there are no things more terrifying than that.

C: 拉洛丝坚定的神情褪色，你听到一声叹息，她眼眸中映出的街角霓虹闪烁了起来。
E: Larose's resolute expression fades, and you catch a sigh as the flickering neon lights on the street corner reflect in her eyes.

C: 请收下这份宣传册吧，我会在这场音乐会上用歌声复现宇宙中失落的{RUBY_B#「纯美」}美好{RUBY_E#}，希望您不要错过。
E: Here, please take this pamphlet. I will be performing the song of {RUBY_B#Beauty}beauty{RUBY_E#} at this concert. Please don't miss it.

C: 我是一个道德家，是世界上最可笑的中间派，同时也是一个失败的警探。
E: I'm a moralist, the most ludicrous kind of centrist in the world. On top of all that, I'm also a lousy detective.

C: 你和那个孩子之间发生过什么？
E: What's the story between you and that girl?

C: …怎么会没有！我的梦想，我一路挥洒的汗水、迄今取得的成就——它们是我的枷锁，却也令我无论如何也不愿放手。
E: ...You bet! My dream, my hard work along the way, and my achievements so far... They are my shackles, but I can't let them go no matter how hard I try.

C: 我知道他们嫉妒我…我不怕他们骂我，但决不能容忍自己的梦想在他们手中毁于一旦！
E: I know they're jealous of me... They can say whatever they want about me, but I can't allow them to ruin my dream!

C: 皮皮西凝神注视着那些奢侈品，硕大墨镜上的反光与橱窗里的灯光交相辉映。
E: The Pepeshi gazes intently at the luxury goods. The reflection on his oversized shades shimmers in harmony with the lights from the display window.

C: 在梦里不捡垃圾也没关系吧？
E: It's okay not to pick up trash in a dream, right?

C: 你好懂…
E: You're so knowledgeable...

C: 不过，无论那人是谁，他应该都是爱着机械的。就像父亲爱着自己的孩子，君王爱着自己的臣民。
E: No matter who it was, they must have had a love for machinery like how a father loves his child and a king loves his people.

C: …啊…没完没了…没完没了……
E: ...Ahh... It doesn't stop... It just doesn't stop...

C: …啊，我知晓了。既然如此，我可以默许你在朝露公馆活动，只要你不做出任何出格的行为。
E: ...Ah, I see. In that case, I'll give tacit consent for anything you want to do here in Dewlight Pavilion, so long as it's nothing out of the ordinary.

C: …偷走？不对，那不是偷盗行为。是我…是我自愿上缴了我的「悲伤」…还有那些让我痛苦的回忆……
E: ...Stolen? No, that's not stealing. I... I voluntarily handed over my "sadness"... and all of those painful memories...

C: 麦考先生的眼角垂了下来…你知道，他一定又开始思念自己的兄弟姐妹了。
E: Mr. McCoy's eyes grew sullen... You know that he must be thinking about his siblings again.

C: 再见，亲爱的朋友。我羡慕这里的和平，但我不属于这里，在银河彼岸，还有更多人民在等待解放，那里才是我该回去的地方。
E: So long, dear friend. I envy the peace here, but Penacony's not where I belong. There's a whole load of people on the other side of the galaxy awaiting liberation, and that's where I need to be.

C: 我奉劝你赶紧把冠军还给应得的选手，然后公开承认自己的错误，不然我就不客气了！
E: You'd better hurry up and return the winner's title to the rightful contestant, then publicly confess your crime, or you'll be sorry!

C: …啊？我还担心太激进了，没想到你还觉得不够…怪不得你能成为匹诺康尼的股东，果然对自己够狠才能成功。
E: What...? I was somewhat worried that my measures were too extreme. I didn't expect you to say that they are not enough... No wonder you were able to become a shareholder of Penacony. Indeed, one must be hard on themselves in order to become successful.

C: 校长有话托我带给你…
E: The dean has asked me to relay some words to you on his behalf...

C: 毕了业又如何？现在的我已经没机会投身音乐行业了，不如在学校里听年轻人唱歌。
E: What's so good about graduating? At my age, there are no longer any opportunities for me to work in the music industry. In that case, I'd rather stay in school and listen to the youngsters' singing.

C: 你很少有机会起草这样正规的文书，但意外完成得还不错——除了个别字存在涂抹痕迹之外。
E: You rarely have the chance to draft up a proper correspondence like this, but it turned out surprisingly well, apart from the smudges on certain letters.

C: 好，那你多保重…诶哟，我这老腰。
E: Okay, take care. *sigh* My back...

C: 说吧，正好我也歇歇腰。
E: Go ahead. It'll also be an opportunity for me to rest my back.

C: 奉大守护者之命，前方区域不予开放。
E: By the order of the Supreme Guardian, the area ahead is closed.

C: 贝洛伯格需要他们的技术。
E: Belobog needs their technology.

C: 难怪没看到星光…要不是你，人家的大头差点就变成了躺椅的永久装饰品啾！
E: No wonder I couldn't see any starlight! If it weren't for you, my big head would have become a permanent decoration on this deckchair!

C: 大家打开箱子只想看到钱…
E: I expect to see cold hard cash when I open chests...

C: 我怎么不觉得…反倒是脏兮兮的，害我羽毛都弄脏了。
E: Can't say I see the appeal... They're kind of filthy. They even got my feathers all gross.

C: 你拼尽全力地大声求救——
E: You scream out for help with all of your might...

C: 给我看看你们的提案。
E: Let me see your plans.

C: 给我看看你们的提案。
E: Let me see your plans.

C: 塔吊。
E: A tower crane.

C: 我们可以向公司或其他天外来客出租。最近我在手机上刷到一个概念叫...巡演！对，这种东西一听就很有搞头。
E: We can rent it out to the IPC and other extraterrestrial guests! I recently came across a new concept on my phone, it's called going on... going on tour! Doesn't hearing something like that just make your ears perk up?

C: 多谢，我也认为这是最好的结果。
E: Thank you. I agree that this is the best solution.

C: 对哦，我晕得都把这事给忘了！
E: Oh yeah! I was so dizzy that I forgot about that!

C: 我不会伤害你的。
E: I won't hurt you.

C: 关于你自己…
E: About you yourself...

C: 唔，虽然很想帮客官，但人家想不起来它们喜欢去哪里了，啾……
E: Oh, I would love to help you, but I can't remember where they like to go, either. Tweet...

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子一直在打磨它的雕塑作品，你可以去那些<color=#dbc291ff>威风的大鸟</color>附近找找它啾~
E: Let me think... Oh yeah, there's one child who's always polishing their sculpture. You can go find them close to the <color=#dbc291ff>majestic bird statue</color>, tweet~

C: 希望你下次还能找到我，再见啦啾！
E: I hope you can still find me next time. Goodbye, tweet!

C: 希望能找到一根又弯又直的树枝啾…
E: I hope to find a crooked and straight branch, tweet...

C: 这是本公子说定的报酬啾~
E: Here's the reward that I promised, tweet!

C: 不能否认——除了本公子外，其他几位同伴也都是厉害的家伙~哼哼，它们的作品同样出色啾~
E: I have to admit though, apart from me, my other companions are also pretty good! Heheh, their works are just as stellar, tweet!

C: 钟表小子在干什么啾？
E: What's Clockie up to? Tweet~

C: 你、你怎么把*小草*都拔掉了…我要去找草绿经理告状啾！
E: You! How could you pull out all of my *grass*? ...I have to report this to Verdant Manager, tweet!

C: 再见啾，我要去寻找下一只猫头鹰了~
E: Good bye, tweet! I must go and search for the next owl~

C: 没错，这就是鄙人，「真理小鸟」啾！
E: That is right, I shall be the one to do so. I am the Truth Bird, tweet!

C: 啾，陌生人，你有见到哈努兄弟吗？
E: Tweet, have you seen Brother Hanu, stranger?

C: 难道是有什么高速工作的秘诀啾？我要找大哥教教我啾。
E: Unless there's a hack to get into the zone, tweet? I'll have to get him to teach me, tweet.

C: 今天的剧场好冷清啾，让我来活跃气氛啾。
E: The theater's so empty today, tweet. Lemme liven it up, tweet.

C: 娜塔莎医生！
E: Dr. Natasha!

C: 千万别掉下去…
E: Please don't fall off...

C: 呜呜呜，为什么要把我找出来……
E: Boohoo, why did you find me...

C: 再见，陌生人…这个垃圾袋就让给你了啾。
E: Goodbye, stranger... I'll give you this trash bag, tweet.

C: 这个宽阔的房间里堆满了镜子，猜猜一共有多少面镜子啾。
E: This spacious room is filled with mirrors. Guess how many there are, tweet.

C: 哎，没关系，我再去找个新的吧啾。
E: *sigh* Never mind. I'll just find a new one, tweet.

C: 扇扇翅膀就上来了啾。
E: Just flap your wings and you'll be up, tweet.

C: 一群小屁孩啾，只有我配得上赤红大哥的稳重啾。
E: A bunch of rotten brats, tweet. Only I am fit for the staunch grace of Boss Red.

C: 这就要抓我了？
E: Are you going to arrest me?

C: 哎！你是不知道那帮人有多凶狠，总之还是听我的，别轻举妄动！
E: Listen, you have no idea how ruthless they can be. Anyway, just listen to me and don't do anything stupid!

C: 好啊，那你和神策府的策士们说，看他们让不让你做个好人。
E: Yeah, sure, you can tell that to the counselors at the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 今天有外人见证，我答应你。但回去之后我要好好查探下诚哥和其他信息，如若属实，我自然会替你保密。可要是……
E: Alright, I promise you. But once I return, I'll verify Cheng's situation and the other details. If what you said is true, I'll keep your secrets to myself and nobody else. However, if...

C: 你交还了《开智之卷》并讲述了回收它的过程。
E: You return the Manuscript of Wisdom and explain how you've retrieved it.

C: 脑海里只有一片空白。
E: My mind is completely blank.

C: 话也不能这么说，你好心做好事，自然该得到回报。只不过你不通厨艺，才闹了个乌龙。这「拳法」，你学了没用，但我学了有用呀。
E: That's not quite true. If you do good things with good intentions, you should be reciprocated. It's just that you're not a cook, so you've kinda dropped this clanger. There's no point in you learning this "boxing" technique — but there is for me.

C: 您知道在长乐天演奏琴曲的宫羽姑娘吧？说到古琴技艺，她肯定能帮到你。
E: So you know about Ms. Gongyu, who plays the guqin in the Exalting Sanctum, right? If it's the guqin, she'll definitely be able to help you.

C: 那你自己想办法吧。这段对话已经有点过长了。
E: Then figure it out yourself. This part of the dialogue is already starting to drag on, my guy.

C: 且为郎君解罗裳，芙蓉帐暖饱饥肠。
E: Robes fall away, revealing my desire. In hibiscus tent, our passions shall transpire.

C: 真是可怕的故事…
E: What a scary story...

C: 呃，重复别人的行为会被扣上「没有创意」的帽子吗？人类真有趣。
E: Um, does repeating another person's behavior get unfairly tagged as being "uncreative"? Humans sure are an interesting species.

C: 嚯哈哈哈！我被你发现了！
E: O-hoho! You found me!

C: 只是因为我将香炉推进去了？
E: All because I pushed the incense burner in?

C: 好想前往朋友身边啊……
E: I really want to go over to my friends...

C: 放心吧，我都准备好了。
E: Don't worry. I've got everything ready.

C: 之后有空的话，再来找杰诺一起玩吧！
E: If you get time, you have to come and play with me again!

C: 你认为我是在演戏？你认为我是故意凑过去，好让那车一头把我撞醒？什么样的人才会无聊到这地步？
E: You think this is all fake? You think I deliberately got close to the car so it could crash into me? Who on earth would ever be so stupid?

C: 嗯，我已经和他争论过了——无论如何，这次我会坚持自己的想法。
E: Yeah, we've already fought about this... No matter what, I am sticking to what I have decided.

C: 妈妈真的就在这里。
E: Mum really is here...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>你突然没由来地感到愤怒</color>——
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Suddenly, an inexplicable rage overcomes you</color> —

C: 没什么事就快点走。这里巡逻的人多，别被看到了。自己多保重。
E: If you've got nothing else to do 'round here then get going. There are a lot of patrols round here, we don't want you being seen. Take care of yourself.

C: 这块碎片是…
E: What is this fragment...

C: 见到了昨天那个赌神！
E: And saw the Ace Gambler there yesterday!

C: …不知贵客长久驻足，究竟所为何事？
E: ...Is there a reason that you have been stopped in your tracks, dear guest?

C: 怎么话这么多呢。
E: You've sure got a lot to say.

C: 哎呀，我记得您。您就是上次游玩「逃跑情境体验卡（免费版）」的客人吧！
E: Ah, I remember you. You must be the customer who played the free version of the Escape Simulation Experience Card!

C: 老爷的容貌举世无双！
E: Boss' looks reign supreme, unmatched by anything in this world!

C: 缘何起…
E: Where does destiny begin...

C: 望何期…
E: When does hope reign...

C: 它似乎很不爱说话，而且还在努力克制自己的欲望。
E: It seems to be a bottle of few words and is still trying hard to restrain its desires.

C: 辛苦了，有您这番操劳，定能把犯人绳之以法。
E: Thank you. With your hard work, we will be able to bring the culprit to justice.

C: 朋友，贪玩虽无罪，但也要看时候啊。
E: My friend, though playing games is not a crime, there is a time and a place for it.

C: 向你致敬，广告牌侦探！
E: We salute you, Billboard Detective!

C: 当然！和蔼的瓦尔特先生永远不会拒绝你。
E: Of course! Gentle Mr. Yang would never refuse you!

C: 天啊，姬子小姐永远这么优雅又善解人意。
E: My, my... Miss Himeko is always so elegant and understanding.

C: 寒鸦…
E: Hanya...

C: …她果然真就在这里。一语成谶。
E: ...She really was already here. Seriously, speak of the Devil...

C: 或许，你会成为比我更虔诚的信徒，成为一个优秀的铁桶，厉害的金桶，强大的垃圾桶！
E: Perhaps you'll become a more devout disciple than I am, becoming an excellent iron can, an astounding gold can, or even a powerful trashcan!

C: 触摸到它的瞬间，微妙的信息也跟着传入你的脑海。
E: The moment you touch it, a subtle message is delivered into your head.

C: 专辑很难买到吗？
E: Is the album really hard to buy?

C: 家人，不是吧？
E: What? No way!

C: 我就先不打扰您了，有什么问题请随时联系我。
E: I'll leave you to it now. Call for me if you need anything!

C: 你拿起纸条，发觉上面写着一行字：「我用这枚硬币在扭蛋机里连中七次头等奖，希望它能把好运带给你。」
E: You pick up the note, upon which the following has been written: "Using this coin, I won the capsule machine's grand prize seven times in a row. Hopefully, you'll be blessed with its good luck as well."

C: （这是…星穹列车？星穹列车的微缩模型？！）
E: (This is... the Astral Express? No, it's actually a miniature model of the Astral Express!?)

C: 您想启动放映机吗？
E: Would you like to use the projector?

C: 您瞧这里，这里是用来囤放压缩过的空白梦泡。只要把手搭在那儿，就能记录下使用者过往的精彩回忆。
E: If you'll look over here, this is where blank compressed dream bubbles are loaded. Just place your hand here and wonderful moments from your past will be saved into the dream bubbles.

C: 你是蒙对的吧？
E: That must be a lucky guess, huh?

C: 确实，我无法给{NICKNAME}大人一个满意的解释。幽囚狱内普通犯人们享有被限制的自由，就算说这本书是犯人在狱中书写，也并非是没有可能的……
E: Indeed, I'm unable to provide {NICKNAME} with a satisfactory answer. Even within the confines of the Shackling Prison, ordinary inmates maintain a degree of constrained autonomy. Hence, it's not impossible that this book was authored by an inmate within the prison walls...

C: 其实都没有什么真正的危害。
E: Actually, you were not in any real danger.

C: 带着箱子去传送带的入口吧。
E: Now, take the box to the conveyor belt entrance.

C: 那么你不应该通过。回去吧！
E: Then you shall not pass. Farewell.

C: 我好想看看飞行编队啊…
E: I really want to see the display team...

C: 什么？还有高手？
E: What? There's someone strong here?

C: 我早已受够了繁文缛节！
E: Enough rambling!

C: …求求你们，放过我吧。
E: ...Please, let me go.

C: {NICKNAME}，多亏了阁下的协助，我们才能毫发无损地解救出人质。非常感谢！
E: It is thanks to your help, {NICKNAME}, that we were able to rescue the hostage without him coming to harm. I am forever grateful!

C: 罗德里克·厄舍！
E: Roderick Usher!

C: 感谢提醒，我这就去。
E: Thanks for the reminder. I'm going now.

C: …你…你喜欢…我的漫画？
E: ...You... You like... my comic?

C: 不就是卖个签名照嘛…
E: It's just selling an autographed photo...

C: 眼前的装置像是熄灭的火炬，你望着它，没由来地生出一种亲切感。
E: The device before you resembles an extinguished torch. You look upon it and find yourself filled with an ineffable sense of affection.

C: 圣烛顶部的光华急速变化，这一次你吸取了经验，提前捂住了眼睛。
E: The glow atop the holy candle changes rapidly. This time, you learn from your experience and cover your eyes in advance.

C: 我钱袋呢？不是…我、我现在结不了账啊！
E: Where's my coin pouch? No... N—No! I can't pay for anything anymore!

C: 熄灭的烛火竟瞬间被你点燃，黄金般璀璨的光芒差点闪瞎了你的双眼。
E: The extinguished flame is reignited by you in an instant. A glowing radiance almost leaves you blind.

C: 当然，您可以任意选择测试方式，也可重复测试，心理诊疗师「闭嘴」将随时为您服务。
E: Of course, you can take whichever assessment you like, or retake the assessment. Psychotherapist Shush will always be at your service.

C: 净庭式古典重甲。
E: A Purity-Palace-style classical heavy armor.

C: 这根本不是心理测试！
E: This is not a psychological assessment at all!

C: …嗯？把我干哪儿来了？这还是星穹列车吗？
E: Hmm? Where the heck am I? Is it still the Astral Express?

C: 直觉告诉你，这个问题不止是题目里的数字那么简单，你决定——
E: Your gut tells you that this question isn't as simple as a math problem. You decide to...

C: 你在通讯里向阿格莱雅复述了题目…才听完第一句，阿格莱雅便轻笑了声。
E: You repeat the problem to Aglaea over the comms... She chuckles right after hearing the first sentence.

C: 还有什么比朝错误方向强化的道具更「一无所有」的存在呢？投入所有资源，最终得到的东西却并不是你需要的，这种痛你绝对不想经历第二次。
E: What concept could be more "nothing" than something that ardently strengthens you in the wrong direction? Investing all your resources, only to end up with something that you don't need — You will never want to experience this pain a second time.

C: 况且，信念一旦动摇，士气溃散，整个阵列都会落败，这难道不是一无所有？
E: Also, if one's will wavers, one's morale will dissipate, and the entire formation will break with this one weakness. Will the army not be left with nothing?

C: 吼吼？虽然有几分道理，但你敢说智慧的化身搞丢脑袋，实在是太没礼貌了！本狮要代替瑟希斯重重地惩罚你吼！
E: Ho-ho? This answer may make some sense, but it's awfully rude of you to say that the incarnation of wisdom has lost its head! I will punish you in Cerces' name!

C: 白厄继续思索着正确答案，低着头离开了……
E: Still trying to figure out the correct answer, Phainon departs with his head bowed...

C: 可以不回答吗？
E: Can I refuse to answer?

C: 求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
E: My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!

C: …数个光历年前，当时的布拉城城主，在他出资新建成的石桥上剪彩时，桥断了，他因此落水，迎接了塞纳托斯的拥抱吼。
E: ...Countless Light Calendar years ago, when the lord of Bura was at a ribbon-cutting ceremony for a bridge he funded, the bridge broke. He fell into the water and faced Thanatos' embrace.

C: 吼吼！确实，他的回应太有攻击性，要论动机，这位祭司绝对排在首位——但很遗憾，答错了吼！
E: Ho-ho! Indeed, his testimony harbored hostility. Motive-wise, this priest would definitely be top of the pile. Alas, wrong answer!

C: 吼？答对了，虽然勇士寻求了帮助，但如此精确实在厉害。
E: Ho? That's right. You may have sought help, but your wit is to be lauded still.

C: 真的好幼稚…幸亏你没发出去。
E: It's so childish... Fortunately, you didn't send them out.

C: 没想到啊，你居然回答出了全部的问题，真是令我刮目相看。
E: I'm impressed. I didn't expect you to answer all the questions.

C: 是哦，对垃圾桶来说，垃圾就是最有价值的东西。
E: Oh, indeed. To a trashcan, trash is the most valuable thing.

C: 不扭。
E: I wouldn't.

C: 苜蓿钞！没有人不爱苜蓿钞！我要，我要它！
E: Alfalfa Credits! No one could resist Alfalfa Credits! I want them! I want them!

C: 望远镜。
E: A telescope.

C: 我是变量！
E: I'm a variable!

C: 这可是一单大买卖。
E: This is a huge deal.

C: 外面变干净了，前帮主所设想的卫生环境，也算是有了盼头。
E: The place will become cleaner, and we'll be one step closer to our former leader's ideal of a hygienic environment.

C: 为了垃圾分类！
E: For trash sorting!

C: 你这细胳膊细腿的，怎么好意思自比的？真是不要脸…吃我一拳！
E: Look at your paper-thin arms and scrawny legs... How dare you compare yourself to such a person? How shameless of you. Take this!

C: 重点是，不要成为加害者，也不要忍气吞声——愿你度过美好的校园生活。
E: The main point is, don't become a perpetrator, but don't suffer in silence — hope you have a great time in school.

C: 道德感和好奇心开始短兵相接。硝烟散去，这场残酷决斗的赢家是——好奇心！它捂着伤口说：「咳，打开它，打开那封信……」
E: Morality and curiosity waged a fierce battle. When the smoke clears, the winner of this brutal duel is... curiosity! Clutching its wounds, it gasps: "Go on... open it. Open that letter..."

C: 我来修修看。
E: I'll give it a try.

C: 这条嫩枝低着头，像是在等什么人。当你靠近时，金色的花苞舒展开来，几颗花种落入了手中。
E: A tender shoot hangs low, as if waiting for someone. As you draw closer, golden buds gently bloom, releasing a few seeds into your hand.

C: 正是。而且，那恐怕并不是一道简单的防火墙。
E: Precisely. And I fear it wasn't a simple firewall at that.

C: 好啦好啦。笑一笑，或者做点其他喜欢的表情，要开始咯？
E: Alright, alright. Give me a smile, or make whatever face you like. Ready?

C: 瞧啊，{NICKNAME}，好丰盛的果盆。看到生活中的小幸福，总是让人心情喜悦。
E: Look, {NICKNAME}, a whole plate of fresh fruit. Little joys like this always make me smile.

C: 呼…小妖精满意地离开了，它平安无事就好。
E: Phew... The fairy is finally satisfied and willing to leave. I'm glad it wasn't hurt.

C: {NICKNAME}总是那么耐心地陪伴人家呢，一起慢慢的收集着美好的瞬间……
E: You're always so patient with me, slowly collecting all these beautiful moments together...

C: 可是你身上的缎带还在啊。
E: But you still have your ribbon on you.

C: 卸下沉重的心情，深呼吸——然后，作为再次邂逅的纪念，请允许我为{NICKNAME}送上一份礼物吧？
E: Cast off your heavy feelings, take a deep breath — and as a memento of our reunion, please allow me to offer you a gift, {NICKNAME}.

C: 好在，你自己送到了我面前。我将以你的血，作为盛在托盘里的首个砝码！
E: Fortunately, you delivered yourself to me on a platter. I shall use your blood as the first weight placed onto the scales!

C: ——愿他能平安抵达。你在心中如此祈愿。
E: ...In your heart, you pray that he arrives safely.

C: 你左右张望，都没能见到任何人影。既然如此，恐怕只能靠你来一探究竟了——
E: You look around you, but there is no one in sight. It seems that it is up to you to investigate...

C: 这不是无名客该做的事！
E: This is not something a Nameless should be doing!

C: 黑潮的威胁将近，必须…必须要将神谕传递给所有城邦才行！神驹，出发了！
E: The black tide approaches. I—I must deliver the prophecy to every city-state! Divine foal, forward!

C: 队长——
E: Captain—

C: 你在这干嘛？不用工作？
E: What do you do around here? Don't you have to work?

C: 稍不留意，就有可能被它们偷袭伏击。
E: You might get ambushed if you are not careful.

C: 你在做什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: 我们…好像不认识。
E: I... don't think we know each other.

C: 我没有问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 那你目前有什么发现？
E: What have you found so far?

C: 不用了不用了，卡波特大人强调过，他的私人事务不能随意经他人手。
E: No. Master Capote told me specifically that his personal affairs should not be handled by random strangers.

C: 闲杂人等别管闲事，我喝不喝咖啡和你没有任何关系！
E: Mind your own business. Whether I drink coffee or not has nothing to do with you!

C: 价格嘛，独家代理的，你懂的…整套系统就是为了回收咱们手里的「黑塔币」而设计的。当然，这话你可不能跟其他人说。
E: And it's an exclusive supply, if you get my drift... The whole thing is designed to recycle Hertareum. You can't actually say that to anyone, though.

C: 我想清楚了，根据呜呜伯的描述，我评估过自己的智力水平，感觉和它口中的科员没什么差别，我觉得我也能当科员。
E: I've thought it all through. Based on Wubbaboo's description and my evaluation of my intelligence level, I don't think there's much difference between me and the researchers as mentioned by Wubbaboo. I'm sure I can be a researcher too.

C: 阮•梅…哎……
E: Ruan Mei... *sigh*

C: 你没感受到吗，之前外面有一股很吓人的气息，所以我们得赶紧修缮好。这些小机器人本来是负责维修工作的，可惜时好时坏的，我既要修外面，又要修这里面的机器人……
E: Can't you feel the scary atmosphere outside? That's why we have to fix these quickly. These little robots are supposed to be in charge of the repair, but they aren't always in order. I have to fix the things outside and the robots here...

C: 我是阿德勒啊，界种科的科员。我们先前不是打过交道吗，你没认出来？
E: I'm Adler, a researcher from the Department of Ecology. Haven't we met each other before? Don't you recognize me?

C: 你得出什么结论了吗？
E: Have you reached any conclusions yet?

C: 是好道来的吗？
E: Did it come from a legal source?

C: 拥挤，吵闹，是何缘由？
E: Crowded and noisy. For what reason is it so?

C: 卷轴底部的纹章正散发着耀眼的光，<color=#dbc291ff>仪式所需要的材料就在附近</color>，去找找看吧，或许会有收获。
E: The text at the bottom of the scroll emits a dazzling light: <color=#dbc291ff>The materials needed for the ceremony are nearby</color>. Take a look around. There may be something in it for you.

C: 学生的成就超过老师，是什么稀奇事吗？按你的观点，世界岂不是始终在倒退？
E: Is it that rare for a student to surpass their teacher? If we follow your view, surely the world would only ever be regressing?

C: 要不你们先做个自我介绍？
E: How about you introduce yourselves first?

C: 以偏概全是知识的大忌，没有人能将自身的想法置于其余人之上。
E: Generalization is a taboo when it comes to speaking of knowledge. No one can impose their thoughts on others.

C: 宁芙，等等！
E: Nympha, wait!

C: 作为宁芙的伴侣，我的职责除了爱她，更重要的是保护她。城外到处都是游荡的怪物，以我一人之力，我很担心无法护她周全。
E: As Nympha's partner, my duty is to protect her rather than merely just love her. All those wandering monsters surround the city... I'm worried that I won't be able to protect her by myself.

C: 哼，你以为能办到吗？这云石天宫四下都是人，总有人会为我通风报信的。
E: Hmph, you think that's possible? There are people all over Marmoreal Palace. Someone will help me pass messages.

C: 我从地上捡的，本想还给你来着…好吧，我承认一开始其实没想还。
E: I found this on the ground and wanted to return it to you... Fine, I admit that I didn't want to give it back to you at first.

C: 黄金裔成员又添一人！
E: Another member has been added to the Chrysos Heirs!

C: 好久不见，没想到竟在这里遇到你。
E: Long time no see. Didn't expect to run into you here.

C: 目前为止的确是最新的，但到你把论文发出来，这个时间内可能会改动，所以我说你这个研究不够严谨。
E: That's right. They are currently the latest, up-to-date articles. But by the time the paper's published they could have been changed — so that's why I'm saying. Your research simply isn't rigorous enough.

C: 剩下的九成呢？
E: What about the remaining <unbreak>90%</unbreak>?

C: 你当放假不就完了。
E: Can't you just treat it as a vacation?

C: 就好像，大家仍在随殿下作战那般……
E: It's as if... we're still following His Highness into battle...

C: 嗡嗡嗡……
E: Grumphhh...

C: 我问你，你说为什么？
E: I ask you — why?

C: 那、那是你硬塞给我的吧？！
E: Th—That was that thing you forced on me, wasn't it!?

C: 「呃啊！喝——呃啊！看打！」远处传来缠斗声。
E: "Ugh! Hah—ugh! Take that!" The sounds of a struggle echoed from the distance.

C: 呃，说实话，这批军备的质量实在不敢恭维。
E: Uh, honestly, the quality of this batch of arms leaves much to be desired.

C: 要么是天父的神谕出了错……
E: Either the sky father made a mistake...

C: 站住，你是——哦！是 {NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Stop! You... Oh! It's you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 是嘛？你假扮了谁？
E: Really? Who did you impersonate?

C: …孩子们，出于 {NICKNAME}阁下的恳请，这回破例带你们来黎明云崖，观仰泰坦的神体。
E: ...Kids, by {NICKNAME}'s sincerest request, we will make an exception and allow you into Dawncloud to behold the Titan's sacred form.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，我看到你了！
E: {F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, I see you!

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，能对我说实话吗？我什么都能接受。上次回应我的声音，也不是真正的刻法勒，是上次那位好心的守卫叔叔吧！
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, tell me the truth. I can handle that. Was that voice last time also fake? It wasn't really Kephale either, right? It was Mr. Nice Guard, right?

C: 刻法勒的声音，会像老爷爷吧…
E: Maybe Kephale sounds like an old grandpa...

C: 我明白，想拜托您的事情是另一件——
E: Right, of course. Actually, I had something different in mind...

C: 成功了吗？
E: Did it work?

C: 小事儿。
E: Happy to help.

C: 留声机？
E: Phonograph?

C: 收费倒不贵，只是切换起来太麻烦了，还不如留声机呢——只要有碟片，想听什么就放什么，还能满足收藏欲。
E: It's not like they're expensive or anything. It's just a hassle to switch between them to find the song you like. With a Phonograph, it's essentially just plug-and-play. It also scratches the itch to collect things I guess.

C: 以前列车停靠在空间站月台的时候，我来拜访过不少次。
E: Y'know, whenever the Express stops at the station platform, I make a point of getting a few visits in.

C: 车厢里放得下吗？
E: Are you sure it'd fit?

C: 在磐岩镇能看见列车么？为什么列车会在天上飞？列车长是谁呀？
E: Can you see the Express in Boulder Town? Why does it fly in the sky? Who is the conductor?

C: 不过，我还是很期待与你们同行。我想看看别的星球、别的文明是如何战胜疾病的，我们贝洛伯格又是否可以效仿。
E: Still, I'm looking forward to the day I can join the crew. I'd like to see how other civilizations fight diseases and what Belobog could learn.

C: …一饭之恩！对，就是这个！
E: The Moles always repay our debts!

C: 哎呀，荣誉队员你怎么还挑三拣四的！
E: Hmph! Since when did honorary members get so choosy?

C: 别客气，荣誉队员！
E: You're welcome, honorary member!

C: 谢谢你邀请克拉拉过来，{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
E: Thank you for bringing me along, {NICKNAME}!

C: 帕姆下不了车哦。
E: It's a shame Pom-Pom can't leave the train.

C: 也没有很想。
E: Meh.

C: 嘿，开个玩笑——来，给你！
E: Ha, just kidding — here you goooo~

C: 难道是因为…我已经抵达事业巅峰了吗？
E: Could it be that... I've peaked already?

C: …你怎么突然这么激动？
E: ...I don't think I've ever seen you that excited.

C: 贝洛伯格的筑城者们总会聊起克里珀的丰功伟绩，在我们心中，祂就是全宇宙唯一至高无上的存在。
E: Belobog's Architects talk about the great deeds of Qlipoth all the time. In our minds, Qlipoth represents the single greatest power in the universe.

C: 是吗？我听丹恒的描述，还以为你们都很喜欢呢……
E: Really? After listening to Dan Heng, I assumed you all liked it...

C: 啊，是你啊…你看到了？
E: Ah, it's you... you saw that?

C: 列车即将开启跃迁，请各位乘客做好准备——
E: The Express is about to warp jump, all passengers please get ready!

C: 帕姆听得特别仔细，是一个合格的列车长。
E: Pom-Pom listened to the instructions very carefully — they must be a very capable conductor.

C: 真是舍不得仙舟美食啊。
E: I really can't survive without Xianzhou delicacies.

C: 另有些漂亮的「石头」，光是放在身边，就能让人舒畅心胸、愉悦精神。
E: There are also beautiful stones that can bring soothing happiness just by being around them.

C: 除了站长和黑塔女士的办公室，它们哪儿都去……
E: They go everywhere apart from Madam Herta's and the lead researcher's offices.

C: 这件事虽然是我的私事，但{NICKNAME}你也不是外人，我还是偷偷告诉你吧。
E: It's my personal business, but since you are hardly a stranger, I'll tell you something in secret.

C: 一百二十尺的巨剑，光是想想都觉得激动！
E: A <unbreak>120</unbreak>-foot sword! Just thinking about it makes me excited.

C: 彦卿刚才去和丹恒老师聊天，但是…总感觉他不太爱说话。
E: I was just talking with Dan Heng, but... he never seems very interested in chatting.

C: 其实我也不知道…
E: Too bad I don't know either...

C: 有没有什么难以忘怀的故事？
E: Any unforgettable stories?

C: 哼哼，那我可要整天泡在这里了。
E: Really? Then I'm gonna spend all day here.

C: 唷，{NICKNAME}！精神不错嘛。
E: Yo, yo, {NICKNAME}! Looking good.

C: 等会儿等会儿，你这分明是化学题吧？
E: Hold on a second... That's obviously a chemistry problem.

C: （开心的声音）
E: (Happy noises)

C: 唔，我…我很难评价。
E: Uh... I—It's hard to describe.

C: 苦？
E: Is it bitter?

C: 但对于虎克和克拉拉这样的小孩子来说，是不是还有希望？他们说不定能代表贝洛伯格，重新投入太空的怀抱！
E: Still, I bet there's still a chance for kids like Hook and Clara, right? Who knows, maybe they'll be able to represent Belobog as it returns to the arms of the universe!

C: 我很羡慕你们，{NICKNAME}。要不是还有职责在身，我可能还想再多待一会儿。
E: I'm envious of you guys, {NICKNAME}. If it weren't for my duties, I'd really like to stay here a little longer.

C: 等寒潮消退，能供人们活动的区域会越来越大，这条铁道也会越修越长。总有一天，它会串联起很多个城市，贝洛伯格只是其中的一座。
E: When the Eternal Freeze finally lifts, people will be able to get around more easily, and the railway will expand. One day, it'll connect different cities — not just Belobog.

C: …我明白你的意思——既然我已经是判官了，与其烦恼有没有资格，不如做好手边的工作。
E: ...Mm, I know what you mean... I'm already a judge after all. Instead of worrying about whether I'm qualified, I should just focus on doing a good job.

C: 是吗？我完全可以理解。走在「开拓」上…不错的体验。
E: Is that so? I can relate. Trailblazing across the vast unknown must be quite the experience.

C: 从我第一次听到「无名客」故事的时候，我就对星空产生了深深的向往。
E: I've been deeply fascinated by the starry skies ever since I first heard the story of the Nameless.

C: 不过得先等爷爷回家…在那之前我要认真工作，快快变成靠谱的大人。
E: Oh, well... I should wait for Grandpa to come home first... I'll keep pushing myself, and eventually, I'll become a dependable adult.

C: 可惜胃里塞不下太多东西了，不然我还能再来几杯。
E: Too bad I can't put too much in my tummy, or else I'd have a few more cups.

C: 梦境与现实…
E: Dreamscape and reality...

C: 礼物嘛，就是要有仪式感才行。
E: It's a present. Of course it's gotta look the part.

C: 但…列车车窗是封住的。
E: But... the Express windows are sealed tight.

C: 是时候好好练习球棒秘技了！
E: Time to practice my baseball techniques!

C: 云璃师父好负责！
E: Master Yunli is so responsible!

C: 「石块」…
E: Stones...

C: 喜欢的话可以送给你。
E: You can have this plant if you want.

C: 似乎没有。
E: I don't think so.

C: 不，不，不是她的错，是我…都怪我。
E: No no no, it's not her fault. It's me... it's all my fault.

C: 华劳斯？他是美食家吗？
E: Wallace? Is he a food connoisseur?

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 你的标签几乎覆盖了行政区一半的人，住这儿的非富即贵。
E: That's over half the population of the Administrative District. Everyone here is well-to-do.

C: 总之我没那个意思，不是想认识他，抱歉。
E: Anyway, that's all it was — I'm not interested in getting to know him. Sorry.

C: 呵，真是悠闲的一天…你还有什么想问的吗？
E: Ahh, what a fine day it is... Is there anything that you want to know?

C: 你问吧，客户永远是我的上帝。
E: Ask away. It's always a pleasure to help a customer.

C: 曙光就在眼前了，这个时候更加不能放弃，您说对吧？
E: The dawn is at hand. We can't afford to quit now, right?

C: 你这是强词夺理。
E: That's hardly a valid argument.

C: 当然有，我马上就要找到适合建造时空隧道的地方了——
E: Of course, I have. I am soon going to find a suitable place to construct the time tunnel —

C: 直到编辑送了我一本原作让我感受风格，我才发现情况不对。那是本真正的杰作！文学界高人辈出，那位作者的想象力和神韵，我根本模仿不来。
E: One of the editors had sent me a copy to let me get the feel of it. It wasn't until I started reading that I realized the book was going to be a classic. I had to admit, I couldn't even remotely reproduce the author's creativity and style.

C: 谢谢你陪我聊天，这本书送你吧，这才是真正的佳作，我希望它被更多人读到……
E: I should thank you instead. It's good to have a little chat. Here, take it, a fine book indeed. I hope more people get to read it.

C: 唔，你看起来有点奇怪啊…不会是什么来路不明的记者吧？我可没有什么独家内幕爆料哦。
E: Uh, you look a little strange... You're not some journalist from who knows where, are you? I don't have any exclusive insider information to reveal.

C: 那我告辞了。
E: See you later then.

C: 唉，这种事情说说容易，做起来难啊。
E: Easier said than done.

C: 你看这《水晶日报》头版，刊登的内容永远是毫无营养、胡说八道——这帮家伙到底在想什么？这能刊登在头版上？我简直要气昏了。
E: Look at the front page of the Crystal Daily. The content that the newspaper puts out is just junk, tabloid-level stuff. What's going on in their heads? Can you really put this stuff on the front page? I'm about to blow a gasket here!

C: 哎哟，不对，波瓦大臣是我爸…咳，看下一条吧。
E: Oh wait, Bova is my father... *cough* Let's look at the next one.

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 来，拿上这个。这是「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」撰写的防骗教程，你可要仔细阅读。要是有什么问题就尽管来找我！
E: Here, take this. This is a tutorial on preventing scams written by the Dark-Blue Scam Victims Association. Read it carefully and if you have any questions, come to me!

C: 嘁，我现在的工作就是和每天来找茬的老头老太太理论，这还不算浪费时间吗？我可是贝洛伯格法学院的高材生，凭什么每天只能处理些家长里短的琐事？
E: Don't you think it's a waste of my time to have me out here trying to talk sense into the elderly every day? I was a straight-A student at Belobog Law School. Why am I dealing with trivial family stuff?

C: 有什么好书推荐吗？
E: Do you have any recommendations?

C: 号外！号外！先睹为快！
E: News! We got the news! Don't miss it!

C: 所以…我觉得吧，铁卫们迟早会重回下层保卫我们的！大守护者一定不会抛弃我们。
E: So... I think that sooner or later the Guards will return to the Underworld to protect us! The Supreme Guardian will never abandon us!

C: 我不是来看拳赛的。
E: I'm not here for the match.

C: 看不起谁呢？
E: Don't you look down on me.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 可你已经很厉害了。
E: But you're very skilled already, aren't you?

C: 最近上下层区要解除封锁了。
E: The Overworld and the Underworld are going to be reunited.

C: …你说得对。我还是不瞎打听了。
E: ...You're right. I'm not gonna do it anymore.

C: 啊…欸？没、没什么！只是，我…我想问你们点事！
E: Huh...? No, no. It's just that... there is something I want to ask you!

C: 哦，是、是你们啊。多亏了你、你们，我们终、终于能回到地面上了。
E: Oh, i—it's you folks. It's all thanks to y—you that we can f—finally return to the surface.

C: 是啊，就缺这个了，但这种模组现在可不好弄啊…哎，真让人头大。
E: Yeah, it's all that's missing. It's hard to get hold of one... *sigh* What a headache.

C: 噢，谢谢，我最近还不错，甚至称得上是「意气风发」了，哈哈。也不怕你笑话，这两天我还在想怎么把白发遮一遮。
E: Oh thanks, I've been pretty good recently — "full of beans" even, you could say, haha! And I'm not afraid of your jokes. I've been thinking about how I can cover up this white hair of mine.

C: 不过，这苔藓实在是不太好挖，没办法作为常驻供应就是了……
E: However, the moss is really not easy to dig. This dish is not always available...

C: 不抓洞螈啦？
E: No more catching olms?

C: 确实是个好地方。
E: Really, it's a great town.

C: 不是吗？那你到底是怎么……
E: No? Then how did you do it...

C: 星球没有被抢走，也没有更多人受伤——皆大欢喜，是吧？
E: Our planet was not taken over, and no more people were harmed... All's well that ends well, right?

C: 好坏参半，这样的人生已经足够完整，我不必替他感到遗憾。
E: For better or for worse, such a life is so complete that I don't have to feel sorry for him anymore.

C: …哈，下一个目标这不就有了吗！得想办法让茉莉爱上摇滚，看看她能不能胜任「机械热潮」的贝斯手……
E: ...Ha, looks like we have our next target to work towards, then! I have to find a way for Molly to fall in love with rock music, and see if she'll be the bassist for Mechanical Fever...

C: 听说很多长期驻扎前线的军官这次都能申请到休假…真不容易啊，唉。
E: I heard many officers who were stationed on the front line for long periods can finally take their leaves... A long time coming, I'd say.

C: 大家…应该都可以靠自己的能力维持生活——但是，现在的下层区到处都缺物资……
E: Everyone... should be able to live their lives by relying on themselves. But the Underworld is sorely lacking in supplies now...

C: 如果可以的话，克拉拉希望永远都不必动用这份力量…我不想强迫他人，我只希望用它来守护重要的大家。
E: If I can, I hope that I never have to use this power... I don't want to force anyone to do anything. I just hope I can use it to protect everyone I care about.

C: 这是不是意味着保护程序效果不好？
E: Does this mean that the protection program isn't effective?

C: 如果你加入了鼹鼠党，就可以和我们一起吃好吃的，玩好玩的…还可以参加我定期组织的大探险活动！
E: If you're in The Moles, you'll get to eat tasty food with us, and have so much fun... And you can join the great adventures that I plan!

C: 就是那个蓝色头发的叔叔吧？虎克当然认识啦！
E: That blue-haired man? Of course I do!

C: 一个健康、正常的下层区不需要「地火」的存在。不过放心，就算组织解散了，还是会有年轻人继承「地火」一直以来的精神的。
E: A healthy, normal Underworld doesn't need an existence like Wildfire's. Don't worry though, even if we do disband, there'll be plenty of youngsters who will carry on the will of Wildfire.

C: 虽然和我的想法不太一致，但布洛妮娅姑娘依旧勇敢地做出了选择，我向她致以敬意。
E: Miss Bronya made a bold decision and I respect her for it, even though it was not exactly what I believed best.

C: 从上面的喧嚣世界，走出了希望的使者
E: From chaos up above comes a messenger of hope

C: 你是怎么解决手机问题的？
E: How did you solve the issues with the phones?

C: 可以聊聊星际和平公司吗？
E: Can we talk about IPC?

C: 先聊到这里吧。
E: Let's stop here for now.

C: 祝您玩得开心！
E: Have a great time!

C: 那项目好像挺有搞头……
E: That project seems to be quite promising...

C: 说吧，为什么只考了<unbreak>35</unbreak>分？
E: Go ahead and fess up, why did you only get <unbreak>35</unbreak> points on the test?

C: 第几版了？
E: What version are you up to now?

C: 记不清了……
E: I can't even remember...

C: 缆车什么时候到站呢……
E: When does the cable car get to the station...

C: 这不是…比赛连轴转嘛……
E: Isn't this... competing night and day, around the clock...

C: 我还是比较看好那个……
E: I'm pretty fond of that one there...

C: 博物馆是做什么的？
E: What does the museum do?

C: 总、总之，我只是个平平无奇的普通人而已，没经历过什么值得一听的故事……
E: I—In short, I'm just an ordinary person, and my stories are as boring as they come...

C: 啊…是{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！欢迎来到博物馆……
E: Ah! It's {F#big sister}{M#big brother} {NICKNAME}! Welcome to the museum...

C: 查拉图斯特拉萨…萨拉…
E: Zarathustra... zara...

C: 我自然是相信{NICKNAME}大人的，不过我的工作习惯促使我要再次提醒您「幽囚狱并非是一个来去自由的场所」，大人切要小心行事。
E: I am more than happy to put my trust in you, {NICKNAME}. But it is my professional obligation to remind you, once again, that the Shackling Prison is not a place where people walk about freely. Please be cautious in your investigation here.

C: 有没有什么奇葩的犯人？
E: Are there any particularly strange prisoners?

C: 二狗二狗，吃喝不愁。二狗二狗，罗浮之友。
E: Noob Noob, never want for gulp or slurp. Noob Noob, Luofu's friend, always a perk.

C: …不过嘛，那人也没全部说错，很多时候准和不准纯粹是一种…主观感受。
E: ...Then again, they aren't totally wrong. Many times, the line between accuracy and inaccuracy is... subjective.

C: 是啊，总算过去了…其实算算时间也没多久，但总有种熬了很久的错觉。
E: Yeah, it's finally over... Even though it hasn't been that long, it feels like we've been going through it for a long time.

C: 好嘞，下回再见。以后要是有什么修旧物、买二手、卖废品的需求记得来找我。
E: Alright, catch you next time then. If you ever need anything fixed, or if you want to buy and sell second-hand stuff, come find me.

C: 我是工造司的工正，就挺有水平的吧。领导对我很赞赏，他说过「小聪啊，你要是稍微有点情商，百年内就能评上大工正」。
E: Yeah, I'm an artisan at the Artisanship Commission, and I'm kind of a big deal. My boss loves me and he said, "Cong, if you just work on your EQ a little, you'll be a Master Artisan in another hundred years."

C: 放心，我不会耽误工造司的工作的。
E: Don't worry. I won't neglect my job at the Artisanship Commission.

C: 你到底是什么？
E: What the heck are you?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 哎…武赫，消停点吧。别让人看热闹了。
E: *sigh* Wu He, calm down. Let's not put on a show for people.

C: 思路打开点，说建木未必要真到建木跟前去拍，可以拍点地衡司录事啊云骑啊他们的视角，搞多点打戏和特效，渲染得紧张些就行了。
E: Don't be so rigid. An immersia about the Ambrosial Arbor doesn't have to include scenes of the real tree. We can film it from the perspectives of the clerks and Cloud Knights from the Realm-Keeping Commission. Just throw in some action scenes and special effects to create tension, and the immersia will do fine.

C: 忘了自我介绍了，我是阿合马铁窗集团首席执行官——阿合马。您也可以叫我马老板或者老马。
E: Apologies, I forgot to introduce myself. I'm Arma, chief executive of the Arma Correctional Group. You can also call me boss or shopkeep.

C: 我从小就不喜欢打架，只喜欢做买卖…整个猎群都觉得我是个可悲的笑话，我爹也以我为耻。
E: I've never enjoyed fighting since young. I only like business... The whole pack thought I was pathetic. Even my father thought I was an embarrassment.

C: 现在是办理会员卡最好的时间，办理十年赠送五年，优惠力度令人震惊。怎么样，我现在就帮您登记一下？
E: There's never been a better time to sign up as a member. Just sign up for ten years, and get another five years for free. That's a crazy deal! How about I help you register with us right now?

C: 你不要故意吓唬我！
E: C'mon, don't freak me out like that!

C: 您先忙！我就不打扰您了……
E: Off you go then! I won't bug you any longer...

C: 哎…算了，不逗你了。你好歹也是景元的客人。我是神策府的策士，我叫青镞。
E: *sigh* ...Alright, fine. I'll let up on you. You're one of Jing Yuan's guests, after all. My name's Qingzu, and I'm a counselor here at the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 怎么没有什么可说的？小时候，这小子特别可爱。我说要做飞行士，他就说他也要做飞行士，「以后陪姐姐一起遨游太空！」
E: What do you mean, "That's all"? This punk used to be so cute when we were little. I'd say how I dreamed of being a pilot one day, and he'd say the same, "I want to travel the universe with you, sis!"

C: 不过，身为工正，老夫并不总是需要做一线工作。更多的时间还是用来研发各种家用机巧、改进各种工造设计，诸如此类。
E: However, I, as an artisan, am not really involved in front-line work all the time. I put most of my efforts into developing various household ingenia and improving our artifex designs.

C: 技术的革新需要身后的积累，而仙舟人最擅长的就是「积累」。
E: Technological breakthroughs require the mass accumulation of knowledge, and if there's one thing the Xianzhou people are good at, it's accumulation.

C: 听说大毫执事官之前是云骑军？
E: I heard the official Dahao used to be in the Cloud Knights?

C: 灾难过后你们还忙吗？
E: The disaster is over, are you guys still busy?

C: 我自己倒是无所谓，只是不希望大毫大人太忙了…你也知道，他那个岁数，那个身体，再忙容易忙出事。
