E: It doesn't bother me, but I do hope that Official Dahao's schedule is less packed now... You know, considering his age and physical condition, it's easy for things to go wrong if he going hard at it.

C: 我是「地衡司内最聪明的头脑派」，只有他们两个都派不上用场的时候，我才会登场。你看他们俩，我主要指的是净砚执事，还在好好干活，那我就不用出手了。
E: I'm the Realm-Keeping Commission's Most Intelligent, and I only show up when those two get stuck. Just look at those two, and I'm mainly talking about the Officer Jingyan here — still going at it so hard, so I don't have to.

C: 啊…那时候我多么有活力啊…维森纳女士为我戴上缎带的那一刻，我觉得自己像一个雀跃的小伙子一样，永远也不会疲惫……
E: Ahhh... How energized I was back then... The moment Madam Wiesener placed that medal on me, I felt like a carefree kid again — never to be tired again...

C: 既然你不是来这里等文件的化外民商人，那我们俩也不是同行冤家了。
E: Since you're not an Outworlder merchant waiting here for documents, then I suppose we aren't rivals.

C: 反倒是那个麦尔彦，嚯嚯嚯！什么东西，跟她呼吸同一片空气都让人觉得辱没了自己。
E: On the contrary, that Maryam — hohoho! What a wreck, it's a disgrace just to be within spitting distance of her.

C: 再后来，星际和平公司与我们建立了联系，「埃伊加文明」才初次加入到信用点结算体系之中，这不，我才能来到仙舟做生意嘛。
E: Later on, the IPC made the first contact with us, and the Aigaian civilization was officially added to the credits macro-economy. Only then could I finally come to the Xianzhou to conduct business affairs.

C: 我听说工造司本来是需要我手上这些超导合金的，需求量不大，结果半路杀出个麦尔彦，要拿下批文，还得跟她竞价…我非得急死。
E: I heard they needed these superconducting alloys over at the Artisanship Commission, but not very much. But Maryam popped out of nowhere and wants the business for herself. Now I have to compete with her prices... I'm so anxious!

C: 让机器把活全干了，我又该干什么呢，胡思乱想？那样一来我不就变成仙舟的不安定因素了？明白了吧？
E: If a machine does this job for me, what am I going to do? Just sit there idling the day away? Why, I'd slowly become a destabilizing factor for the Xianzhou, wouldn't I? Are you starting to catch my drift?

C: 还可以吧。主簿这个工作，其实说重要吧也没那么重要，但是必须有人做这件事。
E: It's acceptable. Perhaps the role of a secretary isn't that important in itself, but someone has to do this work.

C: 好的，大人若还有问题随时找我。
E: Very well. If you have any more questions, please come and find me.

C: 我看您也不是卜者，就不必外行指导内行了。
E: I don't think you're a diviner, buddy. So stay in your lane, alright?

C: 能聊聊天吗？
E: Can we chat for a bit?

C: 我只是随口一提，你紧张什么。
E: I was just making conversation. Why so serious?

C: 族规中，染同胞血者当同受入灭永罚。我不知道我自己该受罚，还是能得到豁免？
E: Our people's creed states that those stained with the blood of a fellow Vidyadhara are punished for all eternity. I don't know whether I should be punished, or whether I could earn an exemption?

C: 说起来，仙舟「方壶」的护珠人与我们有些不尽相同。「方壶」龙尊统御万民，六司六御都是辅佐龙尊的存在。
E: Speaking of which, the Pearlkeepers aboard the Xianzhou Fanghu are different from us. The Fanghu's high elder governs over all the citizens, and the Six Charioteers of the Six Commissions all support the high elder.

C: 我最近刚退役。听闻此次动乱中，有不少持明卵被打破…还有不少兄弟姐妹被药王秘传的妖人所害…可恶！
E: I've only just retired. I heard that during all the turmoil, many Vidyadhara eggs got cracked... Many of my brothers and sisters got harmed by those devils of Sanctus Medicus... Those hateful scoundrels!

C: 你刚刚念的口号又是？
E: What's that slogan you just said?

C: 能聊聊天吗？
E: Can we chat for a bit?

C: 大多数人蜕生前都不愿放手的东西，多半跟他们自己的人生经历有关。都是些旧情难忘的小物件：什么定情的挂坠、老友的书信、或是自己的作品……
E: Most things people are unwilling to part ways with are connected to experiences from their life. It's really all just small sentimental trinkets: Engraved love pendants, letters from old friends, or even works they've personally created...

C: 我和那些时刻想要搞破坏的危险份子不一样，我是技术流。除了扇翅膀的声音有点大，造不成什么危害。
E: I'm not like those dangerous criminals who are always trying to destroy stuff to escape. I prefer to use my skills. My wings may make a lot of noise when I flap them, but they can't cause any real damage.

C: …除非是太卜大人亲临，否则其他人等一律止步。我再次声明，卜算推演之外的事，不清楚，不了解，不感兴趣。
E: ...Except for the master diviner, no one else has access here. Once again, I'd like to emphasize that I have no knowledge or interest in things unrelated to divination.

C: 人情也要看场合，该有的分寸可不能丢。
E: Well, it all depends on the situation. I merely act accordingly.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 三位卜官大人的想法人尽皆知，太卜大人也没有挑明，只有他们仨还以为别人不知道…看他们在职场上明争暗斗也属实是一件有趣的事。
E: Everyone knows what's on the minds of the three Managing Diviners. As the master diviner doesn't address the issue directly, the three still assume that the competition between them is a secret... It's quite amusing to see them scheming against each other at work.

C: 至于若月，听说她被符玄大人算出「她会离开太卜司」，于是便让她离开了。
E: About Ruoyue, I heard that Lady Fu Xuan had predicted her departure from the Divination Commission before, so she allowed her to leave.

C: 瞅你怎么了？就瞅你。
E: So? Imma look at whatever I want.

C: 以后有机会再聊吧。
E: I'll catch you again next time.

C: 店铺啊，星槎海虽然店面挺多的，但有很多都是专做游客生意的，个人感觉不太实惠。
E: Stores... Well, there are lots of stores in Starskiff Haven, but many of them target tourists. I'm afraid you won't find the best deals there.

C: 有些世界栖息着无数猛兽…我印象最深的是一颗叫塔拉萨的海洋世界……
E: Some worlds teem with numerous ferocious beasts... My most vivid memory was of an ocean world called Thalassa...

C: 金人巷里烦心事不少，有烦心事的客人都是会来杜氏茶馆的。要是有一天客人没烦恼了，那我的生意可能会有危险。
E: Aurum Alley is never short of troubles, and people pestered by them would naturally come to my tea house. If my customers were free of troubles one day, then my business would be busted.

C: 会长与我的师父是旧友，得益于这两人交情，我与会长也算是熟识。
E: He used to be a friend of my master's, and that's how I got to know him.

C: 没别的事了，你忙吧。
E: That's all. I can see you're busy.

C: 嘿，瞧您这话说的，瞧不起人不是？就算散客不买，我也有地方分销啊。
E: Hey, what are you trying to imply? Even if my store is rarely frequented by walk-in customers, I have my channels and connections for distribution.

C: 哎，什么购房资格，完全就是针对我们持明嘛。
E: "Property purchase eligibility." Heh. What a joke. It's just targeting us Vidyadhara.

C: 你是在说「公司拟人化」？
E: Are you saying that your colleagues view the IPC in the same way they view people?

C: 欢迎光临！我们家卖的都是地道的罗浮小吃，都是刚出锅的，新鲜得很！
E: Welcome! I only sell authentic Luofu snacks! Freshly baked!

C: 在下算不上「在十王司工作」啦…只是被借调到幽囚狱，听从十王司指挥的云骑军而已。您大概也知道，协助十王司的工作，也是云骑军的义务之一。
E: I don't really work for them... I'm actually a Cloud Knight on secondment to The Shackling Prison, so I'm reporting to the Ten-Lords Commission until further notice. As you're probably aware, assisting the Ten-Lords Commission is very much also part of the Cloud Knights' duties.

C: 此象得主身居高位，刚正不阿。对于你所问之事——你心向正义，行事魄力十足，只需遵从内心良知道德，名利唾手可得。然而高处不胜寒，切勿封闭内心与朋友断交，行事多为亲友考虑，切记欲速则不达。
E: The bearer of this sign is in a high position and has a righteous soul. As for the question in your mind — just follow your conscience and you will gain fame and fortune. However, your journey may be a lonely one. Do not sever your ties with your family and friends and try to keep them in mind. Remember, haste makes waste.

C: 嘿嘿～阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务～
E: Hehe, the Arma Correctional Group is glad to be of service!

C: 给我看看货吧…
E: Show me the goods...

C: 你曾经日夜练习相声。
E: You used to practice crosstalk comedy every day.

C: 零用钱花光了？
E: Have you used up all your pocket money?

C: 那么，{NICKNAME}此番来到司辰宫，是有什么事情吗？
E: Well, what brings you to the Palace of Astrum this time, {NICKNAME}?

C: 感谢你诚恳的建议，可憎的有机体。但放弃从不是「我们」的选择。
E: We appreciate your advice, loathsome organic lifeform, but giving up is not a choice.

C: 「我们」来自两个渴望毁灭对方的有机体文明。其中一方拥有四万五千四百个信息体，另一方拥有六万一千九百三十六个信息体。
E: We were born from two civilizations that desired each other's destruction. One consisted of <unbreak>45,400</unbreak> data entities, while the other consisted of <unbreak>61,936</unbreak> data entities.

C: 仙舟上长生种被剥夺了死亡的尊严，十王司便要化身为死亡——这意味着十王司不应该像六司部一样出现在大众视野中。
E: As the Xianzhou's long-life species have been deprived of death's dignity, the Ten-Lords Commission had to become death... That means that the Ten-Lords Commission should not appear before the eyes of the people like the Six Commissions.

C: {NICKNAME}大人，我叫您的名字，您敢答应吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm calling your name. Dare you respond?

C: 唉…结果现在时过境迁，绥园竟变得如此阴森。当初在那里亲吻的两个人，一个做了十王司的武弁，一个叛逃去做了丰饶民。
E: Ah... Those good old times are now water under the bridge. Fyxestroll Garden has become such an eerie place now. Of the two lovers who kissed under that pavilion, one has become a warden in the Ten-Lords Commission, and the other one defected as a Denizen of Abundance.

C: 没其他问题了，下次见。
E: I don't have any other questions. See you next time.

C: 请问。金人勾魂使四卅七号将尽可能回答。
E: Please do. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> will do its best to answer your questions.

C: 我记得…他好像是订的礼服，出席正式场合用的。
E: I remember... I think he ordered dress attire for formal occasions.

C: 不必了吧…
E: I don't think I need it...

C: 下次再来拜访。
E: I'll come back again.

C: …把旧物卖给外面的人？
E: ...You mean selling old items to Outworlders?

C: 有一些懂得茶道的客人经常来「不夜侯」高谈阔论，在下虽然不才，也偷听到了一些门道，可以给您卖弄一下。您看怎样？
E: Some guests are tea aficionados, and often pontificate about all kinds of expert tea lore at the Sleepless Earl. I'm not a smart man, but I have memorized some facts and can show them off. Would you be interested?

C: 无论是云骑新兵、还是入伍多年的老兵，对着这块异星金属打造的靶人都无可奈何——强壮的士兵能一剑斩出剑痕，而稍弱的士兵甚至留不下痕迹。
E: None was a match before this target dummy forged from alien meteoric alloy, be it newbie Cloud Knight or even the most experienced veterans. The stronger soldiers could leave a mark on the dummy, but the weaker ones could leave nary a scratch.

C: 无罅飞光！
E: The Transcendent Flash!

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 对所有吃饭和做饭以外的话题，我都没什么兴趣，咱们还是聊聊美食吧。
E: I'm not concerned about things other than eating and cooking. So, let's talk about food.

C: 呼——虽然这么说有些唐突，我其实一直在躲避无数个前男友、前女友的「追捕」，我还以为你是他们其中的一位，不过你应该不是。
E: Phew... This may be out of the blue, but I'm actually evading the pursuit of my countless ex-lovers. I thought you were one of them, but apparently not.

C: 等等，你的脸好熟悉…虽说我的记忆只有一个月，但我对你好像还有点儿印象。
E: Hold on, you look familiar... I may only have memories from a month ago, but I have vague recollections of you.

C: 不聊了，云骑开始瞪我们了。
E: We should stop here. The Cloud Knights are starting to glare.

C: 建木的事，有什么内幕吗？
E: Do you know the inside story about what happened to the Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 就是，这就有点不地道了，别人可能不知道，但我俩老早就见到过您来找那位——那位谁来着，顶漂亮的狐人姑娘。
E: It isn't very nice of you to do that. Others may not know it, but we have long seen — uhm — the gorgeous foxian girl you came to look for earlier.

C: 想打听一点儿仙舟趣闻。
E: I want to ask you about some Xianzhou trivia.

C: 只是，自从到这里后，就再也没找见神仙姐姐。心里有些难过。{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，还有什么事情吗？
E: It's just that I haven't found the celestial lady since I arrived, and that makes me sad. {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, is there anything else you want to ask?

C: 您的打扮也和这里的男仙人女仙人差太远啦。冬生实在没法将{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}当作神仙看待。
E: You look so different from the celestial men and women here. I just can't see {F#Miss}{M#Mister} as a celestial.

C: 你为什么想长生不老呢？
E: Why do you want to become immortal?

C: 凌解是谁？
E: Who's Ling Jie?

C: 咦？凌解说化外民都不太了解持明族的蜕生，就让春分来教教你吧！
E: Oh! Ling Jie wrote that Outworlders don't really understand the Vidyadhara's hatching rebirth, so let me explain everything to you!

C: 我是驭空大人的秘书，有很多文书要处理… 具体的内容嘛，我就不讲了。
E: I am Madam Yukong's secretary, charged with handling much documentation... I won't go into detail about my job scope.

C: 好了好了，姐姐还有正事要做，你看我手边这堆工作，我今天还准备准时下班呢。逗逗你还挺开心的，我把这个小礼物送给你吧。
E: All right, all right. I've got business to attend do. See that pile of work here? I still want to clock off work on time. It was fun teasing you, so here's a small gift for you.

C: 哈哈哈哈，开玩笑还是要分场合的。
E: Hahaha, you must read the room before cracking such jokes.

C: 「再胆敢骚扰夕葵，我不但要你滚出天舶司，还要你滚出罗浮。」
E: "If you ever harass Xikui again, I won't just eject you out of the Sky-Faring Commission, and I'll also flush you off Luofu."

C: 我叫岩明，是「天驱商会」驻天舶司的公使，算得上半个市舶官。
E: I am Yanming, a Celestial Guild envoy attached to the Sky-Faring Commission. You can consider me half a Maritime Trade Officer.

C: 这个数字是几百还是几千，反正对你而言，都同样老得不可思议。
E: Whether it's in the hundreds or thousands, it will still sound ancient to you.

C: 但我也在找她，和大家一起找她…原因很简单，因为驭空大人觉得她还活着，想要找到她。所以我会和驭空大人一起找她。仅此而已。
E: Having said that, I'm still looking for her alongside everyone else, simply because Madam Yukong thinks she is alive and wants to find her. I'll follow Madam Yukong to find her - it's as simple as that.

C: 话都让你说完了。
E: You know everything, don't you?

C: …实不相瞒，那是过去。在空间站的时候，我满脑子只有浩瀚银河…你不要笑，我是认真的，只搞科研别无他想。
E: ...That's in the past. The cosmos was the only thing on my mind back on the space station. Don't laugh, I'm serious.

C: 最后三天！最后三天！请想买的顾客抓紧时间抢购吧。
E: Last three days! Get yours now, whilst stocks last.

C: 你这不就是黄牛么？
E: Aren't you just a scalper?

C: 因为他就是我心目中理想的自己！
E: Because he is the ideal that I've always aspired to become!

C: 空间站「黑塔」…
E: The Herta Space Station...

C: 那里有什么特产？
E: What do they have there?

C: 到处在闹反物质军团…
E: Everyone's going on about the Antimatter Legion...

C: 再说了，如果读者获取不了情绪价值，也不会有人愿意去自主传播。
E: Besides, if the reader didn't derive any emotional value from the article, they wouldn't spread the news on their own accord either.

C: 那你尾巴呢？
E: What about your tail then?

C: 哼哼，说漏嘴了吧！其实狐人根本就没有尾巴！
E: Ha, you've spilled the beans now! Foxians don't actually have tails!

C: 咱俩到底是谁在抬杠？
E: Who's pulling whose leg?

C: 另外就是要知足，不能嫌弃多少。要是拿太多了，你要分给其他人；要是拿太少了，你也不能有怨气…毕竟没有别人的慷慨，你啥也不是！
E: Also, contentment is key — you can't be picky about the offering. If it's too much, you distribute some of it to others. If it's too little, you can't gripe about it either... I mean, you're nothing without the benevolence of others!

C: 好将军！寿瘟犯境动刀兵～
E: O General! The plague approaches; tell troops to listen~

C: 把你的东西收拾收拾。
E: Pack up your things.

C: 我们也算是协同作战了…
E: I suppose we're now comrades who have fought alongside each other...

C: 所以我们要不上擂台试试高下？
E: Should we step into the arena and see who comes out on top?

C: 大人还真是麻烦，已经抓住我了，还有这么多的事……
E: Grown ups are such a pain. You've already caught me. What more could you want...

C: 我们交手这么多次，你还不明白吗，我的宿敌。
E: We've locked horns so many times, my nemesis. Hasn't it clicked for you yet?

C: 求战如何？求教又如何？
E: How do you know I'm here to learn, not to fight you?

C: 那你真的变强大了吗？
E: So, did you really get more powerful?

C: 那可真是太好了。
E: That's great.

C: 那位小朋友还真的挺特别，每次找人家「切磋」时，都感觉招数有着些许的变化。我还记得他那一招凛冽凌厉的剑法，冰得人家瑟瑟发抖～
E: That little scamp is pretty special. Every time he spars with me, I can feel like shifts in his moves. I still remember that cold, merciless sword move of his — it sent shivers down my spine (if I had one)!

C: 不过他的招数看起来像是野路子，感觉就像是找了个退伍老兵练过段时间。
E: But his moves looked like he was self-taught, like he trained under some discharged veteran.

C: 确实有这么一位异星的选手，他和所有的人都不一样～枪快人更快，似乎从小就学会如何与土匪搏斗，如何与野兽争夺空间，如何为自己赢得尊重。
E: There is an outworlder who's different from everyone else. His gun's quick, but his moves are even quicker! Like as soon as he learned how to walk, he practiced fighting bandits, how to vie for territory with beasts, how to win respect for himself.

C: {NICKNAME}，见到你真开心～今日来丹鼎司，难道说，你是有什么事要找妾身吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm so happy to see you~ Are you here at the Alchemy Commission today for me? What can I do for you?

C: 再就是摸一摸，要是木纤维太多，会有些粗糙，要是太硬，说明添加了太多粘合剂。
E: Another way to tell is to touch it. If there are too many wooden fibers, it can end up feeling rough. If it's too hard, that means that too much adhesive was added.

C: 唉…早在本座出发前，就算到「罗浮」必有劫难。可与爻光将军所商议的要事，又是非本座亲临不可的。
E: Ah... I had calculated that the Luofu would face calamity long before I had departed. However, the important matters that I had to discuss with General Yao Guang demanded my presence in person.

C: 你上回也是这么说的！
E: That's what you said last time!

C: 说明我们比他们重要！
E: That means we're more important than them!

C: 你这人怎么这么说话呢？我们回家吧，亲爱的。
E: How can you say that? Let's go home, darling.

C: 谁说对了，就给他。
E: I'll give the goods to whomever with the correct answer.

C: 金人巷，有金人的小巷。
E: The Aurum Alley means an alley with aurumatons.

C: 好久没在驾校见到你了！
E: I haven't seen you at the driving school for ages!

C: 谁年轻的时候没犯过错？你还年轻，免不了得走上这么一遭，涨涨教训也好……
E: Who didn't make mistakes when they were young? It's part of the process for your age. Just take it as a lesson...

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 哎呀，总而言之，*我们*已经等很久啦。再不快点的话，今天就见不到妈妈了。
E: Oh dear, long story short, we've been waiting forever. If we don't hurry up, we won't get to see Mom today.

C: 我就知道，老爸又要拿我开涮了。
E: I knew it, Dad's gonna make fun of me again.

C: 瞧你的眼神，莫非也对「大地」的族裔过去的历史感兴趣？
E: That look in your eyes... Are you also interested in the history of Earth's descendants?

C: 剑旗爵盛情难却，我们就恭敬不如从命了。小维吉妮娅，今天恐怕有你发挥的机会了。
E: Since Dux Gladiorum insists so passionately, we'll humbly accept the offer. Little Verginia, looks like you'll get your chance to shine today.

C: 呵呵…背祷文时磕磕绊绊，但记这些旁支末节时，倒是过目不忘呢。
E: Heh... You stumble through your prayers, but when it comes to these trivial details, you've got a photographic memory.

C: 没想到这小玩具准头不错，可火力不足。我刚玩得兴起，它竟然在半空熄火了。
E: Turns out, the little toy's aim was decent, but the firepower was lacking. Just when I was getting into it, it fizzled out midair.

C: 呵，真是豪气。蜜酿确实该一饮而尽。
E: Heh, now that's the spirit. A honey brew should indeed be downed in one go.

C: 一定让你输得体无完肤。
E: That I'll thoroughly defeat you.

C: 不爱看，就别看。
E: Don't watch if you don't like it.

C: 老夫七百有六。
E: I am <unbreak>706</unbreak> years old.

C: 我要立刻凝视深渊！
E: I want to immediately stare into the abyss!

C: 你可以如此相信，但是我仍然建议你双脚不要离地。
E: You can choose to believe so, but I suggest that you to keep your feet rooted to the ground.

C: 恶侯无生，啜食人血，残杀胞族，令苦饿饥寒，没入永昼。
E: Evil existence of the void who drank human blood and committed phratry murder. To be subjected to suffering from hunger and cold for eternity.

C: 贪婪的学者获得了他梦寐以求的长生，只是，他现在的味道变得有一点…好吃。
E: The insatiable researcher received his long-held dream of immortality. However, he ended up developing a somewhat... delicious aroma.

C: 欣赏鸟类艺术照。
E: Admiring artistic images of birds.

C: 参加比赛的选手们自发地做着热身运动，也许他们需要有人指导一番。既然如此，那这个人为什么不可以是你呢？
E: The participating fighters are all warming up at their own pace. Perhaps they need someone to lead them. If that's the case, why can't that be you?

C: 好像有人偷懒，需要你指导一下。
E: Looks like someone's slacking off. They require guidance.

C: （潇洒地离开）
E: (Depart with panache and style)

C: 「胜利」就是我的武德！
E: Victory is my martial sportsmanship!

C: 刚中带柔，可谓拳中之尊。
E: Grace within toughness, that is the supremacy of fists.

C: 千变万化，高深莫测。
E: Ever-changing, unpredictable, unfathomable.

C: 玉界门——你们正是从此处开始着了星核猎手的道，并在此处遇见了停云，想必你已经很熟悉了。
E: Jade Gate is where you fell into the trap of the Stellaron Hunters and met Tingyun. I'm sure you're very familiar with the place.

C: 据说三只物流机巧鸟就可以拖着星槎上天。曾有人试图求证这一说法，至今下落不明。
E: It has been put about that three courier cycranes are strong enough to lift a starskiff. Some people have tried to verify the rumor, but they have never been heard of since.

C: 广告四角写着「百毒不侵」。这会不会涉嫌虚假宣传了？
E: The phrase, "Immune to All Poisons" is written on the four corners of the billboard. Is this considered false advertising?

C: 如果你急需一台座驾，处在这一阶段的星槎安装玦轮后即可自由移动——当然，廻星港的工人和天舶司可不会同意的。
E: If you desperately need a vehicle, you can use the starskiff in the current phase to travel around after fixing it with a jade wheel. Unfortunately, the Stargazer Navalia workers and the Sky-Faring Commission will not approve the practice.

C: 建木根须深入熔炉内部，贪婪地汲取「岁阳」的岁精能量，如同不知疲倦的抽水泵。
E: The roots of Ambrosial Arbor creep into the inside of the furnace where they absorb the heliobi's energy tirelessly like a water pump.

C: 「有人声称，在这一事件中许多游侠受退化溯流影响，失去了战斗力。为了赡养这些同伴，巡海游侠的活动频率不得不减少。」
E: "It has been claimed that many Rangers were affected by the Degeneration Flow and lost their combat ability. To support the living of these affected companions, the Galaxy Rangers had no choice but to cut back on their activities."

C: 你偶尔会听到司辰宫的员工称「那盆绿植如何如何」——但这玩意儿分明是蓝色的。
E: Occasionally, you will hear the workers at the Palace of Astrum talking about the green plants when the plants are actually blue.

C: 就跟你说别喝那玩意…
E: I told you not to drink that stuff...

C: 车窗外，这夜色~
E: I want you, to show me, your fantasy~

C: 你蹲下来，想要仔细辨认快递单上的文字，却听到包裹中传来一阵冷漠的机械提示音：
E: You stoop down to try and carefully read the text on the courier slip, but hear a soulless mechanical security system say from within:

C: 「生物信息已认证，注册者为{NICKNAME}。」
E: "Biometric data verified. Registered to {NICKNAME}."

C: 你迫不及待地拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，但一股冷锐的寒意让你的手指触电般收回。
E: Frantic to open it up, you reach under the lid only for a sharp chill like an electric shock to cause you to pull your hand back.

C: 又是一阵风，信纸从你的指间飞走了。它飘摇着飞向了它的终末——像极了寄件人的爱情。
E: Another gust of wind comes, taking the letter away from your fingers. It drifts to its demise, like the love life of the sender.

C: 快递盒中传来腐败的食物气息。运单上的备注写着「求求店家早点送过来，我已经饿了三天了」。
E: The smell of rotten food comes from the courier package. The bill writes, "Please ship my purchase as soon as possible. I have starved for three days."

C: 持明一族世代供奉的龙尊雕像，看上去很像一位你熟悉的朋友。你什么时候也有机会被人造像崇拜呢？
E: The high elder statue worshiped by the Vidyadhara for generations. It looks a lot like a friend of yours. When will it be your turn to have a statue made and worshiped to?

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 古海波涛声摇晃，与某人立下的誓言在耳畔呢喃，星空彼端的光芒眨了眨眼，你沉入目眩神醉的温暖爱河里……
E: The ancient sea's waves sway. Someone whispers their vows to you in your ear. The light at the end of the starry sky shimmers, and you sink into the warm and intoxicating river of love...

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 这就是组乐队的命运吗……
E: Is this the fate of forming a band...

C: 「所以，现在，我把你分了三千多期的贷款买来的这只小东西送还给你，请你担起责任，对它的余生好好负责！」
E: "So, I am returning this thing to you — this thing that you bought with a loan that's to be paid over three thousand repayments. I hope you will take responsibility and look after it for the rest of its life!"

C: 不管这对恋人间发生了什么样的龃龉，时将一只小狗装在狭窄逼仄的快递箱中邮来寄去，这绝不为任何有爱心的无名客所乐见。
E: No matter what happened between the lovers, mailing a puppy back and forth in a cramped little delivery box would upset any caring Nameless.

C: 这里堆放着不少货物。你仔细查看那些快递箱上的单据，发现它们早在很久之前就该送到收件人手中了。
E: There is a large pile of goods stacked up here. You look closely at the receipts and realize that these should have been delivered to the recipients long ago.

C: 「这几个看似平平无奇的纸箱比金人巷的历史还要悠久。没人知道谁制造了它们，也没人知道它们从何而来。」
E: "These seemingly normal and unassuming cardboard boxes have actually been around for longer than the Aurum Alley itself. No one knows who created them, or where they came from."

C: 是啊，只要凝望着它，就能感受到它那超凡卓绝的艺术表达。
E: That's right. Just looking at it would make one feel its extraordinary artistic expression.

C: 查看相声台本
E: Check crosstalk script

C: 少说也要有<unbreak>700</unbreak>年前了？
E: At least <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago?

C: 哎，那人身上一股味……
E: Ugh, the B.O. is strong in that one...

C: 还好吧，这里挺热闹的，来来往往的行商也多，我感觉挺好。
E: I thought it was fine. The Luofu is always a busy place filled with people and merchants. I quite like it there.

C: …这次我打算换个人附体了。
E: ...I decided to possess a different body.

C: 若是从化外民的角度看，仙舟上的阵法封印几乎都来自太卜司——其实不然，太卜司占了七成，十王司占了两成，鬼画符占了一成。
E: From an outworlder's perspective, it almost seems like the matrix seals on Xianzhou are all from the Divination Commission, but that's not true. Only <unbreak>70%</unbreak> of the seals come from the Divination Commission, <unbreak>20%</unbreak> from the Ten-Lords Commission, and the rest are random unintelligible symbols.

C: ——「不要开门！」不知为何，这样的声音忽然在你的脑海里响起。你很疑惑门后究竟藏着什么，所以你打算……
E: "Don't open the door!" You have no idea why, but this voice suddenly rings out in your head. You can't help but wonder what is hidden behind this door, so you decide to...

C: 比起枯燥地探索完酒店的每一层，还是回到梦中更有趣些。
E: Returning to dreaming would be far more entertaining than merely searching every single floor of the hotel.

C: 啪砰——那是快乐绽放的声响。
E: Pop — this is the sound of happiness.

C: 这屋子的主人想必有许多珍宝要收纳——不然他为何要摆这么多柜子？
E: The master of this house must have kept many valuables — why would he have so many drawers out otherwise?

C: 为庆祝某事而准备的礼物盒，本该属于一场热闹的聚会。
E: A present prepared for the celebration of a certain event. This should have belonged to a fun party.

C: 「您正在呼叫的是，『星辰的时刻』。愿您在机动球大赛中旗开得胜、一车当先。」
E: "You are calling the Moment of Stars. May you emerge victorious in the Roboball Contest."

C: 这扇房门不会再度开启了——它已经封存了太多东西。
E: This door will never be opened again. Too many things are sealed in this room.

C: 「请勿靠近，以防跌落。」
E: "Keep a safe distance to prevent potential falls."

C: 靠近这座喷泉时，你感觉到一阵恍惚。巨大的梦泡仿佛长出了眼睛和双手……
E: When you move near this fountain, you feel a wave of stupor. A giant dream bubble appears to have grown eyes and hands...

C: 「呜呜…还没营业吗，还没营业吗。再不开门的话，我就要哭出来了哦？」
E: "Boohoo... Is the bar still closed? I'm going to cry if it doesn't resume operation."

C: 我个人比较喜欢前者，因为当「美」被精心敲碎时，那种崇高的悲壮总能令人们的灵魂战栗不已。
E: I personally prefer the former. When beauty is carefully shattered, the sublime devastation always leaves people's souls trembling.

C: 是么？看来我该感到庆幸——那些百无一用的礼仪和教养早就在我骨子里生根发芽了。事实上，不，我现在心情很糟。
E: Do I? I should be glad, as those useless manners and etiquette entrenched in me are playing their parts. Honestly speaking, I'm having a bad mood.

C: 不过你是好朋友！你肯定会照顾我的！
E: But you're my good friend! I bet you'll take real good care of me!

C: 就不告诉你。
E: Not telling you.

C: 我想找到这些，我想让真相公之于众。哪怕会将美好全部砸碎，落得满身骂名。
E: When I think of such things, I can't help but want to bring the truth to bear, even if I have to shatter its beauty, to shoulder the scorn of many.

C: 以我对这个宇宙运行规则的理解——塑造「完美」的事物往往需要付出巨大的代价。在匹诺康尼的家族背后，恐怕深藏着某些不为人知的丑恶罪行。
E: According to my understanding of the rules of this universe, the creation of such perfection always requires a hefty price. Lurking in the closets of The Family, I fear there are unknown sinister acts in motion.

C: 我想发掘出那些罪行，然后把真相公之于众。哪怕需要将这虚构的美好全部砸碎，哪怕这会引起很多人的不满。
E: I want to unveil these misdeeds, and present the truth to the public, even if I have to completely shatter this facade of brilliance, even if I invoke the wrath of many.

C: 啊…谢谢您，虽然不多，但如果省吃俭用的话也足够我再多撑几天了。
E: Ah... Thank you. It's not much, but I can hold out for a few more days if I scrimp and save.

C: 这、这么多？！
E: S—So much!?

C: 虽然之前也时不时从博识学会的人手里收购些稀罕的消息作为写作素材，但那群学究死板得很，与您聊天就有意思多了。
E: While I occasionally get some rare bits of detail from the Intelligentsia Guild to use as material, those stuffy researchers really do bore me. It's much more fun to talk to you.

C: 你的手掌紧紧抱住了小熊。比预想得要重一些，但没关系，柔顺的毛发挠得你手心发痒，也让你的心头充满了暖意。你的人生从此又多了一个美妙的时刻。
E: Your palm hugs onto the little cub tightly. It's a little heavier than you expected, but that doesn't matter — its soft fur tickles the palm of your hands while filling your heart up to the brim with warmth. Another beautiful life moment for you.

C: 当今的歌手多数都拥有非常成熟的技巧，这点我承认。但前提是他们踩在了巨人的肩膀上，可以学习的样本比过去要多得多。
E: Singers today mostly rely on very mature techniques, I can admit that. But they are standing on the shoulders of giants, and there are so many mentors to learn from nowadays.

C: 这美妙的一刻只属于她自己，任谁都不该贸然打断。
E: This magical moment belongs to her and her alone, and no one can interrupt it.

C: 一抹笑容重新出现在维塔利脸上，不知有几分真假。
E: A dashing smile appears on Vitali's face once more, though you can't tell if it's honest.

C: 我为训练这些道具花了那么多心血和时间，追求点回报难道有错吗？嗯？
E: To think I have spent so much effort and time to train these props, is it wrong for me to ask for a little reward? Huh?

C: 我是个失败者…就连真正愿意理解我的人都找不到……
E: I'm a failure... I can't even find someone who is willing to hear me out...

C: 可自从来到这里之后，我发现当初的豪言壮语实在太难达到了——他们是人中龙凤，哪怕没有我也能过得很好。反倒是我更需要他们的帮忙。
E: But ever since I've been here, I realized it was too difficult for me to live up to the grandiose promise I made at the beginning — they are the best of the best and can even get by each day without me. Instead, I am the one who needs their help.

C: 我已经在梦境里待了很久了。这里很安全…比现实要安全得多。
E: I've been here for a long time. It's very safe in here... safer than the reality.

C: 夏洛特的脸色黯淡了。但她的眼神中不含悔意，只剩纯净的痛苦。
E: Charlotte's mood darkens. There is no regret in her eyes, only pure pain.

C: 很奇妙的感觉，像是加多了机油，轴承的转动变得顺滑又灵敏……
E: This feels very strange... The bearings are rotating smoothly and flexibly as if I've added too much engine oil...

C: 我不要在这里做一辈子的服务员啊！
E: I won't be working as a waiter here forever!

C: 你蓦然惊醒，而演奏者与被演奏者的美梦还在继续。
E: You awaken abruptly, yet the dream of the pianist and his instruments persists.

C: 呵，吃里扒外的东西！我绝对不会给他们送钱…给你还差不多。
E: Hah, those two-faced fools! I'll never give them any money... I'd much rather give them to you.

C: 我是无业游民。
E: I'm unemployed.

C: 请放心，我从事服务行业也好几年了，会竭力保障您愉快的购物体验。
E: Please be assured, I have been in the service industry for several years. I will do my utmost to ensure that you have a delightful shopping experience.

C: 每周都有艾迪恩代币拿吗？
E: Are there Aideen Tokens to grab every week?

C: 丹西的表情低落下来，欲哭无泪。
E: Dancy's expression suddenly dropped, as if they were about to cry.

C: 那是一种常盘国的先贤们才有的想象力，而在如今的常盘国，早已不复得见了。
E: It is a level of imagination that only the sages of Tokiwa once had, one that has not been seen in Tokiwa for a long time.

C: 常盘国是个自然资源匮乏的国家，我们在公司贸易体系中最重要的出口商品，就是我们的二次元艺术品。
E: Tokiwa is a country of sparse natural resources, and our most valuable export in the IPC trade system is our anime artwork.

C: 摸了也不会变成动漫高手哦～
E: It won't turn you into an anime expert, you know!

C: 看来你听到了我的自言自语，真是羞愧。
E: I see you've overheard me talking to myself. How embarrassing.

C: 演奏者继续忘我地弹奏着、哼唱着，并未发现某位萍水相逢的观众已悄然离去。
E: The pianist continues to play and hum, oblivious to the fact that his audience has quietly left.

C: 只需通过「梦境护照」提交申请，我们就会为您妥善处理好一切。
E: Simply submit a request using your Dreamscape Pass, and we will handle everything for you.

C: 如果您有任何想要了解的问题，随时都可以向我咨询。
E: If you have any questions, please feel free to ask me.

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：丹恒的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Dan Heng's dream.

C: 待会儿，你看清楚这个人。
E: Watch this person carefully.
...Hmm?

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 我的表盘只为你而转动，我的引擎只因你而轰鸣。排气管里释放的都是我对你的爱意，后视镜里映照出的是铭刻在我心中的、你最美的模样。
E: My speedometer moves and my engine roars only for you. What comes out of the exhaust fume is my love for you, and I'll always remember the reflection of your beautiful face in my rearview mirror.

C: 麻烦把车灯打开。谢谢。
E: Please switch on the lights. Thank you.

C: 显而易见，我是只折纸小鸟，你可以叫我「湛蓝爵士」。
E: Obviously, I'm an origami bird. You can call me Dr. Blues.

C: 我知道了。
E: Got it.

C: 来自内心的声音告诉你——这扇门的背后一定隐藏着什么不得了的秘密。
E: Your intuition tells you there must be an incredible secret hidden behind this door.

C: 有人说，这是家族放任导致的乱象——因为我们不能对来宾做出过分的惩罚，最多也只是禁止他们再度入梦。
E: Some say that this madness was caused by The Family's neglect, but we can't mete punishment that is too severe on the guests — the worst we can do is to prevent them from entering the dreams again.

C: 是啊，苜蓿草家的人告诉我，只要成为「家人」，就能接触到真正的钟表小子的秘密。
E: Yeah, the Alfalfas told me that I'd get to know the real Clockie's secret if I became a Family member.

C: 算事业啊，我正巧认识个仙舟来的狐人，算得可准了，就是收费有点贵……
E: For my job. I coincidentally ran into a foxian from Xianzhou, and she's the real deal. Just that her fee is a bit dear...

C: …或许，我该向家族寻求一些帮助……
E: ...Perhaps, I should seek help from The Family...

C: 我曾经最大的梦想就是为他搭建一座专属的学术舞台，然后看他如何在那台上绽放光芒、折服众生……
E: Once upon a time, my greatest aspiration was to create an academic platform only for him, where he could shine and impress everyone with his wisdom...

C: 是动力炉短路了吗？我感觉战甲内的温度正在上升……
E: Is my power furnace short-circuited? I can feel the temperature within my armor rising...

C: 哦哦哦！听起来就不简单——所以那究竟是什么，能给我讲讲吗？
E: Ooh! That sounds complicated! So, what does that mean? Can you tell me more?

C: 哈努兄弟，我最可靠的伙伴，我永远能放心地将背后交给他，滴答！
E: Brother Hanu is my most reliable companion. I can always relax with him watching my back, tick-tock!

C: 还有音符小姐、镜子公主、木头老爷、仓鼠球骑士…相信我，朋友！你也会像我一样喜欢他们的，滴答！
E: Then there is Miss Note, Mirror Princess, Old Man Wood, Hamster Ball Knight... Trust me, my friend! I know you'll love them all just like I do, tick-tock!

C: 疲惫的男人再次陷入沉默，表情匮乏，目光涣散。
E: The exhausted man falls silent again, his expression empty and his eyes unfocused.

C: 非常好匹诺康尼。
E: Penacony's great.

C: 又为什么…我明明背得那么出色，最后还是没能挽救我的家庭呢？
E: And why... Even though I learned them so well, was I not able to save my family?

C: …关于未来。
E: ...About the future.

C: 苜蓿草的拉契卡是公司传统项目部的贪污犯，隐夜鸫的图尔度是个让公司蒙受巨额损失的疯人学者——你觉得不够史诗？那就对了，因为历史本就是由无数小人物编织而成的。
E: Lakkika of the Alfalfa Family was an embezzler working in the IPC Traditional Project Department and Tordu of the Nightingale Family was an insane scholar that caused the IPC crushing financial losses... Are those stories not epic enough for you? Good, because history is simply created through the actions of countless, unremarkable people.

C: 知更鸟演出时的宣传海报，出于某种纪念意义而被收藏于此。
E: Robin's promotional posters. They've been collected here as some sort of keepsake.

C: 原来是您。调饮辛苦了！按照您的意思，我正站在酒吧入口处看门呢。
E: Oh, it's you! Thanks for your hard work mixing drinks! As you suggested, I'm standing by the door and keeping an eye out.

C: 原因出在你身上吧？
E: That's more of an issue on your end, isn't it?

C: 我的心已被她夺走，即使给我调制那种特殊的饮料，即使你拿出安抚那群怪物的手段，也动摇不了我的信念！
E: She has stolen my heart, no specially mixed drink or secret monster-calming technique will shake my faith in love!

C: 它看起来很喜欢这个地方。
E: It seems to be fond of this place.

C: 这么想来，我生活的地方其实是梦境，现实只是维持生命的餐厅而已。
E: Now that I think of it, I pretty much live my life in the Dreamscape. Reality is just a restaurant where I eat to keep my body alive.

C: 倘若你仍想继续我们的战局，明日我依旧恭候于此。
E: If you wish to continue our battle, I will be waiting for you here tomorrow.

C: 你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 家族在银河各地的分家都会不定期举行类似的仪式，规模也各不相同。据我所知，匹诺康尼的谐乐大典应该是各大分家里最隆重的，因此一纪里只会举办一次。
E: The Family holds similar ceremonies of differing sizes every now and then across the various branches spread throughout the Cosmos. As far as I know, Penacony's Charmony Festival is the most prestigious of The Family's, and so it's only staged once every Amber Era.

C: 想想爱墨瑞得-Ⅲ，想想咱们的主推！想想大卫，想想戴夫，想想席德，想想博纳姆！
E: Think of Emerald-III, and think of all our top picks! Think of David, think of Daeve, think of Sid, and think of Bonham!

C: 咦…真的吗？
E: Huh... really?

C: 你这{F#披头散发}{M#蓬头垢面}的像什么话，赶紧去后台找妆造收拾收拾！别花太久，要是赶不上下轮开镜的时间，就别想领工钱了！
E: You {F#ugly duckling}{M#slobby wretch}, get backstage and find a make-up artist right now! And hurry up about it: If you're not back before the next scene, you can kiss your wages goodbye!

C: 只不过呢…我进梦境的方式有点特殊。你们宾客都是通过酒店入梦的吧，但我不一样，借助的是塔利亚的一种自制装置，原理讲不太清。
E: Although... I entered the Dreamscape a little differently than most people do. Guests like you came in through the hotel, right? I didn't. I used a custom Talian device. I can't really explain how it works.

C: 在黄金的时刻呆久了，看流梦礁的垃圾桶都觉得眉清目秀…真的，我没开玩笑。
E: After spending all that time in the Golden Hour, even the trashcans of the Dreamflux Reef start to look beautiful... No, I'm being serious.

C: 嘿，{M#好小子}{F#好姑娘}，现在才察觉到吗？
E: Hey, {M#smart boy}{F#smart girl}, have you only just noticed?

C: 没有响个不停的喇叭，没有闪来闪去的灯光，也没有会走路的广告牌过来烦你。
E: There are no horns blaring constantly, no flashing lights, and no walking billboards to hassle you.

C: 你为什么留在流梦礁？
E: Why have you decided to stay in the Dreamflux Reef?

C: …说起来，曾经有个皮皮西人也对种田表示过好奇，还兴高采烈地让我带他去参观。
E: ...That reminds me, there was a Pepeshi person who was very curious about farming before, too. He even excitedly asked me to show him around the field.

C: 结果第二年挖开一看，别说长出钞票来，连原本那些钞票都不翼而飞了。
E: In the end, when he came to dig it up the next year, not only were there no banknotes to harvest... Even the ones he originally planted had vanished without a trace.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 我完成了自己的课题，关于忆质的论文也马上要出版了。
E: I have completed my research, and my paper on memoria is also about to be published.

C: 流梦礁得救了，但有些老朋友终究还是不在了……
E: The Dreamflux Reef may be saved, but some of my old friends are no longer around...

C: 最初我也不赞同这种做法，用幼稚的故事来替代严肃的历史记录，有悖我们学派的原则。可「钟表匠」用他的动画说服了我。
E: At first, I didn't agree with this approach either. Replacing important historical records with childish stories goes against the principles of our school. But the Watchmaker's animation convinced me.

C: 您可以待会看看菜单，不急着选~
E: Check out the menu whenever you're ready. No rush~

C: 以前流梦礁人多的时候，每天这里都排着长队，等着热腾腾的面包出炉。
E: Back when there were more people around the Dreamflux Reef, this place would have a long queue out the door every day waiting for fresh hot bread to come out of the oven.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 关于清醒村…
E: About Rouseville...

C: 啾！多亏有客官您在，总算把这些小捣蛋鬼给找回来了啾。
E: Tweet! It's all thanks to you that these mischievous little troublemakers were finally found, tweet.

C: 这个嘛…我们将以苏乐达的饮料业务为核心，向餐饮、潮流服饰、旅游、房地产等多个方面拓展我们的业务。
E: Well... With the SoulGlad beverage as our core business, we intend to expand our portfolio into food and beverages, fashion, travel, real estate, and other verticals.

C: 有什么给年轻人的建议吗？
E: Do you have any advice for the younger generation?

C: 哎呀~好问题！是个很有深度的问题！
E: Ooh good question! A very profound one!

C: 虽然无机生命能感受有机生命的情绪、能从生物学上理解有机生命取悦自己的方式，但我们能真正理解与自己构造完全不同的物种是何等感受吗？
E: Inorganic life can feel the emotions of organic life, and can understand how they derive pleasure from a biological standpoint, but can we truly understand the sort of emotions felt by a species whose structural make is entirely different from ours?

C: 米哈伊尔…我的父亲并不完美。但他的一生都在燃烧，发亮。
E: Mikhail... My father was not perfect, but he burned bright his entire life.

C: 不错，不过——听过他名字的人很多，了解他的人却很少。
E: That's right, but while many have heard his name, few truly know him.

C: 「钟表匠」的小把戏对我这个级别的家徒并不好用。如果你想了解我，可以不必采取这种方式。
E: The Watchmaker's paltry tricks are no match for a Family member of my level. You don't have to resort to such antics if you want to learn about me.

C: 你转过头，正对上金属面庞上一双难以分辨的眼睛。
E: You look back and stare straight into a pair of inscrutable eyes sitting upon a metallic face.

C: 你很出名吗？
E: Are you famous?

C: 抱歉，诸位，我还有些工作要处理。
E: Apologies, there are some things that I need to take care of at present.

C: 但有那么一个家伙，我倒是今天回想起来，都还，都还……
E: But I've just remembered today that there is one fellow, one singular guy...

C: 只要孩童们看到花朵仍然能展露出那样的笑容，这个世界无论变成什么样子，都还值得拯救，并且…有「希望」拯救。
E: As long as children are still able to smile upon seeing the flowers, it would mean that regardless of how this world changes, it is still worth saving... and there is "hope" of it being saved.

C: 我早就说过，预测未来的诀窍不在于准确……
E: I've said it before: The trick to predicting the future isn't accuracy.

C: 在那个永远被笼罩在黑夜的星球上，远古的英雄正是踩着这种荧光组成的道路，看清猛兽的獠牙，为人们取回安宁。
E: On that planet shrouded in eternal dark, heroes of yore walked the paths created by these fluorescent lights to clearly see the fangs of ferocious beats and win back peace for their people.

C: 牛肉味，嘎嘣脆，蛋白质是鸡肉的六倍！
E: "It has a beef-like flavor, a crunchy texture, and a protein content six times higher than that of chicken!"

C: 又或者…借这个直播带货做代购？「十四星特产连珠大礼包」？不行不行…还是得再好好想想……
E: Or how about starting a live commerce channel with this stream? Maybe I can sell a "Ginormous <unbreak>14</unbreak>-Planet Specialty Deluxe Pack"? No, that doesn't quite hit the mark. I'll have to think harder...

C: 等我把托马斯的钱搞到手，我就要让他们知道…轻视我艾丽卡，就是他们此生犯过最大的错！
E: Just wait until I get Thomas's money! I'll have them learn that underestimating me, Erica, will be the gravest error they've ever made!

C: 萨曼莎啊萨曼莎，你是个成熟的投资人了，你要学会接受，并不是每一次投资都能得到回报……
E: Oh Samantha, as savvy an investor as you are, you must come to accept that not all investments yield returns...

C: 我还以为上空艇来的都是有头有脸的大人物，没想到这种骗子也能混进去！真不知道家族是怎么做事的，居然放这种人进来！
E: I assumed everyone on the airship were reputable big shots. Never expected scammers to worm their way in! How did the Family even allow such people aboard!

C: 虽然有几个乖孩子一直待在人家身边，但其他小家伙一上船就跑得不见影子了啾……
E: Although some of the more obedient ones stayed by my side, the others disappeared without a trace as soon as they boarded the ship, tweet...

C: 您想来几瓶苏乐达吗，汪？或者，您还有什么需要帮忙的地方吗，汪？
E: Would you like a few bottles of SoulGlad, woof? Or is there anything else I can help you with, woof?

C: …吸气…吐气…冷静点，现在是上班时间…微笑，清嗓子…好，我果然受过专业训练的优秀售货员！
E: ...Breathe in, and out... Calm down, I'm at work now. *smile* Ahem. Alright, I'm a professionally-trained and outstanding salesperson!

C: …是我的疏忽，都怪我。
E: ...I was careless. It's my fault.

C: 我学调饮学了半年，师傅说我可以出师了，我想我的技术其实也没那么糟糕的。虽然学的时间比较短，但我多少有些基础……
E: I've trained for half a year before my mentor said I'm ready to work on my own. I guess I can craft drinks? I may not have trained for long, but I do know the basics...

C: 怎么就突然转行了？
E: Why the sudden job switch?

C: 嗯？你这说话的语气怎么这么像我老板？
E: Hmm? Why do you sound like my boss all of a sudden?

C: 住客们有什么反馈吗？
E: Any feedback from the guests?

C: 我认为，一味地追求利益是不行的，所以我更注重对大家的人文关怀。可惜，很多人都不信任我这一套理念，认为智械不懂人类。
E: I am of the opinion that a blind pursuit of profits will never work out, which explains why I prefer a humanistic management. It's a shame many remain unconvinced by my philosophy, adamant that Intellitrons do not understand humans.

C: 好了，没你们的事了，你们继续待命，我和船长有话要说。
E: Alright, run along to your stations now. I have to speak to the captain about something.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 好的，船长。如果您暂时没有其他问题，我就先回去继续工作了。
E: Alright, captain. If there's nothing else for now, I'll get back to work.

C: 剩下2%呢？
E: What about the remaining 2%?

C: 初次见面，星穹列车的开拓者，侍者亚梅塞菈为您服务。
E: Nice to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express. Attendant Amsella at your service.

C: 我很遗憾…
E: I'm really sorry...

C: 啊哈，又到球笼赛季了吗！这问题，你该去问年轻人，我这一把年纪，眼珠子早就跟不上球笼跑的速度咯，哈哈哈哈。
E: Aha, is it the Spheroid race season already? You should probably ask the youngsters this question. At this age, my eyes can no longer keep up with the speed of the Spheroids. Hahahaha!

C: 哈哈哈，没想到在你眼里我那么高尚。你看，只要会扯淡，我这种贪图享乐的学生也能化身大慈爱家，全看你怎么解读了。
E: Hahaha, I didn't expect you to think so highly of me. See? With the right spin, even a playboy like me can come off as a big philosopher. It's all about how you look at it!

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 再说这个绒球有什么特别吗，就因为长在皮皮西人的头上，才让你这么感兴趣？
E: What is so special about this fluff ball anyway? Is it just the fact that they grow on our heads makes you so obsessed with them?

C: 这一次，我们会代表各自学院的荣誉而战——我绝对不会输给他！
E: This time, we will battle for the honor of our respective academies... I will not lose to him!

C: 所以我从小就定下目标——要为家乡的人们建造足够多坚固的房屋，供所有人安身。
E: So, I set myself an objective at a young age... I would construct enough strong and sturdy buildings in my hometown to give everyone a place to live.

C: 虽然官方发出声明，说是鸢尾花家系在测试什么「拟梦技术」时发生了机械事故，但这种说辞也就能骗骗傻子。
E: Although the official statement was that the Iris Family were testing some kind of DreamSim Tech and there was some kind of mechanical malfunction, only simpletons would fall for an excuse like that.

C: 答应我，如果遇到了和「锈墨」电台有关的事情，一定要及时离得远远的，好吗？
E: Promise me, if you come across anything related to Rusty Ink Radio Station, you stay well away, okay?

C: 而且，比起自己登台演出，我还是更喜欢看前辈们的表演…没办法，他们实在太有魅力了，一举一动都是节目效果。
E: Plus, I prefer to watch my seniors perform than to take to the stage myself... I can't help it. They're too talented. Their every move just screams entertainment.

C: 商业化？原来只是个笑话！
E: Commercialization? So it's just a joke!

C: 可笑，他们口口声声说梦想，到头来，不还是向生存低了头？一旦触及利益，什么理想不理想的，哪里有植入广告带来的收成香！
E: What a joke. They constantly speak of dreams, yet in the end, they still bow in order to survive. Once profit is involved, who cares about dreams and ideals? The smell of money from ads is what matters most!

C: 乱破忍首向学院代表保证过，会接纳我为演出乐队的正式成员，但我更想从头开始，从召集成员、创作乐曲、打造属于自己的风格开始。
E: Head Ninja Rappa promised the academy representatives that I would be included as an official member of the performing band, but I'd rather start all over — recruitment, composition, and creating my own unique style.

C: 无需任何质疑，以绩点为评判依据才是最公平有效的考核方式。
E: There is no debate. Using grades as the basis of evaluation is the fairest and most effective assessment method.

C: 梦境才是匹诺康尼的根基，没有稳固的建筑，所有财富都是空谈！
E: The dreamscapes are Penacony's foundation. Without structural stability, all the wealth in the world is nothing but empty talk!

C: 行。音乐派对还没有结束，去找点好玩的吧。
E: Sure. The music party hasn't ended. Go find somewhere fun.

C: 不记得了。
E: Not at all.

C: 拿什么谢我？
E: What are you gonna thank me with?

C: 我吃吃吃吃！
E: Yes yes yes!

C: 什么留言？有什么要求吗？
E: What message? Are there requirements?

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 唉，如果我放弃学业，不知道大家会怎么想……
E: *sigh* If I abandon my studies, I wonder what everyone will think of me...

C: 我想喝点饮料。
E: I would like a drink.

C: 即使「秩序」的力量已然不复，但若有什么意外…我还是会倾力相助。
E: Even without the power of the Order, I will do my utmost to lend a hand if needed.

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 呵呵。虽说有所涉猎，但我可称不上通晓占卜，也不认为存在确信的未来。
E: Hehe, while I do have some knowledge of divination, I'm no expert, and I don't really believe in a predetermined future.

C: 「滴答，还在等什么，全新瓶装限量苏乐达，等你来享受。」
E: "Tick-tock, tick-tock. What are you waiting for? The all-new, limited edition SoulGlad bottle is waiting for you."

C: 你伫立在船头，眺望着远方，你能感受到风的流动，想象着自己在云层间自由飞翔…直到狂风吹乱了你灰色的发丝，幻想戛然而止。
E: You stand motionless at the ship's bow, gazing toward the distance, feeling the flow of wind, and imagine yourself soaring freely through the covers of clouds... until a fierce billow messes up your gray hair, snapping you out of your daydream.

C: 其实，不知从何时起，烧毁树心的想法犹如定做的礼服，穿在你身上特别合体，仿佛你一生下来就立志要干这件事——下次干坏事要趁早。
E: Actually, at some point, the idea of burning the tree core became like a tailor-made suit that fits you perfectly. It's as if you were born destined to do this. Next time you want to cause trouble, better do it early.

C: 怎么了，宝贝？
E: What's up, darling?

C: 它会把你带到远方…
E: It'll take you far, far away...

C: 那给我来个不贵的。
E: Got anything cheap?

C: 大奖！
E: The big prize!

C: 好酷的车，是新款吧？
E: What a cool car! It's a new model, right?

C: 反正也买不起…
E: Ah, I can't afford it anyway...

C: 那请你去奥帝购物中心逛吧，这里可不是寻找真相的地方。
E: Then please go do that at Oti Mall. This is not the place where you'll find the truth.

C: 现实酒店的房间按天收费。咱们有点积蓄，还能待一段时间…但那些穷游的家伙，就得分秒必争了。
E: Rooms in the hotel in reality are charged daily. We have some savings and can stay here for some time... but those poor travelers will have to seize every moment.

C: 现实已经很累了，来到梦里不就是为了放松嘛。
E: Reality is exhausting. Coming to the Dreamscape is all about getting relaxed, right?

C: 我之前是不是提醒过你？！你说，我是不跟你强调好几回了……
E: Didn't I warn you before? I've told you several times...

C: 这里不错，适合歇息。
E: This is a good place for a rest.

C: 这下绝对值回票价了。
E: The ticket's worth the price.

C: 简直是神之演技…
E: That acting performance's just divine...

C: 我这次运气不错，押的那个一脸主角相的球棒侠，明年的工资都赢回来了。
E: I got pretty lucky this time, bet on that baseballer with that protagonist vibe and won enough to make next year's salary.

C: 怎么还有我的事？等等，我好像猜到你接下来要说什么了。
E: Why am I still involved? Hang on, I think I can guess what you're about to say.

C: 我们的新电影也将在近期上映，请大家多多支持。
E: Our new movie is going to be screened soon, and we hope everyone will support it.

C: 看看公司怎么对待那个无名客呗，我们跟着做就好啦。跟着公司的步调走，总能捡口汤喝。
E: Let's see how IPC treats that Nameless, and we'll just follow suit. I'm sure there'll be scraps left for us if we just follow the IPC's trail.

C: 谐乐大典的开幕典礼改到咱们这里办了，特殊时期，大家都注意点，别闹出什么笑话了。
E: The Charmony Festival's opening ceremony has been reassigned to be held at this place. These are special times, so pay attention and don't make a fool of yourselves.

C: 这个…我知道了，我待会儿就回去改下开幕流程的草案。之后麻烦二位再确认下。
E: I... Understood. I will go back shortly to revise the draft for the opening ceremony process. I would trouble the both of you to re-confirm the rest of the details.

C: 你们动动脑子行吗……
E: Can you guys use your brains just a little...

C: 醒醒，你就是在做梦。
E: Wake up. You're dreaming.

C: 老头子那么抠门…
E: That old man's so stingy...

C: 都是投诉那家伙的吧……
E: It's all for that person I'm guessing...

C: 物是人非…
E: Things aren't what they used to be...

C: 还有遗漏的「按钮」吗？
E: There are still missing "buttons"?

C: 我们保证不会再有这种事发生。
E: We guarantee that such an incident will never happen again.

C: 你好~可以请你讲讲对折纸大学的看法吗？
E: Hello! Can you tell us more about what you think about Paperfold University?

C: ——可喜可贺，可喜可贺。
E: ...Sincere congratulations.

C: 没错，参加社团活动是为了放松，而不是非得要在大赛上获得金奖，你很清楚自己并非是以音乐为终身志向的人，享受生活才是你所需要的。
E: That's right. Club activities gotta be chill, not to join some major competition for some shiny award. You are certain you aren't someone whose lifelong ambition is in music — enjoying life is what you really need.

C: 没错，所以继续想象吧，你想要组建一个什么样的「{NICKNAME}社」呢？
E: That's right. So, keep going. What sort of {NICKNAME} club do you want to form?

C: 小鸟，你可以唱歌。
E: No, you can keep singing.

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 它哪里会玩电脑啊！
E: As if it could play on the computer!

C: 要研究奇美拉砂盆吗……
E: Studying chimera litter trays...

C: 等一下，这也太胡闹了吧！
E: Wait a sec. This is getting too whimsical!

C: 差不多这个感觉，简单来说…他认为我们是瑟希斯的信徒，不应该……
E: Well, something like that. Simply put... he thinks that we as followers of Cerces should not...

C: 粗制葡萄秘酿。
E: Crude Grape Brew.

C: 咦？刚才还看到灰宝在这里的，结果只是一只小奇美拉？
E: Hmm? I just saw Grayie standing here, but now, it's just a little chimera?

C: 可是你到底能做什么准备呢？提前通知昏光庭院的人准备好医疗措施、或者提前通知{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}信仰的朋友来帮忙……
E: But what can you do to get ready? Should you inform the people in Twilight Courtyard to get ready with medical measures, or perhaps notify a friend who follows {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} for help...

C: 数量不多，买点小零食吧。
E: It won't be much, but maybe enough for some snacks.

C: 必然见到久未见面的老朋友。
E: Meeting with an old friend one hasn't seen in a while is on the table.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 当然没问题，如果有什么想吃的，你可以直接尝尝。
E: Sure thing. Feel free to sample anything that catches your eye.

C: 不过，没礼貌的家伙——这是私人住宅，风能进、雨能进，唯独没有被邀请的国王不能进。懂？
E: However, this is my private domain, impolite one. Rain, wind, and sunshine are guests embraced, but not uninvited kings. You understand?

C: （打断他）
E: (Interrupt him.)

C: 「阿卡索斯的祭典携来繁华飨宴，游行者载歌载舞，纵情须狂欢。」
E: "Icatus' celebrations, a blaze of delight. Parades of song, dance, feasting in the night."

C: 不如说，如果您不介意，我希望多跟您聊聊，听您讲讲城外的故事。
E: Rather, if you don't mind, I would hope to converse further with you, and listen to your tales outside the city.

C: 没事，不打扰你了。
E: No worries, I won't bother you then.

C: 很抱歉，客人，上次那件已经是我们最后的存货了，到货时我会再通知您。
E: Truly sorry, good guest. That was the last of our available inventory. I will inform you when the new stock arrives.

C: 勒法刻？不是刻法勒？
E: Lephake? Not Kephale?

C: 你穿行街巷、流连市井；却又与半神比肩、与英雄同行
E: You traverse the streets and bustle the crowds, yet stand shoulder to shoulder with demigods and heroes

C: 啊，是说*我们*和缇安、缇宁之间的心灵感应吗？
E: Oh, you mean the telepathy shared by Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon?

C: 哀地里亚是一座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦，居民们视死如归——与悬锋人的渴望战死不同…他们将死亡作为生的幸福归宿。
E: Aidonia is a city that worships Thanatos. Its residents regard death as their destined end... Unlike the Kremnoans longing to die in battle, the Aidonians see death as the blessed final destination for life.

C: 好的，再见，下次有机会再一起聊聊天吧。
E: Okay, farewell. Let's talk again when we get a chance.

C: 也许你需要看看医生？
E: Maybe you need to see a doctor?

C: 这也太敷衍了吧。
E: That was really phoning it in.

C: 妇人不紧不慢地从怀中掏出一架小天秤托在手中。她将那枚硬币置于一侧托盘上，又随手从衣襟中出翻出几枚利衡币，放在另一侧托盘上。
E: The old lady slowly pulls out a set of scales from her outfit and holds it in her hands. She places the coin on one side, then fishes out some Balance Coins from inside her sleeves to place on the other.
Wh—What?

C: 目前我正在进行一项课题研究，旨在探讨法吉娜祝福的泉水对植物生长与发育的具体影响。
E: I'm currently conducting a research project into the precise effects of fountain water that has been blessed by Phagousa on plant development and growth.

C: 当你们的宴会落幕…清醒后所见的荒唐，便是买醉的代价……
E: When your banquet ends... the absurdity that you will see when you sober up will be the price of buying inebriation...

C: 话归正题吧。今日相逢，亦可说是命运的安排，我特意提前推去了其它居民的邀约。若阁下有兴趣，我们可以再多聊几句。
E: Let's get back on topic. Our meeting today could be fate's design. I even specifically declined invitations from the other residents beforehand. We can chat a bit more if you are interested.

C: 同为雅努萨波利斯的圣女，缇宝大人做出了与我相反的选择。
E: As a Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, Lady Tribbie made a choice contrary to mine.

C: 你拿出相机，拍了一张酷炫的艺术照，这大块头全程没动一下。
E: You pull out your camera and take a cool artistic shot, yet the big guy doesn't move an inch.

C: 太好了，外人只知道恭维我，那些话我都腻了，正发愁找不到知音呢。
E: That's wonderful! I often get compliments from others, but frankly, they've grown stale. I've been longing to find someone who gets it.

C: 它们吃得出区别吗？
E: Can they actually tell the difference?

C: 嘿嘿，还真有点不好意思，记得常来找我们玩啊，勇士阁下！
E: Heh, I'm embarrassed. Make sure to swing by and hang out with us again soon, great warrior!

C: 前些日子他们小队出城探索新区域，好巧不巧遇着了黑潮，死伤那叫一个惨重。后来好不容易逃出生天，想要收拾收拾回城的时候，却发现物资出了问题。
E: A while ago, their squad went out to explore a new area. By sheer bad luck, they ran into the black tide, and the casualties were severe. After barely managing to escape with their lives, they tried to gather themselves and head back to the city, only to find that there was an issue with their supplies.

C: 这就要走了吗？唉，我还没聊够呢……
E: Leaving already? But we haven't talked enough yet...

C: 老师你可真是个好家伙。穿搭的风格也很独特，一看就是喜欢打破规则的人。
E: Master, you're such a great person. Your sense of dressing style is so unique — clearly someone who enjoys breaking the rules.

C: 吃饱了不会发困吗？
E: Aren't you tired after eating?

C: 可惜，卡弥特斯在很久以前就消失了，连同那些珍贵的、早已失传的技艺。这座风琴摆在这许久了，始终未能找到称职的演奏者。
E: Alas, Carmitis disappeared a long time ago, along with those precious arts long lost to time. This water lyre has been here for a long time, unable to secure a worthy musician to play it.

C: 真的假的？那你快去试试啊。
E: For real? Go try it out.

C: 虽然闲聊不是我的工作，但为勇士提供精神食粮是——说吧。
E: Banter isn't part of my job, but providing spiritual food for warriors is. What'd you need?

C: 不是，没兴趣。
E: Nah, not interested.

C: 哈哈，已经赢过了。
E: Haha, I've won before.

C: 上战场？我为什么要做那种事，主动加班？加班费谁来付？
E: The battlefield? Why would I do something like that? Volunteering for overtime? Who's paying for that?

C: 这份工作怎么样？
E: What's this job like?

C: 没有人知道门后究竟隐藏着什么。但看来，雅努斯愿意赐福于你。
E: Nobody knows what lies beyond that gate, but it looks as though Janus is willing to bless you.

C: 给它一个大大的拥抱！
E: Give it a big hug!

C: 「听科员们说，你跟着列车在外面冒险，闯出不少名堂来。哎，外面很危险吧，注意安全啊。实在不行就回来，老太婆这点薄面还是有几分用的……」
E: "I've heard from the researchers that you've been making quite a splash on your adventures with the Express. It sounds pretty wild out there, so please take care. And remember, if it ever becomes too much, you can always come back. I still have enough influence to help you out here..."

C: 维修工程师。
E: Maintenance Engineer.

C: 这是我抓拍的…希望你别太介意。
E: This is one of my snapshots... hope you're okay with it.

C: 我这么说吧，许多现在全宇宙公认的真理，在几个琥珀纪之前都是伪科学。
E: Let me put it this way, many truths now universally acknowledged across the universe were considered pseudoscience just a few Amber Eras ago.

C: 塔米拉怎么不在这儿了？
E: Why isn't Tamila here?

C: 小女子恨不得照顾塔米拉小姐一辈子，这样才能表达出小女子对她的感谢呢。你这问题问得到倒像是小女子和塔米拉小姐有仇，这也太奇怪了吧？
E: I'd gladly stick by her side for life if it meant showing her how grateful I am. Honestly, the way you put it makes it sound like I have something against her, which is just ridiculous.

C: 年轻人…人生就是一场朝圣，你只要无愧于自己的信仰就好。
E: Youngster... Life is a pilgrimage. You need only be devout to your beliefs.

C: 你怎么又在忽悠人？
E: How are you still swindling people like this?

C: …呃…几个月前，家父曾来此求取过一则神谕。但自此以后，他开始变得郁郁寡欢起来，甚至时常整日闭门不出。
E: ...Agh... My father came to this place seeking a prophecy a few months ago. However, he has grown more and more depressed since that day. Now, he spends most of his days locked inside the house.

C: 雅努斯是个怎样的泰坦？
E: What kind of Titan is Janus?

C: 前代圣女尤为我行我素，还干过把贡品送给平民吃的事情，真是渎职。
E: The previous Holy Maiden was particularly insistent on doing things her way. She even gave Titan food offerings to the citizens! It was a complete misuse of power.

C: 好，聊什么都可以，没想到还有人愿意听老婆子我唠叨。
E: Sure, we can chat about anything. It's not often someone's interested in an old lady's ramblings.

C: 聊聊安德烈亚斯。
E: Tell me about Andreas.

C: 哦哦，活泼顽皮的圣女！即便受到命运眷顾，仍旧保留着心中那份纯真，多么难能可贵啊！
E: Oh, a lively and spirited Holy Maiden! Even with destiny's favor, she still retains her innocence. How rare and precious!

C: 纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？
E: Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?

C: 难道他是黑潮的化身？又或是某位泰坦的孑遗？若非万敌及时继承了「纷争」的神力，那牛皮藓似的家伙怕是要再追杀你们一阵。
E: Could it be an embodiment of the black tide? Or perhaps the remnant of some Titan? If not for Mydei inheriting the divinity of "Strife" in time, that persistent foe might have kept pursuing you.

C: 肯定有很多人羡慕你的工作。
E: There must be plenty of people who envy your position.

C: 肯定会有的吧，人们总是对不了解的工作有所向往。
E: Probably. People always admire what they don't really understand.

C: 大部分人临死时都不会有精辟的妙语，更别说精彩的故事、历史的洞见，或者是弥留的温情…更多的人对死亡毫无准备，也不会有像样的遗言。
E: Most humans don't have an elaborate phrase to go with their demise, let alone exciting stories, insights into history, or affectionate farewells... The majority are completely unprepared for death, hence the lack of proper last words.

C: 在这黎明云崖，我许久未见过一位如此值得帮助的民众了。身为贵族，空揽头衔却不履行义务，实在有失风度。而今日，你让我的家名璨璨生辉，我必须向你表达感谢。
E: Here at Dawncloud, I've not seen a citizen so worthy of assistance in a long while. As a noble, it is unbecoming of me to possess the title yet neglect my duties. Today, you've restored honor to my family name again, and for that, I must thank you.

C: 不像某些人，自诩智慧却连最基本的礼数都不懂。哼，真该让他们尝尝亵渎神明的代价。
E: Unlike some, who flaunt their wisdom yet lack the most basic etiquette. Hmph, they ought to learn the consequences of blasphemy.

C: 黑潮不过是对信徒的考验。越是危难时刻，越要坚守信仰。否则和那些无知的庸人有何区别？！
E: The black tide is but a test for the faithful. The more dire the times, the more steadfast in our faith we must be. Otherwise, how are we any different from the ignorant masses?

C: 在黎明云崖，唯一能称得上朝圣之路的，就是泰坦断崖的那条长阶了吧。
E: In Dawncloud Cliff, the only path that can be called a pilgrim's path is the long staircase at the Titan Cliff.

C: 你已经拿到石板了，贵客，希望你不是来消遣我的。
E: You've already obtained the stone slab, honored guest. I hope you're not here to waste my time.

C: 衣匠不语，只是站在原地——也许它想假装没有听见，又或是同样对眼下的情况感到困惑。
E: The garmentmaker remains silent, just standing there, perhaps pretending not to hear, or equally confused by the situation.

C: 我尽力回答…如果我还能记得答案的话。
E: I'll do my best to answer... if I can still remember the answers.

C: 如果就这么迎来「再创世」…
E: If the "Era Nova" arrives under these circumstances...

C: 诸神寂灭，人之赞歌理应唱响\n黑潮肆虐，希望之舟正待启航
E: The gods are silent, but the song of humanity must still rise.\nAmidst the ravages of black tide, the ship of hope is ready to set sail.

C: 你觉得马尔库斯怎么样？
E: What do you think of Marcus?

C: 现在你怎么看待「再创世」？
E: What do you think of the "Era Nova" now?

C: 那些思考、欲念和行动——我们所谓灵魂的东西，只不过是诸多可能性中被规定好的一种。
E: Thoughts, desires, actions — what we call "soul" is but predetermined permutations of possibilities.

C: 如果你被规定好永远只能思考着这些无稽的念头，未免也太可怜了。假使灵魂不存在，你口中的可能性又是由谁来规定的呢？是谁为你选择了命运？
E: How pitiful if you're fated to entertain such absurd notions! If souls don't exist, who dictates these possibilities? Who chooses our fates?

C: 我们一定能拥有更好的世界、过上更好的生活吗？未必。
E: Are we guaranteed a better world and improved lives? Not necessarily.

C: 我们本以为，随着艾格勒的陨落，天空的神力会猝然失效，取而代之的是冥河的召唤。
E: We assumed that when Aquila fell, the sky's divinity would instantly fade, replaced by the calling of the River of Souls.

C: 不过，多亏了阁下的援手，现在安全区的范围有所扩大，我们也能得到更多喘息的空间。翁法罗斯迎来新生前，一切还是不能大意。
E: However, thanks to your help, the safe zones have expanded somewhat, giving us more breathing room. Still, we mustn't lower our guard until Amphoreus is reborn.

C: 有什么需要帮忙的吗？
E: Is there anything I can help with?

C: 哎，英雄阁下，我问你——到了新世界，你有什么想做的？
E: Hey, hero, I have a question for you — what do you plan to do in the new world?

C: 嗯…有位织者想要让世人品尝甜美。金丝带来消息，它正把自己伪装成一块喂食大地兽的红土，你可以在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽工坊</color>附近找到它。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes for all lives to experience a touch of sweetness. The golden thread brings tidings: They now disguise themselves as a piece of redsoil that nourishes the dromas. You may find them near the <color=#dbc291ff>Dromas Workshop</color>.

C: 直到「阳雷骑士」刺穿艾格勒最后的眼目，它们便再了无音讯。
E: But when the Daythunder Knight pierced through the last eye of Aquila, the nymphs fell silent.

C: 感谢你，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: 如您所愿，我会用金丝将那些您曾触碰过的若虫召回。希望这能为您减少一些负担。
E: As you wish, I will summon the nymphs you once touched back with golden threads. I hope this lightens your burden somewhat.

C: 呼…呼…嘻，逗你的，我可没睡哦。
E: Zzz... Zzz... Hehe, gotcha! I'm totally wide awake!

C: 哈…都说多少次了，我才当不了救世主呢。
E: Hah... How many times do I have to say it? I'm not cut out to be some Deliverer.

C: 我正迷迷地叹气，突然发现，脚边全是亮晶晶的鹅卵石！命运实在是太捉弄人了迷！我一气之下，就把它们都丢了出去迷。
E: I sighed a big Mem sigh. Then I looked down — and my feet were surrounded by shiny, glittery cobbles! Fate really is full of surprises, memi! I got so mad, I just tossed them all away, memi.

C: 买大餐，开宴会！
E: Buy a feast! Throw a banquet!

C: 迷迷，身为舞者，许的愿望当然是——
E: Mem, as a dancer, the only wish worth making is—

C: 答案错误，看来我的身影成功让你眼花缭乱了嘤！
E: Wrong guess! Looks like I really did dazzle your vision, eep!

C: 至少现在，没关系哦。暂且放下心头的重压，享受「岁月」送给我们的礼物吧？
E: Yeah, for now at least. It's perfectly fine to set aside our heavy thoughts and enjoy this gift from "Time" itself.

C: 花朵是无辜的吧？
E: These flowers didn't wrong you in any way, did they?

C: 等到他们昂首阔步地驶向星海…或许我会回到树庭，做回一个沉浸学术、偶尔健健身的普通贤人吧。
E: Perhaps when they sail triumphantly toward the cosmos... I'll return to the Grove, a common sage lost in books... and occasional exercise.

C: 下次见！
E: Another time!

C: 说实话，这让我多少有些恐惧。对逐火军的参谋来说，这显然不是个好征兆。
E: To be honest, this makes me a bit fearful. For the advisor of the Flame-Chase Army, this is not a good sign.

C: 因为蜜酿，都是，葡萄……
E: Because honey brews... are all grape...

C: 还好我够机灵~
E: Thankfully, I'm nimble~

C: 好热闹的气氛啊…若不是这副身躯不善舞蹈，我也想到舞池中央跳上一会儿。
E: What a lively crowd... If this body of mine were made for dancing, I'd love to join in the middle of the floor.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 可我还是想不通…怎么会有人面对十五颗半鹅卵石的高价，还能无动于衷迷？
E: But I still can't figure it out... How could anyone stay unmoved by a price as steep as fifteen and a half cobbles, mem?

C: 店长哪里的话，看着生意变好，我心里也好高兴迷！
E: Not at all, manager. Watching the restaurant thrive makes me truly happy, mem!

C: …不，大块头的意见或许有一定道理。味道也是一种艺术判断标准，这是被我们一直忽视的思路。
E: ...No, the big guy might actually be onto something. Flavor is also a criterion that can be used to judge art. This is a thought that we have all overlooked.

C: 只有这样，才能充分享受泉水，也才能展现你对法吉娜的敬畏，懂吗？
E: This is the only way to fully appreciate the spring water, and demonstrate your reverence for Phagousa. Get it?

C: 听说，为了犒赏黄金裔的英勇，上层浴场的水质如琼，秘酿管够！还有专业的辩论师供他们消磨时间……
E: I hear that, to reward the Chrysos Heirs' heroics, the water quality of the upper floor's baths is akin to liquid jade, with a free flow of ambrosia! They'll also be entertained by a professional debater...

C: 只有草药的香味，我已经泡腻了，要不咱们换个吧？
E: There's only the smell of herbs, I'm tired of it. Shall we try baths?

C: …啊？你谁啊，我怎么不认——
E: ...Huh? Who are you? I don't know you...

C: 所以您说，若是云层厚积，且永夜频闪，是要「下雨」。
E: So, you're saying thick clouds and evernight flashes are a sign of "rain"?

C: …你是谁？你难道很懂我家里的事？
E: ...Who are you? Do you even know my family?

C: 执照真难拿啊…
E: Getting a license is impossible...

C: 就不能通融一下吗…
E: Can't you bend the rules just this once...

C: 需要我做什么直说吧。
E: Just let me know what you need.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个热爱哲学的孩子，爱找人进行激烈的辩论，或许它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>某个花瓶</color>中准备伏击过往的路人呢。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who loves philosophy and debating with others. Maybe it's hiding in <color=#dbc291ff>some vase</color>, waiting to ambush passersby.

C: 一定是前辈们太忙了，都没时间回树林探望猫头鹰老师，所以才让老师这么难过啾！
E: It must be because our seniors are too busy to come back and visit Professor Owl. That's why he's all sad, tweet!

C: 所以——我们五个扮成了前辈们的样子，这样老师就不会寂寞了啾啾！
E: So... us five dressed up as our seniors. Then the Professor won't be so lonely, tweet tweet!

C: 但我相信，政法科一定会竭尽自己的努力，去弥补这场灾难导致的诸多漏洞。
E: But I believe the Department of Galactic Geopolitics will certainly try its best to make up for this disaster.

C: 一旦想到她们失望的眉眼，我的心比刀割还要刺痛。所以我不会，也绝不能前往避难。
E: It pains me whenever I think of the disappointment in their eyes. I will never take refuge.

C: 瑟希斯真是这么说的？我不信，瑟希斯不会对我不管不顾的。
E: Did Cerces really say that? I don't believe it. Cerces wouldn't just abandon me like that.

C: 为什么要待在水里…
E: Why stay in the water...

C: 啊…你是怎么找到我的？
E: Ah... how did you find me?

C: 冰冷的心脏变成了温暖的水资源喀！
E: This cold heart has been turned to the warmest water, crrk!

C: 因为我没有手指，旋转不了图标喀！
E: Because I don't have fingers, so I can't turn the puzzle, crrk!

C: 所以我长久地等候在此处，不为别的…
E: That's why I waited here for so long, for nothing else...

C: 衣匠的秘密被裙衫遮掩，它沉默不语，就如同这座大墓一样。
E: The Garmentmaker's secrets lie hidden beneath folds of silk. It speaks not a word, silent as the great tomb itself.

C: 嗯…有位织者瑟瑟发抖。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>房间角落的木箱上</color>，寻找干燥的生活环境呢。
E: Hmm... There is a trembling weaver. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>the wooden crate in the corner of the room</color>, looking for a dry place to settle down.

C: 你确信自己看到了墙壁背后的「硬盘」，莫非你正身处在一个巨大的演算装置内部？又是谁打破了墙壁，扎格列斯大手的冲拳吗？
E: You're certain you saw a "hard drive" behind the wall. Could you be inside some massive computational device? And who broke through the wall. Was it one of Zagreus's mighty punches?

C: 新店开张，买铁饼赠签名石板！数量有限，先到先得！走过路过不要错过啊……
E: Grand opening! Buy iron discs and get a signed tablet for free! Limited quantity, first come, first served! Don't miss out...

C: 停停停，找你们给我出主意，先拌上嘴了是吧！
E: Whoa whoa whoa, I asked for your advice, and you fellows started bickering instead!

C: 生面孔，你是刚来的新兵吧？如今我没什么可教你的，唯有一句：别被荣耀的枷锁束缚，去做你想做的事吧。
E: New kid, you must be a fresh recruit, huh? I've got nothing much to teach you these days, just one thing: Don't let the shackles of glory hold you back. Go do whatever your heart desires.

C: 诶呀，不用不用，我只是开个玩笑，见到你太高兴了嘛。
E: Oh come now, I was just joking! I'm just happy to see you again.

C: 就是你吗？好厉害，和我之前看过的一部小说里的主角好像——
E: Is it really you? That's amazing, you're just like the protagonist from a novel I read!

C: 吃。
E: Eat.

C: 工作的事，怎么能叫卷呢？这是纯粹的热爱嗷呜！
E: Professionalism is nothing like tryhard. Everything is out of pure passion awoo!

C: 摸摸孩子的脑瓜。
E: Pet its head.

C: o((■ω■- )o「但是，都怪██红温海豹，自从它来了，池水的温度一下子█豹涨，豹██差点要变成汗豹煲了！」
E: o((■ω■- )o "But it's all the fault of ████ Red Hot Seal! Ever since it came, the pool temperature has ██████ shot up so much ████ I've almost turned into a Sealburger!"

C: 但是看到这家伙一脸揶揄地走过来，就猜到他会忍不住呛我几句…哎呀，还是和从前一样。
E: But seeing him walk over with that smirk on his face, I knew he couldn't resist taking a few jabs at me... Ah well, some things never change.

C: 「剑旗爵」？我与她的约定…不必以如此刻意的方式说出来。
E: Dux Gladiorum? Our promise... doesn't need to be stated in such a deliberate way.

C: 锵锵！这是*我们*缝制的娃娃，怎么样，很可爱吧？
E: Ta-da! This is a doll that we made. Adorable, isn't it?

C: 要我说，唯一可取的只有一点。
E: If you ask me, there's only one redeeming quality about it.

C: 我该早点想到的，赛飞儿阁下肯定玩心大发，按捺不住想要在新世界施展诡计，捉弄捉弄大家……
E: I should have known earlier that Lady Cipher would be up to her tricks, unable to resist playing her mischievous games in this new world to mess with everyone...

C: 直到你决定踏出这片<color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#世界}洞穴{RUBY_E#}</color>之前……
E: Until you decide to step out of this <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#world}cave{RUBY_E#}</color>...

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 关于命途…
E: About the Paths...

C: 说实话，我不记得帕姆什么时候出现了…好像在我来到列车之前？不，好像之后才出现的…奇怪。
E: To be honest, I don't know when Pom-Pom appeared... I think it was before I came to the Express? No wait, maybe it was after...

C: 失事的飞碟？
E: A crashed UFO?

C: 哔嘟…检索到近似目标物件，开始进入搜索模式。请根据本机指引进行搜索。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Potential target object detected, search mode activated. Please commence search according to my instructions.

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》？
E: The Adventurous Moles?

C: 每天晚上睡觉前我都要看一会儿《冒险鼹鼠队》，梦里全都是有趣的大冒险！
E: I read The Adventurous Moles every night before going to bed. My dreams are full of fun adventures!

C: 当然相信了！
E: Of course I do!

C: （「货架，货箱，摆放，相同。」…这是什么意思呢？）
E: ("Shelves, crates, arrange, same"... What does that mean?)

C: 嚯…我知道了，安东尼娜让你来的吧？
E: Oh... I see. Antonia sent you here, didn't she?

C: 来，搭把手，帮我先把教学场地布置一下。
E: Come on, give me a hand. Help me set things up.

C: 嗯？
E: Hmm?

C: 不愧是你，这种难度的谜题都能顺利解决…下次我可得拿出真本事了。
E: You're indeed brilliant, capable of solving a puzzle this difficult... Guess next time I'll have to bring out the big guns.

C: 我觉得…我已经放弃思考了……
E: I think... I've given up on thinking...

C: 等等，我并不想说那个词——太好了，我还是我自己！
E: Hold on, I didn't want to say that word... Wonderful, I'm still me!

C: 轻轻松松。
E: Piece of cake.

C: 喔，对了，「星芒战幕」的关卡可不止一个，而且每种关卡都适配了三种难度——您如果感兴趣的话，不妨再多挑战几次。
E: Oh yeah, that's right — there's more than one stage in Stellar Flare, and each stage has three difficulty levels. If you want, you can keep playing it.

C: 多亏了您的测试数据，我终于能向世玲姐交差了…您可能不了解，但这对我来说真的很重要…我可不希望试用期没过就被踢出应物科啊。
E: Thanks to the test data from you, I can finally submit my report to Miss Shiling... You might not realize this, but it's really important to me... I don't want to get kicked out of the Department of Implement Arts before my probation ends.

C: 骚、骚扰？等一下，请听我解释！那条短信和我无关！不…也可能有那么点关系……
E: H—Harassed? Hang on, I can explain! That text message has nothing to do with me! No... I mean, it might have a little to do with me...

C: 一段预设好的留言，正在通过监控室的屏幕播放。
E: A pre-recorded message blares out of the screen in the monitoring room.

C: 屏幕上重复着机械的对话，这只是一段预设好的留言。看来想知道些什么，必须得通关这个游戏。
E: The same message repeats itself on the screen — it's just a pre-recorded message. Looks like if you want to get more information, you'll have to first win the game.

C: 你知道监控室变成了街机厅吗…
E: Did you know the monitoring room has become an arcade...

C: 喂，你在干什么！？
E: Hey, what are you doing!?

C: …啧！怎么又是那个老家伙。
E: ...Tsk! That old man again.

C: 哎，行吧行吧。反正我也画完了——把说好的稿费交给我，你就可以带着他要的画走人。
E: Ack, fine then. In any case, the painting's finished — hand over the payment, and you can leave with his painting.

C: 这名字倒是非常…先锋。
E: Now that name is particularly... Avant-garde.

C: 哈！我正想你什么时候才到呢——来来来，我们开工！
E: Ha! I was just wondering when you'd be in — come on then. Let's get to it!

C: 嚯，狮子大开口啊！我这自动机兵的数据可不能随便给外人。
E: Yeah, right. That's a pretty tall order! No way I'm handing over automaton data to just anybody.

C: 辛苦了，我去跟于尔丹说一声，这些玩意就放在展柜里得了。
E: In any case, good job. I'll go tell Uldan about this, and put these things in the display cabinet.

C: 我想再重新考虑一下。
E: I would like to reconsider.

C: 收下吧，这是为你准备的报酬——你应得的。
E: Here is the reward you deserve.

C: 华丽、温馨、舒适，这是很多人对这幅作品的第一印象——他们肯定没有入住次日就被全城通缉的经历。
E: "Opulent, warm, and cozy" is the first impression people have of this piece. They must not have experienced being wanted all over the city the second day of staying there.

C: 你已经在大守护者的办公室里仔细端详过这件展品了，很清楚星球表面那可爱的图案到底意味着什么。
E: You've already inspected this display in detail in the Supreme Guardian's office. You know exactly what the lovely diagram on the surface of the planet really means.

C: 在那段难见天日的黑暗岁月里，正是这台小小的机器将整个城市的每一颗心维系在了一起。
E: In those dark times, it was this tiny machine that tied each and every heart of the city together.

C: 想必你已经发现了：在贝洛伯格，从能源中枢到家用电器，它们用的电路系统都是一样的。
E: You must have noticed: In Belobog, everything from energy hubs to household electrical appliances uses the same circuit system.

C: 一辆「灯塔」型汽车，是「拉塔」汽车公司生产的限量款。
E: A Beacon model automobile. It is a limited edition automobile manufactured by Ratta Motors.

C: 第十八任大守护者可可利亚与其女布洛妮娅的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
E: A portrait of Cocolia, the eighteenth Supreme Guardian, and her daughter Bronya. The exhibition label reads:

C: 反物质兵团的虚卒冰雕，被八百年前的寒潮冻结至今。
E: An ice sculpture of a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion. It was frozen some eight hundred years ago when the Eternal Freeze arrived.

C: …我也反对，两票对两票。
E: ...I disagree too. Two against two.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 没想到，您这是游子归乡。
E: So you're a wanderer returning home.

C: …你真是看热闹不嫌事大。
E: ...You're not being very helpful, are you?

C: 那…我们应该怪谁，又怪公司吗？
E: Then who should we blame? The IPC?

C: 被叫作「浓云金蟾」的香炉。虽然迄今为止，你已经与太多的入魔机巧战斗过，你很难得见到如此安静的家伙。
E: A crucible named "Golden Cloud Toad." Considering how many hostile ingenia you've encountered, this one is suspiciously quiet.

C: …够了，斯科特代表，请阐述公司方面的诉求。
E: ...That's enough, Representative Skott. Please state the IPC's side of the case.

C: 商会为同功坊定制了推广方案，同功坊因而声名鹊起。
E: The merchant guild has established a promotional plan for Artistry Hardware, and hence did its fame begin to grow.

C: 交给我吧！说吧，要怎么拍？
E: Leave it to me! About these visiographs — what do you need me to do?

C: 尚滋味的联动活动？
E: The Spices Supreme crossover event?

C: 因为人们需要金人巷的美食街，<color=#dbc291ff>这一点，我们可以证明</color>。
E: Because people want it to retain its food street. <color=#dbc291ff>We have proof of that</color>.

C: 会长的经历塑造了会长的判断，小少爷的经历塑造了小少爷的判断，我们又何尝不是？
E: The president and Xiaohan had different perspectives because they came from different backgrounds... and I can't help but feel the decisions I made were somewhat restricted by my own background.

C: 稍等一下，我还有别的事。
E: Wait a minute. I've got something else I need to do.

C: 等等！等等！我只是想请个假而已，用不着这么复杂。
E: Wait! Hold on! I just want to take some time off! There's no need to make this so complicated.

C: 那我先回去了，小天老板，你要加油啊，加油之后，我们去打牌吧。
E: I'll get going then, Little Tian. You keep working at it. You can do it. And afterward, let's play a few hands of celestial jade.

C: 出示。
E: (Present evidence)

C: 你怎么知道这就是大家期望的？
E: How can you be sure that everyone's vision aligns with yours?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>（我们可以用什么证明？）</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>(Do we have any proof?)</color>

C: 为了金人巷商会的颜面，请收回吧。
E: You should retract this — I wouldn't want to embarrass the guild.

C: …我问这几位云骑站在这里干什么，他们便说「别问，公务」，我问「公务是什么」，他们无人回应，就只是站在这里。
E: ...I asked these Cloud Knights what they were doing, and they just said, "No questions, Official business." I asked, "What's that?" but they didn't respond. They just stood there in silence.

C: 你问的太多了，这是妨碍公务！
E: You kid around too much. This is obstruction of official business!

C: 帮帮我吧，我还急着去送货呢。
E: Help me out. I'm in a rush to deliver something.

C: 我知道它看上去是「做一件事博取他人信任的事」，但事实并非如此。
E: I know it might seem like "you just do one simple task and you win their trust," but that's not really how it works.

C: 就是，没看到它爪子上的包裹固定器都不在了嘛？你看我，我也是刚从窝里出来，我爪子上也没有，嘿嘿！
E: Yeah, can't you see there's no package holders on its talons? And look at me, I'm fresh out of the nest, so I don't have any holders either.

C: 可你也没有，我也没有，那就是说……
E: But neither of us is. So, that means...

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 报酬到位啥操作都会。
E: With the right rewards, no mission is impossible.

C: 除开一些和践踏者本身有关的样本素材，你还需要去搜集一些<color=#dbc291ff>固态净水</color>。数量我都整理成备忘录给你啦。
E: In addition to getting some samples on Tramplers, you'll also need to collect some <color=#dbc291ff>Solid Water</color>. The exact amount has been specified in this memo I wrote for you.

C: 感应仪的反应…
E: The sensor's reading...

C: 一张图案让人放松的画报，但它背景中大面积的殷红色又让人有些神经紧张，可能这就是艺术的魅力。
E: A drawing with calming illustration, but the deep red spreading across the canvas in the background is somewhat unnerving. This may be the power of art.

C: 要相信科学！
E: Believe in the science!

C: 无论如何，我们贴心地为你准备了单人份钟表披萨！编号随机，即使没朋友也可以愉快享用~
E: Anyway, we've thoughtfully prepared a single serving of Clockie Pizza for you! The numbers are random, so you can enjoy it even if you don't have any friends.

C: 不过这里容我暂且卖个关子，毕竟现在每多说一个字都算是一种剧透。这梦泡的内容，还请客人您亲自体验吧！
E: Please allow me to keep the suspense going for now, as I don't want to give any spoilers. You'll have to enter the dream bubble yourself to find out what it's about!

C: 美梦小镇的监狱啊。难道你以为自己已经自由了？
E: The Dreamville prison. Do you actually think you're already a free man?

C: 此时此刻，您想体验一个什么滋味的梦境？
E: What kind of a dream would you like to experience now?

C: 哦，是你啊啾——想要打倒石头老板的家伙。巧了啾，我也一早就看那家伙不顺眼。
E: Oh, it's you, tweet. You're the guy who wants to take down Boss Stone. What a coincidence! He has rubbed me the wrong way, too.

C: 发出一声疑惑的*哼*。
E: Let out a skeptical grunt.

C: 在过去，苏乐达就是我们的美梦。石头老板想要夺走我们的梦、强迫我们在淤泥里苟活，所以他们被打倒了。而这次，我们也将打倒一切困难！
E: Back then, SoulGlad was our dream. Boss Stone took it away and forced us into a life of abject despair, so he and his men were overthrown. This time, we'll do the same and overcome all challenges!

C: 我们还需要更多证据，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。如果您不介意的话…我们再进到那个异空间里探索一次吧？
E: We still need more evidence. If you don't mind... can we enter that unusual dimension and explore it once more?

C: 冷静下来，辛格勒…你是调查记者，你得保持冷静……
E: Chill out, Singler... You're an investigative journalist and you should stay cool...

C: …不是我的错哇！我只是…好心把珍藏的收音机借它玩玩，就直接给我砸了汪！
E: ...It's not my fault! All I did was... lend him the radio out of the kindness of my heart. And the next thing I knew, he smashed it, woof!

C: 那个收音机是我重要的回忆，是舒翁送给我的。
E: That radio represented an important memory for me. Siobhan gave it to me.

C: （调饮师的工作做久了还挺累的，舒翁是怎么坚持这么久的？）
E: (Being a drinksmith is actually exhausting. How did Siobhan manage to keep at it for so long?)

C: （求救声…是从酒吧外面传来的？）
E: (That cry for help... is coming from outside the lounge?)

C: 开什么玩笑？别说这种天真的傻话了。
E: Are you kidding me? Stop talking nonsense!

C: 我这就开始。
E: I'll start right away.

C: 我和猎犬家系那边打过招呼了，他们决定推迟对梦境酒店的清理工作。就是说，这些怪物不会有危险，「惊梦酒吧」也将继续经营下去。
E: I've contacted the Bloodhound Family, and they've agreed to postpone the cleanup of the hotel in the Dreamscape. In other words, these monsters will be safe, and Dreamjolt Hostelry will continue to operate.

C: …谢谢。我和它们都很感激你。
E: ...Thank you. We really appreciate your help.

C: 我应该做的。
E: Don't mention it.

C: 毕竟…那场审判的见证者有不少还活蹦乱跳地活着。
E: After all... many witnesses of the trial are still alive.

C: 真是不称职的父亲。
E: What a horrible father.

C: 哈哈哈！哈努兄弟，你现在变得又小又孤独，小镇马上就要成为我的囊中之物了！
E: Hahaha! Brother Hanu, you're small and lonely now. Soon the whole town will be under my control!

C: 加油，导演，我们很快就能让克劳克影业再次伟大了！
E: Keep it up, Director! I believe we can make Clock Studios great again!

C: 片名：《盛会终焉》
E: Title: Gala of Finality

C: 「对了，你还记得吗？我曾经偷偷告诉过你，钟表小子的脑袋其实是个罗盘——指向未来的罗盘。」
E: "Oh yes, do you still remember? I secretly told you once that the brain of Clockie is actually a compass — a compass that leads one to the future."

C: 我会马上觐见梅芙恩家主，告诉她——「钟表匠」只是想记录匹诺康尼不应被忘却的历史，这样的理由她一定能理解的，毕竟……
E: I will request to meet Lady Maeven immediately and tell her... the Watchmaker is only trying to document the history of the Penacony that shouldn't be forgotten. I believe she will understand such a reason. After all...

C: 唉，您一说这个我就郁闷，本来影城就是我们最重要的线下收入之一，但前些日子突然被猎犬家系封闭，说是要安全检查……
E: Oh, the mere mention of it saddens me. The theme park has always been one of our most important sources of offline revenue, but it was unexpectedly shut down by the Bloodhound Family for what they called a safety inspection...

C: 皮斯让我来找拍摄广告。
E: Pisce asked me to film some adverts here.

C: 别打我，至少别打脸！
E: Don't hit me, at least not my face!

C: 「看来哈努兄弟已经找齐了这层的广告牌！是时候前往下一个区域了。」
E: "Seems like Brother Hanu has already found all the billboards on this level! It's time to head to the next domain."

C: 我们甚至还请来了特殊嘉宾，深藏在梦中的伟大之桶……
E: We've even invited a special guest — the majestic trashcan buried in the dream...

C: 我真的不是摄影！
E: I'm not the camera person!

C: 「垃垃斯基希望让自己的垃圾袋内充满智慧、圆幕先生希望自己能有一颗稳定而开朗的内心，而气泡锂犬则希望获得比气泡更加真实的勇气。」
E: "Lalasky hopes to fill its own trash bag with wisdom, Mr. Domescreen hopes to have a stable and carefree heart, and the Bubble Hound hopes to gain courage more reliable than a bubble."

C: 好！{M#小伙子}{F#小姑娘}，<color=#dbc291ff>拍得不错</color>！提前收工！
E: Good! {M#Boy}{F#Girl}, <color=#dbc291ff>that wasn't bad at all</color>! We're wrapping up early!

C: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板还没有全部消除…要直接打开宝箱吗？
E: The moving SoulGlad floor hasn't been completely removed... Do you want to open the chest?

C: 哎呦——<color=#dbc291ff>不怎么样</color>，但还能用！
E: Ahh... <color=#dbc291ff>It wasn't the best</color>, but still usable!

C: 那位哈努动画师平时可是出了名的傲慢，麻烦你帮他出谋划策，还真不好意思……
E: The animator is usually known for his arrogance, so we're going to need you to help him come up with some ideas. We're really sorry about this...

C: 别急，听说这里马上就要举办《美梦往事》的展映活动了，说不定我们能一睹真容……
