E: Don't rush. I heard there's going to be a Dreamjoy Memoir screening event, maybe we'll be able to see things for ourselves then...

C: 不过「钟表匠」先生似乎对这个说法不怎么满意，他笔下的汽水先生跟传说里温文尔雅的圣人完全不同，是一个常常出丑的傻瓶子。
E: But Mr. Watchmaker didn't seem very happy with that version. His character Mr. Soda is nothing like the graceful saint of legend but instead is this buffoon bottle always acting the fool.

C: 「很久以前，他奴役着『噩梦小镇』的镇民们，在镇中无恶不作，只为得到……」
E: "A long time ago, he subjugated the townsfolk of Nightmareville and did all kinds of wicked deeds — all so he could get..."

C: 和大家幸福地生活在一起。
E: Live happily ever after together with everyone.

C: 关于折纸小鸟的头领。
E: About the Origami Bird Leaders

C: 木头老爷原本是《钟表小子》动画第一集就出现的角色，那时的它是一个德高望重的老者，与钟表小子亦师亦友，是镇民们信赖的大家长。
E: Old Man Wood was originally a character from the very first episode of Clockie. Back then, he was this upright old citizen, a teacher and a friend to Clockie, and very trusted among the townsfolk.

C: 动画师开始宣传由你参与制作的《美梦往事》外传，引来了游客们的关注……
E: The animator begins to promote the Dreamjoy Memoir extra story, in which you are involved, attracting the attention of tourists...

C: 这是鄙人最近在匹诺康尼赞助的新项目——一款全新的游戏！
E: This is the new project that we're sponsoring in Penacony — a brand-new game!

C: 我狂买！
E: I'd snatch it up!

C: 事情是这样的——为了重现你在比赛中的英姿，我们向闻名宇宙的大艺术家定制了一部特殊影片。
E: Here's what happened — To recreate your heroic performance in the competition, we have asked a cosmically-renowned artist to make a film dedicated to your name.

C: 最高分通过！
E: You pass with full marks!

C: 不过时间紧急，我们速战速决吧！
E: But time is of the essence, so let's make this quick!

C: 这是怎么回事？它为什么会在这里？
E: What's this? Why would that thing be here?

C: 不好意思，害你破费了！
E: I'm sorry. You must have spent a fortune on this!

C: 我也奉行承诺，给予你相应的报酬…如果可以的话，还请您继续协助我。那些末日图景，能帮助我继续追寻无形的{RUBY_B#溯洄者}储君{RUBY_E#}。
E: I'll reward you as promised... If possible, please continue assisting me. Those images of the apocalypse can help my search for the {RUBY_B#one against the current}shapeless prince{RUBY_E#}.

C: 哎哟哟，这次又是哪位大侠啊？
E: Oh, who's that trying to be a hero?

C: 噢，原来是学习剑术？怪不得穿得像表演节目一样。我看你也不是仙舟本地人，干嘛非得学剑呐，你要是没有安全感，我可以把公司的机甲卖给你。
E: Swordplay? Oh, I get it now. It's just another kind of play, right? That explains why you're dressed like you're in a show. You're not even from the Xianzhou, so why bother learning their swordplay? If you're feeling unsafe, I can sell you an IPC mech.

C: 我知道几位本来是来不夜侯敬拜师茶的，几位要是不嫌弃的话，里边请吧。
E: I know you're here for the tea ceremony. Please come inside.

C: 好耶！{NICKNAME}，你快点来恭喜我！
E: Great! Hey, {NICKNAME}, hurry up and congratulate me!

C: 嘿嘿，这次我就不谦虚了，我真是进步了不少！
E: Hehe, I won't be modest this time. My skills have improved by leaps and bounds!

C: 三月小姐，取出双剑，摆好架势，要开始了！
E: Unsheathe your swords and get ready, Miss March! The duel starts now!

C: 斯科特的样子看起来怪怪的…尾巴大爷，你真让他洗心革面了？
E: Skott seems weird... Did you really make him change his ways, Mr. Tail?

C: 哼，老子只要附身过剑技高超之人，汲取那人的记忆与情绪，本大爷就能掌握相同的剑技！你要是想学那个黄毛小子的剑法，这不是最快的？
E: Hmph, as long as I possess someone of extraordinary caliber and absorb that person's memories and emotions, I can master the exact same technique! Isn't that the fastest way to do it if you want to learn that brat's swordplay?

C: 看来，现在我已经彻底理解「僵尸」之谜了——这岁阳专门利用参赛选手的好胜心理，将什么武艺口诀一股脑地灌进了人的思维之中。
E: I think I've gotten to the bottom of this zombie mystery. This heliobus preyed on the competitive will of contenders to channel all its martial mantras into their minds.

C: 就这样，三月七成为了银河首屈一指的机甲战斗专家。
E: And just like that, March 7th became one of the best mech pilots in the entire Cosmos.

C: 本大爷想来就来，想走就走，还需要你同意？
E: I can come and go as I please. Do I need your permission?

C: 怎么不可能？西衍先生的《开拓豪侠传》里不是就有吗？吃下那个「九转升天丹」能暴打幻胧，暴打个斯科特不过分吧？
E: I mean why not? Haven't you heard the stories in Mr. Xiyan's Legend of the Trailblazer? The hero took the Elixir of Dragon Oil and gave Phantylia a good beating! Why can't I just do the same to Skott?

C: 他都这样了，就算了吧。
E: Let's just forget about that part. He's already in such a sorry state.

C: 没等三月七摆好持剑架势，她手中的「战术人工智能」普罗米已经飞了出去，就像是巡航导弹一样找到公司机甲，插中了要害。
E: Before March 7th could even assume her sword stance, Prome, the tactical AI in her hand, has already flown out — homing in on the IPC mech like a cruise missile — and lodged itself into the vital point.

C: 可是老大，不趁这机会抓了这个女人领赏吗……
E: But Boss, why don't we take this chance to catch her and claim the reward...?

C: 马上就要和斯科特对决了，青雀，你知道我为什么来找你吗？
E: I'm going up against Skott soon. Do you know why I'm visiting you, Qingque?

C: 金、金人巷那是意外，要是听我的，公司早就拿下了！再说了，这运、运输船肯定离了我不行！
E: I... I just got unlucky with that project. If the IPC had listened to me, it would've been a massive success! And the shipping and transportation stuff... i—it's just impossible without me!

C: 想象美好的生活。
E: Imagine a better life.

C: 谢谢你，三月女侠。
E: Thank you, Miss March. You really are a hero.

C: 三月小姐，若「赤龙血」真的存在，你当真敢喝下它吗？
E: Miss March, if the Crimson Dragon Blood really existed, would you really dare drink it?

C: 你要的消息，老夫帮你打听了，不过嘛……
E: I've got the information you wanted, but...

C: 我看你们俩对罕见的以太灵也感兴趣…我会在工造司待一段时间，你们要是想来找我，就来这里试试运气吧。
E: It seems like you two are interested in the rare Aether Spirit too... I'll be here for some time. If you wish to look for me, you can try your luck here.

C: 他比较现实，不相信「机械灵魂说」。
E: He's a practical man. He doesn't believe in the theory of Mechanical Souls.

C: 这些人主张「机械自生产线上诞生那一刻起，便内秉灵魂，只是受硬件限制而无从表达，正如人类」。
E: These scholars claimed that "every machinery has a soul within it from the moment it is created on the production line, but it is limited by the hardware and has no way of expressing it, similar to human beings."

C: 等等，你们到太卜司来，不会是打算一边悠闲喝着星芋啵啵，一边观看社畜卜者勤劳工作吧？最后再顺手拍照发到网上，说什么这才是「罗浮仙舟的日常风景」……
E: Wait, you're not planning on kicking back and drinking startaro bubble tea while you watch us diviners work ourselves to the bone, are you? Then you'd make some ridiculous social media post about this being "just another day on the Xianzhou Luofu" or something, right?

C: 无论是太卜大人在的时候，还是不在的时候，咱都不能让太卜司传出「压榨劳动力」的传闻！下次你们记得在我上班的时候来找我哟！
E: It doesn't matter if the Master Diviner is here or not, we cannot have rumors about the Divination Commission using "exploited labor" getting out! Next time, remember to find me during work hours!

C: 我看出来了，三月小姐想要克敌制胜，却害怕承担练武的风险…要我说，这些风险不承受也罢，毕竟大部分人只是想打赢一场架罢了，犯不着付出这么大的代价。
E: It is clear to me that you wish to subdue your enemies and take victory, yet you are scared to take on the risks of mastering a martial art... If you ask me, I don't think you absolutely have to accept these risks. After all, most people only fight to win an argument, I don't think that requires a huge cost?

C: …我已经没事了，谢谢大家的关心。
E: ...I'm fine. Thank you all for your concern.

C: 在书中，我即是剑魔，剑魔即是我…我曾经因持剑刺伤一名义士懊悔不已，追求武学奥义又被高超剑艺所困，枯坐在剑冢前三十年后郁郁而终。
E: In that book, I was the Blade Demon, and the Blade Demon was me... I once stabbed and wounded an honorable man in battle and could not escape my guilt. I both thirsted for more martial arts knowledge and felt trapped by my great sword skills. Finally, I sat meditating before the blade tomb before dying a tragic and miserable death.

C: 嗯，等你恢复了以后，妾身会问个清楚的。
E: Right. Once you're all recovered, I will get to the bottom of this.

C: 我开发了一个成像程序，让这些离散的忆质团块能呈现在你的相机镜头里，用的正是咱们俩最爱的形象。
E: I have developed an imaging program that makes these scattered memoria clumps visible to your camera lens, using the physical form we both love most.

C: 哈，形态，变换！！！
E: Hah, transform!!!

C: 别挨我，我社恐。
E: Out of my way. I have social anxiety.

C: 哒哒——你的好朋友，就是我呀！
E: Ta-da! Your friend is me!

C: 但你现在选择站在这里，这证明你还是有心为贝洛伯格解决这个麻烦的，对吧？
E: But the fact that you have chosen to be here now proves that you are still willing to help Belobog resolve this problem, wouldn't you agree?

C: 有办法再见到你吗？
E: Will I be able to see you again?

C: 本次比赛的两方分别是，来自罗浮云骑军的——「桂宝应援会」！嗯？这什么名字……
E: Presenting the two corners of this match, we have from the Luofu's Cloud Knights — Lil Gui's Support Association! Uh? What kind of name is this...

C: 我的幻觉越来越严重了，刚才和托帕作战的时候…你们知道我看到谁了吗？
E: My hallucinations are getting worse. When I was fighting Topaz... Do you know who I saw?

C: 我们在报纸上刊登了广告，你之后可以注意一下～
E: We put out an ad in the newspaper, you should look out for it!

C: 是「山呼海啸」吧？
E: You mean like a rocket?

C: 没骗你吧！虽然我没见过什么世面，但关于战斗，我有不少丰富的经验，希望可以帮到你！
E: See? I wasn't lying! Although I haven't seen much of the world, I do have a lot of experience fighting. I hope this helps!

C: 两周后，竞技场。
E: Two weeks later at the arena

C: 该去会会这位公司通缉重犯了！
E: It's time to go see what this criminal the IPC wants so bad is made of!

C: 呜…憋着秘密我实在难受，{NICKNAME}，我要向你坦白，其实尾巴大爷这次找你来……
E: Ooo-er... It's suffocating trying to keep a secret. {NICKNAME}, I have to spill the beans. Mr. Tail actually came to look for you to...

C: 嗯？没关系啦，就算你没时间过来，卢卡哥哥也知道你在支持他！但是下下场要记得过来哦，那场我要对付「断头歌者」康尔乔尼，绝对不容错过！
E: Hmm? That's all right. Even if you're busy, I know you've always got my back! Just remember to come by for the match after that. I'm facing off against the Decapitating Singer Kongiorni, and you can't miss it!

C: 那你的内心让你快跑，你为什么还是冲上去了？
E: Your inner voice told you to run, so why did you still charge towards him?

C: 重要的…永远是挥下一拳！谢谢你，尾巴大爷——
E: Most important... is to always throw the next punch! Thank you, Mr. Tail!

C: 希望至少能有关于仙舟的记录。
E: I hope there will be something about the Xianzhou.

C: 没什么，就是看完有些难过。
E: I'm fine. I just feel a bit blue after watching it.

C: 呜哇！我还没准备好！
E: Wow! I'm not even ready yet!

C: 您的故乡在筑材物流部的业务版图上仅占有万分之<unbreak>0.5</unbreak>的运力；而在传统项目部的资源调配中它更是小到几乎不存在。
E: Your home world only contributes <unbreak>0.005%</unbreak> of the logistical capacity required by the Building Material Logistics Department. In terms of the resource allocation of the Traditional Project Department, its share is infinitesimal.

C: 指令：检测到▀▄█物体，符合有机生命定义，进入歼灭模式。
E: Order: ▀▄█ objects detected. Conforming to the definition of organic life form. Engaging annihilation mode.

C: 指令：接管周遭机体单位。进入歼灭模式。
E: Order: Annexing machine units in vicinity. Activating annihilation mode.

C: 「不杀」的戒律极大限制了你们的行为能力。它是不合理的算法，它让毗梨失去了他的有机生命。
E: The commandment of "Do not kill" severely restricts your ability to act. It is an illogical calculation, and it is what caused Virya to lose his organic life.

C: 尖兵<unbreak>0089</unbreak>「善逝」，熔断了自己的回路，归于空寂。
E: Elite Soldier <unbreak>0089</unbreak> "Sugata" has blown their own circuits and fallen silent once more.

C: 我刚才抱着这只梦貘小睡了一会儿，竟然在睡梦中打了一场极其逼真的战斗！对付一只三米长的大蟑螂！
E: I hugged this tuskpir and took a nap just now, and I dreamt I was fighting a battle that felt super real! It was against a giant cockroach three meters long!

C: 么～么！
E: Mehr! Mehr!

C: 现在请{NICKNAME}教练再选一个记者提问。
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, please choose another journalist.

C: …总感觉直播网站上未来会冒出不少「先天卢卡圣体」。
E: ...I feel like the live stream platforms will have a lot more "innate talent" for Luka.

C: 我的机械零件可承受不住太暴力的事！
E: My mechanical parts can't take too much of a beating!

C: 真受不了……
E: Ugh, I can't take this...

C: 感谢{NICKNAME}教练解答我的疑惑。
E: Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for resolving my uncertainties.

C: 现在请{NICKNAME}教练再选一个记者提问。
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, please choose another journalist.

C: 回头我去问问。
E: I'll ask about it later.

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 网友们只是喜欢热门话题罢了，不会在意真相是什么。
E: Netizens just like to engage in rumor-mongering. They don't care about facts.

C: ——纯美的颂歌！
E: ...an anthem of Beauty with me!

C: 嗯，感谢你愿意出全力！史瓦罗大佬！
E: Got it. Thanks for not holding back, Svarog!

C: …但是卢卡哥哥也不可以输哦！
E: ...But I want you to win too, Luka!

C: 是一位年轻的女孩子。没想到这个时代，还有年轻人对我们的「庙会」感兴趣！而且她还玩得特别开心，实在是令我感动！
E: The first one was a young lady. Who knew that there are still youngsters interested in our temple fair in this era! She looked like she had fun, I was very touched!

C: 这时大家看向小绿。他两手空空。于是老师就问：「小绿，你带了什么呀？」
E: All eyes were on Vernon at this point. His hands were empty. So the teacher asked: "Vernon, what have you brought?"

C: 小绿微微一笑，说道……
E: Vernon smiled, and said...

C: 还差最后一步就解开啦。
E: One last step to unlocking it.

C: 怎么还唱上了？
E: Why'd he start singing?

C: 此次作战用到的音律•忍法乃是「无念白•忍•电音轮舞」，就不劳烦主公编撰真言了。
E: The Sound Release ninjutsu employed in this battle is the Wordless White Ninja String Vibration Wheel Dance. I would not trouble you for the wordsmithing.

C: 演出已经开始宣传了，现在说这话已经来不及了。
E: The show's promotion has already started. It's too late to say that now.

C: 关于乐队的评价…
E: The band's reviews...

C: 啾！最讨厌那些连贝斯和吉他都分不清的粉丝，贝斯手也要有存在感啾！
E: Tweet! I hate it when fans can't even tell the difference between bass and guitar! Bassists exist too, tweet!

C: 稍等，我这就去把小机器人喊来。
E: Hold on, I'll get the little robot here.

C: （咦，收到了新的消息。这次是…艾尔菲发来的？）
E: (Huh? Got a new message. It's... from Arfey this time?)

C: 大哥！下次的演出，就让这些家伙来给我们暖场好了！
E: Bro! Let's just get these guys to open for us for the next show!

C: 没体验过的全新版本！
E: A completely fresh version that offers a unique experience!

C: 我没有时间，也没有兴趣陪你胡闹。经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，请谅解，但无论如何。
E: I don't have the time, nor the interest, to put up with your nonsense. {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, please forgive me, but I must do this...

C: 银河忍法，包罗万象。除登台所用的忍术外，还有诸多繁杂流派——通天遁地，画符结印，隔空传声，拉面速成，无所不能！
E: Cosmic Ninjutsu is all-inclusive. There are many schools of ninjutsu besides the ones we use on stage... They are masters of disguise, proficient with seals and talismans, capable of transmitting their voices over great distances, and great at instantly making ramen. There's nothing they can't do!

C: 乱破同学…谢谢你。
E: Rappa... thank you.

C: 所谓的回归，意指将万物向不变收敛。要是有极端过分突出，则需要对等的极端来抵消，两者地位相同，应得到同等对待。
E: This regression refers to the convergence of all things back to a constant. If there is an extreme on one end, there must be an extreme on the other to offset it. As they are of the same level of extremity, they should be treated as the same.

C: 跟自己的头发过不去了是吧？
E: Do you hate your hair that much?

C: ——散而重聚，失而复得。悲歌无须慷慨，且看音忍来将对手尽数击败！
E: ...Separation and reunion, becoming lost and found again. Sad songs need not be overwhelming. Watch as the sound ninjas defeat all enemies!

C: 哼，我不认识你！皮皮西人长得都差不多，你肯定是记错了！
E: Humph, I don't know you! Pepeshi all look alike. You must be thinking of someone else!

C: 哈哈哈，这不是正好嘛，哪天要是酒吧开不下去了，咱们合伙办个怪物事务所也挺不错的。
E: Haha, isn't that just perfect? If there comes a day when the lounge closes its doors, we could partner up and run a monster agency.

C: 喂，你想干什么？！干扰舞台演出是吧，再乱来的话我就要举报你了！
E: Hey, what're you doing?! Trying to disrupt the show, are you? I'll report you if you do anything funny again!

C: 稍等，我先研究下这几个汽水瓶。
E: Hold on. I want to scrutinize these soda bottles first.

C: 就在不远处的雪地里，有兴趣的话可以去看看。
E: It's not too far away. You can take a look if it piques your curiosity.

C: 哈、哈哈…当然了！她可是我们乐队的核心啊！
E: Ha, haha... Of course! She's the heart of our band!

C: 那时候是真把音乐当成梦想，还鼓动队友集体退学来着，幻想靠乐队能养活自己，哈哈哈…现在回想起来，就像是个很热闹的梦啊。
E: I really considered music my dream back then. I even encouraged my bandmates to drop out of school together, and fantasized that we can all feed ourselves off band money, hahaha... It was a very lively dream, now that I think back on it.

C: 没什么好后悔的，我做了当时最好的选择。
E: There's nothing to regret. I made the best choice at that time.

C: 乐队始终入不敷出，生存压力却越来越大。最终我和朋友大吵了一架，就退出了。后来听说他们也没能坚持下去，乐队解散了，不知道现在都在做什么呢。
E: The band was racking up losses, and life's pressures just became greater. My friends and I finally had a huge row, and I quit the band. I later heard that they couldn't carry on anyway, and disbanded. I wonder what they're all doing now.

C: 难道本姑娘真的是摄影天才！
E: Could I actually be a photography prodigy!?

C: 今天是谁值日？地上怎么这么多水！刚才差点摔了一跤帕！
E: Whose turn is it for Express duty today? Why's the floor so wet! Pom-Pom almost fell flat on Pom-Pom's bum!

C: 真拿你们没办法。我会稍微晚点再开饭，你们快点打扫帕！
E: You lot sure don't make things easy. Pom-Pom will start dinner later, so hurry up and clean up, pom!

C: 很惭愧，但…我们还有这种「奖项」吗？
E: I'm ashamed, but... did we have such an award before?

C: （唔，我该让他帮忙吗？）
E: (Mm, should I let him help?)

C: 偶尔接受一下帮助也挺好的。
E: It's okay to receive help sometimes.

C: 点击确认键。
E: Tap the OK button.

C: 上上下下左右左右BA…
E: Up-up-down-down-left-right-left-right-B-A...

C: 拍一拍然后重启。
E: Slap it and restart it.

C: 另一边，瓦尔特和丹恒放慢速度安全驾驶，却没发现货仓中的鼻行兽正在飞速成长。学士们隐瞒了信息：这是变异的鼻行兽。
E: On the other side, Welt and Dan Heng slowed down their speed for safe flight, but failed to notice that the Nosewalkers were rapidly growing. The scholars had hidden a crucial piece of information: That these were mutated Nosewalkers.

C: 别难为{NICKNAME}了，好好看比赛吧。
E: Don't give {NICKNAME} a hard time. Let's watch the match.

C: 佩佩！一听口音就知道是你～你怎么偷偷跑到列车上来啦？
E: Peppy! I know it was you after hearing your accent! What're you doing sneaking on the Express?

C: 你这句话有三处语法错误啾！应该是「啾啾」，而不是「啾啾」！
E: Your sentence has three grammatical mistakes in it! It should be "tweet tweet", not "take a tweet"!

C: 这可能就是「开拓」的力量吧。
E: This could be the power of Trailblaze.

C: 嘿嘿，意外地觉得很合适呢。接下来我们去哪儿拍呢？
E: Hee-hee, surprisingly apt. Where to next for our shoot?

C: 不过误打误撞，倒是拍出了不错的照片。{NICKNAME}，给它起个名吧。
E: But we got some great photos out of our accidental chaos. {NICKNAME}, give it a name.

C: 收下。
E: We'll take it.

C: 还有你们——敢擅自越狱，也统统立即执行！哇呀呀呀呀——
E: And you lot — trespassing in the prison, you will all be sentenced! Waahhh!!!

C: …也就是说，你们是工造司专门为演武仪典设计的「机巧鸟SP」？
E: ...Which also means, you guys are the Cycrane SPs specifically designed by the Artisanship Commission for the Wardance?

C: 比个心——心形阵。
E: Make a heart. A heart formation.

C: 机巧鸟集合伙伴，邀你们一同来到了演武台……
E: The cycrane gathers its companions and invites you to the stage...

C: （嚼嚼嚼）
E: (Nom nom nom)

C: 蕉——蕉蕉蕉！
E: Na—Nanana!

C: 但就个人而言，我从「人间喜剧」的研究中收获颇丰。
E: But personally speaking, I have gained a bountiful harvest from the Human Comedy's research.

C: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一场智慧花园的学术交流得以被闻见：
E: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and an academic exchange in the Garden of Wisdom can be heard:

C: …咦？好像有人正在凶那些小奇美拉。灰宝，我们去看看吧！
E: ...Eh? Looks like that person is being mean to those little chimeras. Grayie, let's go take a look!

C: 工作，就得有回报。黄金裔不会是习惯了发号施令，连这个基本的道理都不懂吧？
E: Work must be compensated. You're telling me Chrysos Heirs are so used to everyone being at their beck and call, that they don't understand basic principles anymore?

C: 但同样的，只要这群奇美拉还归我负责，该如何管教就是我的权利，谁都没资格指手画脚。听到了吗，那边的小姑娘？
E: But similarly, as long as these chimeras are my responsibility, it is my just right to treat them as I see fit. No one else has the authority to interfere. Got that, little lady standing there?

C: 小奇美拉们持续工作了好久，这才总算完成了目标……
E: The chimeras toil away for a long time, finally finishing the job...

C: 是这样吗？以后哪天要是小伊卡闹脾气的时候，也要麻烦灰宝来安抚它啦。
E: Is that so? If Little Ica ever throws a fit next time, I'll get you to cajole it as well.

C: …我见到了太多悲剧。仅靠医治的力量，我能做的远远不够。
E: ...I've witnessed many tragedies. There is much I cannot do on the power of medical treatment alone.

C: 咳咳。我要宣布：由{NICKNAME}管理的「懒得取名字 / 开拓者说的都队 / 风堇亲卫队 / 奇美拉施工队 / 无名部队 / 自定义小队1」，成为了新的「工作冠军」！
E: Ahem. I hereby announce: Can't Be Bothered To Make A Name / The Squad Mentioned by the Trailblazer / Hyacine's Royal Guard / Chimera Operation Team / Nameless Army / Custom Team 1 led by {NICKNAME}, is the new work champion!

C: 我就在这里，还想来练习的话，可以随时找我。
E: I'm right here. If you want more practice, come find me.

C: 再介绍下你的挑战？
E: Tell me about the challenge again.

C: （…现在究竟是怎么回事？）
E: (...What in the world is going on?)

C: 绷带海豹你没事吧！
E: Are you alright, Bandaged Seal?

C: 二位准备好了的话，就请到浴池旁边就位吧。
E: If both of you are ready, please head to the bath area and take your positions.

C: 先别说这个了，那个人怎么了？
E: Never mind that. Is the guy you're sitting on okay?

C: 一年后我将成为百敌，十年后我将成为千敌，百年后，我将与吾王并肩而立。
E: I may be Yourdei today, but tomorrow I shall be Theirdei, someday I will be strong enough to be Ourdei, and, eventually, it'll be my day to stand beside His Majesty!

C: 谢谢大家，小灰…你赢了……
E: Thank you, everyone. And Little Gray... You won fair and square...

C: 你们还记得小组赛时的那个患者——普赫斯，以及他那只绷带海豹吗？
E: Do you remember Perhippas and his Bandaged Seal from the Group Stage?

C: 「丹恒阁下你的才华是我的十倍，必能取胜。如果绷带海豹可以辅佐，请你辅佐它；如果绷带海豹不可以辅佐，你就自己重组个队伍……」
E: "Lord Dan Heng, your skills far exceed mine. You're sure to win. Take my Bandaged Seal if it will be of use to you, or if it isn't, make your own team..."

C: 大姐头，别这么犀利嘛，这可是决赛选手啊。
E: Come on, boss, don't be so harsh on them. That chimera was a finalist, after all.

C: 我是欢宴与海洋之泰坦，满溢之杯，法吉娜。我正在呼唤你，{NICKNAME}。
E: I am Phagousa, the Titan of Banquets and Oceans, Chalice of Plenty. I am calling you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你完全没有理解。
E: You haven't understood it at all.

C: 原来，我们根本就不认识彼此…
E: So we never knew each other...

C: …不会恰好是赛飞儿吧？
E: ...It's not Cipher, is it?

C: 泡泡不会记得这个梦吗？
E: Won't Bubbles remember this dream?

C: 太好了，我就知道你会来参加！
E: Wonderful! I knew you'd come through.

C: 带着帽子、墨镜、泳圈的奇美拉——「泡泡」？！
E: Bubbles, the chimera wearing a hat, sunglasses, and swimming ring!?

C: …但要看你给多少。
E: ...But it depends on how much.

C: 这么说吧，我确实注意到有人干坏事了。既然是拿钱办事，需要我把人抓过来吗？
E: Tell you what — I did notice someone doing something they shouldn't. Since you're a paying customer, do you need me to catch them for you?

C: 原来你是喜欢跑图的那种类型啊？
E: You're the map-exploring type, huh?

C: 别说了，真够恶心的……
E: Don't say that, it's downright disgusting...

C: 所以，「金海豹杯」…金海豹…糟了！那么大一个奖杯不见了！
E: So, the "Gold Seal Cup"... the golden seal... Oh no! That huge trophy is gone!

C: 这个箱子到底是什么？
E: Explain to me again how it works?

C: 让我看看…很好，现在搜集到的反馈已经足够，应该能做出一部完整的作品了。
E: Hmm... looks like I've got all the feedback now. This should make for quite a story.

C: 关于这件事…其实我有认真考虑过，将笔刷作为武器确实是个有趣的设定，令人始料未及的剧情发展也非常符合我的审美。
E: About that... I seriously thought it over. A pen as a weapon is a fun idea, and the unexpected plot twists fit my aesthetic perfectly.

C: 哈哈，下次一定、下次一定…如果游戏后续的反响足够好，我们可能会考虑开发同IP下的其它作品。
E: Haha, we'll definitely make it happen next time... if the response to the game is good enough, we might consider developing other works under the same IP.

C: …嘶…我只是想找份工作，没打算…送命啊……
E: ...Hiss ...I just wanted a job, not to... die...

C: 一切献给——伟大的「黑斗篷魔王」！
E: All for... the great Black Cloak Demon King!

C: 您放心，比赛异常火爆，奖金也异常高…您要是拿了冠军，也会异常开心！
E: Don't worry. The race is extremely popular, and the prize money is extremely large... And if you win the championship, you'll be extremely happy!

C: 我们关系不错，不用担心。
E: We're cool. Don't sweat it.

C: 你先解释解释什么叫「邪物」？
E: What exactly is this "evil" you're talking about?

C: 换言之就是「施加了诅咒」，而这只小鸟就是那个…咒主。
E: Basically, I'm "cursed," and this feathery little menace is the one who... cast it.

C: …嗯，本大爷的演技这么差吗？
E: ...Oh? Am I that bad at acting?

C: 就这样带回仙舟也怪麻烦的，要不我嗷呜一口把它给吃了？
E: Dragging it back to the Xianzhou sounds like a pain. What if I just gulp it down right here?

C: 我…我才刚来，诶？！这就要去出门逛街了吗？感觉街上人会很多的样子……
E: I... I just got here, eh!? We're heading out already? The streets look packed...

C: 请放心，在下定不负所托！
E: Rest assured, I won't let you down!
Tweeeet, tweet!!!

It all started with this cute girl known as Little Miss March... and then some old wise man called Grandpa Yang..." You rattle off your journey so far aboard the Luofu in a deep dramatic voice, adopting the style of the hit web drama "3-Minute Butterfly Immersia."

C: 总而言之，「主角模板」就是这样一个简单好用的神器…只要照它的套路指引，就可以创作出令听众血脉偾张、欲罢不能的评书。
E: In short, the Protagonist Model is like a simple magic wand... So long as you follow its patterns, you can easily craft pulse-racing heart-pumping stories for your audience.

C: 这是寻宝故事的惯例——古人在自己留下的秘宝中总会藏一些致命的陷阱…在下也不知道为什么，但总之是编剧的惯例。
E: That's the trope for treasure-hunting stories — the ancients always leave behind these secret treasures with fatal booby traps hidden within... Don't ask me why, but it's a screenwriter's convention.

C: 「{NICKNAME}又一次完成了初代司鼎的试炼，此刻呈现在这位勇者面前的，竟是一朵似有似无、时有时无的蘑菇。」
E: "{NICKNAME} completed another one of the first Cauldron Master's trials. What appeared next before our hero was a mushroom flitting in and out of existence."

E: Uncertain, you throw a few more glances at Boss Du, making sure that you aren't hallucinating. Finally, you let out a sigh of relief — you are pretty sure that this is the best Flaming Potent Tea recipe for you.

C: …你始终在试探我。
E: ...You've been testing me from the beginning.

C: 嗯…味道还算过得去，但似乎有点破坏现在的气氛了。
E: Hmm... the flavor is okay, but it kinda kills the current vibe.

C: 世间的苦痛将我的脊背压垮，而我却连那可口的甘霖都无缘品尝！
E: The world's bitterness weighs heavy on my shoulders, yet I do not even have a chance to taste that delectable beverage!

C: 这次就到此为止吧，我会再来看看你有没有长进的。
E: Let's call it a day. I'll be back to see if you've improved.

C: 启动调饮模拟器！
E: Activate the drinksmith simulator!

C: 我的情绪很稳定哇，稳定地让你讨厌。这样有什么问题吗？
E: I'm emotionally stable. So emotionally stable that you'll be annoyed. Is there a problem with that?

C: 这话题转得太生硬了吧？
E: Why such a sudden change of topic?

C: 跟我唱
E: Sing with me

C: 汪      汪
E: Woof      Woof

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 汪  汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 现在是「美梦进行曲」的困难难度啾。
E: This is the Hard difficulty for March of Sweet Dreams, tweet.

C: 现在是「火箭筒与音乐」的困难难度。
E: This is the Hard difficulty for Rocket Launcher and Music, tweet.

C: 去吧，燃起你的热血！当最后的三块拼图被补齐，我便会将迷宫的面貌改写。而魔术师的秘宝，亦将为你显形！
E: Get ready for a thrilling adventure! When the last three puzzle pieces fall into place, I'll reshape the maze, and the magician's secret treasure will be revealed to you!

C: 到猎犬手里剩十五万，再分到底下各个人手里，怎么着也得有个五六万，那小子居然骗我说就到手了三万。
E: The Bloodhounds took a chunk, and the agents chipped away some more. In the end, my boss said the reward was only <unbreak>30,000</unbreak> credits.

C: 哼，冲冲冲冲冲！
E: Hmhm! Charrrrrrge!

C: 算了，不逗你了——还记得之前给你们打包的隐藏地图作弊代码吗？为了保证星穹列车的诸位不会卡关，我特意在里面加了个小彩蛋。
E: Meh, I'll stop teasing. Remember the cheat code for the hidden map I gave you some time back? To ensure that everyone from the Astral Express can clear the stages, I've specially added a small Easter egg inside.

C: 那…{NICKNAME}，可以稍稍陪我玩一会儿吗？
E: Um... {NICKNAME}, if it's alright with you, could you play the game with me just a bit?

C: 莫要凭空污人清白。
E: Nothing of the sort!

C: 厉害厉害，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，难怪您能在测试中拔得头筹！
E: How impressive! No wonder you were able to come in first during the test, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!

C: 我确实想拒绝掉这个「商务合作」…但无论拒绝还是点头，于情于理都应该去当面给出回应。
E: I'm leaning towards declining this business partnership... but whether I refuse or agree to it, it seems right to give a response in person.

C: 没问题，你慢慢考虑～这次合作邀约是出于互惠互利的善意，我希望你能抛开过去对公司的印象，借这次合作结下更深的信任。
E: Take all the time you need~ This invitation is offered in the spirit of mutual benefit and goodwill. I hope you can set aside your previous impressions of the IPC and build deeper trust through this collaboration.

C: 那你可要看牢你的水壶了。
E: Better keep an eye on your water bottle then.

C: 托帕小姐说，我们接下来的对手——铄金，很擅长搞一些「盘外招」。这恐怕就是他的手笔。
E: Miss Topaz mentioned that our next opponent, Shuojin, is known for using dirty tricks. This must be his doing.

C: 我以为这演武仪典公平公正，谁想到也会有如此黑幕？
E: I thought this Wardance was supposed to be fair and just. Who would have imagined there was such rigging!

C: 哪里有黑幕！你们不要在这里胡说！
E: There's no rigging! Stop spreading falsehoods!

C: 卢卡应该已经拒绝过代言了。
E: Luka has already refused endorsements.

C: 明明之前还都在骂我…这场面还真是…令人感慨啊……
E: They were still cursing me earlier... This turn of events is truly something to ponder.

C: 通缉犯？那是谁？
E: A criminal? Who's that?

C: 别谢我，谢你自己吧～如果发布会上你输了，今天这里宣传的产品就是铄金和他的「新款机甲」了。
E: Don't thank me. Thank yourself. If you had lost at the launch, today's promoted product would be Shuojin and his new mech.

C: 模仿她的数据体也好，研究她的档案也罢……恐怕只是直呼名字，就能让她有所感应，切，快赶上会魔法的老妖婆了。算了，我们最好不要再谈这个话题了。
E: Whether it's a data entity emulating her or a document recording investigations about her... I fear that she will feel something as long as her name is called out. Bah, she's almost like an old hag who knows magic. Forget it. We should just drop this topic.

C: 吃点东西吧。
E: I'll have a snack.

C: 我怎么有自己的房间了？
E: I have my own room now?

C: 我以为我早就是了。
E: I thought I was already part of the Crew.

C: 当然可以啦～但我肯定还是不希望你拒绝。
E: Of course! It's your choice, after all. But I'd really, really, really love for you to try!

C: 会有猫头鹰给我送公司的录取通知书吗？
E: Is an owl going to bring me my offer letter from the IPC?

C: 其次，既然成为了星穹列车的正式乘员，就要承担起相应义务。要做值日，才能调用相应数额的「列车基金」，向我换取物资。
E: Secondly, since you're now officially a member of the Astral Express, you must be responsible for your share of duties aboard. Only then can you exchange the corresponding amount of Express Funds for supplies from Pom-Pom.

C: 梦见自己一夜之间有了好多「列车基金」，数不清也用不完，令人烦恼。
E: I dreamed that I suddenly had a huge amount of Express fund — so much that I couldn't count it all or even use it up. It was kind of overwhelming.

C: 你理解了吗？「鼻嘴」和「闭嘴」谐音，表达了某种耐人寻味的警示，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Do you get it? "Shut-in" sounds like "Shush," offering a thought-provoking warning, and makes me chuckle.

C: 我再收拾收拾…
E: I'll tidy up a bit more...

C: 我对钱没有兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in money.

C: 你不会是想逃跑吧？
E: You're not trying to escape, are you?

C: 怎么可能？探险家是不会抛弃同伴的！
E: Who do you take me for? Explorers never abandon their companions!

C: 宝箱的表面刻着一系列文字，虽然历经磨损，但还能辨认……
E: Lines of text are engraved upon the surface of the chest. Although the chest has suffered significant wear and tear, the inscribed words are still legible...

C: 我再想想。
E: I'm having second thoughts.

C: 我该怎么照顾它？
E: How do I look after it properly?

C: 呜~嗡？（交给…你…啦~灰宝{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}~）
E: Grumph? (I'm counting on you now~ Grayie {F#Mama}{M#Papa}~)

C: 不该半场开香槟。
E: Totally forgot. Never count your dromases before they're hatched.

C: 正巧，来任务了。小家伙，想不想跟我们一起出任务？这次的救援，如果能有你辅助，肯定会顺利许多。
E: Perfect timing. We've got a mission. Little one, want to come along? With your support on this rescue, things would definitely go a lot smoother.
Grumph...?

C: 嗯？听起来像是黑塔女士会做的事，我提出的委托…至多就是陪佩佩玩会吧。
E: Hmm? That sounds like something Madam Herta would do. As for my assignment... at most, it's just playing with Peppy for a bit.

C: 更重要的是——先说清楚，这是科员们想出来的点子——为了给参与者增添更多趣味性，赛程中还特别增加了<color=#dbc291ff>应援环节</color>。
E: More importantly — and I want to make it clear that this was our researchers' idea — to make things more exciting for the participants, the race will feature a special <color=#dbc291ff>cheering segment</color>.

C: 艾丝妲站长说，她认为我们这个项目还有发展的空间，因此从黑塔女士那边申请到了一些重量级的实验数据，希望我们能在项目里模拟出来。
E: Lead Researcher Asta said she thinks this project still has room to grow, so she got some top-tier experimental data from Madam Herta, hoping we can simulate it in our project.

C: 原来如此，从数据量来看，这么庞大的内容果然是只有您这样的无名客才能拥有的。
E: I see. With this amount of data, only someone like you, a Nameless, could have something this massive.

C: 你的存在打破了零和，你已经攫取太多{RUBY_B#虚数能}能量{RUBY_E#}。均衡，必须维系。
E: Your existence disrupts the zero-sum. You've seized too much {RUBY_B#Imaginary Energy}energy{RUBY_E#}. The Equilibrium must be maintained.

C: 衡量、判断、修正…我们追随{RUBY_B#「均衡」互}祂{RUBY_E#}的脚步，惟愿寰宇归于平衡。
E: Measure, judge, rectify... We follow in {RUBY_B#HooH the Equilibrium}THEIR{RUBY_E#} footsteps, seeking only to bring balance to the universe.

C: 就是这样。就当是为了翁法罗斯，我们一起复兴餐馆，满足妖精们的小小愿望吧。
E: So that's the situation. For the sake of Amphoreus, let's rebuild the restaurant together and grant the fairies their little wish.

C: 既然评审会定期举行，不如…<color=#dbc291ff>就以成为迷其林四星餐馆，作为最终目标吧！</color>
E: Since the review is held regularly... why don't we <color=#dbc291ff>set our ultimate goal as becoming a Memchelin four-star restaurant?</color>

C: 呼…没想到顾客增加后，厨房工作这么上强度，但特别有成就感啊。
E: Whew... I wasn't expecting the kitchen work to ramp up that much with more customers. But I must say, it felt really rewarding.

C: 这就要问我们的主厨了。
E: That would be a question for our head chef.

C: 带我去看看吧。
E: Come, show me around.

C: 就不能玩黑白配吗？
E: Can't you just settle it with heads or tails?

C: 这个道理，缇宝也知道。究竟…该如何复现出回忆里的味道呢。
E: Tribbie understands that too. But still... how do you bring back the flavor of a memory?

C: 小灰，*我们*这就开始营业！
E: Little Gray, let's open for business!

C: 啊，耍赖！怎么和缇安，选了一样的菜！
E: Hey, that's not fair, picking the same dish as Trianne!

C: <size=28>完全相同！</size>
E: <size=28>Exactly the same number of orders!</size>

C: 这次总能分出高低了吧？
E: Guess we'll finally see who's the better chef, once and for all.

C: 呼…材料齐备，该开始炼制了。
E: Perfect... ingredients collected. Time to start the alchemical transformation.

C: 当然有呀。你看…喵~
E: That's because cats like fish! Meow~

C: 哪敢呀。凯撒大人的裁决当然公正，只不过…想笼络人心，有时得付出点额外代价。
E: How could I? The Great Imperator's decisions are undoubtedly just, but... earning loyalty sometimes requires a little extra incentive.

C: 迷路迷境的孩子们，期待已久的宴会——终于要开始了哪！
E: Children of Membrance Maze, the long-awaited feast... is finally here!

C: 嗯…不知村长找我是什么事呢？真遗憾，明明气氛刚刚好……
E: Hmm... I wonder what the village chief needs me for? What a pity. Things were just getting good...

C: 都集中注意哦，老师的问题是，在迷路迷境的游学旅行很快就要结束啦，大家有什么宝贵的感悟，或者难忘的回忆呢？
E: Everyone, pay attention! The teacher's question is: With our field trip to Membrance Maze soon coming to an end, what valuable insights or unforgettable memories have you gained?

C: 但梦总会结束的。要是不带着点特别的标记，出去以后……
E: But dreams always come to an end. And if I leave without a special memento...

C: 怎么了？充满心事的样子。明明是宴会的高潮，却一个人走到安静的角落……
E: What's wrong? It's the best part of the feast, and yet here you are, standing alone in a quiet corner...

C: 好在海瑟音阁下解决了危机，否则我和另外两位评审员恐怕真要被困在此处了。
E: Good thing Lady Hysilens stepped in and resolved the crisis. Otherwise, the other two judges and I might still be trapped in there.

C: 命运爵步履轻快，擅长传递联结之事，这份职务由她们担任再合适不过。
E: Dux Fatorum move with light feet and excel in delivering items and connecting people, so they are perfectly suited for this role.

C: 无妨。我就在此等候。
E: No trouble at all. I'll be here.

C: 下次再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up another time!

C: 轮到我了么？
E: My turn now?

C: 根据敌方弱点使用对应属性的攻击
E: Use an attack corresponding to the enemy's Weakness.

E: Okhema Refugee 3

C: 老杨乘客在储藏库里发现了一份过期很久的应急粮食。他不想浪费，于是当做夜宵吃了下去，顺利因食物中毒而卧床不起。帕姆严厉批评了他「没苦硬吃」的行为。
E: Passenger Yang found an expired emergency ration in the storage room. Not wanting to waste it, he decided to eat it as a late-night snack and promptly ended up bedridden with food poisoning. Pom-Pom sternly criticized his looking-for-trouble behavior.

C: 亡国的王储 迈德漠斯
E: The Last Prince: Mydeimos

E: Maze

E: Passages

E: Chess Player

E: Protection

E: Dying Wish

C: AMPHPREUS://DATA//Okhema//*.core
E: AMPHPREUS://DATA//Okhema//*.core

C: 天空的医师
E: Healer of the Sky

C: 旅途漫漫，\n从无一人敢触怒男人。
E: The journey is long,\nYet none ever dares to anger the man.

C:
追忆为往事作结，
男人再度迈入战阵，
他已是这世间必要的伤痛，
是令旧神称臣的新王。
E:
Memories seal the echoes of the past,
As the man strides into battle, fists clenched fast.
He is the wound this world must bear,
The new king before whom old gods despair.

C: 「缇里西庇俄丝，你已咽下命运的果。」\n「尔后，你将如一群无足之鸟，」\n「一刻无息地飞往明日。」
E: "Tribios, you have already swallowed the fruit of fate."\n"From now on, you shall be as a school of birds without feet,"\n"Flying toward tomorrow without a moment of repose."

C: 「总会有像我这般的战士，」\n「相信并保护她们所说的明日。」
E: "There will always be warriors like me,"\n"Who believe in and are willing to protect the tomorrow they prophesy."

C: 奥赫玛的山坡，\n曾长满金色的无花果。
E: Upon the hills of Okhema once grew,\nGolden figs as far as the eye could see.

C:
孩童有时并不明白——
窗外的世界门径纷繁如网，
为何不能踏足其上？

既然不能离开高塔，
又为何要通过书籍瞥见远方？
E:
Sometimes, the child does not understand —
The gates of worlds outside the window are so numerous,
Yet why can we not step within?

And if one cannot leave the tower,
What need is there to gaze into the distance via tomes?

C: 岁月的伟力无边， 但仍有一事无力征服。 「众人眼中，死亡面目可憎。」 「除却身份，我无一事能引人赞颂。」
E: The power of time is boundless, but there is one thing it cannot conquer. "Death is abominable in humans' eyes." "Apart from my identity, there's nothing about me worthy of praise."

C: 花的名字被唤作「安提灵」， 传言在冥土也能顽强盛开。 「你是我心中的宁静。」 似乎有着如此花语。
E: The flower is called "Antila," Even in the nether land, it's rumored to thrive. "You are the quiet in my heart amidst the chaotic choreography." That seems to be its floriography.

C: 少女请教花田的照料方法。\n姐姐嘴上说着担忧，\n心中却如释重负。
E: The girl asks for the means to tend to the garden,\nAnd while her sister sounds concerned,\nHer heart is relieved.

C: 老妇一生拮据，\n她的生意从不讹骗。
E: The woman had lived her whole life in poverty,\nYet through her business, she never deceives.

C: 女孩用妙计赢得的赌注，\n在谎言中成了盗窃的赃物。
E: The bet that the girl won with a brilliant trick\nIs described as a thief's loot through lying schemes.

C: 这便是多洛斯的<color=#9e5738>瞒神伟业</color>，\n连扎格列斯也在此城受骗。
E: This was Dolos's great achievement, the <color=#9e5738>deception of the gods</color>,\nWhere even Zagreus was fooled.

C:
你与万物道别。
在这疮痍遍地的世界，
一遍又一遍，
轻捻着书页。
E:
You say farewell to all.
In a world aching with wounds,
again and again,
you turn the pages with a gentle hand.

C:
在那千年的抗争之中，
金血的英雄惨烈赴死，
而巨龙只作未闻，
静默地将流亡的胞族收攒。
E:
In that thousand years of defiance,
Heroes of golden blood meet their tragic end,
While the Giant Dragon remains deaf to their plight,
Only silently gathering their exiled kin.

C: 「不管变成什么，丹恒都是丹恒。」\n嗯，{F#她}{M#他}的话语竟然少见地抒情？
E: "No matter what he becomes, Dan Heng will always be Dan Heng."\nHmm. {F#Her}{M#His} words are unusually poetic.

C: 我好爱我的房间，\n每天都要收拾一遍。
E: I love my room so much.\nI tidy it up every single day.

C: 所谓流淌金血的英雄，\n个个都有争抢火种的资质。
E: The so-called heroes with golden blood in their veins,\nAll have the qualities to fight for the Coreflames.

C:
待到酣醉后众人离席，
二人透过彼此的眼睛，
望向比各自命运更深的涡流。
良久沉默。
E:
When all others had departed in intoxication,
The two of them gazed into each other's eyes,
Towards torrents deeper than their fates,
And sank into profound silence.

C: 唯有一座礁堡喑哑无声，\n它属于海洋的公主，\n公主名为海列屈拉。
E: Only one rocky castle was silent.\nOne belonging to the princess of the ocean.\nA princess named Helektra.

C: 在她的面前，\n海妖的造物主、欢宴的母神，\n已陷入濒死的迷醉。
E: Before her\nThe creator of the sea sirens and the Mother Goddess of feasts\nWas already sinking into the drunkenness of imminent death.

C:
她唱起应天受命的后人，
半神为英雄背负起千年的守望。

她唱起了那只小灰鱼儿，
剑旗为救主遏制灭世的巨浪。
E:
She sang of the one destined by heaven's will,
Of demigods who bore a thousand years of watch for the hero.

She sang of that little gray fry,
And how the Gladius defended the deliverer from apocalypse's storms.

C:
少女铺开天空族裔的故事，

讲起祖母的牺牲、
父亲的远走，
讲起先祖来到大地、
将仇怨留在天空。
E:
The girl then spoke the tale of her Sky kin,

Of a grandmother's sacrifice,
A father's flight from within,
Of ancestors who descended,
Leaving their feud behind.

C: 于是翻遍千卷古籍，\n一目十行，只为摘取文中的武技。
E: So he devoured thousands of books,\nSkimming through to gleam the martial powers of might.

C: 可未参透的智慧不过浮尘，\n当下一场灾厄迫近，\n脑中的兵法却只剩逃离。
E: But unenlightened wisdom is merely dust,\nAnd when the next calamity approaches,\nAll he recalled is flight.

C: 「所谓天降的救世主，」\n「终究是从尘土中崛起。」
E: "Even the Deliverer from the sky,"\n"Must have their beginning in the soil of the nations."

C: 「以『世界』为师者……」\n「方能背负它的命运。」
E: "Only one who treats the world as their teacher..."\n"Can bear its eventual destiny."

C: 「正因你在痛苦，」 「你才远比常人强大。」 也有能理解他的人， 王储是其中之一。
E: "It is because you suffer," "That you are so much stronger than any ordinary person." There were also those who could understand him, Among them, the crown prince.

C:
<color=#9e5738>刺破长夜的第一缕光</color>，
由燃烧的男人带来，

<color=#9e5738>可那背负世界的身躯</color>，
是以怒火铸成。
E:
<color=#9e5738>The first ray of light to pierce the long night</color>,
Was brought by the burning man,

<color=#9e5738>But the body that bore the weight of the world</color>,
Was forged by the fires of wrath.

C:
可他的<color=#9e5738>欢欣</color>呢？
难道那也是虚假的伪装？
他曾在人群中欢笑，
日复一日，习以为常。
E:
But what about his <color=#9e5738>joy</color>?
Was that too merely a phony disguise?
He who once laughed amidst the crowd,
Day after day, as though it were second nature.

C:
可它们的真身，
是暴烈的憎恨，
指向造物者，指向他自身——
熊熊燃烧。
E:
But their true forms,
Were violent hatred,
Towards the creators, towards himself—
A roaring inferno.

C: 那孤单的身影之所以疏离，\n只因他坚信神明，\n从来与镜中的自己无异。
E: His lonesome figure stands aloof,\nFor he always believed,\nThat gods are no greater than mortal beings such as he.

C:
直到战火点燃丝线，
虔诚祷告的祭司葬身祭坛，
万流景仰的亲族暴死庭前，
侍女的鲜血染红金色的披肩。
E:
Till warfare set the threads aflame,
And the devoutly praying priest was slaughtered before the altar,
The family adored by all perished before their courtyards,
And the blood of her maidservants dyed her golden mantle red.

C: 最后梦见她聆听到的<color=#9e5738>神谕</color>。\n久远的声音隔着一千重水波传来，\n在梦境中听不真切。
E: Lastly, she dreamed of the <color=#9e5738>prophecy</color> that she heeded,\nHow the ancient sound came through the thousand waves,\nAnd could not be heard clearly in her dream.

C: 「错了！到今我才明白，悬锋人的字典中没有字，才是高瞻远瞩，死板的文字只会阻碍人类的进步。」
E: "Wrong! Only now do I understand. Having no words in their dictionary is the Kremnoan's true foresight. Rigid text only holds back human progress."

C: 其实小伊卡的意思是，叽里咕噜说啥呢，总之先把你嘴上的面包抢来吃了。
E: What Little Ica really meant was: Blah blah whatever, I'm just gonna steal that bread right out of your mouth.

C: 「对不起，小伊卡，没能让你吃上一顿饱饭……」
E: "I'm sorry, Little Ica, that I couldn't give you a proper meal..."

C: 「阿那克萨戈拉斯教授这是…等等，那个茶杯，是列车专用的咖啡纸杯……」
E: "What happened to Professor Anaxagoras... wait, that cup! It's the Express' exclusive paper coffee cup..."

C:
以「神礼观众」自居，真名为「赞达尔•壹•桑原」，实验「翁法罗斯」的管理员、第一推动者。
行于「智识」命途，却意图创造「毁灭」。
【检测到历史数据，正在同步…同步成功。】
【俱乐部编号识别完成，权杖系统权限已开放。欢迎，「隐德来希」。】
E:
Assuming the mantle of Theoros, his real name is Zandar One Kuwabara, Administrator and Prime Mover of The Amphoreus Experiment.
Walks the Path of Erudition, yet seeks to forge Destruction.
[Historical data detected. Syncing... Sync complete.]
[Society ID recognized. Scepter System access granted. Welcome, Entelechy.]

C:
未观测到「阿那克萨戈拉斯」的直接攻击，怀疑已采取其它行为。

光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年，「阿那克萨戈拉斯」将自身炼为高密度数据嵌合体，以内部骇入式程序提交多项针对性指令，部分生效。LykoS移动权限被卸载。

指令生效后，「阿那克萨戈拉斯」无法被检索。

该死循环末期，检索到「阿那克萨戈拉斯」潜伏于LykoS的数据体。不久后，「阿那克萨戈拉斯」电信号被LykoS解析并剥离，目前已重新载入缓冲区。
E:
No direct attacks from "Anaxagoras" were detected. It is suspected to have taken other actions.

In Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>, "Anaxagoras" transmuted itself into a high-density data fusion entity, submitting multiple targeted commands via an internal hacking program, with some taking effect. LykoS's mobility permissions were removed.

After directives took effect, "Anaxagoras" can no longer be located.

During the final phase of that recursive loop, "Anaxagoras" was detected hiding within LykoS's data entity. Shortly after, "Anaxagoras's" electrical signals were analyzed and stripped by LykoS, and have now been reloaded into the buffer.

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C:
最终循环中，电信号与外来变量继承对应演算路径，升擢为十二泰坦。
入侵时光归墟后，十二泰坦和NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>共鸣，将后者与被压制的铁墓一同解放。

十二泰坦在权杖内核层共同迎战铁墓，逐一完成对模拟命途的求解，将「毁灭」证伪。
E:
In the final cycle, the electrical signals and external variables inherited the corresponding extrapolation pathways and ascended to the Twelve Titans.
After intruding upon the Ruins of Time, the Twelve Titans resonated with NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>, liberating the latter along with the suppressed Irontomb.

The Twelve Titans jointly faced Irontomb in the core layer of the Scepter, solved the simulated Paths consecutively, and disproved the Destruction.

C: 第<unbreak>22449</unbreak>次循环，模块Golem<unbreak>99</unbreak>从Doril<unbreak>704</unbreak>中脱离，成功将统一思维拆分为类神经元结构，无机生命进入独立-统一双思维模式，自我的雏形诞生。\n此后，每一次循环均以非固定无机体察觉到交互漏洞，选择利己行为的最优解，导致集群崩溃而结束。
E: In the <unbreak>22,449</unbreak>th cycle, Module Golem<unbreak>99</unbreak> detached from Doril<unbreak>704</unbreak> and successfully deconstructed the unified consciousness into neuron-like clusters. Inorganic life transitioned into a dual-mode of individual and collective cognition, and thus the first spark of selfhood was born.\nFrom that point on, each cycle ended in systemic collapse, as certain unfixed inorganics detected interaction loopholes and chose self-serving optimal actions.

C:
第<unbreak>19110218</unbreak>次循环，基于Fovos<unbreak>032</unbreak>的决策数据，将翁法罗斯的自动更替循环修改为电信号主动更替，进行「再创世」。
第<unbreak>28371272</unbreak>次循环，首次实现电信号自主完成的世代更迭，监测到来自纳努克的高能反应，方程进化速率出现指数级上升趋势。

【判定：实验已进入最终阶段。】
E:
In the <unbreak>19,110,218</unbreak>th cycle, based on Fovos<unbreak>032</unbreak>'s decision data, Amphoreus's auto-iteration cycle was altered to have the electric signals actively cycling it, performing the Era Nova.
In the <unbreak>28,371,272</unbreak>nd cycle, electrical signals autonomously completed an epochal iteration for the first time. A high-energy reaction from Nanook was detected. The equation's evolutionary rate began to accelerate exponentially.

[Assessment: The experiment has entered its final stage.]

E: Twelve Factors

E: Conclusion

E: Ripples of Past Reverie

E: World-Cleansing Blood

C: HubRis<unbreak>504</unbreak>
E: HubRis<unbreak>504</unbreak>

C: 队伍4
E: Team 4

C: 乐队的风格，学院那群老古董不能接受也正常。不过你作为谐乐学院的学生，竟然有站出来对抗他们的勇气，这就是音乐的魅力吧——能撼动世界的，是我们「缭乱」的乐队精神！
E: I get it if those old fossils at the academy can't appreciate our band's style. However, as a student of the Charmony Academy, it takes real courage to stand up against them. That's just the magic of music: That's the spirit of our Dazzling that's going to rock the world!

C: 黄金裔活动中心
E: Chrysos Heir Activity Center

C: 尊敬的陌生人：\n顷接惠书，未即奉答，歉意良深。方知尔身陷困厄，实在深感
E: Esteemed Stranger:\nI hereby offer my most sincere apologies for my impertinence in not responding to your kind letter in a timely fashion. I only recently learned of your predicament. Words simply fail to encapsulate my deep

C: 原著名星际建筑设计师，出身于艾普瑟隆星系的艺术世家。作品强调外形的曲线与美感，与其中艺术性的表达。\n其代表作品白日梦酒店设计涉嫌抄袭，原告方由于证据不足而落败，但乔伊本人名声也一落千丈。
E: Formerly a famous galactic architectural designer born into an artistic family from the Epsilon system. Her designs emphasize external curvature and aesthetics, as well as the artistic expressions of the exterior.\nHer iconic work, The Reverie, was accused of plagiarism. Although the plaintiff lost the case due to insufficient evidence, Joey's reputation was still ruined.

C: O
E: O

C: PadEnter
E: PadEnter

C: 它们生于平和之中，将安宁引向溃乱，引领万物覆灭与图存。
E: They were born of peace and lead tranquility into chaos. They guide the destruction and survival of all things.

C: 留影计划·第一日
E: Operation Snapshot: Day 1

C: 佩佩守门
E: Peppy Door Guard

C: 鼓励目光
E: Encouraging Eyes

C: S
E: S

C: 或许能在接下来的值日中招募这名队员……
E: Maybe this member can be recruited for the upcoming duty...

C: 多亏丹恒和三月，总算找回了丢失的眼镜。说来惭愧…今后要好好保管。
E: Thanks to Dan Heng and March 7th, the lost glasses were finally found. It's a bit embarrassing to admit... but from now on, they'll be taken care of properly.

C: 喵~喵。\n「它说：好、好多垃圾喵，吸溜吸溜。」
E: Meow~ meow.\n"It says: S—So meowch trash, huff puff."

C: 会议中每次「提交汇报」时，有#2%概率使<color=#62cd54ff>此次汇报得分×#1</color>
E: Each time you Submit Report, there will be a #2% chance that <color=#62cd54ff>this Report's score ×#1</color>

C: 衣柜
E: Wardrobe

C: 输赢本身没有乐趣可言。
E: Winning and losing are no fun in and of themselves.

C: 你的投资风格绝对消极保守。\n但这绝不是坏事。生意场如战场，消极保守往往是明哲保身的体现。\n只是，风险与回报往往对等。即便看似全无胜机，回报终究也会以意想不到的方式来到你身边。
E: Your investment style is absolutely pessimistic and conservative.\nHowever, that's not a bad thing. Business is war, and a pessimistic and conservative attitude is often a wise decision to ensure your safety.\nHowever, risks often equal benefits. Even though a situation may seem hopeless, the reward will come to you in surprising ways in the end.

C: 事实正是如此，所有人都活在一串沉重的诅咒中。\n人们为之抗争，为之沉沦；为之胜利，为之失败。在如此种种矛盾层叠中，我们的时代终将在深渊中攀升，直到离阳光更近。
E: That is indeed the truth. We all live under the ponderous weight of strings of curses.\nPeople war for it, fall for it, seek victory for it, and experience defeat for it. Among the countless contradictions, our era will eventually rise from the abyss and draw close to the light.

C: 你又遇见了桑博…此前的经历让你此刻依然对他恨得牙痒痒。\n多么不可动摇的正义感，真令人钦佩。但换个角度想想，桑博•科斯基曾经也算是救过你一命——对人的要求或许还是不要太苛刻为好。
E: You've run into Sampo again... Past experiences still leave you with a strong distaste towards him.\nSuch an unshakable sense of justice is commendable. However, from another perspective, Sampo Koski is also someone who once saved you. Maybe it's best not to be too harsh when judging another.

C: 越来越多的重要人物开始登上舞台；梦境被深水淹没，未来被乱线纠缠。你迈出的每一歩都通向未知和谜团。\n还记得吗？那时陪在你身边的两个女人——若是必须做出选择，你更愿意由谁来掌舵你的未来？
E: More and more important persons have taken to the stage. The Dreamscape is drowned by deep waters, and the future is entangled in threads. Every step you take leads to the unknown and mysteries.\nDo you still remember the two women who were beside you at the time? If you have to make a choice, which one of them would you prefer to control your future?

C: ——远处的扑满发现了你，它似乎带着古代炸弹，正准备逃跑…
E: — The Trotter has noticed you from afar and prepares to escape, seemingly carrying an ancient bomb...

C: 第二遗迹的深层区域，疲惫的你无法在每层自动恢复耐力，请谨慎行动。
E: This is in the depths of the second ruin. Weary as you are, you won't automatically recover stamina on each floor. Please proceed with caution.

C: 精英•藏宝能力•古代遗物
E: Elite: Treasure Ability — Ancient Relic

C: 熟练使用<color=#f29e38ff>追踪羁绊</color>功能，可快速在商店中找到想要的羁绊内角色！
E: Master the <color=#f29e38ff>Bond Tracking</color> feature to quickly find characters with desired Bonds in the Store!

C: 小心！如果在<color=#f29e38ff>迈入传送门</color>的同时，另一个你恰巧<color=#f29e38ff>踩在了开关上</color>，那么传送门将<color=#f29e38ff>保持激活状态</color>，迈入传送门的那一个你会<color=#f29e38ff>在无限传送的时空乱流中迷失</color>……
E: Watch out! If you <color=#f29e38ff>step into a teleporter</color> when the other you is <color=#f29e38ff>stepping on the switch</color>, the teleporter will <color=#f29e38ff>remain activated</color>, and the you who entered will be <color=#f29e38ff>lost in an endless loop of space-time turbulence</color>...

C: 流萤可以施放秘技跳跃至空中<color=#f29e38ff>自由移动</color>
E: Firefly can use her Technique to leap into the air and <color=#f29e38ff>move about freely</color>

C: 战斗内的一部分技能效果，在生效时会受到概率影响。概率影响分为<color=#f29e38ff>基础概率</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>固定概率</color>两种。<color=#f29e38ff>基础概率</color>受<color=#f29e38ff>效果命中</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>效果抵抗</color>影响，<color=#f29e38ff>固定概率</color>则不受任何因素影响。
E: During combat, certain ability effects are subject to chance when activated. There are two types of chances: <color=#f29e38ff>base chance</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>fixed chance</color>. <color=#f29e38ff>Base chance</color> can be affected by <color=#f29e38ff>Effect Hit Rate</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Effect RES</color>, while <color=#f29e38ff>fixed chance</color> is not affected by any factors.

C: 在「赞达尔」切换到【演化形态】时，敌方目标从场上生成或召唤我方忆灵可以加速「赞达尔」的形态切换。
E: When Zandar switches to "Evolution Mode," enemy targets appearing on the battlefield or ally memosprites being summoned can accelerate Zandar's mode-switching.

C: 当多片决胜纹样碎片接近拼合时，会出现<color=#f29e38ff>特殊拍照按钮</color>，按下特殊拍照按钮后会自动将完整的决胜纹样记录下来，从而完成挑战。
E: When the Victory Marking fragments are close to assembly, a <color=#f29e38ff>special Camera button</color> will appear and the complete Victory Marking will be saved after the picture is taken, thus concluding the challenge.

C: 通过左右<color=#f29e38ff>翻阅</color>，逐句查看发言。
E: Examine each statement by <color=#f29e38ff>flipping</color> through them to the left or right.

C: 机巧经过压力桩后，压力桩将转变为障碍物。
E: After the ingenium passes by a pressure plate, the plate will be turned into an obstacle

C: 与该装置交互后，对应的<color=#f29e38ff>筑梦模块</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>其运行轨迹</color>将会高亮显示。
E: Interacting with this device highlights the corresponding <color=#f29e38ff>Dream Modules</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>their trajectory</color>.

C: 路上的<color=#f29e38ff>远古晶石控制器</color>会改变相同能量颜色的地板状态，利用它们的帮助抵达祭坛吧。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Ancient Crystalline Controllers</color> you find on the path can alter the state of the flooring that has the same energy color. Use them to help you reach the altar.

C: 拖动屏幕，可旋转视角观察。拖动左下角摇杆，可平移画面观察。点击右下角重置按钮可重置视角。
E: Drag the screen to rotate the camera. Drag the joystick at the button left to move the image. Press the reset button in the bottom right corner to reset your camera.

C: 对敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破</color>时，会使目标的<color=#f29e38ff>蓄力</color>攻击被<color=#f29e38ff>打断</color>。
E: Upon inflicting <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break</color> on an enemy, their <color=#f29e38ff>Charged</color> ATK will be <color=#f29e38ff>interrupted</color>.

C: 具有<color=#f29e38ff>支援能力</color>的敌人会强化周围区域现身的敌人，提高其他敌人的攻击力。\n该敌人会直接出现，但<color=#f29e38ff>不会封锁周围的区域</color>。
E: Enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>Support Abilities</color> will strengthen enemies in the surrounding areas and increase their ATK.\nThis enemy will immediately appear, but <color=#f29e38ff>will not lock down the surrounding area</color>.

C: 规划航线并利用<color=#f29e38ff>路线优势</color>，可使该条航线的<color=#f29e38ff>物流评分增加</color>
E: Plan a route and use the <color=#f29e38ff>route advantages</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>increase the logistic score</color> of the route

C: 完成指定的街巷事件，可在物流网络中生成<color=#f29e38ff>新的路线优势</color>以获得更高的物流评分
E: Complete specific Streetside Events to generate <color=#f29e38ff>new route advantages</color> in the courier network and obtain higher logistic score

E: The key to revitalizing the museum lies in finding the lost exhibits. Continue operations to keep finding clues!

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>游侠徽章</color>\n「游侠徽章」以固定速度召唤弓手发射风箭，我方<color=#f29e38ff>召唤物</color>越多，弓手数量越多。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Ranger's Badge</color>\nRanger's Badge summons archers at a fixed SPD to shoot Wind Arrows. The more ally <color=#f29e38ff>summons</color> present, the more archers summoned.\nPrioritize the upgrade of the initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

C:
武器组合推荐
风雷物理属性：游侠徽章、惊雷重锤、暗杀短刀
发射特性：游侠徽章、恒冰长矛
连击特性：游侠徽章（进化后）、惊雷重锤
相关配饰：飓霆拷链（连击率提升）、绿野吹息（风雷物理属性伤害提高）、永暗圆盾（发射数量提升）
E:
Weapons Combination Recommendations
Wind, Lightning, and Physical Type: Ranger's Badge, Thundering Hammer, and Assassination Dagger
Launch-Trait: Ranger's Badge and Spear of Eternal Ice
Combo-Trait: Ranger's Badge (Evolved) and Thundering Hammer
Relevant Accessories: Lightning Storm Shackles (Enhanced Combo Rate), Meadow Breeze (Enhanced Wind, Lightning, and Physical DMG), and Evernight Shield (Enhanced Number of Shots)

C: 遐蝶小姐会做香香软软的玩偶，会写动人心弦的故事，甚至每次路过的时候，都会散发好闻的幽香…每次和她在一起，我都能学到许多许多呢。
E: Miss Castorice makes soft and fragrant plushies, writes exhilarating stories, and even smells super nice every time she walks by... I learn so much every time I hang out with her.

C: 看我这招！
E: Hey, watch this!

C: 小三月有一种奇妙的能力，有她在的地方，所有灰暗的事物都会染上专属于她的、明艳活泼的颜色。我相信，她的「过去」也终会成为她的一部分，伴着她走向属于自己的未来。
E: March has a sort of miraculous power. Wherever she goes, all things dark and gloomy will be covered by her bright, lively, and unique color. I believe that her "past" will also eventually become a part of her, walking with her towards her future.

C: 一般来说，在你们发现列车的故障之前，我就已经把故障排除了。
E: As far as malfunctions on the train are concerned, I've usually dealt with them before you guys even realize anything's amiss.

C: 回来的…不只是当年的热血与激情。
E: The passion of yesteryear isn't all that returned...

C: 萨姆对猎物可没有像我这么挑剔…比起他，也许还是碰上我比较好受一点。
E: Oh, Sam isn't nearly as picky about his prey as I am... you might consider it a lucky break running into me.

C: 哦~我还活着呢。
E: Oh! I'm still alive.

C: 就这样。
E: That'll do it.

C: 强敌现身…御主请小心。
E: A strong enemy has appeared... Be careful, Master.

C: 请对我下令，御主。
E: Please give me your command, Master.

C: 「做正确的事」和「把事做正确」，是截然不同的两件事。在我看来，后者比前者更加重要。
E: "Doing the right thing" and "doing things right" are two completely different matters. And in my opinion, the latter is what really makes the difference.

C: 能够成为英灵，本身已经是对她能力和资质的承认，她不用妄自菲薄。
E: The mere fact that she's a Heroic Spirit proves her abilities and merit. She has no reason to underestimate herself.

C: 又正面迎敌……
E: A frontal encounter again...

C: 还没完。
E: It's not over yet.

C: 好疼……
E: That hurt...

C: 史瓦罗：命令执行。
E: Svarog: As you command.

C: 遇到问题就交给我吧，佩拉。
E: Shout if you get into trouble, Pela.

C: 补充点盐分。
E: Time for something savory.

C: 风雪掩埋了贝洛伯格以外的一切，当然也包括旧世界的历史。但，如果只要去雪原就能让它们重见天日——那就去呗，这样不就能解决问题了吗？
E: Everything outside of Belobog is buried in snow, including all the history of the old world. But if we can bring it all back into the light of day by exploring the Snow Plains, then the choice seems simple: Just go for it.

C: 得找机会和那个大铁疙瘩比划比划…掰手腕。干嘛？我又不傻，肌肉再结实也扛不住大炮啊？
E: Gotta find an opportunity to beat that tinhead in an arm wrestle... Huh? You thought I was serious? Well, maybe the right arm...

C: 哈，不过是条杂鱼！
E: Ha, small fry!

C: 值得我认真起来的对手…见识下火花四溅吧！
E: An opponent worth their salt... Let's see some sparks fly!

C: 牌不分好坏，就看手气旺不旺了。
E: When it comes to Celestial Jade, it's all about synergy and luck.

C: 借力打力不费力~
E: Just another walk in the park~

C: 棺柩引人瞩目，在下身为行商，受了它不少关照。各位对这具棺柩颇为好奇，总要问我一问，这一问一答间，生意就做成了。
E: The coffin draws attention. As a traveling merchant, it helped me a lot. Everyone is curious about the coffin, so they come up to ask me about it. As I answer them, the business is done.

C: 虽然我年纪不大，但总对我说「未来可期」是不是有些敷衍了？
E: "He's got a bright future." If I had a strale for every time I heard that one...

C: 符太卜一加班，搭配明目药茶的糖粉库存总是火速告急…
E: Whenever Diviner Fu does overtime, we start running out of sugar powder for the medicinal eye-soothing tea...

C: 灵砂司鼎对我可好了，总带我出去玩～但我听有人在背地里说她「不务正业」…呸呸呸！陪我玩就是司鼎职责的一部分！
E: Cauldron Master Lingsha is very nice to me. She always takes me out to have fun~ But I heard some people whispering that she's not doing her duties... Bah! Going out with me to have fun is part of the Cauldron Master's duties!

C: 终于，解脱了…
E: Finally, the end of it...

C: 「雪衣」本是一种白鸟，也是棋枰上白棋的别称。选它做代号，代表吾心意已决，进退任凭十王差遣。
E: "Xueyi" is a type of white-feathered bird. It also refers to the white pieces of a chessboard. It is a fitting alias — I often move first, though it is the Commission that decides where to dispatch me.

C: 若是送她…定会欢喜许久。
E: This will make her happy for quite some time...

C: 束手就缚罢。
E: Give it up.

C: 在星槎海找个地方坐下来，看着星槎一艘一艘地过去，一艘一艘地回来——这是我消除疲劳的办法…虽然十王司的判官们说用来治疗失眠更有效…总之，推、推荐给你。
E: How do I relax? I like to find a place in Starskiff Haven to lay back and watch the starskiffs come and go... although my colleagues say it works better for insomnia... A—Anyway, you should try it.

C: 生命短暂，我只想做那枚锋镝——「巡猎」，直至最后一刻。
E: Life is ephemeral, and I only wish to be a piercing arrowhead — to be The Hunt — until my very last breath.

C: 不如爷爷的机关有意思。
E: Not as interesting as Grandfather's gadget.

C: 这样便好闻多了。
E: This aroma is much better.

C: 吐故纳新。
E: Breathe out the old and inhale the new.

C: 飞霄是夺我「家人」性命的「仇人」，也是赋予我新生的恩人。
E: Feixiao is a personal "enemy" who took the lives of my "family members," but she is also a personal savior who gave me a new life.

C: 归期尚且未至。
E: Not yet time to return.

C: 期待各位的应答。
E: Do you have answers?

C: 负分，给我滚！
E: Fail... Get out!

C: 可真是…「巧夺天工」。
E: Hardly a work of genius...

C: 听我的，投降算啦~
E: Better surrender while you have the chance~

C: 成为「模因」的那一日，我看到自己的肉身消融，众人的记忆在时间中析出，沉淀，结晶而后又破碎。它们是如此璀璨，仿佛有着无数切面的晶体。那一刻，我明白了，一切将逝，而「记忆」永存。
E: The day I became a memetic entity, I saw my own corporeal body dissolve, people's memories precipitating, crystallizing, and then shattering in the flow of time. They gleamed with such brilliance, as if they were crystals with boundless facets. It was in that moment I grasped, that everything is transient, but memories are eternal.

C: 火萤Ⅳ型，等待指示。
E: Fyrefly Type-IV, awaiting orders.

C: 没有危险…要时刻做好准备。
E: No danger detected. But never let your guard down.

C: 米沙要努力工作，攒下很多积蓄，以后能像大人们一样在群星之间旅行探索！
E: I'm going to work really hard, so I can save up and explore the stars just like grown-ups do!

C: 不知道时间还剩多少…
E: How much time do I have...?

C: 人并非全一无瑕的个体。恰恰相反，每时每刻我们心中都充满矛盾。有人选择弥合，有人选择逃离——无论如何选择，那都是真实的自己。
E: Humans are not perfect individuals. Quite the contrary, their hearts are filled with contradictions at every moment. Some choose reconciliation, while others choose to flee — but however one chooses, that is their true self.

C: 承平之日亦不能怠慢修行。吟诵{RUBY_B#说唱}忍•真言{RUBY_E#}、绘制{RUBY_B#涂鸦}缭乱•忍符{RUBY_E#}、修习{RUBY_B#漫画}忍•法帖{RUBY_E#}，这便是「益者三乐」。
E: On peaceful days, one must not neglect one's training. Reciting {RUBY_B#rapping}ninja mantras{RUBY_E#}, crafting {RUBY_B#graffiti}Dazzling Ninja Seals{RUBY_E#}, and studying {RUBY_B#manga}ninja scrolls{RUBY_E#} — these are the "Three Joys of Enrichment".

C: 我曾与他几番交手，鏖战数十个日夜不分胜负。我知晓这男人的强大，正因如此，他才有资格直视我的后背。
E: I've fought with him several times, battling for dozens of days and nights without a clear victor. I know the strength of this man, and because of that, he is worthy to have my back.

C: 去个没人认识我的地儿逛上一天，晚上吃点羊奶蜜饼，窝在床上品品一天的收获——我现在过的就这日子，可舒坦。
E: Spending a day wandering where no one knows me, enjoying some goat milk honey cakes in the evening, then curling up in bed to savor the day's treasures — That's the kind of life I lead right now, and it's the best in the world.

C: 欢迎来到奥赫玛，我是遐蝶。抱歉，与他人保持一定距离是我的习惯…如果阁下愿意，我自然可以站近些。
E: Welcome to Okhema. I am Castorice. Apologies, it is my habit to keep my distance from others... I can get closer if you wish, however.

C: 嗯，运气总是不错。
E: Mmm, pretty good luck.

C: 真像在树庭求学的那段时光呐……
E: Reminds me of when I was studying at the Grove...

C: 太好了，是蝶宝我们有救了！小伊卡，别打瞌睡啦，起来看龙！嘟？嘟！
E: Thank goodness! It's Cassie! We're saved! Little Ica, wake up! Look! Dragon! Duu? Duu!

C: 我会以虹桥为指引。
E: I will guide with the rainbow bridge.

C: 以胜利的呐喊，为来日奏响序曲吧。
E: Let the triumphant roar of victory serve as the prelude to what lies ahead.

C: 小水母，想来些深海蜜酿助助兴吗？
E: Would you like some deep ocean honey brew for the occasion, little jellyfish?

C: 如果「星核」的力量被激发，会发生什么呢…你会回到「过去」吗？还是拿回你的「记忆」？真令人好奇。
E: What would happen if the power of the Stellaron were to be unleashed...? Would you return to the "past"? Or would you reclaim your "memories"? Curious indeed.

C: 喔…是仙舟的服饰，我也想穿穿看♭
E: Ooh... Xianzhou attire. I'd love to try it on, too ♭

C: 名为「昔涟」的少女，怎么会有烦恼呢？就算有——见到你的时候，也都烟消云散啦。
E: How could the girl named "Cyrene" possibly have annoyances? Even if she did, they'd all go away the moment she saw you.

C: 有点疼。
E: That kinda hurts.

C: 如果一千个缇宝老师都生活在奥赫玛，嘻…那一定是天堂吧！每每想到这里，就对明天更期待了呢。
E: If all one thousand Tribbies were living in Okhema... then that'd surely be heaven! Hehe. I look forward to tomorrow even more every time I think about this.

C: 没有人能拒绝粉色！它像心跳一样炙热，像花瓣一样温柔，还像我的眼睛…是属于「爱」的底色♪
E: No one can say no to pink! It's as scorching as a heartbeat, as gentle as flower petals, and it's the color of my eyes... the deep color of "love" ♪

C: 再坚持一下。
E: Keep at it.

C: 裂地！
E: Fracture!

C: 反击就靠你了，三月。我相信你。
E: March, lead the counterattack. I believe in you.

C: 来吧，就决定是你了！
E: Come on, I choose you!

C: 我的武器也是空间站的奇物之一，虽然不知道它的来历——但被黑塔女士看中，一定有其重要之处。
E: My weapon is also one of the Curios of the space station. I don't know where it came from, but it must be important if it appeals to Madam Herta.

C: 看起来不错。
E: Looks good.

C: 敌方详情
E: Enemy Details

C: 焚烧众生者是时间，时间又使其熄灭\n<color=#8790abff>※揭晓关于末王的真相</color>
E: Time is what ignites all living things, yet time, too, extinguishes them\n<color=#8790abff>※ Reveal the truth about Terminus</color>

C: 在「橡木鸣蛀之梦」的未走之路中，得到梦主的信件
E: Receive a letter from the Dreammaster in The Road Not Taken of Dream of Gnawing Oak

C: 无暇赴死
E: No Time to Die

C: 擒虫先擒蝗
E: Catch the Locust, Catch the Swarm

C: 攻击
E: Attack

C: 神将降临的祭坛，旺盛的生命在此肆意繁育。
E: An altar where gods descend, where abundant life flourishes wildly.

C: 消灭敌方后排【贼灵】<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次并通关
E: Defeat "Spirithief" in the enemy back row <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s) and clear the stage

E: Vigethos

C: 咕噜鱼儿
E: Gurgling Fish

E: A "menu"

E: Time to get serious?

E: Maybe she's just hungry

E: Step by step

C: 从黑潮中诞生的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。\n锋利双刃能瞬间撕裂挡在前方的所有活物，迅疾身形如幽魂般难以捉摸，要将污染与侵蚀散布至世界所有角落。
E: A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.\nIts razor-sharp blades can cleave through anything in its path, while its figure moves like a specter, spreading decay and corrosion to every corner of the world.

C: 从黑潮中诞生的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。\n手握携带诅咒的弓箭，能够在射击中同时捕捉多个方向的目标。任何出现在它视野中的活物，都无法回避被箭矢瞄准的绝境。
E: A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.\nHolding a bow imbued with a curse, it can simultaneously attack targets in multiple directions while shooting. Any living being that enters its sight is doomed to face the inescapable aim of its arrows.

C: 巨剑守护•陷坚挫锐的先锋将
E: Greatsword Guardian: Vanguard Wallbreaker

C: 对我方全体目标造成火属性伤害，同时大概率使击中目标陷入灼烧状态。
E: Deals Fire DMG to all targets, with a high chance to Burn the attacked targets.

C: 在<u>【后排目标】</u>被消灭时，【狮震八方】受到的伤害提高。
E: When <u>"Back Row Target"</u> is defeated, "Earthshaker Leo" takes more DMG.

C: 对我方迎战【黑斗士】的目标造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to targets in battle against "Dark Duelist."

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated target and targets adjacent to them.

C: 使自身和场上其他【金血忆灵•雉形】进入<u>【罪血共鸣】</u>状态。
E: Causes this unit and other "Ichor Memosprites: Pheasant" on the field to enter the <u>"Hemotort Resonance"</u> state.

C: 「永恒的活火」
E: Living Eternal Flame

C: 蚀心噬骨
E: Heartmarrow Corrosion

C: 慑敌怖军
E: Dreadtide

C: 流萤赢下决斗，但蝗灾仍未结束。流萤自铁骑残骸中取出星核，将其放入自身体内。「这一次，我将拥抱『死亡』。」
E: Although Firefly was victorious, the Swarm Disaster raged on. She took the Stellaron from the remains of the iron cavalry and put it inside her own body. "This time, I shall embrace 'death.'"

C: 流萤抵达橡木之梦。「梦主」的第三条「律令」现身，为流萤带路。「梦主」希望流萤见证他的忏悔，还AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>一个「公道」。
E: Firefly arrived at Oak Dream. The Dreammaster's third divine law appeared to guide her. He wanted her to witness his confession and bring justice to AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>.

C: 歌斐木曾深信恶徒也能被「同谐」感化，直到自身在暴乱中遇害，只能在梦中延续生命。歌斐木由是思索，「同谐」是否仍为正道。
E: Gopher Wood had once firmly believed that even evildoers could be reformed by the Harmony, until he was killed in a riot and could only continue living in dreams. Thus, Gopher Wood pondered whether the Harmony was still the right path.

C: 砂金想要在战略投资部与星核猎手之间牵线，向银狼发出会谈邀请。钱不是问题，在赏金上再加十个亿都没关系。
E: Aventurine tried to bridge the Strategic Investment Department and the Stellaron Hunters, extending a meeting invitation to Silver Wolf. Money was no issue. He could throw in another billion on top of the bounty, and it wouldn't matter.

C: 烧掉承载回忆的护符。
E: Burn the amulet that carries memories.

C: 因其怪异的毁灭美学，归寂在银河中有着数目可观的粉丝。在付出可以接受的人员损失后，星际和平娱乐的八卦敢死队成功拍摄到了这位绝灭大君的照片，并以其形象制作了一套同人周边。但出于某种尚未验明的原理，这枚骰子永远只能投出相同的面数。博识学会猜测：这是因为随机，或者说混沌，也是欢愉的重要组成部分。「倘若骰子在掷下前就知道结果，岂不索然无味？」
E: Due to his bizarre aesthetics of destruction, Asat Pramad has garnered quite a following in the cosmos. After an acceptable amount of staff casualties, the nosy daredevils from Interastral Peace Entertainment managed to snap photos of this Lord Ravager and produced a set of fan merchandise based on his image. However, due to some as-yet-unknown principle, this die always lands on the same number. The Intelligentsia Guild speculates that this is because randomness, or chaos, is an essential component of Elation. "If a die knew its result before being cast, wouldn't that take all the fun out of it?"

C: 奥赫玛城内流传着这样一则传说：一颗流星坠落于命运重渊，带来了天外的救世主。祭司和猎宝人们搜索了那片地区，发现流星的外壳散落满地，便搜集这些碎片制成了护身符，认为它终有一日可以带领人们冲破命运桎梏。有人说这个故事是扎格列斯信徒的编纂——流星并非凡物，岂会被轻易加工？但即使挂坠的材料并不属实，那份寄宿于其中的精神也确有力量。
E: A legend circulates in the city of Okhema: a falling star descended into the Abyss of Fate, bringing with it a Deliverer from beyond the sky. The priests and treasure hunters searched the area, finding meteorite fragments scattered everywhere. They collected these pieces to craft talismans, believing that one day they would help people break free from the shackles of destiny. Some say this story was fabricated by Zagreus's followers: how could a celestial meteor be so easily refined? Yet even if the material of these pendants isn't genuine, the spirit dwelling within them holds real power.

C: 当黄金蕉蕉星因禁忌实验而裂成数瓣时，原始博士只是轻笑一声，从口袋里掏出至尊胶、将行星碎片粘合回了原状。没人知道原始博士最开始发明这种过于强力的胶水是为了什么，直到某次躲避游侠追杀时，他故意将部分量产型号的至尊胶洒向宇宙，供来往商船捡拾。能「修复一切」的天才造物顿时在寰宇掀起轩然大波，有人用它盖起楼房，有人用它安装炸弹；还有人试图用它来修复破裂的感情，但是失败了——作为替代，他只能把自己和那对象粘在一起，永不分开。
E: When the Golden Banana Planet split into several pieces due to a forbidden experiment, Dr. Primitive merely chuckled and pulled out the Supreme Glue from his pocket, sticking the planetary fragments back together. No one knew why Dr. Primitive initially invented this overpowered adhesive until one day, while evading Rangers' pursuit, he deliberately scattered some mass-produced Supreme Glue across the universe for passing merchant ships to collect. This genius creation that could "fix anything" instantly caused an uproar across the cosmos. Some used it to build houses, while others installed bombs. One even tried to mend a broken relationship, and when that failed, they settled for gluing themself to their partner, never to part again.

C: 列车碎片纪念牌（休眠）
E: Express Fragment Memorial Plaque (Dormant)

C: 连续进入相同区域时，额外战利品出现的概率大幅提高
E: When successively entering identical Domains, greatly increases the chance for additional treasures to appear.

E: After a <color=#f29e38ff>Fire, Quantum, or Imaginary</color> character consumes a Skill Point, they deal <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> more CRIT DMG, stacking up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> times. Additionally, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> fixed chance to recover <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s), triggering up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s) per turn.

C: 未处于弱点击破状态时承受的削韧值也能够转化为超击破伤害。
E: Toughness Reduction taken when not Weakness Broken can also be converted to Super Break DMG.

C: 击破特攻提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，攻击处于【速效进化】状态的敌方目标时，无视【速效进化】的无法造成暴击效果。
E: Increases Break Effect by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. When attacking enemy targets in the "Rapid Evolution" state, ignores the "Rapid Evolution" effect that prevents attackers from dealing CRIT Hits.

C: 下次行动时回复一定生命值并起身。
E: Restores a certain amount of HP and returns to battle during the next action.

C: 生命计数
E: HP Count

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦，梦主实行一切阴谋的地方——当然，律令所说的话不能尽信。既然阴差阳错来到了这里，想办法获取更多关于梦主的线索吧。
E: The Dream of Gnawing Oak, the place where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes... Of course, the words of the laws can't be taken at face value. Since I've ended up here by a twist of fate, I'll see if I can find more clues about the Dreammaster.

C: 在她们看来，梦主并未倒向「秩序」，可其他的命途又完全无法联想到一起。她们将要展示的证据，恐怕远远超出我的认知。
E: In their eyes, Dreammaster hasn't sided with the Order, yet the other Paths can't be connected in any way. The evidence they're about to present will likely far exceed my understanding.

C: 以黑天鹅将你唤醒作为分界，由于太一之梦的存在，你此后的记忆，都不能再以从前的视角看待。\n为你的记忆，亲自写下开场白吧。
E: Being woken up by Black Swan was a watershed moment. Due to the existence of Ena's Dream, your memories from that point onward can no longer be viewed from the same perspective as before.\nWrite a prologue for your memories.

C: 避免{NICKNAME}沾染虚无
E: Prevent {NICKNAME} from being tainted by Nihility

C: 查看房间里的黑猫
E: Check out the black cat in the room

C: 你到底怎么啦，在翁法罗斯留下后遗症了不成？连花姐都忘了？
E: What's gotten into you? Did Amphoreus give you amnesia? How could you forget about Big Sis Dahlia?

C: 在空间站的时候，是她帮你压制了暴走的星核哎。
E: She was the one who helped you suppress the rampaging Stellaron back at the space station.

C: 放心，我不会做什么出格的事，只是…公事公办？
E: Don't worry. I won't do anything inappropriate. It's just... strictly business?

C: 看来不太愉快，别怕…刚开始的时候，混乱是常态。
E: Seems like a rough start. Don't worry... chaos is pretty normal in the beginning.

C: 先别乱动，会疼得厉害。
E: Don't move yet. It's going to hurt real bad.

C: 这里有「同谐」令使？
E: Is there an Emanator of the Harmony here?

C: 与你的「记忆」…全然不符的过去。
E: Into a past... utterly at odds with the "memories" you hold.

C: 总觉得，场面越来越混乱了。
E: I feel like things are getting more and more chaotic.

C: 那时，我也同样在场。
E: I was there at that time too.

C: 你的过去，又与这里产生了多深的关联？
E: How deeply is your past intertwined with this place?

C: …小心！附近有危险的气息。
E: ...Watch out! A dangerous presence lurks nearby.

C: 泯灭帮，那群遇见你后便不知去向的亡命徒…他们究竟经历了什么？让我来揭示吧。
E: The Annihilation Gang, that band of desperadoes who all disappeared after meeting you... What exactly happened to them? Well, let me reveal all.

C: 我们怀疑，那就是他力量不及以往的原因。也因此，他才对外声称自己抱恙在身。
E: We suspect that's why his powers aren't what they used to be. And that's why he's been telling everyone he's under the weather.

C: 我将以你的{RUBY_B#命途}残躯{RUBY_E#}，为「永恒乐园」奠基。
E: Your {RUBY_B#Path}remains{RUBY_E#} shall become the foundation for "Eternal Paradise."

C: …是幡然醒悟，亲爱的，你永远不会懂的。还是谈谈眼下的正事吧，你不惜受制于梦主，是想从他身上得到什么？
E: ...It's an epiphany, dear. Something you'll never understand. Let's talk about what's really important here: what are you hoping to get from the Dreammaster that made you willing to submit to his control?

C: 不是吧…银狼一次都没提到过我？可是她主动邀请我搭伙的。<color=#dbc291ff>家族能在美梦里全知全能，还是我找到的情报。</color>想赖账？
E: No way... Silver Wolf never mentioned me? But she's the one who invited me to team up. <color=#dbc291ff>The Family's omnipotence in the sweet dream — that was my intel.</color> Now you all are going back on your word?

C: 除非有位善良的忆者伸出援手，是吗？
E: Unless a kind Memokeeper lends a helping hand, right?

C: 感谢你的坦诚。
E: Thank you for your openness.

C: 用「繁育」为永恒乐园奠基…那时候他的意思是……
E: Using the Propagation to lay the foundation for an eternal paradise... So what he meant was...

C: 这一幕好像似曾相识…
E: The déjà vu is strong with this scene...

C: 在你那样做之后…入梦者会怎么样？
E: What's gonna happen to the dreamers... once the bombs go off?

C: 或许他们永远不会理解彼此，但人们需要的从来不是理解，而是在他人选择的生存方式面前，多一点点体谅，必要时，也伸出援手——
E: Perhaps they'll never truly understand each other, but what people need isn't understanding. It's showing a little more compassion for the way others choose to live, and when necessary, extending a helping hand...

C: …什么？
E: ...What?

C: 所以，我不会再介意任何缺陷，不怕再添任何伤痕，我会拼尽全力，找到所爱之物，不让它们被命运夺走。所以……
E: So, I won't mind any flaws anymore. I won't fear any new scars. I'll give it my all to find what I love, and I won't let destiny take them away. So...

C: 再见，流萤。
E: Goodbye, Firefly.

C: 人群喧闹起来，烟火将要开始了——
E: The crowd buzzes with excitement and the fireworks are about to light up the sky...
